492.yw_zh: 通过崇拜半神人，苦修苦练，调息练习，同情怜悯，在圣地沐浴，遵守严格的誓言，乐善好施，吟诵各种曼陀，人的心意无法获得当无穷无尽的人格首神显现在一个人的内心所产生的那种绝对净化。
492.yw_en: By one’s engaging in the processes of demigod worship, austerities, breath control, compassion, bathing in holy places, strict vows, charity and chanting of various mantras, one’s mind cannot attain the same absolute purification as that achieved when the unlimited Personality of Godhead appears within one’s heart.

492.ldw:
tasmāt sarvātmanā rājan
 hṛdi-sthaṁ kuru keśavam
mriyamāṇo hy avahitas
 tato yāsi parāṁ gatim|
492.ldw_fc: tasmāt ; sarva-ātmanā ; rājan ; hṛdi-stham ; kuru ; keśavam ; mriyamāṇaḥ ; hi ; avahitaḥ ; tataḥ ; yāsi ; parām ; gatim
492.words_en_fc: therefore; with all endeavor; O King; within your heart; make; Lord Keśava; dying; indeed; concentrated; then; you will go; to the supreme; destination.
492.yw_zh: 因此，王啊，全力以赴使至尊主凯沙瓦驻留在你的内心。始终如此全神贯注于主，死亡时，你必到达至高无上的目的地。
492.yw_en: Therefore, O King, endeavor with all your might to fix the Supreme Lord Keśava within your heart. Maintain this concentration upon the Lord, and at the time of death you will certainly attain the supreme destination.
492.yz_zh: 虽然至尊主始终在众生的心中，但诗文hrdi-stham kuru kesavam指明，人应该努力认识到主的临在，每时每刻保持这样的觉悟。帕瑞克西特•玛哈茹阿吉即将离开尘世，正从他的灵性导师舒卡戴瓦•勾斯瓦米那里接受最后的教导。在国王将要辞世的情况下，这节诗具有特殊深意。
492.yz_en: Although the Supreme Lord is always in the heart of every living being, the words hṛdi-sthaṁ kuru keśavam indicate that one should endeavor to realize the Lord’s presence there and maintain this awareness at every moment. Parīkṣit Mahārāja is about to give up this world and is receiving final instructions from his spiritual master, Śukadeva Gosvāmī. In the context of the King’s imminent departure, this verse has special significance.

492.ldw:
mriyamāṇair abhidhyeyo
 bhagavān parameśvaraḥ
ātma-bhāvaṁ nayaty aṅga
 sarvātmā sarva-saṁśrayaḥ|
492.ldw_fc: mriyamāṇaiḥ ; abhidhyeyaḥ ; bhagavān ; parama-īśvaraḥ ; ātma-bhāvam ; nayati ; aṅga ; sarva-ātmā ; sarva-saṁśrayaḥ
492.words_en_fc: by those who are dying; meditated upon; the Personality of Godhead; the Supreme Lord; their own true identity; leads them to; my dear King; the Supreme Soul; the shelter of all beings.
492.yw_zh: 我亲爱的王，人格首神乃是终极控制者。他就是至尊灵魂，众生的至尊庇护所。当垂死之人专心冥想他，他便向他们提示他们自身的永恒灵性身份。
492.yw_en: My dear King, the Personality of Godhead is the ultimate controller. He is the Supreme Soul and the supreme shelter of all beings. When meditated upon by those about to die, He reveals to them their own eternal spiritual identity.

492.ldw:
kaler doṣa-nidhe rājann
 asti hy eko mahān guṇaḥ
kīrtanād eva kṛṣṇasya
 mukta-saṅgaḥ paraṁ vrajet|
492.ldw_fc: kaleḥ ; doṣa-nidheḥ ; rājan ; asti ; hi ; ekaḥ ; mahān ; guṇaḥ ; kīrtanāt ; eva ; kṛṣṇasya ; mukta-saṅgaḥ ; param ; vrajet
492.words_en_fc: of the Age of Kali; in the ocean of faults; O King; there is; certainly; one; very great; good quality; by chanting; certainly; of the holy name of Kṛṣṇa; liberated from material bondage; to the transcendental spiritual kingdom; one can go.
492.yw_zh: 我亲爱的王，尽管卡历-尤嘎是错误的海洋，但这个年代仍有一个非常伟大的好品质：仅凭唱颂哈瑞奎师那玛哈-曼陀，就能逐渐超脱物质束缚，晋升至超然的国度。
492.yw_en: My dear King, although Kali-yuga is an ocean of faults, there is still one good quality about this age: Simply by chanting the Hare Kṛṣṇa mahā-mantra, one can become free from material bondage and be promoted to the transcendental kingdom.
492.yz_zh: 在说过这个卡历年代错误擢发难数之后，舒卡戴瓦•勾斯瓦米现在谈起它的一个杰出品质。正像孔武有力的国王能—举消灭无数盗贼，一项光辉的灵性品质就能摧毁这个年代的一切污染。唱颂哈瑞奎师那，哈瑞奎师那，奎师那奎师那，哈瑞哈瑞/哈瑞茹阿玛，哈瑞茹阿玛，茹阿玛茹阿玛，哈瑞哈瑞的重要性难以估量，尤其是在这个堕落的年代。
492.yz_en: After mentioning the innumerable faults of this Age of Kali, Śukadeva Gosvāmī now mentions its one brilliant aspect. Just as one powerful king can kill innumerable thieves, one brilliant spiritual quality can destroy all the contamination of this age. It is impossible to overestimate the importance of chanting Hare Kṛṣṇa, Hare Kṛṣṇa, Kṛṣṇa Kṛṣṇa, Hare Hare/ Hare Rāma, Hare Rāma, Rāma Rāma, Hare Hare, especially in this fallen age.

492.ldw:
kṛte yad dhyāyato viṣṇuṁ
 tretāyāṁ yajato makhaiḥ
dvāpare paricaryāyāṁ
 kalau tad dhari-kīrtanāt|
492.ldw_fc: kṛte ; yat ; dhyāyataḥ ; viṣṇum ; tretāyām ; yajataḥ ; makhaiḥ ; dvāpare ; paricaryāyām ; kalau ; tat ; hari-kīrtanāt
492.words_en_fc: in the Satya-yuga; which; from meditation; on Lord Viṣṇu; in the Tretā-yuga; from worshiping; by performing sacrifices; in the age of Dvāpara; by worshiping the lotus feet of Kṛṣṇa; in the Age of Kali; that same result (can be achieved); simply by chanting the Hare Kṛṣṇa mahā-mantra.
492.yw_zh: 在萨提亚-尤嘎通过冥想维施努，在特瑞塔-尤嘎通过施行祭祀，在杜瓦帕尔-尤嘎通过侍奉主莲花足所取得的一切成果，在卡历-尤嘎仅凭唱颂哈瑞奎师那玛哈-曼陀即能获得。
492.yw_en: Whatever result was obtained in Satya-yuga by meditating on Viṣṇu, in Tretā-yuga by performing sacrifices, and in Dvāpara-yuga by serving the Lord’s lotus feet can be obtained in Kali-yuga simply by chanting the Hare Kṛṣṇa mahā-mantra.
492.yz_zh:
在（维施努•普然那》（6.2.17)，《帕德玛•普然那》（乌塔尔-康达72.25)和《布瑞翰-纳茹阿迪亚•普然那》(38.97)中，有如下类似的诗节：

dhyayan krte yajan yajnais

tretayam dvapare rcayan

yad apnoti tad apnoti

kalau sankirtya kesavam

“在萨提亚-尤嘎通过冥想，在特瑞塔-尤嘎通过施行祭祀，在杜瓦桕尔-尤嘎通过崇拜主奎师那的莲花足所取得的一切，在卡历年代仅凭荣耀主凯沙瓦的圣名便能获得。”

关于在卡历-尤嘎人们的堕落境况。施瑞拉•吉瓦•勾斯瓦米还进一步引述了《布茹阿玛-外瓦尔塔 普然那》：

atah kalau tapo-yoga

vidya-yajnadikah kriyah

sanga bhavanti nakrtah

kusalair api dehibhih

“因此，在卡历年代，即便最老练的体困灵魂也不正确地从事苦行，做瑜伽冥想，崇拜神像，施行祭祀以及相关的各种辅助活动。”

关于在这个年代唱颂哈瑞奎师那的必要性，施瑞拉•吉瓦•勾斯瓦米还引述了《斯康达 普然那》的恰图尔玛夏-玛哈特密亚：

tatha caivottamam loke

tapah sri-hari-kirtanam

kalau yuge visesena

visnu-prityai samacaret

“如此，在这世上，所做的最完美的苦行便是唱颂主施瑞哈尔依的圣名。尤其在卡历年代，从事桑克依尔坦便能满足至尊主维施努。”

总之，应该向全世界广泛传播主的圣名，引导人们唱颂哈瑞奎师那曼卓，如此，人类社会才能获得救赎，脱离危险的卡历年代之洋。
492.yz_en:
A similar verse is found in the Viṣṇu Purāṇa (6.2.17), and also in the Padma Purāṇa (Uttara-khaṇḍa 72.25) and the Bṛhan-nāradīya Purāṇa (38.97):

dhyāyan kṛte yajan yajñais
 tretāyāṁ dvāpare ’rcayan
yad āpnoti tad āpnoti
 kalau saṅkīrtya keśavam

“Whatever is achieved by meditation in Satya-yuga, by the performance of sacrifice in Tretā-yuga, and by the worship of Lord Kṛṣṇa’s lotus feet in Dvāpara-yuga is obtained in the Age of Kali simply by glorifying the name of Lord Keśava.”

Śrīla Jīva Gosvāmī has further quoted from the Brahma-vaivarta Purāṇa concerning the degraded condition of people in Kali-yuga:

ataḥ kalau tapo-yoga-
 vidyā-yajñādikāḥ kriyāḥ
sāṅgā bhavanti na kṛtāḥ
 kuśalair api dehibhiḥ

“Thus in the Age of Kali the practices of austerity, yoga meditation, Deity worship, sacrifice and so on, along with their various subsidiary functions, are not properly carried out, even by the most expert embodied souls.”

Śrīla Jīva Gosvāmī has also cited the Cāturmāsya-māhātmya of the Skanda Purāṇa concerning the necessity of chanting Hare Kṛṣṇa in this age:

tathā caivottamaṁ loke
 tapaḥ śrī-hari-kīrtanam
kalau yuge viśeṣeṇa
 viṣṇu-prītyai samācaret

“In this way the most perfect penance to be executed in this world is the chanting of the name of Lord Śrī Hari. Especially in the Age of Kali, one can satisfy the Supreme Lord Viṣṇu by performing saṅkīrtana.”

In conclusion, massive propaganda should be made all over the world to induce people to chant the Hare Kṛṣṇa mantra, by which human society can be rescued from the dangerous ocean of the Age of Kali.

Thus end the purports of the humble servants of His Divine Grace A.C. Bhaktivedanta Swami Prabhupāda to the Twelfth Canto, Third Chapter, of the Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam, entitled “The Bhūmi-gītā.”

493.ldw:
śrī-śuka uvāca|kālas te paramāṇv-ādir
 dvi-parārdhāvadhir nṛpa
kathito yuga-mānaṁ ca
 śṛṇu kalpa-layāv api|
493.ldw_fc: śrī-śukaḥ uvāca ; kālaḥ ; te ; parama-aṇu ; ādiḥ ; dvi-para-ardha ; avadhiḥ ; nṛpa ; kathitaḥ ; yuga-mānam ; ca ; śṛṇu ; kalpa ; layau ; api
493.words_en_fc: Śrī Śukadeva Gosvāmī said; time; to you; (the smallest fraction of time measured in terms of) the indivisible atom; beginning with; the two halves of Brahmā’s total life span; culminating in; O King Parīkṣit; has been described; the duration of the millennia; and; now hear; Brahmā’s day; annihilation; also.
493.yw_zh: 舒卡戴瓦·哥斯瓦米说：我亲爱的王，我已向你讲述过时长，从以单个原子的运动来测度的最小时长开始，上至主布茹阿玛的一生。我还论及了宇宙历史中不同年代的时长。现在，请好好听布茹阿玛的一天和毁灭过程有多长。
493.yw_en: Śukadeva Gosvāmī said: My dear King, I have already described to you the measurements of time, beginning from the smallest fraction measured by the movement of a single atom up to the total life span of Lord Brahmā. I have also discussed the measurement of the different millennia of universal history. Now hear about the time of Brahmā’s day and the process of annihilation.

493.ldw:
catur-yuga-sahasraṁ tu
 brahmaṇo dinam ucyate
sa kalpo yatra manavaś
 caturdaśa viśām-pate|
493.ldw_fc: catuḥ-yuga ; sahasram ; tu ; brahmaṇaḥ ; dinam ; ucyate ; saḥ ; kalpaḥ ; yatra ; manavaḥ ; caturdaśa ; viśām-pate
493.words_en_fc: four ages; one thousand; indeed; of Lord Brahmā; the day; is said; that; a kalpa; in which; original progenitors of mankind; fourteen; O King.
493.yw_zh: 四个年代的一千次循环等于布茹阿玛的一个白天，即一个考帕。国王陛下啊，在那期间，十四位玛努相继显现隐没。
493.yw_en: One thousand cycles of four ages constitute a single day of Brahmā, known as a kalpa. In that period, O King, fourteen Manus come and go.

493.ldw:
tad-ante pralayas tāvān
 brāhmī rātrir udāhṛtā
trayo lokā ime tatra
 kalpante pralayāya hi|
493.ldw_fc: tat-ante ; pralayaḥ ; tāvān ; brāhmī ; rātriḥ ; udāhṛtā ; trayaḥ ; lokāḥ ; ime ; tatra ; kalpante ; pralayāya ; hi
493.words_en_fc: after those (thousand cycles of ages); the annihilation; of the same duration; of Brahmā; the nighttime; is described; the three; worlds; these; at that time; are prone; to annihilation; indeed.
493.yw_zh: 在布茹阿玛的一个白天之后，毁灭发生在他的黑夜，而他的一夜之长等于他的一个白昼。在那时，所有三个星系遭遇毁灭。
493.yw_en: After one day of Brahmā, annihilation occurs during his night, which is of the same duration. At that time all the three planetary systems are subject to destruction.

493.ldw:
eṣa naimittikaḥ proktaḥ
 pralayo yatra viśva-sṛk
śete ’nantāsano viśvam
 ātmasāt-kṛtya cātma-bhūḥ|
493.ldw_fc: eṣaḥ ; naimittikaḥ ; proktaḥ ; pralayaḥ ; yatra ; viśva-sṛk ; śete ; ananta-āsanaḥ ; viśvam ; ātma-sāt-kṛtya ; ca ; ātma-bhūḥ
493.words_en_fc: this; occasional; is said; annihilation; in which; the creator of the universe, the Supreme Lord, Nārāyaṇa; lies down; upon the snake-bed of Ananta Śeṣa; the universe; absorbing within Himself; also; Lord Brahmā.
493.yw_zh: 这便叫做临时毁灭，在此期间，原初创造者主纳茹阿央纳躺在阿南塔·蛇床上，将整个宇宙吸入他体内，那时，主布茹阿玛安然入睡。
493.yw_en: This is called the naimittika, or occasional, annihilation, during which the original creator, Lord Nārāyaṇa, lies down upon the bed of Ananta Śeṣa and absorbs the entire universe within Himself while Lord Brahmā sleeps.

493.ldw:
dvi-parārdhe tv atikrānte
 brahmaṇaḥ parameṣṭhinaḥ
tadā prakṛtayaḥ sapta
 kalpante pralayāya vai|
493.ldw_fc: dvi-parārdhe ; tu ; atikrānte ; brahmaṇaḥ ; parame-sthinaḥ ; tadā ; prakṛtayaḥ ; sapta ; kalpante ; pralayāya ; vai
493.words_en_fc: two parārdhas; and; when they have become completed; of Lord Brahmā; the most highly situated living entity; then; the elements of nature; seven; are subject; to destruction; indeed.
493.yw_zh: 当最超卓的受造物主布茹阿玛的一生完结，七大基本创造元素便遭毁灭。
493.yw_en: When the two halves of the lifetime of Lord Brahmā, the most elevated created being, are complete, the seven basic elements of creation are annihilated.

493.ldw:
eṣa prākṛtiko rājan
 pralayo yatra līyate
aṇḍa-koṣas tu saṅghāto
 vighāta upasādite|
493.ldw_fc: eṣaḥ ; prākṛtikaḥ ; rājan ; pralayaḥ ; yatra ; līyate ; aṇḍa-koṣaḥ ; tu ; saṅghātaḥ ; vighāte ; upasādite
493.words_en_fc: this; of the elements of material nature; O King Parīkṣit; the annihilation; in which; is dissolved; the egg of the universe; and; the amalgamation; the cause of its disruption; being encountered.
493.yw_zh: 国王陛下啊，在物质元素毁灭时，宇宙蛋，即创造元素的集合体，横遭瓦解。
493.yw_en: O King, upon the annihilation of the material elements, the universal egg, comprising the elemental amalgamation of creation, is confronted with destruction.
493.yz_zh: 舒卡戴瓦•勾斯瓦米，帕瑞克西特王的灵性导师，在他的门徒瀕临死亡时详细论述宇宙毁灭，这是极具深意的。通过专心聆听宇宙毁灭史，能易于理解在整个浩瀚无际的物质展示中，人告别这短暂的世界实在是微不足惜。作为一位完美的灵性导师，舒卡戴瓦•勾斯瓦米对神的创造深刻而贴切的论述，使他的门徒为死亡那一刻做好充分准备。
493.yz_en: It is significant that Śukadeva Gosvāmī, the spiritual master of King Parīkṣit, is broadly discussing cosmic annihilation just before the death of his disciple. By attentively hearing the story of universal destruction, one can easily understand one’s personal departure from this temporary world to be an insignificant incident within the gigantic scope of the total material manifestation. By his deep and relevant discussions of the creation of God, Śukadeva Gosvāmī, as an ideal spiritual master, is preparing his disciple for the moment of death.

493.ldw:
parjanyaḥ śata-varṣāṇi
 bhūmau rājan na varṣati
tadā niranne hy anyonyaṁ
 bhakṣyamāṇāḥ kṣudhārditāḥ
kṣayaṁ yāsyanti śanakaiḥ
 kālenopadrutāḥ prajāḥ|
493.ldw_fc: parjanyaḥ ; śata-varṣāṇi ; bhūmau ; rājan ; na varṣati ; tadā ; niranne ; hi ; anyonyam ; bhakṣyamāṇāḥ ; kṣudhā ; arditāḥ ; kṣayam ; yāsyanti ; śanakaiḥ ; kālena ; upadrutāḥ ; prajāḥ
493.words_en_fc: the clouds; for one hundred years; upon the earth; my dear King; will not give rain; then; with the coming of famine; indeed; one another; eating; by hunger; distressed; to destruction; they go; gradually; by the force of time; confounded; the people.
493.yw_zh: 国王陛下啊，当毁灭逼近，地球上将连续一百年滴雨不降。久旱之后，饥荒接踵而至，饥饿的百姓会互相吞食，这是确凿的事实。地球居民在时间力量的作用下迷茫失措，逐渐被毁灭殆尽。
493.yw_en: As annihilation approaches, O King, there will be no rain upon the earth for one hundred years. Drought will lead to famine, and the starving populace will literally consume one another. The inhabitants of the earth, bewildered by the force of time, will gradually be destroyed.

493.ldw:
sāmudraṁ daihikaṁ bhaumaṁ
 rasaṁ sāṁvartako raviḥ
raśmibhiḥ pibate ghoraiḥ
 sarvaṁ naiva vimuñcati|
493.ldw_fc: sāmudram ; daihikam ; bhaumam ; rasam ; sāṁvartakaḥ ; raviḥ ; raśmibhiḥ ; pibate ; ghoraiḥ ; sarvam ; na ; eva ; vimuñcati
493.words_en_fc: of the ocean; of living bodies; of the earth; the juice; annihilating; the sun; with its rays; drinks up; which are terrible; all; nothing; even; gives.
493.yw_zh: 太阳将以其毁灭性的模样，用它可怕的炽烈光线吸干一切江河海洋和众生与大地的水分。但是，具有毁灭威力的太阳则不会回以雨水。
493.yw_en: The sun in its annihilating form will drink up with its terrible rays all the water of the ocean, of living bodies and of the earth itself. But the devastating sun will not give any rain in return.

493.ldw:
tataḥ saṁvartako vahniḥ
 saṅkarṣaṇa-mukhotthitaḥ
dahaty anila-vegotthaḥ
 śūnyān bhū-vivarān atha|
493.ldw_fc: tataḥ ; saṁvartakaḥ ; vahniḥ ; saṅkarṣaṇa ; mukha ; utthitaḥ ; dahati ; anila-vega ; utthaḥ ; śūnyān ; bhū ; vivarān ; atha
493.words_en_fc: then; of destruction; the fire; of the Supreme Lord, Saṅkarṣaṇa; from the mouth; arisen; burns; by the force of the wind; raised; empty; of the planets; the crevices; after that.
493.yw_zh: 接着，巨大的毁灭之火将从主桑卡尔珊口中喷射出来。这烈火会被飓风席卷着燃烧整个宇宙，烤焦没有生气的宇宙之壳。
493.yw_en: Next the great fire of annihilation will flare up from the mouth of Lord Saṅkarṣaṇa. Carried by the mighty force of the wind, this fire will burn throughout the universe, scorching the lifeless cosmic shell.

493.ldw:
upary adhaḥ samantāc ca
 śikhābhir vahni-sūryayoḥ
dahyamānaṁ vibhāty aṇḍaṁ
 dagdha-gomaya-piṇḍa-vat|
493.ldw_fc: upari ; adhaḥ ; samantāt ; ca ; śikhābhiḥ ; vahni ; sūryayoḥ ; dahyamānam ; vibhāti ; aṇḍam ; dagdha ; go-maya ; piṇḍa-vat
493.words_en_fc: above; and below; in all directions; and; with the flames; of the fire; and of the sun; being burned; glows; the egg of the universe; burned; of cow dung; like a ball.
493.yw_zh: 所有方向都在燃烧——上有似火的骄阳，下有主桑卡尔珊喷射的烈火——宇宙蛋赤红得像熊熊燃烧的牛粪球。
493.yw_en: Burned from all sides — from above by the blazing sun and from below by the fire of Lord Saṅkarṣaṇa — the universal sphere will glow like a burning ball of cow dung.

493.ldw:
tataḥ pracaṇḍa-pavano
 varṣāṇām adhikaṁ śatam
paraḥ sāṁvartako vāti
 dhūmraṁ khaṁ rajasāvṛtam|

493.words_en_fc: then; terrible; a wind; of years; more than; one hundred; great; causing annihilation; blows; gray; the sky; with dust; covered.
493.yw_zh: 骇人恐怖的毁灭狂风会连续猛刮一百多年，沙尘四处飞扬，天空黯然惨淡。
493.yw_en: A great and terrible wind of destruction will begin to blow for more than one hundred years, and the sky, covered with dust, will turn gray.

493.ldw:
tato megha-kulāny aṅga
 citra varṇāny anekaśaḥ
śataṁ varṣāṇi varṣanti
 nadanti rabhasa-svanaiḥ|
