493.words_en_fc: then; the clouds; my dear King; of various colors; numerous; one hundred; years; they pour down rain; they thunder; with tremendous sounds.
493.yw_zh: 国王陛下啊，然后，五颜六色的云层滚滚翻动，呼啸着发出可怕的轰隆雷鸣，继而连续一百年倾泻瓢泼大雨。
493.yw_en: After that, O King, groups of multicolored clouds will gather, roaring terribly with thunder, and will pour down floods of rain for one hundred years.

493.ldw:
tata ekodakaṁ viśvaṁ
 brahmāṇḍa-vivarāntaram|
493.ldw_fc: tataḥ ; eka-udakam ; viśvam ; brahma-aṇḍa ; vivara-antaram
493.words_en_fc: then; a single body of water; the universe; of the egg of creation; within.
493.yw_zh: 那时，宇宙蛋满溢着水，形成巨大的汪洋。
493.yw_en: At that time, the shell of the universe will fill up with water, forming a single cosmic ocean.

493.ldw:
tadā bhūmer gandha-guṇaṁ
 grasanty āpa uda-plave
grasta-gandhā tu pṛthivī
 pralayatvāya kalpate|
493.ldw_fc: tadā ; bhūmeḥ ; gandha-guṇam ; grasanti ; āpaḥ ; uda-plave ; grasta-gandhā ; tu ; pṛthivī ; pralayatvāya kalpate
493.words_en_fc: then; of the earth; the perceptible quality of fragrance; takes away; the water; during the flooding; deprived of its fragrance; and; the element earth; becomes unmanifest.
493.yw_zh: 当整个宇宙被洪水淹没，大水将夺去土地独特的芳香，土元素将丧失其显著的特质，逐渐分化溶解。
493.yw_en: As the entire universe is flooded, the water will rob the earth of its unique quality of fragrance, and the element earth, deprived of its distinguishing quality, will be dissolved.
493.yz_zh: 正如整部《圣典博伽瓦谭》淸晰阐明，第一元索，天空，拥有独特的声音。随着创造逐步扩展，第二元素，空气，逐渐形成，继而拥有声音和触感。第三元素，火，拥有声音、触感和形状，第四元素，水，拥有声音、触感、形状和味道。主拥有声音、触感、形状、味道和气味。当毎种元素失去其显著的特质，自然会变得跟比较精微的元素没有不同，从而实际上瓦解成—个独特的实体。
493.yz_en: As clearly explained throughout Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam, the first element, sky, possesses the unique quality of sound. As creation expands, the second element, air, comes into being, and it possesses sound and touch. The third element, fire, possesses sound, touch and form, and the fourth element, water, possesses sound, touch, form and flavor. The earth possesses sound, touch, form, flavor and aroma. As each element loses its unique distinguishing quality, it naturally becomes indistinguishable from the more subtle elements and is thus effectively dissolved as a unique entity.

493.ldw:
apāṁ rasam atho tejas
 tā līyante ’tha nīrasāḥ
grasate tejaso rūpaṁ
 vāyus tad-rahitaṁ tadā|līyate cānile tejo
 vāyoḥ khaṁ grasate guṇam
sa vai viśati khaṁ rājaṁs
 tataś ca nabhaso guṇam|śabdaṁ grasati bhūtādir
 nabhas tam anu līyate
taijasaś cendriyāṇy aṅga
 devān vaikāriko guṇaiḥ|mahān grasaty ahaṅkāraṁ
 guṇāḥ sattvādayaś ca tam
grasate ’vyākṛtaṁ rājan
 guṇān kālena coditam|na tasya kālāvayavaiḥ
 pariṇāmādayo guṇāḥ
anādy anantam avyaktaṁ
 nityaṁ kāraṇam avyayam|
493.ldw_fc: apām ; rasam ; atha ; tejaḥ ; tāḥ ; līyante ; atha ; nīrasāḥ ; grasate ; tejasaḥ ; rūpam ; vāyuḥ ; tat-rahitam ; tadā ; līyate ; ca ; anile ; tejaḥ ; vāyoḥ ; kham ; grasate ; guṇam ; saḥ ; vai ; viśati ; kham ; rājan ; tataḥ ; ca ; nabhasaḥ ; guṇam ; śabdam ; grasati ; bhūta-ādiḥ ; nabhaḥ ; tam ; anu ; līyate ; taijasaḥ ; ca ; indriyāṇi ; aṅga ; devān ; vaikārikaḥ ; guṇaiḥ ; mahān ; grasati ; ahaṅkāram ; guṇāḥ ; sattva-ādayaḥ ; ca ; tam ; grasate ; avyākṛtam ; rājan ; guṇān ; kālena ; coditam ; na ; tasya ; kāla ; avayavaiḥ ; pariṇāma-ādayaḥ ; guṇāḥ ; anādi ; anantam ; avyaktam ; nityam ; kāraṇam ; avyayam
493.words_en_fc: of water; the taste; then; fire; that water; dissolves; after this; deprived of its quality of taste; takes away; of fire; the form; the air; deprived of that form; then; merges; and; in wind; fire; of the air; the ether; takes away; the perceptible quality (touch); that air; indeed; enters; the ether; O King Parīkṣit; thereupon; and; of the ether; the quality; sound; takes away; the element of false ego in the mode of ignorance; the ether; into that false ego; subsequently; merges; false ego in the mode of passion; and; the senses; my dear King; the demigods; false ego in the mode of goodness; along with the manifest functions (of false ego); the mahat-tattva; seizes; false ego; the basic modes of nature; goodness, passion and ignorance; and; that mahat; seizes; the unmanifest original form of nature; O King; the three modes; by time; impelled; there are not; of that unmanifest nature; of time; by the segments; transformation and the other changes of visible matter (creation, growth and so on); such qualities; without beginning; without end; unmanifest; eternal; the cause; infallible.
493.yw_zh: 火元素拿走水元素的味道，水元素因丧失独有的物质，即味道，便融入火中。空气夺走火元素固有的物质，形状，于是火元素失去其形状而融入空气中。以太元素拿走空气的特质，即触感，继而融入到以太中。就这样，国王陛下啊，处在愚昧属性中的假自我夺去以太的特质，声音，之后，以太融入到假自我中。处在激情属性中的假自我左右感官，而处在善良属性中的假自我吞噬半神人。接着，整个玛哈·塔特瓦拿走假自我及其各种活动，而mahat被三种基本自然属性——善良、激情和愚昧属性拿走。我亲爱的帕瑞克西特王，然后，这些属性在时间的驱使下，被原始而未展示的自然形象吞没。那未展示的自然不受制于因时间的影响而引发的六种变化。恰相反，它既没有开始，也没有结束。它乃是创造的未展示的、永恒的且绝对可靠的原因。
493.yw_en: The element fire then seizes the taste from the element water, which, deprived of its unique quality, taste, merges into fire. Air seizes the form inherent in fire, and then fire, deprived of form, merges into air. The element ether seizes the quality of air, namely touch, and that air enters into ether. Then, O King, false ego in ignorance seizes sound, the quality of ether, after which ether merges into false ego. False ego in the mode of passion takes hold of the senses, and false ego in the mode of goodness absorbs the demigods. Then the total mahat-tattva seizes false ego along with its various functions, and that mahat is seized by the three basic modes of nature — goodness, passion and ignorance. My dear King Parīkṣit, these modes are further overtaken by the original unmanifest form of nature, impelled by time. That unmanifest nature is not subject to the six kinds of transformation caused by the influence of time. Rather, it has no beginning and no end. It is the unmanifest, eternal and infallible cause of creation.

493.ldw:
na yatra vāco na mano na sattvaṁ
 tamo rajo vā mahad-ādayo ’mī
na prāṇa-buddhīndriya-devatā vā
 na sanniveśaḥ khalu loka-kalpaḥ|na svapna-jāgran na ca tat suṣuptaṁ
 na khaṁ jalaṁ bhūr anilo ’gnir arkaḥ
saṁsupta-vac chūnya-vad apratarkyaṁ
 tan mūla-bhūtaṁ padam āmananti|
493.ldw_fc: na ; yatra ; vācaḥ ; na ; manaḥ ; na ; sattvam ; tamaḥ ; rajaḥ ; vā ; mahat ; ādayaḥ ; amī ; na ; prāṇa ; buddhi ; indriya ; devatāḥ ; vā ; na ; sanniveśaḥ ; khalu ; loka-kalpaḥ ; na ; svapna ; jāgrat ; na ; ca ; tat ; suṣuptam ; na ; kham ; jalam ; bhūḥ ; anilaḥ ; agniḥ ; arkaḥ ; saṁsupta-vat ; śūnya-vat ; apratarkyam ; tat ; mūla-bhūtam ; padam ; āmananti
493.words_en_fc: not; wherein; speech; not; the mind; not; the mode of goodness; the mode of ignorance; the mode of passion; or; the mahat-tattva; and so on; these elements; not; the vital air; intelligence; the senses; and the controlling demigods; or; not; the particular construction; indeed; of the arrangement of the planetary systems; not; sleep; waking condition; not; and; that; deep sleep; not; ether; water; earth; air; fire; the sun; like one who is fast asleep; like a void; inaccessible to logic; that pradhāna; serving as the basis; the substance; great authorities say.
493.yw_zh: 物质自然未展示的状态叫做pradhana，那里没有言语的表达，没有心意，没有始于mahat的精微元素的展示，也没有善良、激情和愚昧属性。那里没有生命之气和智性，也没有任何感官和半神人。那里没有一目了然的星系排列，也没有呈现出知觉的不同状态——睡眠、醒觉和深度睡眠状态。那里也没有以太、水、土、空气、火和太阳。情形就像酣睡或空的状态。的的确确，真是难以名状。然而，灵性科学的权威们解释说，既然pradhana是本源体，那么，它就是物质创造的基础。
493.yw_en: In the unmanifest stage of material nature, called pradhāna, there is no expression of words, no mind and no manifestation of the subtle elements beginning from the mahat, nor are there the modes of goodness, passion and ignorance. There is no life air or intelligence, nor any senses or demigods. There is no definite arrangement of planetary systems, nor are there present the different stages of consciousness — sleep, wakefulness and deep sleep. There is no ether, water, earth, air, fire or sun. The situation is just like that of complete sleep, or of voidness. Indeed, it is indescribable. Authorities in spiritual science explain, however, that since pradhāna is the original substance, it is the actual basis of material creation.

493.ldw:
layaḥ prākṛtiko hy eṣa
 puruṣāvyaktayor yadā
śaktayaḥ sampralīyante
 vivaśāḥ kāla-vidrutāḥ|
493.ldw_fc: layaḥ ; prākṛtikaḥ ; hi ; eṣaḥ ; puruṣa ; avyaktayoḥ ; yadā ; śaktayaḥ ; sampralīyante ; vivaśāḥ ; kāla ; vidrutāḥ
493.words_en_fc: the annihilation; of the material elements; indeed; this; of the Supreme Lord; and of His material nature in its unmanifest form; when; the energies; merge totally; helpless; by time; disarrayed.
493.yw_zh: 这就是物质元素的毁灭，在那期间，属于至尊之人的各种能量和他的未展示的物质自然被时间力量瓦解，丧失它们的力量，全融合在一起。
493.yw_en: This is the annihilation called prākṛtika, during which the energies belonging to the Supreme Person and His unmanifest material nature, disassembled by the force of time, are deprived of their potencies and merge together totally.

493.ldw:
buddhīndriyārtha-rūpeṇa
 jñānaṁ bhāti tad-āśrayam
dṛśyatvāvyatirekābhyām
 ādy-antavad avastu yat|
493.ldw_fc: buddhi ; indriya ; artha ; rūpeṇa ; jñānam ; bhāti ; tat ; āśrayam ; dṛśyatva ; avyatirekābhyām ; ādi-anta-vat ; avastu ; yat
493.words_en_fc: of intelligence; the senses; and the objects of perception; in the form; the Absolute Truth; manifests; of these elements; the basis; because of being perceived; and because of being nondifferent from its own cause; which has a beginning and an end; is insubstantial; whatever.
493.yw_zh: 正是绝对真理本身以智性、感官和感官对象的形式展示着，并且是它们的终极基础。凡有始有终的一切均是有限的感官所感知的对象，并且跟其自身的原因别无二致，故而全非真相。
493.yw_en: It is the Absolute Truth alone who manifests in the forms of intelligence, the senses and the objects of sense perception, and who is their ultimate basis. Whatever has a beginning and an end is insubstantial because of being an object perceived by limited senses and because of being nondifferent from its own cause.
493.yz_zh: 梵文词drsyatva表明，籍着至尊主的力量，一切精微与粗糙的物质展示才是可见的，然后，在毁灭之际又变得不可见或不展示。所以，实际上，它们并不独立于扩展、撤回它们的根源。
493.yz_en: The word dṛśyatva indicates that all subtle and gross material manifestations are made visible by the potency of the Supreme Lord and again become invisible, or unmanifest, at the time of annihilation. They are therefore in essence not separate from the source of their expansion and withdrawal.

493.ldw:
dīpaś cakṣuś ca rūpaṁ ca
 jyotiṣo na pṛthag bhavet
evaṁ dhīḥ khāni mātrāś ca
 na syur anyatamād ṛtāt|
493.ldw_fc: dīpaḥ ; cakṣuḥ ; ca ; rūpam ; ca ; jyotiṣaḥ ; na ; pṛthak ; bhavet ; evam ; dhīḥ ; khāni ; mātrāḥ ; ca ; na syuḥ ; anyatamāt ; ṛtāt
493.words_en_fc: a lamp; a perceiving eye; and; a perceived form; and; from the original element fire; not; distinct; are; in the same way; intelligence; the senses; the perceptions; and; they are not; which is itself completely distinct; from the reality.
493.yw_zh: 一盏灯和借助于灯光而看的眼睛，以及被目睹的可见形象，其实跟火元素别无二致。同样，智性、感官和感官的感知并非独立于至尊真相而存在，尽管绝对真理永远跟它们截然不同。
493.yw_en: A lamp, the eye that views by the light of that lamp, and the visible form that is viewed are all basically nondifferent from the element fire. In the same way, intelligence, the senses and sense perceptions have no existence separate from the supreme reality, although that Absolute Truth remains totally distinct from them.

493.ldw:
buddher jāgaraṇaṁ svapnaḥ
 suṣuptir iti cocyate
māyā-mātram idaṁ rājan
 nānātvaṁ pratyag-ātmani|
493.ldw_fc: buddheḥ ; jāgaraṇam ; svapnaḥ ; suṣuptiḥ ; iti ; ca ; ucyate ; māyā-mātram ; idam ; rājan ; nānātvam ; pratyak-ātmani
493.words_en_fc: of intelligence; waking consciousness; sleep; deep sleep; thus; and; are called; merely illusion; this; O King; the duality; experienced by the pure soul.
493.yw_zh: 智性的三种状态是醒觉、睡眠和深度睡眠。但是，我亲爱的国王，通过这些不同的状态，纯粹生物体所经历的各种体验不过是幻象，仅此而已。
493.yw_en: The three states of intelligence are called waking consciousness, sleep and deep sleep. But, my dear King, the variegated experiences created for the pure living entity by these different states are nothing more than illusion.
493.yz_zh: 纯粹的奎师那知觉存在于各种物质知觉状态之上。就像有光明就没有黑暗，凡有光辉而纯粹的奎师那知觉在，虚幻的物质智性。即所经验的正常感知、做梦和深度睡眠，便烟消云散。
493.yz_en: Pure Kṛṣṇa consciousness exists beyond the various stages of material awareness. Just as darkness vanishes in the presence of light, so illusory material intelligence, which is experienced as normal perception, dreaming and deep sleep, completely vanishes in the brilliant presence of pure Kṛṣṇa consciousness, the constitutional condition of every living entity.

493.ldw:
yathā jala-dharā vyomni
 bhavanti na bhavanti ca
brahmaṇīdaṁ tathā viśvam
 avayavy udayāpyayāt|
493.ldw_fc: yathā ; jala-dharāḥ ; vyomni ; bhavanti ; na bhavanti ; ca ; brahmaṇi ; idam ; tathā ; viśvam ; avayavi ; udaya ; apyayāt
493.words_en_fc: just as; the clouds; in the sky; are; are not; and; within the Absolute Truth; this; similarly; universe; having parts; because of generation; and dissolution.
493.yw_zh: 如同天空中的云朵随着它们的构成元素的聚合与瓦解而逐渐形成并消散，这物质宇宙因其组成元素的聚合与分解而被得以创造和毁灭，息止在绝对真理中。
493.yw_en: Just as clouds in the sky come into being and are then dispersed by the amalgamation and dissolution of their constituent elements, this material universe is created and destroyed within the Absolute Truth by the amalgamation and dissolution of its elemental, constituent parts.

493.ldw:
satyaṁ hy avayavaḥ proktaḥ
 sarvāvayavinām iha
vinārthena pratīyeran
 paṭasyevāṅga tantavaḥ|
493.ldw_fc: satyam ; hi ; avayavaḥ ; proktaḥ ; sarva-avayavinām ; iha ; vinā ; arthena ; pratīyeran ; paṭasya ; iva ; aṅga ; tantavaḥ
493.words_en_fc: real; because; the ingredient cause; is said to be; of all constituted entities; in this created world; apart from; their manifest product; they can be perceived; of a cloth; as; my dear King; the threads.
493.yw_zh: 我亲爱的国王，据说（在韦丹塔·苏坨中）构成此间宇宙中所有展示的产物的质料因可被感知为一个单独的实体，就如能看出组成布匹的线及其产品是单个存在着。
493.yw_en: My dear King, it is stated [in the Vedānta-sūtra] that the ingredient cause that constitutes any manifested product in this universe can be perceived as a separate reality, just as the threads that make up a cloth can be perceived separately from their product.

493.ldw:
yat sāmānya-viśeṣābhyām
 upalabhyeta sa bhramaḥ
anyonyāpāśrayāt sarvam
 ādy-antavad avastu yat|
493.ldw_fc: yat ; sāmānya ; viśeṣābhyām ; upalabhyeta ; saḥ ; bhramaḥ ; anyonya ; apāśrayāt ; sarvam ; ādi-anta-vat ; avastu ; yat
493.words_en_fc: whatever; in terms of general cause; and specific product; is experienced; that; is illusion; mutual; because of dependence; everything; subject to beginning and end; unreal; which.
493.yw_zh: 凡有因有果的一切必是幻象，因为这些因果相互依存。千真万确，有开始与结束的一切均非真相。
493.yw_en: Anything experienced in terms of general cause and specific effect must be an illusion, because such causes and effects exist only relative to each other. Indeed, whatever has a beginning and an end is unreal.
493.yz_zh:
一种物质原因的本性若不洞悉其结果是不可得知的。例如，火燃烧的本性若不观察火引起的结果。比如燃烧的物体或灰烬，不然无法认知。同样，饱和的水质如果不看其结果，比如浸满水的布或纸，便理解不了。一个人的组织能力若不去注意他充满生机的活动成果，比如一所稳固的机构。否则难以了解。如此，不仅结果依靠其原因，而且对原因的了解也取决于对结果的认识。所以，二者互相定义，有始有终。总而言之，一切物质因果实际上均是短暂而相对的，最终全是幻象。

至尊人格首神虽是万原之源，却无始无终。因此，他既不是物质的又非幻象。主奎师那的富裕和能量均是绝对真相，超然于互相依存的物质因果之上。
493.yz_en:
The nature of a material cause cannot be perceived without perception of the effect. For example, the burning nature of fire cannot be perceived without observing the effect of fire, such as a burning object or ashes. Similarly, the saturating quality of water cannot be understood without observing the effect, a saturated cloth or paper. The organizational power of a man cannot be understood without observing the effect of his dynamic work, namely a solid institution. In this way, not only do effects depend upon their causes, but the perception of the cause also depends upon observation of the effect. Thus both are defined relatively and have a beginning and an end. The conclusion is that all such material causes and effects are essentially temporary and relative, and consequently illusory.

The Supreme Personality of Godhead, although the cause of all causes, has no beginning or end. Therefore He is neither material nor illusory. Lord Kṛṣṇa’s opulences and potencies are absolute reality, beyond the interdependence of material cause and effect.

493.ldw:
vikāraḥ khyāyamāno ’pi
 pratyag-ātmānam antarā
na nirūpyo ’sty aṇur api
 syāc cec cit-sama ātma-vat|
493.ldw_fc: vikāraḥ ; khyāyamānaḥ ; api ; pratyak-ātmānam ; antarā ; na ; nirūpyaḥ ; asti ; aṇuḥ ; api ; syāt ; cet ; cit-samaḥ ; ātma-vat
493.words_en_fc: the transformation of created existence; appearing; although; the Supreme Soul; without; not; conceivable; is; a single atom; even; it is so; if; equally spirit; remaining as it is, without change.
493.yw_zh: 若不联系至尊灵魂，虽然有所感知，但甚至就有关物质自然中一粒原子的变化都无最终定论。某物要被接受为真实存在，则必须具有跟纯粹灵魂相同的性质——永恒而不变的存在。
493.yw_en: Although perceived, the transformation of even a single atom of material nature has no ultimate definition without reference to the Supreme Soul. To be accepted as factually existing, something must possess the same quality as pure spirit — eternal, unchanging existence.
493.yz_zh: 出现在沙漠中水的幻影实际上是光的一种展示；虚无缥缈的水的幻影是光的一种特殊转化物。同样，貌似独立的物质自然是至尊人格首神的一个转化物。物质自然是主的物质能量。
493.yz_en: A mirage of water appearing in the desert is actually a manifestation of light; the false appearance of water is a specific transformation of light. That which falsely appears as independent material nature is similarly a transformation of the Supreme Personality of Godhead. Material nature is the external potency of the Lord.

493.ldw:
na hi satyasya nānātvam
 avidvān yadi manyate
nānātvaṁ chidrayor yadvaj
 jyotiṣor vātayor iva|
493.ldw_fc: na ; hi ; satyasya ; nānātvam ; avidvān ; yadi ; manyate ; nānātvam ; chidrayoḥ ; yadvat ; jyotiṣoḥ ; vātayoḥ ; iva
493.words_en_fc: there is no; indeed; of the Absolute Truth; duality; a person not in true knowledge; if; he thinks; the duality; of the two skies; just as; of the two celestial lights; of the two winds; as.
493.yw_zh: 绝对真理没有物质二元性。愚人所感知的二元性就好比装在空罐子里的空气和罐子外的空气的区别，或者好比侧映在水中的太阳和天空中的太阳的区别，或者就像一个生物体内的生命之气和另一生物内的生命之气之间的分别。
493.yw_en: There is no material duality in the Absolute Truth. The duality perceived by an ignorant person is like the difference between the sky contained in an empty pot and the sky outside the pot, or the difference between the reflection of the sun in water and the sun itself in the sky, or the difference between the vital air within one living body and that within another body.

493.ldw:
yathā hiraṇyaṁ bahudhā samīyate
 nṛbhiḥ kriyābhir vyavahāra-vartmasu
evaṁ vacobhir bhagavān adhokṣajo
 vyākhyāyate laukika-vaidikair janaiḥ|
493.ldw_fc: yathā ; hiraṇyam ; bahudhā ; samīyate ; nṛbhiḥ ; kriyābhiḥ ; vyavahāra-vartmasu ; evam ; vacobhiḥ ; bhagavān ; adhokṣajaḥ ; vyākhyāyate ; laukika ; vaidikaiḥ ; janaiḥ
493.words_en_fc: just as; gold; in many forms; appears; to men; in terms of different functions; in ordinary usage; similarly; in varying terms; the Personality of Godhead; the transcendental Lord, who is inconceivable to material senses; is described; mundane; and Vedic; by men.
493.yw_zh: 按照不同的意向，人们以各种方法使用黄金，故而市面黄金各式各样。同样，凭借物质感官难以臻达的至尊人格首神，为不同类型的人以各种普通或或韦达术语所描述。
493.yw_en: According to their different purposes, men utilize gold in various ways, and gold is therefore perceived in various forms. In the same way, the Supreme Personality of Godhead, who is inaccessible to material senses, is described in various terms, both ordinary and Vedic, by different types of men.
493.yz_zh: 那些不是至尊主的纯粹奉献者的人，在试图开发利用主和他的能量。按照他们的开发策略，他们以各种方式设想和描写绝对真理。在《博伽梵歌原意》和《圣典博伽瓦谭》中，绝对真理如其所如地呈现他自己，为的是禆益没有愚蠢地试图臆测至尊首神的真诚之人。
493.yz_en: All those who are not pure devotees of the Supreme Lord are basically trying to exploit the Lord and His energies. According to their strategy of exploitation, they conceive of and describe the Absolute Truth in various ways. In Bhagavad-gītā and Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam the Absolute Truth presents Himself as He actually is for the benefit of sincere people who do not foolishly try to conceptually manipulate the Supreme Godhead.

493.ldw:
yathā ghano ’rka-prabhavo ’rka-darśito
 hy arkāṁśa-bhūtasya ca cakṣuṣas tamaḥ
evaṁ tv ahaṁ brahma-guṇas tad-īkṣito
 brahmāṁśakasyātmana ātma-bandhanaḥ|
493.ldw_fc: yathā ; ghanaḥ ; arka ; prabhavaḥ ; arka ; darśitaḥ ; hi ; arka ; aṁśa-bhūtasya ; ca ; cakṣuṣaḥ ; tamaḥ ; evam ; tu ; aham ; brahma-guṇaḥ ; tat-īkṣitaḥ ; brahma-aṁśakasya ; ātmanaḥ ; ātma-bandhanaḥ
493.words_en_fc: as; a cloud; of the sun; the product; by the sun; made visible; indeed; of the sun; which is the partial expansion; and; of the eye; darkness; in the same way; indeed; false ego; a quality of the Absolute Truth; visible through the agency of that Absolute Truth; of the partial expansion of the Absolute Truth; of the jīva soul; serving to obstruct perception of the Supreme Soul.
493.yw_zh: 虽然云朵是太阳的一种产物，也是凭借太阳才能见到，却给观看的眼睛制造黑暗，而黑暗是太阳的另一个部分扩展。同样，物质的假自我——只有通过绝对真理方能得见的绝对真理的一种特定产物，阻碍个体灵魂，绝对真理的另一种部分扩展，觉悟绝对真理。
493.yw_en: Although a cloud is a product of the sun and is also made visible by the sun, it nevertheless creates darkness for the viewing eye, which is another partial expansion of the sun. Similarly, material false ego, a particular product of the Absolute Truth made visible by the Absolute Truth, obstructs the individual soul, another partial expansion of the Absolute Truth, from realizing the Absolute Truth.

493.ldw:
ghano yadārka-prabhavo vidīryate
 cakṣuḥ svarūpaṁ ravim īkṣate tadā
yadā hy ahaṅkāra upādhir ātmano
 jijñāsayā naśyati tarhy anusmaret|
493.ldw_fc: ghanaḥ ; yadā ; arka-prabhavaḥ ; vidīryate ; cakṣuḥ ; svarūpam ; ravim ; īkṣate ; tadā ; yadā ; hi ; ahaṅkāraḥ ; upādhiḥ ; ātmanaḥ ; jijñāsayā ; naśyati ; tarhi ; anusmaret
493.words_en_fc: the cloud; when; the product of the sun; is torn apart; the eye; in its real form; the sun; sees; then; when; indeed also; false ego; the superficial covering; of the spirit soul; by spiritual inquiry; is destroyed; at that time; one gains his proper remembrance.
493.yw_zh: 当原本产生自太阳的云朵被驱散，眼睛就能看到太阳的本来面目。同样，当人探究超然的科学，摧毁物质覆盖物，便恢复其原本的灵性知觉。
493.yw_en: When the cloud originally produced from the sun is torn apart, the eye can see the actual form of the sun. Similarly, when the spirit soul destroys his material covering of false ego by inquiring into the transcendental science, he regains his original spiritual awareness.
493.yz_zh: 就像太阳驱散遮挡视线的云朵，至尊主本人能去除阻碍我们看见他的假自我。然而，有些生物体，比如猫头鹰，不喜欢见到太阳，同样，那些对灵性知识不感兴趣的人从不接受见神的恩典。
493.yz_en: Just as the sun can burn away the clouds that prevent one from seeing it, the Supreme Lord (and He alone) can remove the false ego that prevents one from seeing Him. There are some creatures, however, like owls, who are averse to seeing the sun. In the same way, those who are not interested in spiritual knowledge will never receive the privilege of seeing God.

493.ldw:
yadaivam etena viveka-hetinā
 māyā-mayāhaṅkaraṇātma-bandhanam
chittvācyutātmānubhavo ’vatiṣṭhate
 tam āhur ātyantikam aṅga samplavam|
493.ldw_fc: yadā ; evam ; etena ; viveka ; hetinā ; māyā-maya ; ahaṅkaraṇa ; ātma ; bandhanam ; chittvā ; acyuta ; ātma ; anubhavaḥ ; avatiṣṭhate ; tam ; āhuḥ ; ātyantikam ; aṅga ; samplavam
493.words_en_fc: when; in this way; by this; of discrimination; sword; illusory; false ego; of the soul; the cause of bondage; cutting off; of the infallible; Supreme Soul; realization; develops firmly; that; they call; ultimate; my dear King; annihilation.
493.yw_zh: 我亲爱的帕瑞克西特，当以超绝知识的利剑斩去了束缚灵魂且令人迷幻的假自我，便发展出对主阿丘塔 ，至尊灵魂的觉悟，这就叫做物质存在的终极毁灭。
493.yw_en: My dear Parīkṣit, when the illusory false ego that binds the soul has been cut off with the sword of discriminating knowledge and one has developed realization of Lord Acyuta, the Supreme Soul, this is called the ātyantika, or ultimate, annihilation of material existence.

493.ldw:
nityadā sarva-bhūtānāṁ
 brahmādīnāṁ parantapa
utpatti-pralayāv eke
 sūkṣma-jñāḥ sampracakṣate|
493.ldw_fc: nityadā ; sarva-bhūtānām ; brahma-ādīnām ; param-tapa ; utpatti ; pralayau ; eke ; sūkṣma-jñāḥ ; sampracakṣate
493.words_en_fc: constantly; of all created beings; beginning with Lord Brahmā; O subduer of the enemies; creation; and annihilation; some; expert knowers of subtle things; declare.
493.yw_zh: 敌人的征服者啊，精于自然微妙活动的知悉者已昭示，从布茹阿玛开始的一切受造物不停地经历循环往复的创造与毁灭的过程。
493.yw_en: Experts in the subtle workings of nature, O subduer of the enemy, have declared that there are continuous processes of creation and annihilation that all created beings, beginning with Brahmā, constantly undergo.

493.ldw:
kāla-sroto-javenāśu
 hriyamāṇasya nityadā
pariṇāminām avasthās tā
 janma-pralaya-hetavaḥ|
493.ldw_fc: kāla ; srotaḥ ; javena ; āśu ; hriyamāṇasya ; nityadā ; pariṇāminām ; avasthāḥ ; tāḥ ; janma ; pralaya ; hetavaḥ
493.words_en_fc: of time; of the mighty current; by the force; rapidly; of that which is being taken away; constantly; of things subject to transformation; the various conditions; they; of birth; and annihilation; the causes.
493.yw_zh: 一切物质实体均变化不定，不断地被时间巨浪迅速侵蚀。物质所经历的各种存在阶段乃是它们的产生与毁灭的长久原因。
493.yw_en: All material entities undergo transformation and are constantly and swiftly eroded by the mighty currents of time. The various stages of existence that material things exhibit are the perpetual causes of their generation and annihilation.

493.ldw:
anādy-antavatānena
 kāleneśvara-mūrtinā
avasthā naiva dṛśyante
 viyati jyotiṣām iva|
493.ldw_fc: anādi-anta-vatā ; anena ; kālena ; īśvara ; mūrtinā ; avasthāḥ ; na ; eva ; dṛśyante ; viyati ; jyotiṣām ; iva
493.words_en_fc: without beginning or end; by this; time; of the Supreme Personality of Godhead; the representation; the different stages; not; indeed; are seen; in outer space; of the moving planets; just as.
493.yw_zh: 无始无终的时间，至尊主的非人格代表，所引起的存在的不同阶段是目不可见的，就像太空中各个星宿每一瞬间的位置变化令人难以察知。
493.yw_en: These stages of existence created by beginningless and endless time, the impersonal representative of the Supreme Lord, are not visible, just as the infinitesimal momentary changes of position of the planets in the sky cannot be directly seen.
493.yz_zh: 虽然人人知晓空中的太阳在不停地运动，但是人们通常看不到太阳在动。同样，无入察觉到自己的头发或指甲在长，但随着时间飞转流逝，我们感知到这一事实。时间，主的能量，非常精微，强而有力，是试图开发利用物质创造的愚人所难以跨越的障碍。
493.yz_en: Although everyone knows that the sun is constantly moving in the sky, one cannot normally see the sun moving. Similarly, no one can directly perceive his hair or nails growing, although with the passing of time we perceive the fact of growth. Time, the potency of the Lord, is very subtle and powerful and is an insurmountable barrier to fools who are trying to exploit the material creation.

493.ldw:
nityo naimittikaś caiva
 tathā prākṛtiko layaḥ
ātyantikaś ca kathitaḥ
 kālasya gatir īdṛśī|
493.ldw_fc: nityaḥ ; naimittikaḥ ; ca ; eva ; tathā ; prākṛtikaḥ ; layaḥ ; ātyantikaḥ ; ca ; kathitaḥ ; kālasya ; gatiḥ ; īdṛśī
493.words_en_fc: continuous; occasional; and; indeed; also; natural; annihilation; final; and; are described; of time; the progress; like this.
493.yw_zh: 如此，四种毁灭——长久的、临时的、躯体的和最终的，是对时间进程的写实。
493.yw_en: In this way the progress of time is described in terms of the four kinds of annihilation — continuous, occasional, elemental and final.

493.ldw:
etāḥ kuru-śreṣṭha jagad-vidhātur
 nārāyaṇasyākhila-sattva-dhāmnaḥ
līlā-kathās te kathitāḥ samāsataḥ
 kārtsnyena nājo ’py abhidhātum īśaḥ|
493.ldw_fc: etāḥ ; kuru-śreṣṭha ; jagat-vidhātuḥ ; nārāyaṇasya ; akhila-sattva-dhāmnaḥ ; līlā-kathāḥ ; te ; kathitāḥ ; samāsataḥ ; kārtsnyena ; na ; ajaḥ ; api ; abhidhātum ; īśaḥ
493.words_en_fc: these; O best of the Kurus; of the creator of the universe; of Lord Nārāyaṇa; the reservoir of all existences; the pastime narrations; to you; have been related; in summary; entirely; not; unborn Brahmā; even; to enumerate; is capable.
493.yw_zh: 库茹族的佼佼者啊，我已向你简要概述过此间宇宙的创造者兼一切存在之终极源头主纳茹阿央纳的逍遥时光。就连主布茹阿玛本人也不能充分地予以描述。
493.yw_en: O best of the Kurus, I have related to you these narrations of the pastimes of Lord Nārāyaṇa, the creator of this world and the ultimate reservoir of all existence, presenting them to you only in brief summary. Even Lord Brahmā himself would be incapable of describing them entirely.

493.ldw:
saṁsāra-sindhum ati-dustaram uttitīrṣor
 nānyaḥ plavo bhagavataḥ puruṣottamasya
līlā-kathā-rasa-niṣevaṇam antareṇa
 puṁso bhaved vividha-duḥkha-davārditasya|
493.ldw_fc: saṁsāra ; sindhum ; ati-dustaram ; uttitīrṣoḥ ; na ; anyaḥ ; plavaḥ ; bhagavataḥ ; puruṣa-uttamasya ; līlā-kathā ; rasa ; niṣevaṇam ; antareṇa ; puṁsaḥ ; bhavet ; vividha ; duḥkha ; dava ; arditasya
493.words_en_fc: of material existence; the ocean; impossible to cross; for one who desires to cross; there is not; any other; boat; of the Personality of Godhead; the Supreme Lord; of the narrations of the pastimes; to the transcendental taste; the rendering of service; apart from; for a person; there can be; various; of material miseries; by the fire; who is distressed.
493.yw_zh: 无论是对在无尽痛苦的烈火中煎熬的人，还是对渴望跨过不可逾越的物质存在之洋的人来说，除了培养对聆听至尊人格首神的逍遥时光的奉献性超然品味之外，别无其他合适的渡船。
493.yw_en: For a person who is suffering in the fire of countless miseries and who desires to cross the insurmountable ocean of material existence, there is no suitable boat except that of cultivating devotion to the transcendental taste for the narrations of the Supreme Personality of Godhead’s pastimes.
493.yz_zh: 虽然主的逍遥时光说之不尽，但对之仅有些许欣赏与了解也能把人从不堪忍受的物质存在的痛苦中解救出来。唯有至尊主的圣名和《圣典博伽瓦谭》详尽描述的至尊主的逍遥时光这良药，才能治愈物质存在的高热。
493.yz_en: Although it is not possible to completely describe the pastimes of the Lord, even a partial appreciation can save one from the unbearable miseries of material existence. The fever of material existence can be removed only by the medicine of the holy name and pastimes of the Supreme Lord, which are perfectly narrated in Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam.

493.ldw:
purāṇa-saṁhitām etām
 ṛṣir nārāyaṇo ’vyayaḥ
nāradāya purā prāha
 kṛṣṇa-dvaipāyanāya saḥ|
493.ldw_fc: purāṇa ; saṁhitām ; etām ; ṛṣiḥ ; nārāyaṇaḥ ; avyayaḥ ; nāradāya ; purā ; prāha ; kṛṣṇa-dvaipāyanāya ; saḥ
493.words_en_fc: of all the Purāṇas; the essential compendium; this; the great sage; Lord Nara-Nārāyaṇa; the infallible; to Nārada Muni; previously; spoke; to Kṛṣṇa Dvaipāyana Vedavyāsa; he, Nārada.
493.yw_zh: 很久以前，这部所有普然那的诗文选集由永不犯错的主纳茹阿·纳茹阿央纳口授给拿茹阿达，然后，拿茹阿达将其复述传承给了奎师那·兑帕亚纳·韦达维亚萨。
493.yw_en: Long ago this essential anthology of all the Purāṇas was spoken by the infallible Lord Nara-Nārāyaṇa Ṛṣi to Nārada, who then repeated it to Kṛṣṇa Dvaipāyana Vedavyāsa.

493.ldw:
sa vai mahyaṁ mahā-rāja
 bhagavān bādarāyaṇaḥ
imāṁ bhāgavatīṁ prītaḥ
 saṁhitāṁ veda-sammitām|
493.ldw_fc: saḥ ; vai ; mahyam ; mahārāja ; bhagavān ; bādarāyaṇaḥ ; imām ; bhāgavatīm ; prītaḥ ; saṁhitām ; veda-sammitām
493.words_en_fc: he; indeed; to me, Śukadeva Gosvāmī; O King Parīkṣit; the powerful incarnation of the Supreme Lord; Śrīla Vyāsadeva; this; Bhāgavata scripture; being satisfied; the anthology; equal in status to the four Vedas.
493.yw_zh: 我亲爱的玛哈茹阿吉·帕瑞克西特，了不起的施瑞拉·维亚萨戴瓦将这部与四韦达经并驾齐驱的《圣典博伽瓦谭》传授给我了。
493.yw_en: My dear Mahārāja Parīkṣit, that great personality Śrīla Vyāsadeva taught me this same scripture, Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam, which is equal in stature to the four Vedas.

493.ldw:
imāṁ vakṣyaty asau sūta
 ṛṣibhyo naimiṣālaye
dīrgha-satre kuru-śreṣṭha
 sampṛṣṭaḥ śaunakādibhiḥ|
493.ldw_fc: imām ; vakṣyati ; asau ; sūtaḥ ; ṛṣibhyaḥ ; naimiṣa-ālaye ; dīrgha-satre ; kuru-śreṣṭha ; sampṛṣṭaḥ ; śaunaka-ādibhiḥ
493.words_en_fc: this; will speak; present before us; Sūta Gosvāmī; to the sages; in the forest of Naimiṣa; at the lengthy sacrificial performance; O best of the Kurus; questioned; by the assembly led by Śaunaka.
493.yw_zh: 库茹族的佼佼者啊，坐在我们面前的同一位苏塔·哥斯瓦米将把这部《圣典博伽瓦谭》传授给聚集在奈米沙冉亚森林施行盛大祭祀的圣人们。他这么做是因为当时以邵纳卡为首的与会者们向他询以疑难。
493.yw_en: O best of the Kurus, the same Sūta Gosvāmī who is sitting before us will speak this Bhāgavatam to the sages assembled in the great sacrifice at Naimiṣāraṇya. This he will do when questioned by the members of the assembly, headed by Śaunaka.
493.yz_en: Thus end the purports of the humble servants of His Divine Grace A.C. Bhaktivedanta Swami Prabhupāda to the Twelfth Canto, Fourth Chapter, of the Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam, entitled “The Four Categories of Universal Annihilation.”

494.ldw:
śrī-śuka uvāca|atrānuvarṇyate ’bhīkṣṇaṁ
 viśvātmā bhagavān hariḥ
yasya prasāda-jo brahmā
 rudraḥ krodha-samudbhavaḥ|
494.ldw_fc: śrī-śukaḥ uvāca ; atra ; anuvarṇyate ; abhīkṣṇam ; viśva-ātmā ; bhagavān ; hariḥ ; yasya ; prasāda ; jaḥ ; brahmā ; rudraḥ ; krodha ; samudbhavaḥ
494.words_en_fc: Śrī Śukadeva Gosvāmī said; in this Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam; is elaborately described; repeatedly; the soul of the entire universe; the Supreme Personality of Godhead; Lord Hari; of whom; from the satisfaction; born; Lord Brahmā; Lord Śiva; from the anger; whose birth.
494.yw_zh: 舒卡戴瓦·哥斯瓦米：这部《圣典博伽瓦谭》淋漓尽致地描述了一切存在的至尊灵魂——人格首神，哈尔依——从他的满足诞生出布茹阿玛，从布茹阿玛的愤怒诞生出茹铎。
494.yw_en: Śukadeva Gosvāmī said: This Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam has elaborately described in various narrations the Supreme Soul of all that be — the Personality of Godhead, Hari — from whose satisfaction Brahmā is born and from whose anger Rudra takes birth.
494.yz_zh: 施瑞拉•维施瓦纳塔•恰夸瓦尔提•塔库尔在评述这节诗时，非常精辟地概述了《圣典博伽瓦谭》。这位伟大的阿査尔亚的论述核心是，正如舒卡戴瓦•勾斯瓦米所言，对至尊主奎师那无条件且充盈爱心的臣服才是生命的最高完美。《圣典博伽瓦谭》的唯一目的是使受条件限制灵魂确信无疑地臣服于主，重返家园，回归首神。
494.yz_en: Śrīla Viśvanātha Cakravartī Ṭhākura has given a very elaborate summary of Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam in his commentary on this verse. The essence of the great ācārya’s statement is that unconditional loving surrender to the Supreme Lord, Kṛṣṇa, as described by Śukadeva Gosvāmī, is the highest perfection of life. The exclusive purpose of Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam is to convince the conditioned soul to execute such surrender to the Lord and go back home, back to Godhead.

494.ldw:
tvaṁ tu rājan mariṣyeti
 paśu-buddhim imāṁ jahi
na jātaḥ prāg abhūto ’dya
 deha-vat tvaṁ na naṅkṣyasi|
494.ldw_fc: tvam ; tu ; rājan ; mariṣye ; iti ; paśu-buddhim ; imām ; jahi ; na ; jātaḥ ; prāk ; abhūtaḥ ; adya ; deha-vat ; tvam ; na naṅkṣyasi
494.words_en_fc: you; but; O King; I am about to die; thus thinking; animalistic mentality; this; give up; not; born; previously; nonexistent; today; like the body; you; will not be destroyed.
494.yw_zh: 王啊，抛开动物般的心态，切莫想着：“我行将灭亡”。跟躯体迥然不同的是，你不生不灭。过去从未有一个时刻你不曾存在过，将来你也不会灭亡。
494.yw_en: O King, give up the animalistic mentality of thinking, “I am going to die.” Unlike the body, you have not taken birth. There was not a time in the past when you did not exist, and you are not about to be destroyed.
494.yz_zh:
在第一篇末（1.19.15)，帕瑞克西特王说：

tam mopajatam pratiyantu vipra

ganga ca devi dhrta-cittam ise

dvijopasrstah kuhakas taksako va

dasatv alam gayata visnu-gathah

“诸位布茹阿玛纳啊，请接受我为一个完全臣服的灵魂吧，请让恒河母亲，主的代表，也如样接受我吧，因为我已将主的莲花足置于心田。就让蛇鸟--无论那位布茹阿玛纳造的什么魔物一即刻撕咬我吧。我唯一的心愿是，你们都继续歌颂主维施努的光辉事迹。

甚至在聆听《圣典博伽瓦谭》之前，帕瑞克西特王就已经是一位玛哈-巴嘎瓦塔，主奎师那的一位伟大的纯粹奉献者。实标上，国王并无惧怕死亡的动物心理，但为了我们，舒卡戴瓦•勾斯瓦米以激切的言辞向他的门徒发话，俨如主奎师那在《博伽梵歌原意》中对阿尔诸那严词以待。
494.yz_en:
At the end of the First Canto (1.19.15) King Parīkṣit stated:

taṁ mopajātaṁ pratiyantu viprā
 gaṅgā ca devī dhṛta-cittam īśe
dvijopasṛṣṭaḥ kuhakas takṣako vā
 daśatv alaṁ gāyata viṣṇu-gāthāḥ

“O brāhmaṇas, just accept me as a completely surrendered soul, and let mother Ganges, the representative of the Lord, also accept me in that way, for I have already taken the lotus feet of the Lord into my heart. Let the snake-bird — or whatever magical thing the brāhmaṇa created — bite me at once. I only desire that you all continue singing the deeds of Lord Viṣṇu.”

Even before hearing Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam, King Parīkṣit was a mahā-bhāgavata, a great and pure devotee of Lord Kṛṣṇa. There was actually no animalistic fear of death within the King, but for our sake Śukadeva Gosvāmī is speaking very strongly to his disciple, just as Lord Kṛṣṇa speaks strongly to Arjuna in Bhagavad-gītā.

494.ldw_fc: na bhaviṣyasi ; bhūtvā ; tvam ; putra ; pautra ; ādi ; rūpa-vān ; bīja ; aṅkura ; vat ; deha-ādeḥ ; vyatiriktaḥ ; yathā ; analaḥ
494.words_en_fc: you will not come into being; becoming; you; of children; grandchildren; and so on; assuming the forms; the seed; and the sprout; like; from the material body and its paraphernalia; distinct; as; the fire (from the wood).
494.yw_zh: 你将不再投生为你家族的子孙后代，不再像一粒种子破土发芽生长，结出新的种子。恰相反，你完全不同于物质躯体及其随身物，就如火有别于火中的燃料。
494.yw_en: You will not take birth again in the form of your sons and grandsons, like a sprout taking birth from a seed and then generating a new seed. Rather, you are entirely distinct from the material body and its paraphernalia, in the same way that fire is distinct from its fuel.
494.yz_zh: 有时，一个人梦见自己投生为自己的孙子，希望永久地留在同一个物质家族中。正如sruti-mantra说，pita putrena pitrman yoni-yonau:“子将为父之父，因夫父亲可能投生为自己的孙子。”《圣典博伽瓦谭》旨在助人获得灵性解脱，决非使人愚蠢地延缓跟物质躯体认同的幻象。本诗节已昭示这一点。
494.yz_en: Sometimes one dreams of being reborn as the son of one’s son, in the hope of perpetually remaining in the same material family. As stated in the śruti-mantra, pitā putreṇa pitṛmān yoni-yonau: “A father has a father in his son, because he may take birth as his own grandson.” The purpose of Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam is spiritual liberation and not the foolish prolonging of the illusion of bodily identification. That is clearly stated in this verse.

494.ldw:
svapne yathā śiraś-chedaṁ
 pañcatvādy ātmanaḥ svayam
yasmāt paśyati dehasya
 tata ātmā hy ajo ’maraḥ|
494.ldw_fc: svapne ; yathā ; śiraḥ ; chedam ; pañcatva-ādi ; ātmanaḥ ; svayam ; yasmāt ; paśyati ; dehasya ; tataḥ ; ātmā ; hi ; ajaḥ ; amaraḥ
494.words_en_fc: in a dream; as; of one’s head; the cutting off; the condition of being composed of the five material elements, and other material conditions; one’s own; oneself; because; one sees; of the body; therefore; the soul; certainly; unborn; immortal.
494.yw_zh: 在梦里会亲眼目睹自己的头被砍掉，故而明白真正的自我跟梦中的体验毫无干系。同样，当人警觉清醒时，便能看到自己的躯体是五大物质元素的一个产物。因此，要知道，真正的自我，即灵魂，有别于所观察的躯体，并且是不经出生仍存在且永恒不朽的。
494.yw_en: In a dream one can see his own head being cut off and thus understand that his actual self is standing apart from the dream experience. Similarly, while awake one can see that his body is a product of the five material elements. Therefore it is to be understood that the actual self, the soul, is distinct from the body it observes and is unborn and immortal.

494.ldw:
ghaṭe bhinne ghaṭākāśa
 ākāśaḥ syād yathā purā
evaṁ dehe mṛte jīvo
 brahma sampadyate punaḥ|
494.ldw_fc: ghaṭe ; bhinne ; ghaṭa-ākāśaḥ ; ākāśaḥ ; syāt ; yathā ; purā ; evam ; dehe ; mṛte ; jīvaḥ ; brahma ; sampadyate ; punaḥ
494.words_en_fc: a pot; when it is broken; the sky within the pot; sky; remains; as; previously; similarly; the body; when it is given up, in the liberated condition; the individual soul; his spiritual status; attains; once again.
494.yw_zh: 当罐子破碎，罐内的空间依旧是空间元素。同样，当粗糙和精微躯体消亡，体内的生物便恢复其灵性身份。
494.yw_en: When a pot is broken, the portion of sky within the pot remains as the element sky, just as before. In the same way, when the gross and subtle bodies die, the living entity within resumes his spiritual identity.

494.ldw:
manaḥ sṛjati vai dehān
 guṇān karmāṇi cātmanaḥ
tan manaḥ sṛjate māyā
 tato jīvasya saṁsṛtiḥ|
494.ldw_fc: manaḥ ; sṛjati ; vai ; dehān ; guṇān ; karmāṇi ; ca ; ātmanaḥ ; tat ; manaḥ ; sṛjate ; māyā ; tataḥ ; jīvasya ; saṁsṛtiḥ
494.words_en_fc: the mind; produces; indeed; the material bodies; the qualities; the activities; and; of the soul; that; mind; produces; the illusory potency of the Supreme Lord; thus; of the individual living being; the material existence.
494.yw_zh: 灵魂的物质躯体、物质品质和物质活动均产生自物质心意。物质心意本身则产生自至尊主的迷幻能量，如此，灵魂便有了物质存在。
494.yw_en: The material bodies, qualities and activities of the spirit soul are created by the material mind. That mind is itself created by the illusory potency of the Supreme Lord, and thus the soul assumes material existence.

494.ldw:
snehādhiṣṭhāna-varty-agni-
 saṁyogo yāvad īyate
tāvad dīpasya dīpatvam
 evaṁ deha-kṛto bhavaḥ
rajaḥ-sattva-tamo-vṛttyā
 jāyate ’tha vinaśyati|
494.ldw_fc: sneha ; adhiṣṭhāna ; varti ; agni ; saṁyogaḥ ; yāvat ; īyate ; tāvat ; dīpasya ; dīpatvam ; evam ; deha-kṛtaḥ ; bhavaḥ ; rajaḥ-sattva-tamaḥ ; vṛttyā ; jāyate ; atha ; vinaśyati
494.words_en_fc: of the oil; the vessel; the wick; and the fire; the combination; to which extent; is seen; to that extent; of the lamp; the status of functioning as a lamp; similarly; due to the material body; material existence; of the modes of passion, goodness and ignorance; by the action; arises; and; is destroyed.
494.yw_zh: 当油、容器、灯芯和火组合起来，灯才能照明。同样，建立在将灵魂认同于物质躯体的基础上的物质生命，透过物质躯壳的构成元素，即物质善良、激情和愚昧属性的活动而得以发展和毁灭。
494.yw_en: A lamp functions as such only by the combination of its fuel, vessel, wick and fire. Similarly, material life, based on the soul’s identification with the body, is developed and destroyed by the workings of material goodness, passion and ignorance, which are the constituent elements of the body.

494.ldw:
na tatrātmā svayaṁ-jyotir
 yo vyaktāvyaktayoḥ paraḥ
ākāśa iva cādhāro
 dhruvo ’nantopamas tataḥ|
494.ldw_fc: na ; tatra ; ātmā ; svayam-jyotiḥ ; yaḥ ; vyakta-avyaktayoḥ ; paraḥ ; ākāśaḥ ; iva ; ca ; ādhāraḥ ; dhruvaḥ ; ananta ; upamaḥ ; tataḥ
494.words_en_fc: not; there; the soul; self-luminous; who; from the manifest and the unmanifest (the gross and subtle bodies); different; the sky; as; and; the basis; fixed; without end; or comparison; thus.
494.yw_zh: 体内的灵魂是自明的，跟可见的粗糙躯体和目不可见的精微躯体毫不相关。灵魂始终是千变万化的躯体存在的稳固基石，俨如以太空间是物质转化物的不变的基础。因此，灵魂没有穷尽，是物质所不可比拟的。
494.yw_en: The soul within the body is self-luminous and is separate from the visible gross body and invisible subtle body. It remains as the fixed basis of changing bodily existence, just as the ethereal sky is the unchanging background of material transformation. Therefore the soul is endless and without material comparison.

494.ldw_fc: evam ; ātmānam ; ātma-stham ; ātmanā ; eva ; āmṛśa ; prabho ; buddhyā ; anumāna-garbhiṇyā ; vāsudeva-anucintayā
494.words_en_fc: in this way; your true self; situated within the bodily covering; with your mind; indeed; consider carefully; O master of the self (King Parīkṣit); with intelligence; conceived by logic; with meditation upon Lord Vāsudeva.
494.yw_zh: 我亲爱的国王，你该恒常地冥想至尊主华苏戴瓦，该运用清晰而富有逻辑的智慧，好好深思你真实的自我，以及真实的自我怎么居于物质体内。
494.yw_en: My dear King, by constantly meditating upon the Supreme Lord, Vāsudeva, and by applying clear and logical intelligence, you should carefully consider your true self and how it is situated within the material body.

494.ldw:
codito vipra-vākyena
 na tvāṁ dhakṣyati takṣakaḥ
mṛtyavo nopadhakṣyanti
 mṛtyūnāṁ mṛtyum īśvaram|
494.ldw_fc: coditaḥ ; vipra-vākyena ; na ; tvām ; dhakṣyati ; takṣakaḥ ; mṛtyavaḥ ; na upadhakṣyanti ; mṛtyūnām ; mṛtyum ; īśvaram
494.words_en_fc: sent; by the words of the brāhmaṇa; not; you; will burn; the snake-bird Takṣaka; the agents of death personified; cannot burn; of these causes of death; the very death; the master of the self.
494.yw_zh: 由那位布茹阿玛纳的诅咒派来的蛇鸟，不会焚毁你真实的自我。死亡的各种代理决不会焚烧如你这样的自我的主人，因为你已经踏在回归首神的归途，征服了一切危险。
494.yw_en: The snake-bird Takṣaka, sent by the curse of the brāhmaṇa, will not burn your true self. The agents of death will never burn such a master of the self as you, for you have already conquered all dangers on your path back to Godhead.
494.yz_zh: 真正死的是遮蔽自身永恒的奎师那知觉的覆盖物。对于灵魂来说，物质幻象就像死尸，但是，帕瑞克西特•玛哈茹阿吉已摧毁了这一切对灵性生活产生威胁的危险，比如色欲、嫉妒和恐惧。舒卡戴瓦•勾斯瓦米在此祝贺这位伟大的圣王，主奎师那的一位纯粹奉献者，回归死亡遥不可及的灵性天穹。
494.yz_en: Real death is the covering of one’s eternal Kṛṣṇa consciousness. For the soul, material illusion is just like death, but Parīkṣit Mahārāja had already destroyed all those dangers that threaten one’s spiritual life, such as lust, envy and fear. Śukadeva Gosvāmī here congratulates the great saintly king, who, as a pure devotee of Lord Kṛṣṇa homeward bound to the spiritual sky, was far beyond the reach of death.

494.ldw:
ahaṁ brahma paraṁ dhāma
 brahmāhaṁ paramaṁ padam
evaṁ samīkṣya cātmānam
 ātmany ādhāya niṣkale|daśantaṁ takṣakaṁ pāde
 lelihānaṁ viṣānanaiḥ
na drakṣyasi śarīraṁ ca
 viśvaṁ ca pṛthag ātmanaḥ|
494.ldw_fc: aham ; brahma ; param ; dhāma ; brahma ; aham ; paramam ; padam ; evam ; samīkṣya ; ca ; ātmānam ; ātmani ; ādhāya ; niṣkale ; daśantam ; takṣakam ; pāde ; lelihānam ; viṣa-ānanaiḥ ; na drakṣyasi ; śarīram ; ca ; viśvam ; ca ; pṛthak ; ātmanaḥ
494.words_en_fc: I; the Absolute Truth; supreme; the abode; the Absolute Truth; I; the supreme; destination; thus; considering; and; yourself; in the Supreme Self; placing; which is free from material designation; biting; Takṣaka; upon your foot; the snake, licking his lips; with his mouth full of poison; you will not even notice; your body; and; the entire material world; and; separate; from the self.
494.yw_zh: 你应该思考，“我跟绝对真理，至高居所，没有不同，而绝对真理，至高归宿，也跟我别无二致。”如此，你使自己臣服于超然在一切错误的物质认同之上的至尊灵魂，你甚至都不会留意到那只蛇鸟靠近你，张开毒牙咬你的足。你也不会注意你的垂死之躯和你周遭的物质世界，因为你已领悟你自身不同于这些。
494.yw_en: You should consider, “I am nondifferent from the Absolute Truth, the supreme abode, and that Absolute Truth, the supreme destination, is nondifferent from me.” Thus resigning yourself to the Supreme Soul, who is free from all material misidentifications, you will not even notice the snake-bird Takṣaka when he approaches with his poison-filled fangs and bites your foot. Nor will you see your dying body or the material world around you, because you will have realized yourself to be separate from them.

494.ldw:
etat te kathitaṁ tāta
 yad ātmā pṛṣṭavān nṛpa
harer viśvātmanaś ceṣṭāṁ
 kiṁ bhūyaḥ śrotum icchasi|
494.ldw_fc: etat ; te ; kathitam ; tāta ; yat ; ātmā ; pṛṣṭavān ; nṛpa ; hareḥ ; viśva-ātmanaḥ ; ceṣṭām ; kim ; bhūyaḥ ; śrotum ; icchasi
494.words_en_fc: this; to you; narrated; my dear Parīkṣit; which; you; inquired; O King; of the Supreme Personality of Godhead; of the Soul of the universe; the pastimes; what; further; to hear; do you wish.
494.yw_zh: 亲爱的帕瑞克西特王，我已向你讲述了你最初询问的题旨——主哈尔依，宇宙的至尊灵魂的逍遥时光。现在，你还渴望聆听什么？
494.yw_en: Beloved King Parīkṣit, I have narrated to you the topics you originally inquired about — the pastimes of Lord Hari, the Supreme Soul of the universe. Now, what more do you wish to hear?
494.yz_zh: 在评注这节诗时，施瑞拉•吉瓦•勾斯瓦米引述了《圣典博伽瓦谭》的许多诗节，详细阐明帕瑞克西特王全神贯注于主奎师那，意志、坚决地重返家园，回归首神的崇髙的奉爱境界。
494.yz_en:
In his commentary on this text, Śrīla Jīva Gosvāmī has elaborately demonstrated, by citing many Bhāgavatam verses, the exalted devotional position of King Parīkṣit, who was fully determined to fix his mind upon Lord Kṛṣṇa and go back home, back to Godhead.

Thus end the purports of the humble servants of His Divine Grace A.C. Bhaktivedanta Swami Prabhupāda to the Twelfth Canto, Fifth Chapter, of the Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam, entitled “Śukadeva Gosvāmī’s Final Instructions to Mahārāja Parīkṣit.”

495.ldw:
sūta uvāca|etan niśamya muninābhihitaṁ parīkṣid
 vyāsātmajena nikhilātma-dṛśā samena
tat-pāda-mūlam upasṛtya natena mūrdhnā
 baddhāñjalis tam idam āha sa viṣṇurātaḥ|
495.ldw_fc: sūtaḥ uvāca ; etat ; niśamya ; muninā ; abhihitam ; parīkṣit ; vyāsa-ātma-jena ; nikhila ; ātma ; dṛśā ; samena ; tat ; pāda-mūlam ; upasṛtya ; natena ; mūrdhnā ; baddha-añjaliḥ ; tam ; idam ; āha ; saḥ ; viṣṇu-rātaḥ
495.words_en_fc: Sūta Gosvāmī said; this; hearing; by the sage (Śukadeva); narrated; Mahārāja Parīkṣit; by the son of Vyāsadeva; of all living beings; the Supreme Lord; who sees; who is perfectly equipoised; of him (Śukadeva); to the lotus feet; going up; bowed down; with his head; his arms folded in supplication; to him; this; said; he; Parīkṣit, who while still in the womb had been protected by Lord Kṛṣṇa Himself.
495.yw_zh: 苏塔·哥斯瓦米说：聆听了觉悟了自我、怡然平和的舒卡戴瓦，维亚萨戴瓦之子的叙述后，玛哈茹阿吉·帕瑞克西特谦卑地去到他的莲花足近旁。终其一生都在主维施努的护佑下的国王叩首顶拜圣贤的足之后，双手合什地如下祈祷。
495.yw_en: Sūta Gosvāmī said: After hearing all that was narrated to him by the self-realized and equipoised Śukadeva, the son of Vyāsadeva, Mahārāja Parīkṣit humbly approached his lotus feet. Bowing his head down upon the sage’s feet, the King, who had lived his entire life under the protection of Lord Viṣṇu, folded his hands in supplication and spoke as follows.
495.yz_zh: 据施瑞拉•维施瓦纳塔•恰夸瓦尔提•塔库尔说，在场倾听舒卡戴瓦教导帕瑞克西特王的圣人中，有些是非人格主义哲学家。因此，samena—词意指，在上一章舒卡戴瓦•勾斯瓦米已经以令这些瑜伽智者愉悦的方式讲述过觉悟自我的哲学。
495.yz_en: According to Śrīla Viśvanātha Cakravartī Ṭhākura, some of the sages present while Śukadeva was instructing King Parīkṣit were impersonalist philosophers. Thus the word samena indicates that in the previous chapter Śukadeva Gosvāmī had spoken the philosophy of self-realization in a way pleasing to such intellectual yogīs.

495.ldw:
rājovāca|siddho ’smy anugṛhīto ’smi
 bhavatā karuṇātmanā
śrāvito yac ca me sākṣād
 anādi-nidhano hariḥ|
495.ldw_fc: rājā uvāca ; siddhaḥ ; asmi ; anugṛhītaḥ ; asmi ; bhavatā ; karuṇā-ātmanā ; śrāvitaḥ ; yat ; ca ; me ; sākṣāt ; anādi ; nidhanaḥ ; hariḥ
495.words_en_fc: King Parīkṣit said; fully successful; I am; shown great mercy; I am; by your good self; who are full of mercy; has been described aurally; because; and; to me; directly; who has no beginning; or end; the Supreme Personality of Godhead.
495.yw_zh: 玛哈茹阿吉·帕瑞克西特说：我现在已达成生命的目标，因为像你这样伟大而仁慈的灵魂已向我显示了这般恩泽。你亲自对我讲述了无始无终的至尊人格首神，哈尔依的讯息。
495.yw_en: Mahārāja Parīkṣit said: I have now achieved the purpose of my life, because a great and merciful soul like you has shown such kindness to me. You have personally spoken to me this narration of the Supreme Personality of Godhead, Hari, who is without beginning or end.

495.ldw:
nāty-adbhutam ahaṁ manye
 mahatām acyutātmanām
ajñeṣu tāpa-tapteṣu
 bhūteṣu yad anugrahaḥ|
495.ldw_fc: na ; ati-adbhutam ; aham ; manye ; mahatām ; acyuta-ātmanām ; ajñeṣu ; tāpa ; tapteṣu ; bhūteṣu ; yat ; anugrahaḥ
495.words_en_fc: not; very surprising; I; think; for the great souls; whose minds are always absorbed in Lord Kṛṣṇa; upon the ignorant; by the distresses of material life; tormented; upon the conditioned souls; which; mercy.
495.yw_zh: 你像这般伟大的灵魂恒常地专注于永不犯错的人格首神，向我们这等饱受物质生命诸苦的折磨，愚蠢而受条件限制的灵魂显示仁慈，这不是什么稀奇事。
495.yw_en: I do not consider it at all amazing that great souls such as yourself, whose minds are always absorbed in the infallible Personality of Godhead, show mercy to the foolish conditioned souls, tormented as we are by the problems of material life.

495.ldw:
purāṇa-saṁhitām etām
 aśrauṣma bhavato vayam
yasyāṁ khalūttamaḥ-śloko
 bhagavān anuvarṇyate|
495.ldw_fc: purāṇa-saṁhitām ; etām ; aśrauṣma ; bhavataḥ ; vayam ; yasyām ; khalu ; uttamaḥ-ślokaḥ ; bhagavān ; anuvarṇyate
495.words_en_fc: essential summary of all the Purāṇas; this; have heard; from you; we; in which; indeed; who is always described in choice poetry; the Personality of Godhead; is fittingly described.
495.yw_zh: 我已从你这里聆听了这部《圣典博伽瓦谭》，它是所有普然那的完美概述，并且尽善尽美地描述了至尊主，乌塔玛施娄卡（被超然诗歌所称颂的至尊人格首神）。
495.yw_en: I have heard from you this Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam, which is the perfect summary of all the Purāṇas and which perfectly describes the Supreme Lord, Uttamaḥśloka.

495.ldw:
bhagavaṁs takṣakādibhyo
 mṛtyubhyo na bibhemy aham
praviṣṭo brahma nirvāṇam
 abhayaṁ darśitaṁ tvayā|
495.ldw_fc: bhagavan ; takṣaka ; ādibhyaḥ ; mṛtyubhyaḥ ; na bibhemi ; aham ; praviṣṭaḥ ; brahma ; nirvāṇam ; abhayam ; darśitam ; tvayā
495.words_en_fc: my lord; from the snake-bird Takṣaka; or other living entities; from repeated deaths; do not fear; I; having entered; the Absolute Truth; exclusive of everything material; fearlessness; shown; by you.
495.yw_zh: 我的主人，我现在不惧怕塔克沙卡和其他任何生物体，甚至也不惧怕反反复复的死亡，因为我已全身心地贯注于由你亲自提示且摧毁一切恐惧的至纯至粹的灵性绝对真理中。
495.yw_en: My lord, I now have no fear of Takṣaka or any other living being, or even of repeated deaths, because I have absorbed myself in that purely spiritual Absolute Truth, which you have revealed and which destroys all fear.

495.ldw:
anujānīhi māṁ brahman
 vācaṁ yacchāmy adhokṣaje
mukta-kāmāśayaṁ cetaḥ
 praveśya visṛjāmy asūn|
495.ldw_fc: anujānīhi ; mām ; brahman ; vācam ; yacchāmi ; adhokṣaje ; mukta ; kāma-āśayam ; cetaḥ ; praveśya ; visṛjāmi ; asūn
495.words_en_fc: please give your permission; to me; O great brāhmaṇa; my speech (and all other sensory functions); I shall place; within the Supreme Personality of Godhead; having given up; all lusty desires; my mind; absorbing; I shall give up; my life air.
495.yw_zh: 布茹阿玛纳啊，请允许我把我的言语和我的一切感官活动都奉献给主阿窦珂沙佳。请允许我将色欲涤荡的心意专注于他，告别尘世。
495.yw_en: O brāhmaṇa, please give me permission to resign my speech and the functions of all my senses unto Lord Adhokṣaja. Allow me to absorb my mind, purified of lusty desires, within Him and to thus give up my life.
495.yz_zh: 舒卡戴瓦•勾斯瓦米询问帕瑞克西特王，“你还要渴望聆听什么呢？”国主回答说他已充分理解《圣典博伽瓦谭》的讯息，准备好重返家园，回归首神，无需进一步探讨。
495.yz_en: Śukadeva Gosvāmī asked King Parīkṣit, “What more do you wish to hear?” Now the King replies that he has perfectly understood the message of Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam and that he is ready, without further discussion, to go back home, back to Godhead.

495.ldw:
ajñānaṁ ca nirastaṁ me
 jñāna-vijñāna-niṣṭhayā
bhavatā darśitaṁ kṣemaṁ
 paraṁ bhagavataḥ padam|
495.ldw_fc: ajñānam ; ca ; nirastam ; me ; jñāna ; vijñāna ; niṣṭhayā ; bhavatā ; darśitam ; kṣemam ; param ; bhagavataḥ ; padam
495.words_en_fc: ignorance; also; eradicated; my; in knowledge of the Supreme Lord; and direct realization of His opulence and sweetness; by becoming fixed; by you; has been shown; all-auspicious; supreme; of the Lord; the Personality.
495.yw_zh: 你已向我揭示主至高无上的人格特征乃是至为吉祥的。眼下，我稳处于知识中，稳处于觉悟自我之境，我的愚昧无知已连根剃除。
495.yw_en: You have revealed to me that which is most auspicious, the supreme personal feature of the Lord. I am now fixed in knowledge and self-realization, and my ignorance has been eradicated.

495.ldw:
sūta uvāca|ity uktas tam anujñāpya
 bhagavān bādarāyaṇiḥ
jagāma bhikṣubhiḥ sākaṁ
 nara-devena pūjitaḥ|
495.ldw_fc: sūtaḥ uvāca ; iti ; uktaḥ ; tam ; anujñāpya ; bhagavān ; bādarāyaṇiḥ ; jagāma ; bhikṣubhiḥ ; sākam ; nara-devena ; pūjitaḥ
495.words_en_fc: Śrī Sūta Gosvāmī said; thus; spoken to; him; giving permission; the powerful saint; Śukadeva, the son of Bādarāyaṇa Vedavyāsa; went away; the renounced sages; along with; by the King; worshiped.
495.yw_zh: 苏塔·哥斯瓦米说：如此恳请之后，施瑞拉·维亚萨戴瓦的圣洁之子应允了帕瑞克西特王。继而，国王和在场的所有圣贤陆续崇拜了他，然后，舒卡戴瓦起身离去了。
495.yw_en: Sūta Gosvāmī said: Thus requested, the saintly son of Śrīla Vyāsadeva gave his permission to King Parīkṣit. Then, after being worshiped by the King and all the sages present, Śukadeva departed from that place.

495.ldw:
parīkṣid api rājarṣir
 ātmany ātmānam ātmanā
samādhāya paraṁ dadhyāv
 aspandāsur yathā taruḥ|prāk-kūle barhiṣy āsīno
 gaṅgā-kūla udaṅ-mukhaḥ
brahma-bhūto mahā-yogī
 niḥsaṅgaś chinna-saṁśayaḥ|
495.ldw_fc: parīkṣit ; api ; rāja-ṛṣiḥ ; ātmani ; ātmānam ; ātmanā ; samādhāya ; param ; dadhyau ; aspanda ; asuḥ ; yathā ; taruḥ ; prāk-kūle ; barhiṣi ; āsīnaḥ ; gaṅgā-kūle ; udak-mukhaḥ ; brahma-bhūtaḥ ; mahā-yogī ; niḥsaṅgaḥ ; chinna ; saṁśayaḥ
495.words_en_fc: Mahārāja Parīkṣit; furthermore; the great saintly King; within his own spiritual identity; his mind; by his intelligence; placing; upon the Supreme; he meditated; motionless; his living air; just as; a tree; with the tips of its stalks facing east; upon darbha grass; sitting; on the bank of the Gaṅgā; facing north; in perfect realization of his true identity; the exalted mystic; free of all material attachment; broken off; all doubts.
495.yw_zh: 接着，玛哈茹阿吉·帕瑞克西特坐于恒河岸边，达尔巴草垫的茎尖朝东，他转身面北。因臻达了瑜伽的完美之境，故而他已充分觉悟自我，毫无物质依附与疑惑。圣王以纯净的智性专注于灵性自我，进而冥想至尊绝对真理。他屏住生命之气，像树一样静止不动。
495.yw_en: Mahārāja Parīkṣit then sat down on the bank of the Ganges, upon a seat made of darbha grass with the tips of its stalks facing east, and turned himself toward the north. Having attained the perfection of yoga, he experienced full self-realization and was free of material attachment and doubt. The saintly King settled his mind within his spiritual self by pure intelligence and proceeded to meditate upon the Supreme Absolute Truth. His life air ceased to move, and he became as stationary as a tree.

495.ldw:
takṣakaḥ prahito viprāḥ
 kruddhena dvija-sūnunā
hantu-kāmo nṛpaṁ gacchan
 dadarśa pathi kaśyapam|
495.ldw_fc: takṣakaḥ ; prahitaḥ ; viprāḥ ; kruddhena ; dvija ; sūnunā ; hantu-kāmaḥ ; nṛpam ; gacchan ; dadarśa ; pathi ; kaśyapam
495.words_en_fc: the snake-bird Takṣaka; sent; O learned brāhmaṇas; who had been angered; of the sage Śamīka; by the son; desirous of killing; the King; while going; he saw; upon the road; Kaśyapa Muni.
495.yw_zh: 诸位博学的布茹阿玛纳啊，由那位布茹阿玛纳愤怒的儿子派遣的蛇鸟塔克沙卡朝国王奔去，意欲杀死他，但在半路遇到了卡夏帕·牟尼。
495.yw_en: O learned brāhmaṇas, the snake-bird Takṣaka, who had been sent by the angry son of a brāhmaṇa, was going toward the King to kill him when he saw Kaśyapa Muni on the path.

495.ldw:
taṁ tarpayitvā draviṇair
 nivartya viṣa-hāriṇam
dvija-rūpa-praticchannaḥ
 kāma-rūpo ’daśan nṛpam|
495.ldw_fc: tam ; tarpayitvā ; draviṇaiḥ ; nivartya ; viṣa-hāriṇam ; dvija-rūpa ; praticchannaḥ ; kāma-rūpaḥ ; adaśat ; nṛpam
495.words_en_fc: him (Kaśyapa); gratifying; with valuable offerings; stopping; an expert in counteracting poison; in the form of a brāhmaṇa; disguising himself; Takṣaka, who could assume any form he wished; bit; King Parīkṣit.
495.yw_zh: 塔克沙卡向卡夏帕馈赠重礼，奉承讨好他，以制止这位精通解毒术的圣人保护玛哈茹阿吉·帕瑞克西特。然后，这只能随意变化身体的蛇鸟摇身伪装成一名布茹阿玛纳，去到国王跟前咬他。
495.yw_en: Takṣaka flattered Kaśyapa by presenting him with valuable offerings and thereby stopped the sage, who was expert in counteracting poison, from protecting Mahārāja Parīkṣit. Then the snake-bird, who could assume any form he wished, disguised himself as a brāhmaṇa, approached the King and bit him.
495.yz_zh: 卡夏帕本可以抵消塔克沙卡的剧毒，他曾施展过这种力量，使塔克沙卡用毒牙咬死的一棵棕榈树起死回生。由于命运的安排，卡夏帕被塔克沙卡引开，结果便发生了不可避免的一幕。
495.yz_en: Kaśyapa could counteract the poison of Takṣaka and demonstrated this power by bringing a palm tree back to life after Takṣaka had burned it to ashes by biting it with his fangs. According to the arrangement of destiny, Kaśyapa was diverted by Takṣaka, and the inevitable took place.

495.ldw:
brahma-bhūtasya rājarṣer
 deho ’hi-garalāgninā
babhūva bhasmasāt sadyaḥ
 paśyatāṁ sarva-dehinām|
495.ldw_fc: brahma-bhūtasya ; rāja-ṛṣeḥ ; dehaḥ ; ahi ; garala ; agninā ; babhūva ; bhasma-sāt ; sadyaḥ ; paśyatām ; sarva-dehinām
495.words_en_fc: of the fully self-realized; the saint among kings; the body; of the snake; from the poison; by the fire; turned; to ashes; immediately; while they were watching; all embodied living beings.
495.yw_zh: 宇宙间的芸芸众生亲眼目睹到，君王中觉悟了自我的伟大圣人，顷刻间被毒蛇喷出的烈火焚成灰烬。
495.yw_en: While living beings all over the universe looked on, the body of the great self-realized saint among kings was immediately burned to ashes by the fire of the snake’s poison.

495.ldw:
hāhā-kāro mahān āsīd
 bhuvi khe dikṣu sarvataḥ
vismitā hy abhavan sarve
 devāsura-narādayaḥ|
495.ldw_fc: hāhā-kāraḥ ; mahān ; āsīt ; bhuvi ; khe ; dikṣu ; sarvataḥ ; vismitāḥ ; hi ; abhavan ; sarve ; deva ; asura ; nara ; ādayaḥ
495.words_en_fc: a cry of lamentation; great; there was; on the earth; in the sky; in the directions; all about; amazed; indeed; they became; all; the demigods; demons; human beings; and other creatures.
495.yw_zh: 天堂人间，四面八方，恸哭声一片，令人毛骨悚然，全体半神人、恶魔、人类和其他生物体大为震惊。
495.yw_en: There arose a terrible cry of lamentation in all directions on the earth and in the heavens, and all the demigods, demons, human beings and other creatures were astonished.

495.ldw:
deva-dundubhayo nedur
 gandharvāpsaraso jaguḥ
vavṛṣuḥ puṣpa-varṣāṇi
 vibudhāḥ sādhu-vādinaḥ|
495.ldw_fc: deva ; dundubhayaḥ ; neduḥ ; gandharva-apsarasaḥ ; jaguḥ ; vavṛṣuḥ ; puṣpa-varṣāṇi ; vibudhāḥ ; sādhu-vādinaḥ
495.words_en_fc: of the demigods; the kettledrums; resounded; the Gandharvas and Apsarās; sang; they showered down; rains of flowers; the demigods; speaking praise.
495.yw_zh: 定音鼓响彻半神人的居所，天神般的甘达尔瓦和阿普萨尔们引吭高歌。诸位半神人抛洒花雨，吟诵赞歌。
495.yw_en: Kettledrums sounded in the regions of the demigods, and the celestial Gandharvas and Apsarās sang. The demigods showered flowers and spoke words of praise.
495.yz_zh: 虽然包括半神人在内的所有博学之士起初悲伤满怀，但很快领会到一个伟大的灵魂已重返家园，回归首神。毋庸置疑，这就是举天同庆的原因所在。
495.yz_en: Although lamenting at first, all learned persons, including the demigods, soon realized that a great soul had gone back home, back to Godhead. This was certainly a cause for celebration.

495.ldw:
janmejayaḥ sva-pitaraṁ
 śrutvā takṣaka-bhakṣitam
yathājuhāva saṅkruddho
 nāgān satre saha dvijaiḥ|
495.ldw_fc: janmejayaḥ ; sva-pitaram ; śrutvā ; takṣaka ; bhakṣitam ; yathā ; ājuhāva ; saṅkruddhaḥ ; nāgān ; satre ; saha ; dvijaiḥ
495.words_en_fc: King Janamejaya, the son of Parīkṣit; his own father; hearing; by Takṣaka, the snake-bird; bitten; properly; offered as oblations; extremely angry; the snakes; in a great sacrifice; along with; brāhmaṇas.
495.yw_zh: 得知父王被蛇鸟咬死，玛哈茹阿吉·佳纳梅佳亚雷霆震怒，他号召众位布茹阿玛纳举行盛大的祭祀，要把世上所有的蛇投到祭火中当做供品。
495.yw_en: Hearing that his father had been fatally bitten by the snake-bird, Mahārāja Janamejaya became extremely angry and had brāhmaṇas perform a mighty sacrifice in which he offered all the snakes in the world into the sacrificial fire.

495.ldw:
sarpa-satre samiddhāgnau
 dahyamānān mahoragān
dṛṣṭvendraṁ bhaya-saṁvignas
 takṣakaḥ śaraṇaṁ yayau|
495.ldw_fc: sarpa-satre ; samiddha ; agnau ; dahyamānān ; mahā-uragān ; dṛṣṭvā ; indram ; bhaya ; saṁvignaḥ ; takṣakaḥ ; śaraṇam ; yayau
495.words_en_fc: in the snake sacrifice; blazing; in the fire; being burned; the great serpents; seeing; to Indra; with fear; very disturbed; Takṣaka; for shelter; went.
495.yw_zh: 当塔克沙卡看到甚至最强大的蛇都葬身于蛇祭的烈火中，不禁诚惶诚恐，遂到主因陀跟前寻求庇护。
495.yw_en: When Takṣaka saw even the most powerful serpents being burned in the blazing fire of that snake sacrifice, he was overwhelmed with fear and approached Lord Indra for shelter.

495.ldw:
apaśyaṁs takṣakaṁ tatra
 rājā pārīkṣito dvijān
uvāca takṣakaḥ kasmān
 na dahyetoragādhamaḥ|
495.ldw_fc: apaśyan ; takṣakam ; tatra ; rājā ; pārīkṣitaḥ ; dvijān ; uvāca ; takṣakaḥ ; kasmāt ; na dahyeta ; uraga ; adhamaḥ
495.words_en_fc: not seeing; Takṣaka; there; the King; Janamejaya; to the brāhmaṇas; said; Takṣaka; why; has not been burned; of all the serpents; the lowest.
495.yw_zh: 当佳纳梅佳亚未见塔克沙卡落入祭火中，便对诸位布茹阿玛纳说道：为何蛇中最低贱的塔克沙卡还未葬身于祭火中。
495.yw_en: When King Janamejaya did not see Takṣaka entering his sacrificial fire, he said to the brāhmaṇas: Why is not Takṣaka, the lowest of all serpents, burning in this fire?

495.ldw:
taṁ gopāyati rājendra
 śakraḥ śaraṇam āgatam
tena saṁstambhitaḥ sarpas
 tasmān nāgnau pataty asau|
495.ldw_fc: tam ; gopāyati ; rāja-indra ; śakraḥ ; śaraṇam ; āgatam ; tena ; saṁstambhitaḥ ; sarpaḥ ; tasmāt ; na ; agnau ; patati ; asau
495.words_en_fc: him (Takṣaka); is hiding; O best of kings; Lord Indra; for shelter; who has approached; by that Indra; kept; the snake; thus; not; into the fire; does fall; he.
495.yw_zh: 诸位布茹阿玛纳答道：君王中的佼佼者啊，巨蛇塔克沙卡尚未坠入火中似是因为他到因陀跟前求取庇护，故而被保护起来。因陀一直使他没有落入烈火。
495.yw_en: The brāhmaṇas replied: O best of kings, the snake Takṣaka has not fallen into the fire because he is being protected by Indra, whom he has approached for shelter. Indra is holding him back from the fire.

495.ldw:
pārīkṣita iti śrutvā
 prāhartvija udāra-dhīḥ
sahendras takṣako viprā
 nāgnau kim iti pātyate|
495.ldw_fc: pārīkṣitaḥ ; iti ; śrutvā ; prāha ; ṛtvijaḥ ; udāra ; dhīḥ ; saha ; indraḥ ; takṣakaḥ ; viprāḥ ; na ; agnau ; kim ; iti ; pātyate
495.words_en_fc: King Janamejaya; these words; hearing; replied; to the priests; broad; whose intelligence; along with; Indra; Takṣaka; O brāhmaṇas; not; into the fire; why; indeed; is made to fall.
495.yw_zh: 睿智的佳纳梅佳亚王听罢，对祭司们答道：诸位亲爱的布茹阿玛纳，为何不使塔克沙卡连同他的保护神因陀双双坠入火中？
495.yw_en: The intelligent King Janamejaya, hearing these words, replied to the priests: Then, my dear brāhmaṇas, why not make Takṣaka fall into the fire, along with his protector, Indra?

495.ldw:
tac chrutvājuhuvur viprāḥ
 sahendraṁ takṣakaṁ makhe
takṣakāśu patasveha
 sahendreṇa marutvatā|
495.ldw_fc: tat ; śrutvā ; ājuhuvuḥ ; viprāḥ ; saha ; indram ; takṣakam ; makhe ; takṣaka ; āśu ; patasva ; iha ; saha indreṇa ; marut-vatā
495.words_en_fc: that; hearing; they performed the ritual of offering oblation; the brāhmaṇa priests; along with; King Indra; the snake-bird Takṣaka; into the sacrificial fire; O Takṣaka; quickly; you should fall; here; together with Indra; who is accompanied by all the demigods.
495.yw_zh: 听了这番话，众位祭司便吟诵以下曼陀，决意把塔克沙卡和因陀当作祭品置于祭火中：塔克沙卡呀，立即随同因陀及其全体半神人随从坠入祭火吧！
495.yw_en: Hearing this, the priests then chanted this mantra for offering Takṣaka together with Indra as an oblation into the sacrificial fire: O Takṣaka, fall immediately into this fire, together with Indra and his entire host of demigods!

495.ldw:
iti brahmoditākṣepaiḥ
 sthānād indraḥ pracālitaḥ
babhūva sambhrānta-matiḥ
 sa-vimānaḥ sa-takṣakaḥ|
495.ldw_fc: iti ; brahma ; udita ; ākṣepaiḥ ; sthānāt ; indraḥ ; pracālitaḥ ; babhūva ; sambhrānta ; matiḥ ; sa-vimānaḥ ; sa-takṣakaḥ
495.words_en_fc: thus; by the brāhmaṇas; spoken; by the insulting words; from his place; Lord Indra; thrown; became; disturbed; in his mind; along with his heavenly airplane; along with Takṣaka.
495.yw_zh: 由于众位布茹阿玛纳具有杀伤力的话语，因陀连同他的飞机和塔克沙卡突然直落云霄，这使因陀惴惴不安。
495.yw_en: When Lord Indra, along with his airplane and Takṣaka, was suddenly thrown from his position by these insulting words of the brāhmaṇas, he became very disturbed.

495.ldw:
taṁ patantaṁ vimānena
 saha-takṣakam ambarāt
vilokyāṅgirasaḥ prāha
 rājānaṁ taṁ bṛhaspatiḥ|
495.ldw_fc: tam ; patantam ; vimānena ; saha-takṣakam ; ambarāt ; vilokya ; āṅgirasaḥ ; prāha ; rājānam ; tam ; bṛhaspatiḥ
495.words_en_fc: him; falling; in his airplane; with Takṣaka; from the sky; observing; the son of Aṅgirā; spoke; to the King (Janamejaya); to him; Bṛhaspati.
495.yw_zh: 布瑞哈斯帕提，安给茹阿·牟尼之子，看见因陀和塔克沙卡乘着飞机突然从天际坠落，便去到佳纳梅佳亚跟前说了如下一番话。
495.yw_en: Bṛhaspati, the son of Aṅgirā Muni, seeing Indra falling from the sky in his airplane along with Takṣaka, approached King Janamejaya and spoke to him as follows.

495.ldw:
naiṣa tvayā manuṣyendra
 vadham arhati sarpa-rāṭ
anena pītam amṛtam
 atha vā ajarāmaraḥ|

495.words_en_fc: not; this snake-bird; by you; O great ruler of men; murder; deserves; the king of snakes; by him; has been drunk; the nectar of the demigods; therefore; certainly; free from the effects of old age; virtually immortal.
495.yw_zh: 人之君王啊，这条蛇王不宜被你手刃，因为他已喝饮半神人的长生甘露。所以，他不受年老与死亡等普通表象的左右。
495.yw_en: O King among men, it is not fitting that this king of snakes meet death at your hands, for he has drunk the nectar of the immortal demigods. Consequently he is not subject to the ordinary symptoms of old age and death.

495.ldw:
jīvitaṁ maraṇaṁ jantor
 gatiḥ svenaiva karmaṇā
rājaṁs tato ’nyo nāsty asya
 pradātā sukha-duḥkhayoḥ|
495.ldw_fc: jīvitam ; maraṇam ; jantoḥ ; gatiḥ ; svena ; eva ; karmaṇā ; rājan ; tataḥ ; anyaḥ ; na asti ; asya ; pradātā ; sukha-duḥkhayoḥ
495.words_en_fc: the living; the dying; of a living being; the destination in his next life; by his own; only; work; O King; than that; another; there is not; for him; bestower; of happiness and distress.
495.yw_zh: 体困灵魂经历的生与死，以及他在来世的目的地，均由他自身的活动引起。因此，国王陛下啊，实际上，没有其他代理负责产生一个人的苦与乐。
495.yw_en: The life and death of an embodied soul and his destination in the next life are all caused by himself through his own activity. Therefore, O King, no other agent is actually responsible for creating one’s happiness and distress.
495.yz_zh: 虽然帕瑞克西特王表面上被塔克沙卡咬死，但实际上主奎师那本人已把国王带回神的王国。布瑞哈斯帕提想要佳纳梅佳亚王从灵性的视角看待事情。
495.yz_en: Although King Parīkṣit apparently died by the bite of Takṣaka, it was Lord Kṛṣṇa Himself who brought the King back to the kingdom of God. Bṛhaspati wanted young King Janamejaya to see things from the spiritual point of view.

495.ldw:
sarpa-caurāgni-vidyudbhyaḥ
 kṣut-tṛd-vyādhy-ādibhir nṛpa
pañcatvam ṛcchate jantur
 bhuṅkta ārabdha-karma tat|
495.ldw_fc: sarpa ; caura ; agni ; vidyudbhyaḥ ; kṣut ; tṛṭ ; vyādhi ; ādibhiḥ ; nṛpa ; pañcatvam ; ṛcchate ; jantuḥ ; bhuṅkte ; ārabdha ; karma ; tat
495.words_en_fc: from snakes; thieves; fire; and lightning; from hunger; thirst; disease; and other agents; O King; death; obtains; the conditioned living entity; he enjoys; already created by his past work; the fruitive reaction; that.
495.yw_zh: 当受条件限制灵魂遭蛇虫、盗贼、烈火、雷电、饥渴、疾病等攻击致死，便要经历他自身过往活动的反应。
495.yw_en: When a conditioned soul is killed by snakes, thieves, fire, lightning, hunger, disease or anything else, he is experiencing the reaction to his own past work.
495.yz_zh: 据施瑞拉•维施瓦纳塔•恰夸瓦尔提•塔库尔说，显而易见，帕瑞克西特王不是在遭受他过往卡尔玛的反应。他是一位伟大奉献者，已被主亲自带回家园，带回首神。
495.yz_en: According to Śrīla Viśvanātha Cakravartī Ṭhākura, King Parīkṣit obviously was not suffering the reaction of past karma. As a great devotee he was personally brought back home, back to Godhead, by the Lord.

495.ldw:
tasmāt satram idaṁ rājan
 saṁsthīyetābhicārikam
sarpā anāgaso dagdhā
 janair diṣṭaṁ hi bhujyate|
495.ldw_fc: tasmāt ; satram ; idam ; rājan ; saṁsthīyeta ; ābhicārikam ; sarpāḥ ; anāgasaḥ ; dagdhāḥ ; janaiḥ ; diṣṭam ; hi ; bhujyate
495.words_en_fc: therefore; sacrifice; this; O King; should be stopped; done with intent to harm; the serpents; innocent; burned; by persons; fate; indeed; is suffered.
495.yw_zh: 因此，我亲爱的国王，请停止这场意在伤害他人而做的祭祀。许多无辜的蛇已被烧死。千真万确，所有人要经受各自过往活动导致的无法预料的结果。
495.yw_en: Therefore, my dear King, please stop this sacrificial performance, which was initiated with the intent of doing harm to others. Many innocent snakes have already been burned to death. Indeed, all persons must suffer the unforeseen consequences of their past activities.
495.yz_zh: 布瑞哈斯帕提在此承认，尽管那些蛇貌似无辜，但由于主的安排，他们在为经年的罪恶活动而受到惩戒。
495.yz_en: Bṛhaspati here admits that although the snakes appeared to be innocent, by the Lord’s arrangement they were also being punished for previous vicious activities.

495.ldw:
sūta uvāca|ity uktaḥ sa tathety āha
 maharṣer mānayan vacaḥ
sarpa-satrād uparataḥ
 pūjayām āsa vāk-patim|
495.ldw_fc: sūtaḥ uvāca ; iti ; uktaḥ ; saḥ ; tathā iti ; āha ; mahā-ṛṣeḥ ; mānayan ; vacaḥ ; sarpa-satrāt ; uparataḥ ; pūjayām āsa ; vāk-patim
495.words_en_fc: Sūta Gosvāmī said; thus; addressed; he (Janamejaya); so be it; he said; of the great sage; honoring; the words; from the snake sacrifice; ceasing; he worshiped; Bṛhaspati, the master of eloquence.
495.yw_zh: 苏塔·哥斯瓦米继续道：如此奉劝之后，玛哈茹阿吉·佳纳梅佳亚答道：“如您所愿”。他依照伟大圣哲的话语行事，停止施行蛇祭，然后他崇拜了最善于辞令的圣哲布瑞哈斯帕提。
495.yw_en: Sūta Gosvāmī continued: Advised in this manner, Mahārāja Janamejaya replied, “So be it.” Honoring the words of the great sage, he desisted from performing the snake sacrifice and worshiped Bṛhaspati, the most eloquent of sages.

495.ldw:
saiṣā viṣṇor mahā-māyā-
 bādhyayālakṣaṇā yayā
muhyanty asyaivātma-bhūtā
 bhūteṣu guṇa-vṛttibhiḥ|
495.ldw_fc: sā eṣā ; viṣṇoḥ ; mahā-māyā ; abādhyayā ; alakṣaṇā ; yayā ; muhyanti ; asya ; eva ; ātma-bhūtāḥ ; bhūteṣu ; guṇa ; vṛttibhiḥ
495.words_en_fc: this very; of the Supreme Lord, Viṣṇu; the illusory material energy; by her who cannot be checked; indiscernible; by whom; become bewildered; of the Lord; indeed; the part-and-parcel spirit souls; within their material bodies; of the modes of nature; by the functions.
495.yw_zh: 千真万确，这就是至尊主维施努那难以阻止和察知的迷幻能量。虽然个体灵魂是主的所属碎片部分，但在迷幻能量的影响下，变得迷茫困惑，跟各种物质躯体认同。
495.yw_en: This is indeed the Supreme Lord Viṣṇu’s illusory energy, which is unstoppable and difficult to perceive. Although the individual spirit souls are part and parcel of the Lord, through the influence of this illusory energy they are bewildered by their identification with various material bodies.
495.yz_zh: 主维施努的迷幻能量如此强大有力，甚至帕瑞克西特王的杰出儿子一时间也出现了闪失。然而，由于他是主奎师那的奉献者，所以及时醒悟了。另一方面，普通的物质主义者不在主的特殊保护下，跌落进物质愚昧的深渊。事实上，物质主义者对主维施努的保护毫无兴致，故而必遭毁灭。
495.yz_en: The illusory energy of Lord Viṣṇu is so powerful that even the illustrious son of King Parīkṣit was temporarily misdirected. Because he was a devotee of Lord Kṛṣṇa, however, his bewilderment was quickly rectified. On the other hand, an ordinary, materialistic person without the special protection of the Lord plummets to the depths of material ignorance. Factually, materialistic persons are not interested in the protection of Lord Viṣṇu. Therefore their complete ruination is inevitable.

495.ldw:
na yatra dambhīty abhayā virājitā
 māyātma-vāde ’sakṛd ātma-vādibhiḥ
na yad vivādo vividhas tad-āśrayo
 manaś ca saṅkalpa-vikalpa-vṛtti yat|na yatra sṛjyaṁ sṛjatobhayoḥ paraṁ
 śreyaś ca jīvas tribhir anvitas tv aham
tad etad utsādita-bādhya-bādhakaṁ
 niṣidhya cormīn virameta tan muniḥ|
495.ldw_fc: na ; yatra ; dambhī ; iti ; abhayā ; virājitā ; māyā ; ātma-vāde ; asakṛt ; ātma-vādibhiḥ ; na ; yat ; vivādaḥ ; vividhaḥ ; tat-āśrayaḥ ; manaḥ ; ca ; saṅkalpa ; vikalpa ; vṛtti ; yat ; na ; yatra ; sṛjyam ; sṛjatā ; ubhayoḥ ; param ; śreyaḥ ; ca ; jīvaḥ ; tribhiḥ ; anvitaḥ ; tu ; aham ; tat etat ; utsādita ; bādhya ; bādhakam ; niṣidhya ; ca ; ūrmīn ; virameta ; tat ; muniḥ
495.words_en_fc: not; in which; he is a hypocrite; thinking thus; fearless; visible; the illusory energy; when spiritual inquiry is being conducted; constantly; by those who describe spiritual science; not; in which; materialistic argument; taking many different forms; founded upon that illusory energy; the mind; and; decision; and doubt; whose functions; in which; not; in which; the created products of the material world; along with their causes; by both; achieved; the benefits; and; the living entity; with the three (modes of nature); joined; indeed; (conditioned by) false ego; that indeed; excluding; the obstructed (conditioned living beings); and the obstructing (modes of material nature); warding off; and; the waves (of false ego and so on); should take special pleasure; in that; a sage.
495.yw_zh: 但是，存在着至尊真相，在其中迷幻能量不能斗胆主宰，不会想，“我可以掌控这个人，因为他虚伪欺诈。”在那至高的真相中，不存在产生迷惑、引起争论的五花八门的哲学。恰相反，在那里，灵性科学方面的真正学生永恒研究权威的灵性知识。在那至高无上的真相中，没有其功能是反复地接受与拒绝的物质心意的展示。受 造的物质产物及其精微的原因，还有对二者加以使用而进行享乐的种种目标，在那里一概不存在。而且，在至高的真相中，没有为假自我和自然三属性所覆盖的受条件限制的灵魂。一切受限制的或有限制的一切均不存在于那真相之中。因此，智者应该停止随波逐流的物质生命，在至尊真理中获得喜乐。
495.yw_en: But there exists a supreme reality, in which the illusory energy cannot fearlessly dominate, thinking, “I can control this person because he is deceitful.” In that highest reality there are no illusory argumentative philosophies. Rather, there the true students of spiritual science constantly engage in authorized spiritual investigation. In that supreme reality there is no manifestation of the material mind, which functions in terms of alternating decision and doubt. Created material products, their subtle causes and the goals of enjoyment attained by their utilization do not exist there. Furthermore, in that supreme reality there is no conditioned spirit, covered by false ego and the three modes of nature. That reality excludes everything limited or limiting. One who is wise should therefore stop the waves of material life and enjoy within that Supreme Truth.
495.yz_zh:
主的迷幻能量，玛亚Maya，能自如地对那些伪善者、欺诈者和违反神的法律的人施以影响。由于人格首神没有一切物质品质，所以玛亚在他面前望而生畏。正如主布茹阿玛说(vilajjamanaya yasya sthatum iksa-pate muya)：“Maya不好意思与至尊主面对面相见。”

在至尊灵性真相中，决无没用的学术争斗。正如《圣典博伽瓦谭》（6.4.31)说，

yac-chaktayo vadatam vadinam vai

vivada-samvada-bhuvo bhavanti

kurvanti caisam mahur atma-moham

tasmai namo nanta-gunaya bhumne

“让我向无所不在且拥有无限超然品质的至尊人格首神，致以虔敬的顶拜。他活动在传播各种观点的所有哲学家的心中，他使他们时而观点一致，时而各执一词的时候忘却自己是灵魂。就这样，他在物质世界里创造出一种他们莫衷一是的情形。我向他顶礼膜拜。”
495.yz_en:
The illusory energy of the Lord, Māyā, can freely exert her influence over those who are hypocritical, deceitful and disobedient to the laws of God. Since the Personality of Godhead is free of all material qualities, Māyā herself becomes fearful in His presence. As stated by Lord Brahmā (vilajjamānayā yasya sthātum īkṣa-pate ’muyā): “Māyā herself is ashamed to stand face to face with the Supreme Lord.”

In the supreme spiritual reality, useless academic wrangling is completely absent. As stated in Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam (6.4.31):

yac-chaktayo vadatāṁ vādināṁ vai
 vivāda-saṁvāda-bhuvo bhavanti
kurvanti caiṣāṁ muhur ātma-mohaṁ
 tasmai namo ’nanta-guṇāya bhūmne

“Let me offer my respectful obeisances unto the all-pervading Supreme Personality of Godhead, who possesses unlimited transcendental qualities. Acting from within the cores of the hearts of all philosophers, who propagate various views, He causes them to forget their own souls while sometimes agreeing and sometimes disagreeing among themselves. Thus He creates within this material world a situation in which they are unable to come to a conclusion. I offer my obeisances unto Him.”

495.ldw:
paraṁ padaṁ vaiṣṇavam āmananti tad
 yan neti netīty atad-utsisṛkṣavaḥ
visṛjya daurātmyam ananya-sauhṛdā
 hṛdopaguhyāvasitaṁ samāhitaiḥ|
495.ldw_fc: param ; padam ; vaiṣṇavam ; āmananti ; tat ; yat ; na iti na iti ; iti ; atat ; utsisṛkṣavaḥ ; visṛjya ; daurātmyam ; ananya ; sauhṛdāḥ ; hṛdā ; upaguhya ; avasitam ; samāhitaiḥ
495.words_en_fc: the supreme; situation; of Lord Viṣṇu; they designate; that; which; “not this, not this”; thus analyzing; everything extraneous; those who are desirous of giving up; rejecting; petty materialism; placing nowhere else; their affection; within their hearts; embracing Him; who is captured; by those who meditate upon Him in trance.
495.yw_zh: 那些渴望摈弃一切非真相的人，通过辨析否定外在的而系统地了解主维施努的至尊地位。他们抛开猥琐的物质主义，专一地将爱献给他们心中的绝对真理，全神贯注地冥想和信奉至高真理。
495.yw_en: Those who desire to give up all that is not essentially real move systematically, by negative discrimination of the extraneous, to the supreme position of Lord Viṣṇu. Giving up petty materialism, they offer their love exclusively to the Absolute Truth within their hearts and embrace that highest truth in fixed meditation.
495.yz_zh: 诗文yan neti netity atad-utsisrksavah指的是辨析否定的方式，通过这种方式，一个人系统地探寻至为重要的绝对真理，摈弃多余、肤浅且相对的一切。纵覌世界，人们在逐渐否定政治、社会甚至宗教真言的最终有效性，但由干他们缺乏奎师那知觉，所以始终困惑迷惘、愤世嫉俗。然而，正如这里清晰说道，param padam vaisnavam amananti tat。真正渴望完美知识的人必须不仅摈弃非实质的一切，而且最终还要了解实质性的灵性真相，即param padam vaisnavam:至高无上的目的地，主维施努的居所。Padam指的是至尊人格首神的地位与居所，这只为那些已摈除猥亵的物质主义，臻至专心地为主奉献的人所理解。如此纯一的爱决非思想狭隘和宗派主义的体现，因为当人直接服务至尊生物体，尽在主中的芸芸众生全自动地被得以服务。这为主和一切众生做出最髙服务的程序，便构成《圣典博伽瓦谭》通篇教导的奎师那知觉的科学。
495.yz_en: The words yan neti netīty atad-utsisṛkṣavaḥ indicate the process of negative discrimination, by which one engaged in the search for essential and absolute truth systematically rejects all that is superfluous, superficial and relative. Throughout the world people have gradually rejected the ultimate validity of political, social and even religious truths, but because they lack Kṛṣṇa consciousness they remain bewildered and cynical. However, as clearly stated here, paraṁ padaṁ vaiṣṇavam āmananti tat. Those who actually desire perfect knowledge must not only reject the nonessential but must also ultimately understand the essential spiritual reality called paraṁ padaṁ vaiṣṇavam: the supreme destination, the abode of Lord Viṣṇu. Padam indicates both the status and the abode of the Supreme Personality of Godhead, which can be understood only by those who give up petty materialism and adopt the position of ananya-sauhṛdam, exclusive love for the Lord. Such exclusive love is not narrow-minded or sectarian, because all living entities, being within the Lord, are automatically served when one directly serves the supreme entity. This process of rendering the highest service to the Lord and to all living entities constitutes the science of Kṛṣṇa consciousness, which is taught throughout Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam.

495.ldw:
ta etad adhigacchanti
 viṣṇor yat paramaṁ padam
ahaṁ mameti daurjanyaṁ
 na yeṣāṁ deha-geha-jam|

495.yw_zh: 这些奉献者了解人格首神主维施努的至尊超然地位，因为他们不再被基于躯体和家庭的“我”和“我的”概念污染。
495.yw_en: Such devotees come to understand the supreme transcendental situation of the Personality of Godhead, Lord Viṣṇu, because they are no longer polluted by the concepts of “I” and “my,” which are based on body and home.

495.ldw:
ativādāṁs titikṣeta
 nāvamanyeta kañcana
na cemaṁ deham āśritya
 vairaṁ kurvīta kenacit|

495.yw_zh: 应该容忍一切侮辱，不要失敬于人。切莫跟物质躯体认同，不要于人为敌。
495.yw_en: One should tolerate all insults and never fail to show proper respect to any person. Avoiding identification with the material body, one should not create enmity with anyone.

495.ldw:
namo bhagavate tasmai
 kṛṣṇāyākuṇṭha-medhase
yat-pādāmburuha-dhyānāt
 saṁhitām adhyagām imām|

495.words_en_fc: obeisances; to the Supreme Personality of Godhead; to Him; Lord Śrī Kṛṣṇa; whose power is never impeded; whose; upon the lotus feet; by meditation; the scripture; I have assimilated; this.
495.yw_zh: 我向至尊人格首神，不可思议的圣主奎师那，顶礼膜拜。仅凭冥想他的莲花足，我就做到了研习并理解这部伟大的文献。
495.yw_en: I offer my obeisances to the Supreme Personality of Godhead, the invincible Lord Śrī Kṛṣṇa. Simply by meditating upon His lotus feet I have been able to study and appreciate this great literature.

495.ldw:
śrī-śaunaka uvāca|pailādibhir vyāsa-śiṣyair
 vedācāryair mahātmabhiḥ
vedāś ca kathitā vyastā
 etat saumyābhidhehi naḥ|
