495.words_en_fc: Śrī Śaunaka Ṛṣi said; by Paila and others; the disciples of Śrīla Vyāsadeva; the standard authorities of the Vedas; whose intelligence was very great; the Vedas; and; spoken; divided; this; O gentle Sūta; please narrate; to us.
495.yw_zh: 邵纳卡·瑞希说：温文尔雅的苏塔啊，请向我们讲述培拉和施瑞拉·维亚萨戴瓦的其他智珠在握的门徒们如何讲解并编辑了韦达诸经，他们乃是韦达智慧方面知名的标准权威。
495.yw_en: Śaunaka Ṛṣi said: O gentle Sūta, please narrate to us how Paila and the other greatly intelligent disciples of Śrīla Vyāsadeva, who are known as the standard authorities of Vedic wisdom, spoke and edited the Vedas.

495.ldw:
sūta uvāca|samāhitātmano brahman
 brahmaṇaḥ parameṣṭhinaḥ
hṛdy ākāśād abhūn nādo
 vṛtti-rodhād vibhāvyate|
495.ldw_fc: sūtaḥ uvāca ; samāhita-ātmanaḥ ; brahman ; brahmaṇaḥ ; parame-sthinaḥ ; hṛdi ; ākāśāt ; abhūt ; nādaḥ ; vṛtti-rodhāt ; vibhāvyate
495.words_en_fc: Sūta Gosvāmī said; whose mind was perfectly fixed; O brāhmaṇa (Śaunaka); of Lord Brahmā; the most elevated of living beings; within the heart; from out of the sky; arose; the transcendental subtle sound; by stopping the functioning (of the ears); is perceived.
495.yw_zh: 苏塔·哥斯瓦米说：布茹阿玛纳呀，首先，超然的精微音震从至为崇高的主布茹阿玛的心房油然升起，那时他的心意固若磐石，稳处于灵性觉悟中。当人停止聆听外界的一切，便能觉知到这精微的音震。
495.yw_en: Sūta Gosvāmī said: O brāhmaṇa, first the subtle vibration of transcendental sound appeared from the sky of the heart of the most elevated Lord Brahmā, whose mind was perfectly fixed in spiritual realization. One can perceive this subtle vibration when one stops all external hearing.
495.yz_zh: 《圣典博伽瓦谏》是至髙无上的韦达典籍，以邵纳卡为首的圣贤们切望追溯其渊源。
495.yz_en: Because Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam is the supreme Vedic literature, the sages headed by Śaunaka desired to trace out its source.

495.ldw:
yad-upāsanayā brahman
 yogino malam ātmanaḥ
dravya-kriyā-kārakākhyaṁ
 dhūtvā yānty apunar-bhavam|
495.ldw_fc: yat ; upāsanayā ; brahman ; yoginaḥ ; malam ; ātmanaḥ ; dravya ; kriyā ; kāraka ; ākhyam ; dhūtvā ; yānti ; apunaḥ-bhavam
495.words_en_fc: of which (subtle form of the Vedas); by the worship; O brāhmaṇa; mystic sages; the contamination; of the heart; substance; activity; and performer; designated as such; cleansing away; they achieve; freedom from rebirth.
495.yw_zh: 通过崇拜这精微形式的韦达经，布茹阿玛纳呀，众位神秘主义圣人心中由物质、活动和施行者的不洁招致的一切污染一扫而空，如此，他们臻至不再生死轮回的超脱境界。
495.yw_en: By worship of this subtle form of the Vedas, O brāhmaṇa, mystic sages cleanse their hearts of all contamination caused by impurity of substance, activity and doer, and thus they attain freedom from repeated birth and death.

495.ldw:
tato ’bhūt tri-vṛd oṁkāro
 yo ’vyakta-prabhavaḥ sva-rāṭ
yat tal liṅgaṁ bhagavato
 brahmaṇaḥ paramātmanaḥ|
495.ldw_fc: tataḥ ; abhūt ; tri-vṛt ; oṁkāraḥ ; yaḥ ; avyakta ; prabhavaḥ ; sva-rāṭ ; yat ; tat ; liṅgam ; bhagavataḥ ; brahmaṇaḥ ; parama-ātmanaḥ
495.words_en_fc: from that; came into being; threefold; the syllable om; which; not apparent; its influence; self-manifesting; which; that; the representation; of the Supreme Personality of Godhead; of the Absolute Truth in His impersonal aspect; and of the Supersoul.
495.yw_zh: 从那超然的精微音震中产生出由三个音节组成的omkara。omkara具有目不可见的威力，自动展示在纯净的心灵中。它代表绝对真理的三个方面——至尊人格，至尊灵魂（超灵）和至尊非人格真理。
495.yw_en: From that transcendental subtle vibration arose the oṁkāra composed of three sounds. The oṁkāra has unseen potencies and manifests automatically within a purified heart. It is the representation of the Absolute Truth in all three of His phases — the Supreme Personality, the Supreme Soul and the supreme impersonal truth.

495.ldw:
śṛṇoti ya imaṁ sphoṭaṁ
 supta-śrotre ca śūnya-dṛk
yena vāg vyajyate yasya
 vyaktir ākāśa ātmanaḥ|sva-dhāmno brahmaṇaḥ sākṣād
 vācakaḥ paramātmanaḥ
sa sarva-mantropaniṣad
 veda-bījaṁ sanātanam|
495.ldw_fc: śṛṇoti ; yaḥ ; imam ; sphoṭam ; supta-śrotre ; ca ; śūnya-dṛk ; yena ; vāk ; vyajyate ; yasya ; vyaktiḥ ; ākāśe ; ātmanaḥ ; sva-dhāmnaḥ ; brahmaṇaḥ ; sākṣāt ; vācakaḥ ; parama-ātmanaḥ ; saḥ ; sarva ; mantra ; upaniṣat ; veda ; bījam ; sanātanam
495.words_en_fc: hears; who; this; unmanifest and eternal subtle sound; when the sense of hearing is asleep; and; devoid of material sight and other sensory functions; by which; the expanse of Vedic sound; is elaborated; of which; the manifestation; in the sky (of the heart); from the soul; who is His own origin; of the Absolute Truth; directly; the designating term; of the Supersoul; that; of all; Vedic hymns; the secret; of the Vedas; the seed; eternal.
495.yw_zh: 终极而言，这omkara是非物质的，难以觉察，为没有物质耳朵和其他物质感官的超灵所听到。浩如烟海的韦达音震均源于omkara，而omkara显自灵魂，在心灵的天空中。它是起源于自身的绝对真理，即超灵的直接称呼，是一切韦达赞歌的隐秘的实质和永恒的种子。
495.yw_en: This oṁkāra, ultimately nonmaterial and imperceptible, is heard by the Supersoul without His possessing material ears or any other material senses. The entire expanse of Vedic sound is elaborated from oṁkāra, which appears from the soul, within the sky of the heart. It is the direct designation of the self-originating Absolute Truth, the Supersoul, and is the secret essence and eternal seed of all Vedic hymns.
495.yz_zh: 沉睡者的感官不活动，直到他醒来为止。因此，如果沉睡者被一阵喧嚣声惊醒，有人就会问，“到底是谁听到了吵闹声？”这节诗中的词语 supta- srotrer表明，心中的至尊主听到声响，继而唤醒沉睡的生物体。主的感官活动永远在更高的层面进行。终极而言，一切声音在天宇震荡，并且，在心灵深处有一片天是为韦达音震而设。所有韦达音震的种子或起源是 omkara。这一点韦达经有证 om ity etad brahmano nedistham nama。对韦达种子音震的详实阐述便是最伟大的韦达文献《圣典博伽瓦谭》。
495.yz_en: The senses of a sleeping person do not function until he has awakened. Therefore, when a sleeping person is awakened by a noise, one may ask, “Who heard the noise?” The words supta-śrotre in this verse indicate that the Supreme Lord within the heart hears the sound and awakens the sleeping living entities. The Lord’s sensory activities always function on a superior level. Ultimately, all sounds vibrate within the sky, and in the internal region of the heart there is a type of sky meant for the vibration of Vedic sounds. The seed, or source, of all Vedic sounds is the oṁkāra. This is confirmed by the Vedic statement om ity etad brahmaṇo nediṣṭhaṁ nāma. The full elaboration of the Vedic seed sound is Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam, the greatest Vedic literature.

495.ldw:
tasya hy āsaṁs trayo varṇā
 a-kārādyā bhṛgūdvaha
dhāryante yais trayo bhāvā
 guṇa-nāmārtha-vṛttayaḥ|
495.ldw_fc: tasya ; hi ; āsan ; trayaḥ ; varṇāḥ ; a-kāra-ādyāḥ ; bhṛgu-udvaha ; dhāryante ; yaiḥ ; trayaḥ ; bhāvāḥ ; guṇa ; nāma ; artha ; vṛttayaḥ
495.words_en_fc: of that oṁkāra; indeed; came into being; three; sounds of the alphabet; beginning with the letter a; O most eminent of the descendants of Bhṛgu; are sustained; by which three sounds; the threefold; states of existence; the qualities of nature; names; goals; and states of consciousness.
495.yw_zh: omkara展示出三个原始字母音——A、U和M。布瑞古后裔中最杰出的人啊，这三个音支撑着物质存在的一切不同的三重特征，其中包括自然三属性，瑞歌韦达，雅褚韦达和萨玛韦达的名字，以布尔、布瓦和斯瓦星系见称的目标，以及称之为醒觉、睡眠和深度睡眠的三种知觉状态。
495.yw_en: Oṁkāra exhibited the three original sounds of the alphabet — A, U and M. These three, O most eminent descendant of Bhṛgu, sustain all the different threefold aspects of material existence, including the three modes of nature, the names of the Ṛg, Yajur and Sāma Vedas, the goals known as the Bhūr, Bhuvar and Svar planetary systems, and the three functional platforms called waking consciousness, sleep and deep sleep.

495.ldw:
tato ’kṣara-samāmnāyam
 asṛjad bhagavān ajaḥ
antasthoṣma-svara-sparśa-
 hrasva-dīrghādi-lakṣaṇam|
495.ldw_fc: tataḥ ; akṣara ; samāmnāyam ; asṛjat ; bhagavān ; ajaḥ ; anta-stha ; uṣma ; svara ; sparśa ; hrasva-dīrgha ; ādi ; lakṣaṇam
495.words_en_fc: from that oṁkāra; of the different sounds; the total collection; created; the powerful demigod; unborn Brahmā; as the semivowels; sibilants; vowels; and consonant stops; in short and long forms; and so on; characterized.
495.yw_zh: 从omkara，主布茹阿玛创造了所有的字母音——元音、辅音、半元音、齿擦音等——构以长音短音的特征区分开来。
495.yw_en: From that oṁkāra Lord Brahmā created all the sounds of the alphabet — the vowels, consonants, semivowels, sibilants and others — distinguished by such features as long and short measure.

495.ldw:
tenāsau caturo vedāṁś
 caturbhir vadanair vibhuḥ
sa-vyāhṛtikān soṁkārāṁś
 cātur-hotra-vivakṣayā|
495.ldw_fc: tena ; asau ; caturaḥ ; vedān ; caturbhiḥ ; vadanaiḥ ; vibhuḥ ; sa-vyāhṛtikān ; sa-oṁkārān ; cātuḥ-hotra ; vivakṣayā
495.words_en_fc: with that body of sounds; he; the four; Vedas; from his four; faces; the all-powerful; along with the vyāhṛtis (the invocations of the names of the seven planetary systems: bhūḥ, bhuvaḥ, svaḥ, mahaḥ, janaḥ, tapaḥ and satya); along with the seed, om; the four aspects of ritual sacrifice performed by the priests of each of the four Vedas; with the desire of describing.
495.yw_zh: 全能的布茹阿玛充分运用这个声音集合体，从他的四张脸产生出四韦达经，与之一起显见的还有神圣的omkara和七vyahrti祈祷。他的意向是，传播精通四韦达经的祭司们所施行的各种韦达祭祀程序。
495.yw_en: All-powerful Brahmā made use of this collection of sounds to produce from his four faces the four Vedas, which appeared together with the sacred oṁkāra and the seven vyāhṛti invocations. His intention was to propagate the process of Vedic sacrifice according to the different functions performed by the priests of each of the four Vedas.

495.ldw:
putrān adhyāpayat tāṁs tu
 brahmarṣīn brahma-kovidān
te tu dharmopadeṣṭāraḥ
 sva-putrebhyaḥ samādiśan|
495.ldw_fc: putrān ; adhyāpayat ; tān ; tu ; brahma-ṛṣīn ; brahma ; kovidān ; te ; tu ; dharma ; upadeṣṭāraḥ ; sva-putrebhyaḥ ; samādiśan
495.words_en_fc: to his sons; he taught; those Vedas; and; to the great sages among the brāhmaṇas; in the art of Vedic recitation; who were very expert; they; moreover; in religious rituals; instructors; to their own sons; imparted.
495.yw_zh: 布茹阿玛把这些韦达经传授给他的儿子们，他们全是布茹阿玛纳中的伟大圣贤，个个精通吟诵韦达经的技巧。他们轮流担任阿查尔亚，将韦达诸经传授给他们的子嗣。
495.yw_en: Brahmā taught these Vedas to his sons, who were great sages among the brāhmaṇas and experts in the art of Vedic recitation. They in turn took the role of ācāryas and imparted the Vedas to their own sons.

495.ldw:
te paramparayā prāptās
 tat-tac-chiṣyair dhṛta-vrataiḥ
catur-yugeṣv atha vyastā
 dvāparādau maharṣibhiḥ|
495.ldw_fc: te ; paramparayā ; prāptāḥ ; tat-tat ; śiṣyaiḥ ; dhṛta-vrataiḥ ; catuḥ-yugeṣu ; atha ; vyastāḥ ; dvāpara-ādau ; mahā-ṛṣibhiḥ
495.words_en_fc: these Vedas; by continuous disciplic succession; received; of each succeeding generation; by the disciples; who were firm in their vows; throughout the four ages; then; were divided; at the end of the Dvāpara millennium; by great authorities.
495.yw_zh: 就这样，在循环往复的四个年代中，一代又一代恪守灵性誓言的门徒通过使徒传系接受这些韦达经。在每个杜瓦帕尔·尤嘎末，韦达经由杰出的圣哲们进行编辑划分。
495.yw_en: In this way, throughout the cycles of four ages, generation after generation of disciples — all firmly fixed in their spiritual vows — have received these Vedas by disciplic succession. At the end of each Dvāpara-yuga the Vedas are edited into separate divisions by eminent sages.

495.ldw:
kṣīṇāyuṣaḥ kṣīṇa-sattvān
 durmedhān vīkṣya kālataḥ
vedān brahmarṣayo vyasyan
 hṛdi-sthācyuta-coditāḥ|
495.ldw_fc: kṣīṇa-āyuṣaḥ ; kṣīṇa-sattvān ; durmedhān ; vīkṣya ; kālataḥ ; vedān ; brahma-ṛṣayaḥ ; vyasyan ; hṛdi-stha ; acyuta ; coditāḥ
495.words_en_fc: their life span diminished; their strength diminished; of less intelligence; observing; by the effect of time; the Vedas; the chief sages; divided up; sitting within their hearts; by the infallible Personality of Godhead; inspired.
495.yw_zh: 留意到普通大众在时间的影响下，他们的寿命缩短，力量削弱，智力下降，伟大的圣贤们在居于他们心中的人格首神的激励下，系统地将韦达经进行划分。
495.yw_en: Observing that people in general were diminished in their life span, strength and intelligence by the influence of time, great sages took inspiration from the Personality of Godhead sitting within their hearts and systematically divided the Vedas.

495.ldw:
asminn apy antare brahman
 bhagavān loka-bhāvanaḥ
brahmeśādyair loka-pālair
 yācito dharma-guptaye|parāśarāt satyavatyām
 aṁśāṁśa-kalayā vibhuḥ
avatīrṇo mahā-bhāga
 vedaṁ cakre catur-vidham|
495.ldw_fc: asmin ; api ; antare ; brahman ; bhagavān ; loka ; bhāvanaḥ ; brahma ; īśa ; ādyaiḥ ; loka-pālaiḥ ; yācitaḥ ; dharma-guptaye ; parāśarāt ; satyavatyām ; aṁśa ; aṁśa ; kalayā ; vibhuḥ ; avatīrṇaḥ ; mahā-bhāga ; vedam ; cakre ; catuḥ-vidham
495.words_en_fc: in this; also; rule of Manu; O brāhmaṇa (Śaunaka); the Supreme Personality of Godhead; of the universe; the protector; by Brahmā; Śiva; and the others; the rulers of the various planets; requested; for the protection of the principles of religion; by Parāśara Muni; in the womb of Satyavatī; of His plenary expansion (Saṅkarṣaṇa); of the expansion (Viṣṇu); as the partial expansion; the Lord; descended; O most fortunate one; the Veda; he made; in four parts.
495.yw_zh: 布茹阿玛纳呀，在目前的外瓦斯瓦塔·玛努时期，以布茹阿玛和希瓦为首的宇宙领袖们，请求至尊人格首神，所有世界的保护者，拯救宗教原则。最幸运的邵纳卡呀，于是，无所不能的主便以帕茹阿沙尔之子显现在萨提亚瓦提的子宫，显示了他的全权部分的部分的一粒神圣火花。以奎师那·兑帕亚纳·维亚萨见称的这个形体，将韦达经一分为四。
495.yw_en: O brāhmaṇa, in the present age of Vaivasvata Manu, the leaders of the universe, led by Brahmā and Śiva, requested the Supreme Personality of Godhead, the protector of all the worlds, to save the principles of religion. O most fortunate Śaunaka, the almighty Lord, exhibiting a divine spark of a portion of His plenary portion, then appeared in the womb of Satyavatī as the son of Parāśara. In this form, named Kṛṣṇa Dvaipāyana Vyāsa, he divided the one Veda into four.

495.ldw:
ṛg-atharva-yajuḥ-sāmnāṁ
 rāśīr uddhṛtya vargaśaḥ
catasraḥ saṁhitāś cakre
 mantrair maṇi-gaṇā iva|
495.ldw_fc: ṛk-atharva-yajuḥ-sāmnām ; rāśīḥ ; uddhṛtya ; vargaśaḥ ; catasraḥ ; saṁhitāḥ ; cakre ; mantraiḥ ; maṇi-gaṇāḥ ; iva
495.words_en_fc: of the Ṛg, Atharva, Yajur and Sāma Vedas; the accumulation (of mantras); separating out; in specific categories; four; collections; he made; with the mantras; gems; just as.
495.yw_zh: 施瑞拉·维亚萨戴瓦将众多曼陀划分为四类，即瑞歌韦达，阿塔尔瓦韦达，雅褚韦达和萨玛韦达，犹如将混合放置的各种珠宝分类归堆。就这样，他编纂了四种不同的韦达文献。
495.yw_en: Śrīla Vyāsadeva separated the mantras of the Ṛg, Atharva, Yajur and Sāma Vedas into four divisions, just as one sorts out a mixed collection of jewels into piles. Thus he composed four distinct Vedic literatures.
495.yz_zh: 当主布茹阿玛初次以他的四张口讲述四韦达经时，所有曼陀混在一起，就像未加以分类的各种珠宝。施瑞拉•维亚萨戴瓦将所有韦达曼陀分成四类，即成为可被认识的瑞歌韦达，阿塔尔瓦韦达，雅褚韦达和萨玛韦达。
495.yz_en: When Lord Brahmā first spoke the four Vedas with his four mouths, the mantras were mixed together like an unsorted collection of various types of jewels. Śrīla Vyāsadeva sorted the Vedic mantras into four divisions (saṁhitās), which thus became the recognizable Ṛg, Atharva, Yajur and Sāma Vedas.

495.ldw:
tāsāṁ sa caturaḥ śiṣyān
 upāhūya mahā-matiḥ
ekaikāṁ saṁhitāṁ brahmann
 ekaikasmai dadau vibhuḥ|
495.ldw_fc: tāsām ; saḥ ; caturaḥ ; śiṣyān ; upāhūya ; mahā-matiḥ ; eka-ekām ; saṁhitām ; brahman ; eka-ekasmai ; dadau ; vibhuḥ
495.words_en_fc: of those four collections; he; four; disciples; calling near; the powerfully intelligent sage; one by one; a collection; O brāhmaṇa; to each of them; he gave; the powerful Vyāsadeva.
495.yw_zh: 布茹阿玛纳呀，最孔武有力、睿智过人的维亚萨戴瓦叫来他的四位门徒，将这四部萨姆诃塔分别委托给他们每个人。
495.yw_en: The most powerful and intelligent Vyāsadeva called four of his disciples, O brāhmaṇa, and entrusted to each of them one of these four saṁhitās.

495.ldw:
pailāya saṁhitām ādyāṁ
 bahvṛcākhyāṁ uvāca ha
vaiśampāyana-saṁjñāya
 nigadākhyaṁ yajur-gaṇam|sāmnāṁ jaiminaye prāha
 tathā chandoga-saṁhitām
atharvāṅgirasīṁ nāma
 sva-śiṣyāya sumantave|
495.ldw_fc: pailāya ; saṁhitām ; ādyām ; bahu-ṛca-ākhyam ; uvāca ; ha ; vaiśampāyana-saṁjñāya ; nigada-ākhyam ; yajuḥ-gaṇam ; sāmnām ; jaiminaye ; prāha ; tathā ; chandoga-saṁhitām ; atharva-aṅgirasīm ; nāma ; sva-śiṣyāya ; sumantave
495.words_en_fc: to Paila; the collection; first (of the Ṛg Veda); called Bahvṛca; he spoke; indeed; to the sage named Vaiśampāyana; known as Nigada; the collection of Yajur mantras; the mantras of the Sāma Veda; to Jaimini; he spoke; and; the saṁhitā named Chandoga; the Veda ascribed to the sages Atharva and Aṅgirā; indeed; to his disciple; Sumantu.
495.yw_zh: 施瑞拉·维亚萨戴瓦将第一部萨姆诃塔，即瑞歌韦达，传授给培拉，并把这部集锦取名为Bahvrca；把名为Nigada的雅褚曼陀集锦教授给外尚帕央；把称为之为Chandoga.samhita的全部萨玛韦达曼陀传授给翟米尼；把阿塔尔瓦韦达传授给他亲爱的门徒苏曼图。
495.yw_en: Śrīla Vyāsadeva taught the first saṁhitā, the Ṛg Veda, to Paila and gave this collection the name Bahvṛca. To the sage Vaiśampāyana he spoke the collection of Yajur mantras named Nigada. He taught the Sāma Veda mantras, designated as the Chandoga-saṁhitā, to Jaimini, and he spoke the Atharva Veda to his dear disciple Sumantu.

495.ldw:
pailaḥ sva-saṁhitām ūce
 indrapramitaye muniḥ
bāṣkalāya ca so ’py āha
 śiṣyebhyaḥ saṁhitāṁ svakām|caturdhā vyasya bodhyāya
 yājñavalkyāya bhārgava
parāśarāyāgnimitra
 indrapramitir ātmavān|adhyāpayat saṁhitāṁ svāṁ
 māṇḍūkeyam ṛṣiṁ kavim
tasya śiṣyo devamitraḥ
 saubhary-ādibhya ūcivān|
495.ldw_fc: pailaḥ ; sva-saṁhitām ; ūce ; indrapramitaye ; muniḥ ; bāṣkalāya ; ca ; saḥ ; api ; āha ; śiṣyebhyaḥ ; saṁhitām ; svakām ; caturdhā ; vyasya ; bodhyāya ; yājñavalkyāya ; bhārgava ; parāśarāya ; agnimitre ; indrapramitiḥ ; ātma-vān ; adhyāpayat ; saṁhitām ; svām ; māṇḍūkeyam ; ṛṣim ; kavim ; tasya ; śiṣyaḥ ; devamitraḥ ; saubhari-ādibhyaḥ ; ūcivān
495.words_en_fc: Paila; his own collection; spoke; to Indrapramiti; the sage; to Bāṣkala; and; he (Bāṣkala); moreover; spoke; to his disciples; the collection; his own; in four parts; dividing; to Bodhya; to Yājñavalkya; O descendant of Bhṛgu (Śaunaka); to Parāśara; to Agnimitra; Indrapramiti; the self-controlled; taught; the collection; his; to Māṇḍūkeya; the sage; scholarly; of him (Māṇḍūkeya); the disciple; Devamitra; to Saubhari and others; spoke.
495.yw_zh: 在把他的萨姆诃塔划分成两部分之后，头脑睿智的培拉将其传授给因陀帕弥提和巴施卡拉。巴尔嘎瓦呀，巴施卡拉又将他的那部分集锦划分成四部，分别教授给他的门徒博迪亚，雅格亚瓦勒克亚，帕茹阿沙尔和阿格尼弥陀。自控自律的圣哲因陀帕弥提把他的那部分集锦传授给博学的神秘主义者曼杜凯亚，后者的门徒戴瓦弥陀后来将瑞歌韦达的各部分传承给邵巴瑞和其他人。
495.yw_en: After dividing his saṁhitā into two parts, the wise Paila spoke it to Indrapramiti and Bāṣkala. Bāṣkala further divided his collection into four parts, O Bhārgava, and instructed them to his disciples Bodhya, Yājñavalkya, Parāśara and Agnimitra. Indrapramiti, the self-controlled sage, taught his saṁhitā to the learned mystic Māṇḍūkeya, whose disciple Devamitra later passed down the divisions of the Ṛg Veda to Saubhari and others.
495.yz_zh: 据施瑞拉·施瑞达尔·斯瓦米说，曼杜凯亚是茵卓帕弥提之子，他从父亲那里获得韦达知识。
495.yz_en: According to Śrīla Śrīdhara Svāmī, Māṇḍūkeya was the son of Indrapramiti, from whom he received Vedic knowledge.

495.ldw:
śākalyas tat-sutaḥ svāṁ tu
 pañcadhā vyasya saṁhitām
vātsya-mudgala-śālīya-
 gokhalya-śiśireṣv adhāt|
495.ldw_fc: śākalyaḥ ; tat-sutaḥ ; svām ; tu ; pañcadhā ; vyasya ; saṁhitām ; vātsya-mudgala-śālīya ; gokhalya-śiśireṣu ; adhāt
495.words_en_fc: Śākalya; the son of Māṇḍūkeya; his own; and; in five parts; dividing; the collection; to Vātsya, Mudgala and Śālīya; and to Gokhalya and Śiśira; gave.
495.yw_zh: 曼杜凯亚之子名叫沙考亚，把他的那部集锦划分成五部，分别委托给瓦特夏、穆德嘎拉、沙利亚、勾考亚和希锡茹阿。
495.yw_en: The son of Māṇḍūkeya, named Śākalya, divided his own collection into five, entrusting one subdivision each to Vātsya, Mudgala, Śālīya, Gokhalya and Śiśira.

495.ldw:
jātūkarṇyaś ca tac-chiṣyaḥ
 sa-niruktāṁ sva-saṁhitām
balāka-paila-jābāla-
 virajebhyo dadau muniḥ|
495.ldw_fc: jātūkarṇyaḥ ; ca ; tat-śiṣyaḥ ; sa-niruktām ; sva-saṁhitām ; balāka-paila-jābāla-virajebhyaḥ ; dadau ; muniḥ
495.words_en_fc: Jātūkarṇya; and; the disciple of Śākalya; along with a glossary explaining obscure terms; the collection he received; to Balāka, Paila, Jābāla and Viraja; passed down; the sage.
495.yw_zh: 圣人佳图康亚也是沙考亚的一名门徒，他把沙考亚传授给他的萨姆诃塔划分成三部之后，又附加上韦达词汇表这第四部分。他将这几部分分别传授给四位门徒——巴利卡、培拉二世、佳巴拉和维茹阿佳。
495.yw_en: The sage Jātūkarṇya was also a disciple of Śākalya, and after dividing the saṁhitā he received from Śākalya into three parts, he added a fourth section, a Vedic glossary. He taught one of these parts to each of four disciples — Balāka, the second Paila, Jābāla and Viraja.

495.ldw:
bāṣkaliḥ prati-śākhābhyo
 vālakhilyākhya-saṁhitām
cakre vālāyanir bhajyaḥ
 kāśāraś caiva tāṁ dadhuḥ|
495.ldw_fc: bāṣkaliḥ ; prati-śākhābhyaḥ ; vālakhilya-ākhya ; saṁhitām ; cakre ; vālāyaniḥ ; bhajyaḥ ; kāśāraḥ ; ca ; eva ; tām ; dadhuḥ
495.words_en_fc: Bāṣkali, the son of Bāṣkala; from all the different branches; entitled Vālakhilya; the collection; he made; Vālāyani; Bhajya; Kāśāra; and; indeed; that; they accepted.
495.yw_zh: 巴施卡历汇编了Valakhilya.samhita，一部汇集所有瑞歌韦达分支的集锦。这部集锦被传授给了瓦拉亚尼、巴佳和卡沙尔。
495.yw_en: Bāṣkali assembled the Vālakhilya-saṁhitā, a collection from all the branches of the Ṛg Veda. This collection was received by Vālāyani, Bhajya and Kāśāra.
495.yz_zh: 施瑞拉•施瑞达尔•斯瓦米说，瓦拉亚尼、巴佳和卡沙尔属于戴提亚社团。
495.yz_en: According to Śrīla Śrīdhara Svāmī, Vālāyani, Bhajya and Kāśāra belonged to the Daitya community.

495.ldw:
bahvṛcāḥ saṁhitā hy etā
 ebhir brahmarṣibhir dhṛtāḥ
śrutvaitac-chandasāṁ vyāsaṁ
 sarva-pāpaiḥ pramucyate|
495.ldw_fc: bahu-ṛcāḥ ; saṁhitāḥ ; hi ; etāḥ ; ebhiḥ ; brahma-ṛṣibhiḥ ; dhṛtāḥ ; śrutvā ; etat ; chandasām ; vyāsam ; sarva-pāpaiḥ ; pramucyate
495.words_en_fc: of the Ṛg Veda; the collections; indeed; these; by these; saintly brāhmaṇas; maintained through disciplic succession; hearing; their; of the sacred verses; the process of division; from all sins; one becomes delivered.
495.yw_zh: 就这样，瑞歌韦达的各种萨姆诃塔被这些布茹阿玛纳圣人通过使徒传系传承维系下来。仅凭聆听这些韦达赞歌，便可从一切罪恶中超脱出来。
495.yw_en: Thus these various saṁhitās of the Ṛg Veda were maintained through disciplic succession by these saintly brāhmaṇas. Simply by hearing of this distribution of the Vedic hymns, one will be freed from all sins.

495.ldw:
vaiśampāyana-śiṣyā vai
 carakādhvaryavo ’bhavan
yac cerur brahma-hatyāṁhaḥ
 kṣapaṇaṁ sva-guror vratam|
495.ldw_fc: vaiśampāyana-śiṣyāḥ ; vai ; caraka ; adhvaryavaḥ ; abhavan ; yat ; ceruḥ ; brahma-hatyā ; aṁhaḥ ; kṣapaṇam ; sva-guroḥ ; vratam
495.words_en_fc: the disciples of Vaiśampāyana; indeed; named the Carakas; authorities of the Atharva Veda; became; because; they executed; due to the killing of a brāhmaṇa; of the sin; the expiation; for their own guru; the vow.
495.yw_zh: 外尚帕央的门徒们都成为了阿塔尔瓦韦达的权威。他们以恰茹阿卡著称，因为他们恪守誓言，所以使得他们的古茹免于杀死一名布茹阿玛纳的罪恶。
495.yw_en: The disciples of Vaiśampāyana became authorities in the Atharva Veda. They were known as the Carakas because they executed strict vows to free their guru from his sin of killing a brāhmaṇa.

495.ldw:
yājñavalkyaś ca tac-chiṣya
 āhāho bhagavan kiyat
caritenālpa-sārāṇāṁ
 cariṣye ’haṁ su-duścaram|
495.ldw_fc: yājñavalkyaḥ ; ca ; tat-śiṣyaḥ ; āha ; aho ; bhagavan ; kiyat ; caritena ; alpa-sārāṇām ; cariṣye ; aham ; su-duścaram
495.words_en_fc: Yājñavalkya; and; the disciple of Vaiśampāyana; said; just see; O master; how much value; with the endeavor; of these weak fellows; shall execute; I; that which is very difficult to perform.
495.yw_zh: 一次，雅格亚瓦勒克亚，外尚帕央的一位门徒，说道：主人啊，从您的这些脆弱的门徒做的微薄努力中可得来多少裨益呢？我将亲身从事一种难以攻克的苦行。
495.yw_en: Once Yājñavalkya, one of the disciples of Vaiśampāyana, said: O master, how much benefit will be derived from the feeble endeavors of these weak disciples of yours? I will personally perform some outstanding penance.

495.ldw:
ity ukto gurur apy āha
 kupito yāhy alaṁ tvayā
viprāvamantrā śiṣyeṇa
 mad-adhītaṁ tyajāśv iti|
495.ldw_fc: iti ; uktaḥ ; guruḥ ; api ; āha ; kupitaḥ ; yāhi ; alam ; tvayā ; vipra-avamantrā ; śiṣyeṇa ; mat-adhītam ; tyaja ; āśu ; iti
495.words_en_fc: thus; addressed; his spiritual master; indeed; said; angry; go away; enough; with you; the insulter of brāhmaṇas; such a disciple; what has been taught by me; give up; immediately; thus.
495.yw_zh: 话音刚落，灵性导师外尚帕央怒目切齿地说道：走开！对布茹阿玛纳出言不逊的弟子啊，你言之过甚！而且，你必须立刻如数奉还我教给你的一切。
495.yw_en: Addressed thus, the spiritual master Vaiśampāyana became angry and said: Go away from here! Enough of you, O disciple who insults brāhmaṇas! Furthermore, you must immediately give back everything I have taught you.
495.yz_zh: 圣外尚帕央生气是因为他的一个门徒，雅格亚瓦勒克亚，在侮辱其他门徒，而他们毕竞是合格的布茹阿玛纳。就像一个孩子苛待其他孩子时，父亲会深感不安，如果骄傲的门徒侮辱或虐待古茹的其他门徒，灵性导师会十分恼怒。
495.yz_en: Śrī Vaiśampāyana was angry because one of his disciples, Yājñavalkya, was insulting the other disciples, who were, after all, qualified brāhmaṇas. Just as a father is disturbed when one son mistreats the father’s other children, the spiritual master is very displeased if a proud disciple insults or mistreats the guru’s other disciples.

495.ldw:
devarāta-sutaḥ so ’pi
 charditvā yajuṣāṁ gaṇam
tato gato ’tha munayo
 dadṛśus tān yajur-gaṇān|yajūṁṣi tittirā bhūtvā
 tal-lolupatayādaduḥ
taittirīyā iti yajuḥ-
 śākhā āsan su-peśalāḥ|
495.ldw_fc: devarāta-sutaḥ ; saḥ ; api ; charditvā ; yajuṣām ; gaṇam ; tataḥ ; gataḥ ; atha ; munayaḥ ; dadṛśuḥ ; tān ; yajuḥ-gaṇān ; yajūṁsi ; tittirāḥ ; bhūtvā ; tat ; lolupatayā ; ādaduḥ ; taittirīyāḥ ; iti ; yajuḥ-śākhāḥ ; āsan ; su-peśalāḥ
495.words_en_fc: the son of Devarāta (Yājñavalkya); he; indeed; vomiting; of the Yajur Veda; the collected mantras; from there; having gone; then; the sages; saw; those; yajur-mantras; these yajur-mantras; partridges; becoming; for those mantras; with greedy desire; picked them up; known as Taittirīya; thus; branches of the Yajur Veda; came into being; most beautiful.
495.yw_zh: 雅格亚瓦勒克亚，戴瓦茹阿塔之子，随即吐出雅褚韦达，离开那里。聚首的门徒们贪婪地盯着这些雅褚赞歌，立刻变成鹧鸪的模样，全都捡拾起来。因此，雅褚韦达的这些部分被称为最美妙的泰提瑞亚·萨姆诃塔，即一群鹧鸪采集的赞歌。
495.yw_en: Yājñavalkya, the son of Devarāta, then vomited the mantras of the Yajur Veda and went away from there. The assembled disciples, looking greedily upon these yajur hymns, assumed the form of partridges and picked them all up. These divisions of the Yajur Veda therefore became known as the most beautiful Taittirīya-saṁhitā, the hymns collected by partridges [tittirāḥ].
495.yz_zh: 据施墙拉•施瑞达尔•斯瓦米说，布茹阿玛纳收集呕吐物是不雅之举，所以，外尚帕央强有力的布茹阿玛纳门徒们变成一群鹧鹄tittira，收集了那些珍贵的曼卓。
495.yz_en: According to Śrīla Śrīdhara Svāmī, it is improper for a brāhmaṇa to collect what has been vomited, and so the powerful brāhmaṇa disciples of Vaiśampāyana assumed the form of tittiras, partridges, and collected the valuable mantras.

495.ldw:
yājñavalkyas tato brahmaṁś
 chandāṁsy adhi gaveṣayan
guror avidyamānāni
 sūpatasthe ’rkam īśvaram|
495.ldw_fc: yājñavalkyaḥ ; tataḥ ; brahman ; chandāṁsi ; adhi ; gaveṣayan ; guroḥ ; avidyamānāni ; su-upatasthe ; arkam ; īśvaram
495.words_en_fc: Yājñavalkya; thereafter; O brāhmaṇa; mantras; additional; seeking out; to his spiritual master; not known; he carefully worshiped; the sun; the powerful controller.
495.yw_zh: 我亲爱的邵纳卡布茹阿玛纳，此后，雅格亚瓦勒克亚切望找到就连他的灵性导师都有所不知的新雅褚曼陀。他带着这样的心念，专注地崇拜了孔武有力的太阳之主。
495.yw_en: My dear brāhmaṇa Śaunaka, Yājñavalkya then desired to find out new yajur-mantras unknown to even his spiritual master. With this in mind he offered attentive worship to the powerful lord of the sun.

495.ldw: śrī-yājñavalkya uvāca|oṁ namo bhagavate ādityāyākhila-jagatām ātma-svarūpeṇa kāla-svarūpeṇa catur-vidha-bhūta-nikāyānāṁ brahmādi-stamba-paryantānām antar-hṛdayeṣu bahir api cākāśa ivopādhināvyavadhīyamāno bhavān eka eva kṣaṇa-lava-nimeṣāvayavopacita-saṁvatsara-gaṇenāpām ādāna- visargābhyām imāṁ loka-yātrām anuvahati.|
495.ldw_fc: śrī-yājñavalkyaḥ uvāca ; oṁ namaḥ ; bhagavate ; ādityāya ; akhila-jagatām ; ātma-svarūpeṇa ; kāla-svarūpeṇa ; catuḥ-vidha ; bhūta-nikāyānām ; brahma-ādi ; stamba-paryantānām ; antaḥ-hṛdayeṣu ; bahiḥ ; api ; ca ; ākāśaḥ iva ; upādhinā ; avyavadhīyamānaḥ ; bhavān ; ekaḥ ; eva ; kṣaṇa-lava-nimeṣa ; avayava ; upacita ; saṁvatsara-gaṇena ; apām ; ādāna ; visargābhyām ; imām ; loka ; yātrām ; anuvahati
495.words_en_fc: Śrī Yājñavalkya said; I offer my respectful obeisances; to the Personality of Godhead; appearing as the sun-god; of all the planetary systems; in the form of the Supersoul; in the form of time; of four kinds; of all the living beings; beginning from Lord Brahmā; and extending down to the blades of grass; within the recesses of their hearts; externally; also; and; in the same way as the sky; by material designations; not being covered; yourself; alone; indeed; the kṣaṇa, lava and nimeṣa (the smallest fractions of time); by these fragments; collected together; by the years; of the water; by taking away; and giving; this; of the universe; the maintenance; carries out.
495.yw_zh: 圣雅格亚瓦勒克亚说：我向显现为太阳的至尊人格首神致以虔敬的顶拜。您以上至布茹阿玛，下至一片草的四种生物体的控制者而临在。就像天空存在于每一生物之内之外，您以超灵存在于众生的心中，在外以时间的形式临在。恰似天空不为存在于其间的云朵所遮蔽，您永不被任何虚假的物质名号掩盖。随着由称之为ksana、lava和nimesa的微小时间单位组成的岁月流逝，您一人维系这世界，蒸发掉水分，继而又回报以雨水。
495.yw_en: Śrī Yājñavalkya said: I offer my respectful obeisances to the Supreme Personality of Godhead appearing as the sun. You are present as the controller of the four kinds of living entities, beginning from Brahmā and extending down to the blades of grass. Just as the sky is present both inside and outside every living being, you exist both within the hearts of all as the Supersoul and externally in the form of time. Just as the sky cannot be covered by the clouds present within it, you are never covered by any false material designation. By the flow of years, which are made up of the tiny fragments of time called kṣaṇas, lavas and nimeṣas, you alone maintain this world, drying up the waters and giving them back as rain.
495.yz_zh: 这段祷文不是献给太阳神的，并非说太阳神是一个独立自主的生物体，而是献给至尊人格首神，他强大有力的扩展，太阳神祗，代表着他。
495.yz_en: This prayer is not offered to the sun-god as an independent or autonomous entity but rather to the Supreme Personality of Godhead, represented by His powerful expansion the solar deity.

495.ldw: yad u ha vāva vibudharṣabha savitar adas tapaty anusavanam ahar ahar āmnāya-vidhinopatiṣṭhamānānām akhila-durita-vṛjina- bījāvabharjana bhagavataḥ samabhidhīmahi tapana maṇḍalam.|
495.ldw_fc: yat ; u ha vāva ; vibudha-ṛṣabha ; savitaḥ ; adaḥ ; tapati ; anusavanam ; ahaḥ ahaḥ ; āmnāya-vidhinā ; upatiṣṭhamānānām ; akhila-durita ; vṛjina ; bīja ; avabharjana ; bhagavataḥ ; samabhidhīmahi ; tapana ; maṇḍalam
495.words_en_fc: which; indeed; O chief of the demigods; O lord of the sun; that; is glowing; at each of the junctures of the day (sunrise, noon and sunset); each day; by the Vedic path, as passed down through disciplic succession; of those who are engaged in offering prayer; all sinful activities; the consequent suffering; and the original seed of such; O you who burn; of the mighty controller; I meditate with full attention; O glowing one; upon the sphere.
495.yw_zh: 光辉灿烂的人啊，孔武有力的太阳之主啊，您是全体半神人之首。我专心致志地冥想您火红的球体，因为您为那些按照权威使徒传系传承下来的韦达之途每日向您供奉三次祷文的人，焚烧掉一切罪恶活动和随之而来的一切痛苦，以及欲望的原种子。
495.yw_en: O glowing one, O powerful lord of the sun, you are the chief of all the demigods. I meditate with careful attention on your fiery globe, because for those who offer prayers to you three times daily according to the Vedic method passed down through authorized disciplic succession, you burn away all sinful activities, all consequent suffering and even the original seed of desire.

495.ldw: ya iha vāva sthira-cara-nikarāṇāṁ nija-niketanānāṁ mana-indriyāsu-gaṇān anātmanaḥ svayam ātmāntar-yāmī pracodayati.|
495.ldw_fc: yaḥ ; iha ; vāva ; sthira-cara-nikarāṇām ; nija-niketanānām ; manaḥ-indriya-asu-gaṇān ; anātmanaḥ ; svayam ; ātma ; antaḥ-yāmī ; pracodayati
495.words_en_fc: who; in this world; indeed; of all the nonmoving and moving living beings; who depend on your shelter; the mind, senses and vital air; which are nonliving matter; yourself; in their hearts; the indwelling lord; inspires to activity.
495.yw_zh: 您亲自以寓居于一切动与不动的生物心中的主临在，芸芸众生完全依靠您的庇护。千真万确，您激励他们的物质心意、感官和生命之气活动。
495.yw_en: You are personally present as the indwelling lord in the hearts of all moving and nonmoving beings, who depend completely on your shelter. Indeed, you animate their material minds, senses and vital airs to act.

495.ldw: ya evemaṁ lokam ati-karāla-vadanāndhakāra-saṁjñājagara-graha-gilitaṁ mṛtakam iva vicetanam avalokyānukampayā parama-kāruṇika īkṣayaivotthāpyāhar ahar anusavanaṁ śreyasi sva-dharmākhyātmāva-sthane pravartayati.|
495.ldw_fc: yaḥ ; eva ; imam ; lokam ; ati-karāla ; vadana ; andhakāra-saṁjña ; ajagara ; graha ; gilitam ; mṛtakam ; iva ; vicetanam ; avalokya ; anukampayā ; parama-kāruṇikaḥ ; īkṣayā ; eva ; utthāpya ; ahaḥ ahaḥ ; anu-savanam ; śreyasi ; sva-dharma-ākhya ; ātma-avasthāne ; pravartayati
495.words_en_fc: who; alone; this; world; very fearful; the mouth of which; known as darkness; by the python; seized; and swallowed; dead; as if; unconscious; by glancing; mercifully; supremely magnanimous; by casting his glance; indeed; raising them up; day after day; at the three sacred junctures of the day; in the ultimate benefit; known as the soul’s proper duty; in the inclination toward spiritual life; engages.
495.yw_zh: 世界已被黑暗这巨蟒死死钳住，被他恐惧的口吞噬，已不省人事，仿佛死的一样。然而，由于您仁慈地向世间沉睡的人们投以瞥视，用您目光的礼物唤起他们。因此，您最慷慨仁慈。在每日三个神圣的交接时刻，您使虔诚之人遵循终极至善之途，激励他们履行宗教职责，使其处在他们的灵性位置上。
495.yw_en: The world has been seized and swallowed by the python of darkness in its horrible mouth and has become unconscious, as if dead. But mercifully glancing upon the sleeping people of the world, you raise them up with the gift of sight. Thus you are most magnanimous. At the three sacred junctures of each day, you engage the pious in the path of ultimate good, inducing them to perform religious duties that situate them in their spiritual position.
495.yz_zh: 按照韦达文化，三个较高的社会阶层（知识分子阶层、管理阶层和商贾阶虽）正式地经过灵性导师的启迪与之连接，接受嘎亚垂曼陀。毎日默念三遍这具有净化力的曼陀——日出、中午和日落时分。履行灵性职责的吉祥时刻，是根据太空中太阳的运行轨道计算出来，这里把这有条不紊的灵性职责时刻表归功于神的代表，太阳。
495.yz_en: According to Vedic culture, the three higher classes of society (the intellectual, political and mercantile sections) are formally connected with the spiritual master by initiation and receive the Gāyatrī mantra. This purifying mantra is chanted three times daily — at sunrise, noon and sunset. Auspicious moments for the performance of spiritual duties are calculated according to the sun’s path in the sky, and this systematic scheduling of spiritual duties is here attributed to the sun as the representative of God.

495.ldw: avani-patir ivāsādhūnāṁ bhayam udīrayann aṭati parita āśā-pālais tatra tatra kamala-kośāñjalibhir upahṛtārhaṇaḥ.|
495.ldw_fc: avani-patiḥ ; iva ; asādhūnām ; bhayam ; udīrayan ; aṭati ; paritaḥ ; āśā-pālaiḥ ; tatra tatra ; kamala-kośa ; añjalibhiḥ ; upahṛta ; arhaṇaḥ
495.words_en_fc: a king; as; of the unholy; fear; creating; travels about; all around; by the controlling deities of the directions; here and there; holding lotus flowers; with folded palms; offered; honorable presentations.
495.yw_zh: 俨如一位地球君王，您四处巡游，让邪恶之人感到恐惧，他们就像掌控方向的强大神祇，双手合十地向您奉上莲花和其他恭敬的献礼。
495.yw_en: Just like an earthly king, you travel about everywhere spreading fear among the unholy as the powerful deities of the directions offer you in their folded palms lotus flowers and other respectful presentations.

495.ldw: atha ha bhagavaṁs tava caraṇa-nalina-yugalaṁ tri-bhuvana-gurubhir abhivanditam aham ayāta-yāma-yajuṣ-kāma upasarāmīti.|
495.ldw_fc: atha ; ha ; bhagavan ; tava ; caraṇa-nalina-yugalam ; tri-bhuvana ; gurubhiḥ ; abhivanditam ; aham ; ayāta-yāma ; yajuḥ-kāmaḥ ; upasarāmi ; iti
495.words_en_fc: thus; indeed; O lord; your; two lotus feet; of the three worlds; by the spiritual masters; honored; I; unknown to anyone else; desiring to have the yajur-mantras; am approaching with worship; thus.
495.yw_zh: 所以，我的主，我祈祷接近您那备受三个世界的灵性导师们崇敬的莲花足，因为我希望从您那里获得不为他人所知的雅褚韦达曼卓。
495.yw_en: Therefore, my lord, I am prayerfully approaching your lotus feet, which are honored by the spiritual masters of the three worlds, because I hope to receive from you mantras of the Yajur Veda unknown to anyone else.

495.ldw:
sūta uvāca|evaṁ stutaḥ sa bhagavān
 vāji-rūpa-dharo raviḥ
yajūṁṣy ayāta-yāmāni
 munaye ’dāt prasāditaḥ|
495.ldw_fc: sūtaḥ uvāca ; evam ; stutaḥ ; saḥ ; bhagavān ; vāji-rūpa ; dharaḥ ; raviḥ ; yajūṁṣi ; ayāta-yāmāni ; munaye ; adāt ; prasāditaḥ
495.words_en_fc: Sūta Gosvāmī said; in this way; offered glorification; he; the powerful demigod; the form of a horse; assuming; the sun-god; yajur- mantras; never learned by any other mortal; to the sage; presented; being satisfied.
495.yw_zh: 苏塔·哥斯瓦米说：这样的礼赞令孔武有力的太阳神心满意足，于是他变化成马的形体，向圣人雅格亚瓦勒克亚呈现出以往人类社会闻所未闻的雅褚曼卓。
495.yw_en: Sūta Gosvāmī said: Satisfied by such glorification, the powerful sun-god assumed the form of a horse and presented to the sage Yājñavalkya yajur-mantras previously unknown in human society.

495.ldw:
yajurbhir akaroc chākhā
 daśa pañca śatair vibhuḥ
jagṛhur vājasanyas tāḥ
 kāṇva-mādhyandinādayaḥ|
495.ldw_fc: yajurbhiḥ ; akarot ; śākhāḥ ; daśa ; pañca ; śataiḥ ; vibhuḥ ; jagṛhuḥ ; vāja-sanyaḥ ; tāḥ ; kāṇva-mādhyandina-ādayaḥ
495.words_en_fc: with the yajur-mantras; he made; branches; ten; plus five; with the hundreds; the powerful; they accepted; produced from the hairs of the horse’s mane and thus known as Vājasaneyī; them; the disciples of Kāṇva and Mādhyandina, and other ṛṣis.
495.yw_zh: 强劲有力的圣人把雅褚韦达数以百计的曼陀编纂成十五个新的韦达文献分支。这些得名为Vajaasaneyi.samhita，因为它们产生自马的鬃毛，它们通过使徒传系，为坎瓦、玛德延迪纳和其他圣人的追随者们所接受。
495.yw_en: From these countless hundreds of mantras of the Yajur Veda, the powerful sage compiled fifteen new branches of Vedic literature. These became known as the Vājasaneyi-saṁhitā because they were produced from the hairs of the horse’s mane, and they were accepted in disciplic succession by the followers of Kāṇva, Mādhyandina and other ṛṣis.

495.ldw:
jaimineḥ sama-gasyāsīt
 sumantus tanayo muniḥ
sutvāṁs tu tat-sutas tābhyām
 ekaikāṁ prāha saṁhitām|
495.ldw_fc: jaimineḥ ; sama-gasya ; āsīt ; sumantuḥ ; tanayaḥ ; muniḥ ; sutvān ; tu ; tat-sutaḥ ; tābhyām ; eka-ekām ; prāha ; saṁhitām
495.words_en_fc: of Jaimini; the singer of the Sāma Veda; there was; Sumantu; the son; the sage (Jaimini); Sutvān; and; the son of Sumantu; to each of them; one of each of the two parts; he spoke; collection.
495.yw_zh: 翟米尼圣哲，萨玛韦达的权威，有一子名叫苏曼图，苏曼图之子是苏特万。圣哲翟米尼把萨玛韦达·萨姆诃塔的不同部分分别传授给他俩。
495.yw_en: Jaimini Ṛṣi, the authority of the Sāma Veda, had a son named Sumantu, and the son of Sumantu was Sutvān. The sage Jaimini spoke to each of them a different part of the Sāma-veda-saṁhitā.

495.ldw:
sukarmā cāpi tac-chiṣyaḥ
 sāma-veda-taror mahān
sahasra-saṁhitā-bhedaṁ
 cakre sāmnāṁ tato dvija|hiraṇyanābhaḥ kauśalyaḥ
 pauṣyañjiś ca sukarmaṇaḥ
śiṣyau jagṛhatuś cānya
 āvantyo brahma-vittamaḥ|
495.ldw_fc: sukarmā ; ca ; api ; tat-śiṣyaḥ ; sāma-veda-taroḥ ; mahān ; sahasra-saṁhitā ; bhedam ; cakre ; sāmnām ; tataḥ ; dvija ; hiraṇyanābhaḥ kauśalyaḥ ; pauṣyañjiḥ ; ca ; sukarmaṇaḥ ; śiṣyau ; jagṛhatuḥ ; ca ; anyaḥ ; āvantyaḥ ; brahma-vit-tamaḥ
495.words_en_fc: Sukarmā; and; indeed; the disciple of Jaimini; of the tree of the Sāma Veda; the great thinker; of one thousand collections; a division; he made; of the sāma-mantras; and then; O brāhmaṇa (Śaunaka); Hiraṇyanābha, the son of Kuśala; Pauṣyañji; and; of Sukarmā; the two disciples; took; and; another; Āvantya; most perfectly realized in knowledge of the Absolute Truth.
495.yw_zh: 苏卡尔玛， 翟米尼的另一个门徒，是一位了不起的学者。他将巨大的萨玛韦达之树划分成一千部萨妈诃塔。布茹阿玛纳呀，然后，库沙拉之子苏卡尔玛·嘿冉亚纳巴的二个门徒，匏尚吉和在灵性觉悟方面十分精进的阿万提亚，继承掌管了诸多萨玛曼陀。
495.yw_en: Sukarmā, another disciple of Jaimini, was a great scholar. He divided the mighty tree of the Sāma Veda into one thousand saṁhitās. Then, O brāhmaṇa, three disciples of Sukarmā — Hiraṇyanābha, the son of Kuśala; Pauṣyañji; and Āvantya, who was very advanced in spiritual realization — took charge of the sāma-mantras.

495.ldw:
udīcyāḥ sāma-gāḥ śiṣyā
 āsan pañca-śatāni vai
pauṣyañjy-āvantyayoś cāpi
 tāṁś ca prācyān pracakṣate|
495.ldw_fc: udīcyāḥ ; sāma-gāḥ ; śiṣyāḥ ; āsan ; pañca-śatāni ; vai ; pauṣyañji-āvantyayoḥ ; ca ; api ; tān ; ca ; prācyān ; pracakṣate
495.words_en_fc: belonging to the north; the singer of the Sāma Veda; the disciples; there were; five hundred; indeed; of Pauṣyañji and Āvantya; and; indeed; they; also; easterners; are called.
495.yw_zh: 匏尚吉和阿万提亚的五百门徒被冠以萨玛韦达的北方歌圣的美名，后来他们中的一些人还以东方歌圣著称。
495.yw_en: The five hundred disciples of Pauṣyañji and Āvantya became known as the northern singers of the Sāma Veda, and in later times some of them also became known as eastern singers.

495.ldw:
laugākṣir māṅgaliḥ kulyaḥ
 kuśīdaḥ kukṣir eva ca
pauṣyañji-śiṣyā jagṛhuḥ
 saṁhitās te śataṁ śatam|
495.ldw_fc: laugākṣiḥ māṅgaliḥ kulyaḥ ; kuśīdaḥ kukṣiḥ ; eva ; ca ; pauṣyañji-śiṣyāḥ ; jagṛhuḥ ; saṁhitāḥ ; te ; śatam śatam
495.words_en_fc: Laugākṣi, Māṅgali and Kulya; Kuśīda and Kukṣi; indeed; also; disciples of Pauṣyañji; they took; collections; they; each one hundred.
495.yw_zh: 匏尚吉的另外五个门徒，即崂嘎克西、芒嘎利、库尔亚、库希达和库克西，各接受了一百部萨姆诃塔。
495.yw_en: Five other disciples of Pauṣyañji, namely Laugākṣi, Māṅgali, Kulya, Kuśīda and Kukṣi, each received one hundred saṁhitās.

495.ldw:
kṛto hiraṇyanābhasya
 catur-viṁśati saṁhitāḥ
śiṣya ūce sva-śiṣyebhyaḥ
 śeṣā āvantya ātmavān|
495.ldw_fc: kṛtaḥ ; hiraṇyanābhasya ; catuḥ-viṁśati ; saṁhitāḥ ; śiṣyaḥ ; ūce ; sva-śiṣyebhyaḥ ; śeṣāḥ ; āvantyaḥ ; ātma-vān
495.words_en_fc: Kṛta; of Hiraṇyanābha; twenty-four; collections; the disciple; spoke; to his own disciples; the remaining (collections); Āvantya; the self-controlled.
495.yw_zh: 科瑞塔，嘿冉亚纳巴门徒，把二十四部samhita传授给他的门徒，剩下的集锦由觉悟了自我的圣哲阿万提亚传承下去。
495.yw_en: Kṛta, the disciple of Hiraṇyanābha, spoke twenty-four saṁhitās to his own disciples, and the remaining collections were passed down by the self-realized sage Āvantya.
495.yz_en: Thus end the purports of the humble servants of His Divine Grace A.C. Bhaktivedanta Swami Prabhupāda to the Twelfth Canto, Sixth Chapter, of the Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam, entitled “Mahārāja Parīkṣit Passes Away.”

496.ldw:
sūta uvāca|atharva-vit sumantuś ca
 śiṣyam adhyāpayat svakām
saṁhitāṁ so ’pi pathyāya
 vedadarśāya coktavān|
496.ldw_fc: sūtaḥ uvāca ; atharva-vit ; sumantuḥ ; ca ; śiṣyam ; adhyāpayat ; svakām ; saṁhitām ; saḥ ; api ; pathyāya ; vedadarśāya ; ca ; uktavān
496.words_en_fc: Sūta Gosvāmī said; the expert knower of the Atharva Veda; Sumantu; and; to his disciple; instructed; his own; collection; he, the disciple of Sumantu; also; to Pathya; to Vedadarśa; and; spoke.
496.yw_zh: 苏塔·哥斯瓦米说：苏曼图·瑞希，阿塔尔瓦韦达的权威人士，把他的samhita（集锦）传授给他的门徒卡班达，卡班达又将其传给帕提亚和维达达尔沙。
496.yw_en: Sūta Gosvāmī said: Sumantu Ṛṣi, the authority on the Atharva Veda, taught his saṁhitā to his disciple Kabandha, who in turn spoke it to Pathya and Vedadarśa.
496.yz_zh:
正如维施努普然那确证的：

atharva-vedam sa munih

sumantur amita-dyutih

sisyam adhyapayam asa

kabandham so pi ca dvidha

krtva tu vedadarsaya

tatha pathyaya dattavan

“圣哲苏曼图出类拔萃，无比杰出，他将阿塔尔瓦韦达传给他的门徒卡班达，卡班达又将其分成两部分，传给维达达尔沙和帕提亚。”
496.yz_en:
As confirmed in the Viṣṇu Purāṇa:

atharva-vedaṁ sa muniḥ
 sumantur amita-dyutiḥ
śiṣyam adhyāpayām āsa
 kabandhaṁ so ’pi ca dvidhā
kṛtvā tu vedadarśāya
 tathā pathyāya dattavān

“That sage Sumantu, whose brilliance was immeasurable, taught the Atharva Veda to his disciple Kabandha. Kabandha in turn divided it into two parts and passed them down to Vedadarśa and Pathya.”

496.ldw:
śauklāyanir brahmabalir
 modoṣaḥ pippalāyaniḥ
vedadarśasya śiṣyās te
 pathya-śiṣyān atho śṛṇu
kumudaḥ śunako brahman
 jājaliś cāpy atharva-vit|
496.ldw_fc: śauklāyaniḥ brahmabaliḥ ; modoṣaḥ pippalāyaniḥ ; vedadarśasya ; śiṣyāḥ ; te ; pathya-śiṣyān ; atho ; śṛṇu ; kumudaḥ śunakaḥ ; brahman ; jājaliḥ ; ca ; api ; atharva-vit
496.words_en_fc: Śauklāyani and Brahmabali; Modoṣa and Pippalāyani; of Vedadarśa; the disciples; they; the disciples of Pathya; furthermore; please hear; Kumuda and Śunaka; O brāhmaṇa, Śaunaka; Jājali; and; also; full in knowledge of the Atharva Veda.
496.yw_zh: 邵克拉亚尼、布茹阿玛巴利、摩朵沙和毗帕拉雅尼均是维达达尔沙的门徒。请听我说一说帕提亚的门徒。我亲爱的布茹阿玛纳，他们是库姆达、舒纳卡和嘉佳利，全都谙熟阿塔尔瓦韦达。
496.yw_en: Śauklāyani, Brahmabali, Modoṣa and Pippalāyani were disciples of Vedadarśa. Hear from me also the names of the disciples of Pathya. My dear brāhmaṇa, they are Kumuda, Śunaka and Jājali, all of whom knew the Atharva Veda very well.
496.yz_zh: 据施瑞拉•施瑞达尔•斯瓦米说，维达达尔沙将他编辑的阿塔尔瓦韦达分成四部分并传授给他的四位门徒。帕提亚将自己所编辑的分成三部分并传给这里提到的三位门徒。
496.yz_en: According to Śrīla Śrīdhara Svāmī, Vedadarśa divided his edition of the Atharva Veda into four parts and instructed them to his four disciples. Pathya divided his edition into three parts and instructed it to the three disciples mentioned here.

496.ldw:
babhruḥ śiṣyo ’thāṅgirasaḥ
 saindhavāyana eva ca
adhīyetāṁ saṁhite dve
 sāvarṇādyās tathāpare|
496.ldw_fc: babhruḥ ; śiṣyaḥ ; atha ; aṅgirasaḥ ; saindhavāyanaḥ ; eva ; ca ; adhīyetām ; saṁhite ; dve ; sāvarṇa ; ādyāḥ ; tathā ; apare
496.words_en_fc: Babhru; the disciple; then; of Śunaka (also known as Aṅgirā); Saindhavāyana; indeed; also; they learned; collections; two; Sāvarṇa; headed by; similarly; other disciples.
496.yw_zh: 巴布茹和塞恩达瓦亚纳，舒纳卡的门徒，研读了他们的灵性导师编纂划分的阿塔尔瓦韦达的两部分。塞恩达瓦亚纳的门徒萨瓦尔纳和其他伟大圣哲的门徒们也研读了这部经过编辑的阿塔尔瓦韦达。
496.yw_en: Babhru and Saindhavāyana, disciples of Śunaka, studied the two divisions of their spiritual master’s compilation of the Atharva Veda. Saindhavāyana’s disciple Sāvarṇa and disciples of other great sages also studied this edition of the Atharva Veda.

496.ldw_fc: nakṣatrakalpaḥ ; śāntiḥ ; ca ; kaśyapa-āṅgirasa-ādayaḥ ; ete ; ātharvaṇa-ācāryāḥ ; śṛṇu ; paurāṇikān ; mune
496.words_en_fc: Nakṣatrakalpa; Śāntikalpa; also; Kaśyapa, Āṅgirasa and others; these; spiritual masters of the Atharva Veda; now hear; the authorities of the Purāṇas; O sage, Śaunaka.
496.yw_zh: 纳克沙陀考帕、善提考帕、卡夏帕、安给茹阿萨和其他人也是阿塔尔瓦韦达方面的阿查尔亚。现在，圣哲啊，请听我列举精通普然那文献的权威们。
496.yw_en: Nakṣatrakalpa, Śāntikalpa, Kaśyapa, Āṅgirasa and others were also among the ācāryas of the Atharva Veda. Now, O sage, listen as I name the authorities on Purāṇic literature.

496.ldw_fc: trayyāruṇiḥ kaśyapaḥ ca ; sāvarṇiḥ akṛta-vraṇaḥ ; vaiśampāyana-hārītau ; ṣaṭ ; vai ; paurāṇikāḥ ; ime
496.words_en_fc: Trayyāruṇi and Kaśyapa; Sāvarṇi and Akṛtavraṇa; Vaiśampāyana and Hārīta; six; indeed; spiritual masters of the Purāṇas; these.
496.yw_zh: 陀亚茹尼、卡夏帕、萨瓦尔尼、阿卡瑞塔乌纳、外尚帕亚纳和哈瑞塔是诸多普然那方面的六位导师。
496.yw_en: Trayyāruṇi, Kaśyapa, Sāvarṇi, Akṛtavraṇa, Vaiśampāyana and Hārīta are the six masters of the Purāṇas.

496.ldw:
adhīyanta vyāsa-śiṣyāt
 saṁhitāṁ mat-pitur mukhāt
ekaikām aham eteṣāṁ
 śiṣyaḥ sarvāḥ samadhyagām|
496.ldw_fc: adhīyanta ; vyāsa-śiṣyāt ; saṁhitām ; mat-pituḥ ; mukhāt ; eka-ekām ; aham ; eteṣām ; śiṣyaḥ ; sarvāḥ ; samadhyagām
496.words_en_fc: they have learned; from the disciple of Vyāsadeva (Romaharṣaṇa); the collection of the Purāṇas; of my father; from the mouth; each learning one portion; I; of these; the disciple; all the collections; I have thoroughly learned.
496.yw_zh: 他们每个人从我父亲柔玛哈尔珊纳，施瑞拉·维亚萨戴瓦的一位门徒那里，分别研读了六部普然那诗文集中的一部。后来，我成为这六位权威的门徒，谙熟他们所有人呈现的普然那智慧。
496.yw_en: Each of them studied one of the six anthologies of the Purāṇas from my father, Romaharṣaṇa, who was a disciple of Śrīla Vyāsadeva. I became the disciple of these six authorities and thoroughly learned all their presentations of Purāṇic wisdom.

496.ldw_fc: kaśyapaḥ ; aham ; ca ; sāvarṇiḥ ; rāma-śiṣyaḥ ; akṛtavraṇaḥ ; adhīmahi ; vyāsa-śiṣyāt ; catvāraḥ ; mūla-saṁhitāḥ
496.words_en_fc: Kaśyapa; I; and; Sāvarṇi; a disciple of Rāma; namely Akṛtavraṇa; we have assimilated; from the disciple of Vyāsa (Romaharṣaṇa); four; basic collections.
496.yw_zh: 柔玛哈尔珊纳，维亚萨的一位门徒，将诸多普然那分成四部主要集锦。圣哲卡夏帕和我，还有萨瓦尔尼和茹阿玛的一位门徒阿卡瑞塔乌纳，学得这四部集锦。
496.yw_en: Romaharṣaṇa, a disciple of Vedavyāsa, divided the Purāṇas into four basic compilations. The sage Kaśyapa and I, along with Sāvarṇi and Akṛtavraṇa, a disciple of Rāma, learned these four divisions.

496.ldw_fc: purāṇa-lakṣaṇam ; brahman ; brahma-ṛṣibhiḥ ; nirūpitam ; śṛṇuṣva ; buddhim ; āśritya ; veda-śāstra ; anusārataḥ
496.words_en_fc: the characteristics of a Purāṇa; O brāhmaṇa, Śaunaka; by great learned brāhmaṇas; ascertained; please hear; intelligence; resorting to; the Vedic scriptures; in accordance with.
496.yw_zh: 邵纳卡呀，请仔细听我讲述普然那的特点，这已被最杰出而博学的布茹阿玛纳们按照韦达典籍给出了详细说明。
496.yw_en: O Śaunaka, please hear with attention the characteristics of a Purāṇa, which have been defined by the most eminent learned brāhmaṇas in accordance with Vedic literature.

496.ldw:
sargo ’syātha visargaś ca
 vṛtti-rakṣāntarāṇi ca
vaṁśo vaṁśānucaritaṁ
 saṁsthā hetur apāśrayaḥ|daśabhir lakṣaṇair yuktaṁ
 purāṇaṁ tad-vido viduḥ
kecit pañca-vidhaṁ brahman
 mahad-alpa-vyavasthayā|śrī-śuka uvāca|
496.ldw_fc: sargaḥ ; asya ; atha ; visargaḥ ; ca ; vṛtti ; rakṣā ; antarāṇi ; ca ; vaṁśaḥ ; vaṁśa-anucaritam ; saṁsthā ; hetuḥ ; apāśrayaḥ ; daśabhiḥ ; lakṣaṇaiḥ ; yuktam ; purāṇam ; tat ; vidaḥ ; viduḥ ; kecit ; pañca-vidham ; brahman ; mahat ; alpa ; vyavasthayā
496.words_en_fc: the creation; of this universe; then; the secondary creation; and; maintenance; protection by sustenance; the reigns of the Manus; and; the dynasties of great kings; the narrations of their activities; the annihilation; the motivation (for the living entities’ involvement in material activities); the supreme shelter; with the ten; characteristics; endowed; a Purāṇa; of this matter; those who know; they know; some authorities; fivefold; O brāhmaṇa; of great; and lesser; according to the distinction.
496.yw_zh: 布茹阿玛纳呀，这方面的权威人士了解普然那涵盖十个特色主题：此间宇宙的创造，各世界与生物体的再创造，众生的维系，众生的生计，各位玛努的统治期，伟大君王的王朝，这些君王的活动，毁灭，动机和至尊庇护所。其他学者们说，主要的普然那讨论的是这十个主题，而次要的普然那可能只讨论五个。
496.yw_en: O brāhmaṇa, authorities on the matter understand a Purāṇa to contain ten characteristic topics: the creation of this universe, the subsequent creation of worlds and beings, the maintenance of all living beings, their sustenance, the rule of various Manus, the dynasties of great kings, the activities of such kings, annihilation, motivation and the supreme shelter. Other scholars state that the great Purāṇas deal with these ten topics, while lesser Purāṇas may deal with five.
496.yz_zh:
主要的普然那讨论的十个主题也在《圣典博伽瓦谭》(2.10.1)中有述：

sri-suka uvaca

atra sargo visargas ca

sthanam posanam utayah

manvantaresanukatha

nirodho muktir asrayah

“圣舒卡戴瓦•勾斯瓦米说：《圣典博伽瓦谭》讨论如下十个话题：宇宙的创造，再创造，各星系，主的保护，创造的推动力，玛努的更替，关于神的科学，重返家园（回归首神），解脱和至善。”

据施瑞拉•吉瓦•勾斯瓦米说，诸如《圣典博伽瓦谭》这样的普然那讨论这十个主题，而次要的普然那只讨论五个。正如韦达文献说：

sargas ca pratisargas ca

vamso manvantarani ca

vamsanucaritam ceti

puranam panca-laksanam

“创造，二次创造，帝王们的皇朝，玛努们的统治和各王朝的活动是普然那的五个特色主题。”要知道，涵盖五个知识范畴的普然那是次要的普然那文献。

施瑞拉•吉瓦•勾斯瓦米解释说，《圣典博伽瓦谭》的十大主题贯穿于十二篇的每一篇。不该试图把十个主题分别归属于哪一篇，也不要牵强附会地解释说《圣典博伽瓦谭》逐一讨论这些主题。简单的事实是，对人类尤为重要的各方面知识，正如上文槪述的十个主题，《圣典博伽瓦谭》通篇都进行了深重不一的分析。
496.yz_en:
The ten subjects of a great Purāṇa are also described in the Second Canto of Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam (2.10.1):

atra sargo visargaś ca
 sthānaṁ poṣaṇam ūtayaḥ
manvantareśānukathā
 nirodho muktir āśrayaḥ

“Śrī Śukadeva Gosvāmī said: In the Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam there are ten divisions of statements regarding the following: the creation of the universe, subcreation, planetary systems, protection by the Lord, the creative impetus, the change of Manus, the science of God, returning home (back to Godhead), liberation and the summum bonum.”

According to Śrīla Jīva Gosvāmī, Purāṇas such as Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam deal with these ten topics, whereas lesser Purāṇas deal with only five. As stated in Vedic literature:

sargaś ca pratisargaś ca
 vaṁśo manvantarāṇi ca
vaṁśānucaritaṁ ceti
 purāṇaṁ pañca-lakṣaṇam

“Creation, secondary creation, the dynasties of kings, the reigns of Manus and the activities of various dynasties are the five characteristics of a Purāṇa.” Purāṇas covering five categories of knowledge are understood to be secondary Purāṇic literature.

Śrīla Jīva Gosvāmī has explained that the ten principal topics of Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam are found within each of the twelve cantos. One should not try to assign each of the ten topics to a particular canto. Nor should the Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam be artificially interpreted to show that it deals with the topics successively. The simple fact is that all aspects of knowledge important to human beings, summarized in the ten categories mentioned above, are described with various degrees of emphasis and analysis throughout the Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam.

496.ldw_fc: avyākṛta ; guṇa-kṣobhāt ; mahataḥ ; tri-vṛtaḥ ; ahamaḥ ; bhūta-sūkṣma ; indriya ; arthānām ; sambhavaḥ ; sargaḥ ; ucyate
496.words_en_fc: of the unmanifest stage of nature; by the agitation of the modes; from the basic mahat-tattva; threefold; from the false ego; of the subtle forms of perception; of the senses; and the objects of sense perception; the generation; creation; is called.
496.yw_zh: 通过激活未展示的物质自然中的各个原始属性，便产生出玛哈·塔特瓦。从玛哈·塔特瓦产生出假自我元素， 这个元素一分为三。这三重假自我进一步展示为感知的各种精微形式，各种感官和粗糙的感官对象。所有这些的产生便叫做创造。
496.yw_en: From the agitation of the original modes within the unmanifest material nature, the mahat-tattva arises. From the mahat-tattva comes the element false ego, which divides into three aspects. This threefold false ego further manifests as the subtle forms of perception, as the senses and as the gross sense objects. The generation of all these is called creation.

496.ldw_fc: puruṣa ; anugṛhītānām ; eteṣām ; vāsanā-mayaḥ ; visargaḥ ; ayam ; samāhāraḥ ; bījāt ; bījam ; cara ; acaram
496.words_en_fc: of the Supreme Personality of Godhead in His pastime role of creation; which have received the mercy; of these elements; consisting predominantly of the remnants of past desires of the living entities; the secondary creation; this; manifest amalgamation; from a seed; another seed; moving beings; and nonmoving beings.
496.yw_zh: 籍着主的仁慈方能存在的第二重创造，乃是众生欲望得以展示的集合 体。犹如一粒种子生长产出更多的种子，促使施行者的物质欲望得以实现的活动便产生出动与不动的各种生命形式。
496.yw_en: The secondary creation, which exists by the mercy of the Lord, is the manifest amalgamation of the desires of the living entities. Just as a seed produces additional seeds, activities that promote material desires in the performer produce moving and nonmoving life forms.
496.yz_zh: 就如一粒种子长成参天大树，结出数以千计的新种子，物质欲望发展成果报活动，刺激受条件限制灵魂心中萌生千千万方新的欲望。词语purusanugrhitanam意指，凭借至尊主的恩典，人才能发出愿望，在这世上活动。
496.yz_en: Just as a seed grows into a tree that produces thousands of new seeds, material desire develops into fruitive activity that stimulates thousands of new desires within the heart of the conditioned soul. The word puruṣānugṛhītānām indicates that by the mercy of the Supreme Lord one is allowed to desire and act in this world.

496.ldw:
vṛttir bhūtāni bhūtānāṁ
 carāṇām acarāṇi ca
kṛtā svena nṛṇāṁ tatra
 kāmāc codanayāpi vā|
496.ldw_fc: vṛttiḥ ; bhūtāni ; bhūtānām ; carāṇām ; acarāṇi ; ca ; kṛtā ; svena ; nṛṇām ; tatra ; kāmāt ; codanayā ; api ; vā
496.words_en_fc: the sustenance; living beings; of living beings; of those that move; those that do not move; and; executed; by one’s own conditioned nature; for human beings; therein; out of lust; in pursuit of Vedic injunction; indeed; or.
496.yw_zh: Vrtti的意思是谋生方法，凭其动的生物靠不动的生物而活。对人类来说，vrtti尤其意味着以符合某人的天性的谋生方式而行为。从事这样的活动可能要么是追求私欲，要么遵循神的法律。
496.yw_en: Vṛtti means the process of sustenance, by which the moving beings live upon the nonmoving. For a human, vṛtti specifically means acting for one’s livelihood in a manner suited to his personal nature. Such action may be carried out either in pursuit of selfish desire or in accordance with the law of God.

496.ldw_fc: rakṣā ; acyuta-avatāra ; īhā ; viśvasya ; anu yuge yuge ; tiryak ; martya ; ṛṣi ; deveṣu ; hanyante ; yaiḥ ; trayī-dviṣaḥ
496.words_en_fc: protection; of the incarnations of Lord Acyuta; the activities; of this universe; in each age; among the animals; human beings; sages; and demigods; are killed; by which incarnations; the Daityas, who are enemies of Vedic culture.
496.yw_zh: 在每个年代，永不犯错的主显现于世，降临到动物、人类、圣人和半神人中。他以他的这些化身的活动保护宇宙，消灭韦达文化的敌人。
496.yw_en: In each age, the infallible Lord appears in this world among the animals, human beings, sages and demigods. By His activities in these incarnations He protects the universe and kills the enemies of Vedic culture.
496.yz_zh: Raksa—词指的是主具有保护性的活动，这正是玛哈_普然那，即主要的普然那文献的十个主要话题之一。
496.yz_en: The protective activities of the Lord, indicated by the word rakṣā, constitute one of the ten fundamental topics of a Mahā-purāṇa, or a great Purāṇic literature.

496.ldw:
manvantaraṁ manur devā
 manu-putrāḥ sureśvarāḥ
ṛṣayo ’ṁśāvatārāś ca
 hareḥ ṣaḍ-vidham ucyate|

496.words_en_fc: the reign of each Manu; the Manu; the demigods; the sons of Manu; the different Indras; the chief sages; the incarnations of portions of the Supreme Lord; and; of Lord Hari; sixfold; is said.
496.yw_zh: 在每位玛努统治期间，有六类人作为主哈尔依的展示而显现：进行统治的玛努，首要半神人，玛努诸子，因陀，伟大的圣人和至尊人格首神的部分化身。
496.yw_en: In each reign of Manu, six types of personalities appear as manifestations of Lord Hari: the ruling Manu, the chief demigods, the sons of Manu, Indra, the great sages and the partial incarnations of the Supreme Personality of Godhead.

496.ldw:
rājñāṁ brahma-prasūtānāṁ
 vaṁśas trai-kāliko ’nvayaḥ
vaṁśānucaritaṁ teṣāṁ
 vṛttaṁ vaṁśa-dharās ca ye|

496.words_en_fc: of the kings; born originally from Brahmā; dynasty; extending into the three phases of time (past, present and future); the series; histories of the dynasties; of these dynasties; the activities; the prominent members of the dynasties; and; which.
496.yw_zh: 各王朝由历代君王，主布茹阿玛的后裔们传承，不断延展，经历过去、现在和未来。对这些王朝的叙述，尤其是对皇室中最杰出者的叙述，便构成王朝历史的主题。
496.yw_en: Dynasties are lines of kings originating with Lord Brahmā and extending continuously through past, present and future. The accounts of such dynasties, especially of their most prominent members, constitute the subject of dynastic history.

496.ldw:
naimittikaḥ prākṛtiko
 nitya ātyantiko layaḥ
saṁstheti kavibhiḥ proktaś
 caturdhāsya svabhāvataḥ|
496.ldw_fc: naimittikaḥ ; prākṛtikaḥ ; nityaḥ ; ātyantikaḥ ; layaḥ ; saṁsthā ; iti ; kavibhiḥ ; proktaḥ ; caturdhā ; asya ; svabhāvataḥ
496.words_en_fc: occasional; elemental; continuous; ultimate; annihilation; the dissolution; thus; by learned scholars; described; in four aspects; of this universe; by the inherent energy of the Supreme Personality of Godhead.
496.yw_zh: 有四种宇宙毁灭——临时的，物质元素的，长期的和终极的——这一切均受至尊主固有的能量的影响。博学的学者已讲述过毁灭这一主题。
496.yw_en: There are four types of cosmic annihilation — occasional, elemental, continuous and ultimate — all of which are effected by the inherent potency of the Supreme Lord. Learned scholars have designated this topic dissolution.

496.ldw_fc: hetuḥ ; jīvaḥ ; asya ; sarga-ādeḥ ; avidyā ; karma-kārakaḥ ; yam ; ca ; anuśāyinam ; prāhuḥ ; avyākṛtam ; uta ; apare
496.words_en_fc: the cause; the living being; of this universe; of the creation, maintenance and destruction; out of ignorance; the performer of material activities; whom; and; the underlying personality; they call; the unmanifest; indeed; others.
496.yw_zh: 因为愚昧无知，生物从事物质活动，所以从某种意义上说，生物成为宇宙的创造、维系和毁灭之因。有些权威人士称生物是潜存于物质创造下的个性，而另一些权威说他是未展示的自我。
496.yw_en: Out of ignorance the living being performs material activities and thereby becomes in one sense the cause of the creation, maintenance and destruction of the universe. Some authorities call the living being the personality underlying the material creation, while others say he is the unmanifest self.
496.yz_zh:
至尊主本人创造、维系并毁灭宇宙。然而，这些活动是按照受条件限制灵魂的欲望而为，他们在此被描述为hetu，即宇宙活动之因。主创造这世界为的是给受条件限制灵魂试图开发利用自然提供便利，并且终极而言，是为了促使受条件限制灵魂觉悟自我。

由于受条件限制灵魂不能觉知到他们自身的法定构成性地位，所以他们在此被描述为avyakrtam或未展示的。换言之，除非生物体完全具有奎师那知觉，不然，不能觉知到一己的真实形体。
496.yz_en:
The Supreme Lord Himself creates, maintains and annihilates the cosmos. However, such activities are performed in response to the desires of conditioned souls, who are described herein as hetu, or the cause of cosmic activity. The Lord creates this world to facilitate the conditioned soul’s attempt to exploit nature and ultimately to facilitate his self-realization.

Since conditioned souls cannot perceive their own constitutional identity, they are described here as avyākṛtam, or unmanifest. In other words, the living entity cannot perceive his real form unless he is completely Kṛṣṇa conscious.

496.ldw_fc: vyatireka ; anvayaḥ ; yasya ; jāgrat ; svapna ; suṣuptiṣu ; māyā-mayeṣu ; tat ; brahma ; jīva-vṛttiṣu ; apāśrayaḥ
496.words_en_fc: the presence as separate; and as conjoint; of which; within waking consciousness; sleep; and deep sleep; within the products of the illusory energy; that; the Absolute Truth; within the functions of the living entities; the unique shelter.
496.yw_zh: 至尊绝对真理存在于知觉的所有状态中——醒觉和知觉状态，睡眠的状态和深度睡眠状态——遍存于迷幻能量所展示的一切现象中，存在于众生的活动中，而且，他还独立于这一切而存在着。如此，他稳处于他自身的超然性中，他是终极的、独一无二的庇护所。
496.yw_en: The Supreme Absolute Truth is present throughout all the stages of awareness — waking consciousness, sleep and deep sleep — throughout all the phenomena manifested by the illusory energy, and within the functions of all living entities, and He also exists separate from all these. Thus situated in His own transcendence, He is the ultimate and unique shelter.

496.ldw_fc: pada-artheṣu ; yathā ; dravyam ; sat-mātram ; rūpa-nāmasu ; bīja-ādi ; pañcatā-antāsu ; hi ; avasthāsu ; yuta-ayutam
496.words_en_fc: within material objects; just as; the basic substance; the sheer existence of things; among their forms and names; beginning from the seed (ie, from the time of conception); ending with death; indeed; throughout the various phases of bodily existence; both conjoined and separate.
496.yw_zh: 虽然一个物质的物体会以各种形状和名字呈现，但它的基本要素始终是其存在的基础。同样，无论是聚散离合，至尊绝对真理无时无刻不临在于受造的物质躯体中，遍存于从怀孕开始到死亡之间的所有存在阶段。
496.yw_en: Although a material object may assume various forms and names, its essential ingredient is always present as the basis of its existence. Similarly, both conjointly and separately, the Supreme Absolute Truth is always present with the created material body throughout its phases of existence, beginning with conception and ending with death.
496.yz_zh: 湿黏土可被塑成各种形状，叫做“水罐”、花瓶”或“储存罐”等。尽管有各种名字和形状，但是其基本要素，土，恒常存在着。同样，至尊主存在于物质躯体存在的每个阶段。主跟物质自然别无二致，是物质自然的终极源头。与此同时，独一无二。的至尊生物独立存在着，超然稳处于他自身的居所中。
496.yz_en: Moist clay can be molded into various shapes and named “waterpot,” “flowerpot” or “storage pot.” Despite the various names and forms, the essential ingredient, earth, is constantly present. Similarly, the Supreme Lord is present throughout a material body’s stages of bodily existence. The Lord is identical with material nature, being its ultimate generating source. At the same time, the unique Supreme Being exists separately, aloof in His own abode.

496.ldw:
virameta yadā cittaṁ
 hitvā vṛtti-trayaṁ svayam
yogena vā tadātmānaṁ
 vedehāyā nivartate|
496.ldw_fc: virameta ; yadā ; cittam ; hitvā ; vṛtti-trayam ; svayam ; yogena ; vā ; tadā ; ātmānam ; veda ; īhāyāḥ ; nivartate
496.words_en_fc: desists; when; the mind; giving up; the functions of material life in the three phases of waking, sleep and deep sleep; automatically; by regulated spiritual practice; or; then; the Supreme Soul; he knows; from material endeavor; he ceases.
496.yw_zh: 要么自动地，或者由于规范的灵修，一个人的心意可能会停止在醒觉、睡眠和深度睡眠等物质层面上的知觉状态中的活动。那时，一个人便了解至尊灵魂，从物质努力中撤回。
496.yw_en: Either automatically or because of one’s regulated spiritual practice, one’s mind may stop functioning on the material platform of waking consciousness, sleep and deep sleep. Then one understands the Supreme Soul and withdraws from material endeavor.
496.yz_zh:
正如《圣典博伽瓦谭》（3.25.33)说，jarayaty asu yakosam niginam analo yatha:“Bhakti

，奉献服务，无需单独努力便可瓦解生物体的精微躯体，就像胃火消化掉我们吃的一切。”精微的物质躯体倾向于通过性、贪婪、虚假骄傲和疯狂开发利用自然。然而，对主的爱心服务摧毁顽固的假自我，将人提升至纯粹喜乐的知觉，即奎师那知觉这崇髙而完美的存在境界中。
496.yz_en: As stated in Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam (3.25.33), jarayaty āśu yā kośaṁ nigīrṇam analo yathā: “Bhakti, devotional service, dissolves the subtle body of the living entity without separate endeavor, just as fire in the stomach digests all that we eat.” The subtle material body is inclined to exploit nature through sex, greed, false pride and madness. Loving service to the Lord, however, dissolves the stubborn false ego and lifts one to pure blissful consciousness, Kṛṣṇa consciousness, the sublime perfection of existence.

496.yw_zh: 精通古老历史的圣贤们已宣布过，根据诸多普然那的各种特点，可将其划分成十八部主要的普然那和十八部次要的普然那。
496.yw_en: Sages expert in ancient histories have declared that the Purāṇas, according to their various characteristics, can be divided into eighteen major Purāṇas and eighteen secondary Purāṇas.

496.yw_zh: 十八部主要的普然那是，布茹阿玛、帕德玛、维施努、希瓦、灵嘎、嘎茹达、拿茹阿达、巴嘎瓦塔、阿格尼、斯康达、巴维夏、布茹阿玛·外瓦尔塔、玛尔康戴亚、瓦玛纳、瓦茹阿哈、玛茨亚、库尔玛和布茹阿曼达普然那。
496.yw_en: The eighteen major Purāṇas are the Brahma, Padma, Viṣṇu, Śiva, Liṅga, Garuḍa, Nārada, Bhāgavata, Agni, Skanda, Bhaviṣya, Brahma-vaivarta, Mārkaṇḍeya, Vāmana, Varāha, Matsya, Kūrma and Brahmāṇḍa Purāṇas.
496.yz_zh: 施瑞拉•吉瓦•勾斯瓦米曾援引瓦茹阿哈普然那，希瓦普然那和玛茨亚普然那，证实以上两个诗节。
496.yz_en: Śrīla Jīva Gosvāmī has quoted from the Varāha Purāṇa, Śiva Purāṇa and Matsya Purāṇa in confirmation of the above two verses.

496.yw_zh: 布茹阿玛纳呀，我已向你充分讲述由伟大的圣人维亚萨戴瓦及其门徒，还有他的门徒的门徒拓展的韦达经的诸多分支。聆听这一叙述的人，其灵性力量将与日俱增。
496.yw_en: I have thoroughly described to you, O brāhmaṇa, the expansion of the branches of the Vedas by the great sage Vyāsadeva, his disciples and the disciples of his disciples. One who listens to this narration will increase in spiritual strength.
496.yz_en: Thus end the purports of the humble servants of His Divine Grace A.C. Bhaktivedanta Swami Prabhupāda to the Twelfth Canto, Seventh Chapter, of the Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam, entitled “The Purāṇic Literatures.”

497.yw_zh: 施瑞·邵纳卡说：愿你长寿！圣洁的人，最佳讲者啊，请继续向我们讲述。千真万确，唯有你能向世人指引明路。
497.yw_en: Śrī Śaunaka said: O Sūta, may you live a long life! O saintly one, best of speakers, please continue speaking to us. Indeed, only you can show men the path out of the ignorance in which they are wandering.
497.yz_zh: 据施瑞拉•吉瓦•勾斯瓦米说，圣人们看到苏塔•勾斯瓦米即将叙述完《圣典博伽瓦谭》，故而催促他首先谈一谈玛尔康戴亚•瑞希的生平。
497.yz_en: According to Śrīla Jīva Gosvāmī, the sages saw that Sūta Gosvāmī was about to end his narration of Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam, and thus they urged him to first tell the story of Mārkaṇḍeya Ṛṣi.

497.yw_zh: 权威人士们说，玛尔康戴亚·瑞希，嘧瑞康度之子，是一位格外长寿的圣哲，他是布茹阿玛的一个白昼结束时的唯一幸存者，那时，整个宇宙浸没在毁灭的洪水中。但是，这同一位玛尔康戴亚·瑞希，布瑞古最杰出的后裔，诞生在布茹阿玛目前一个白日中的我们家族中，在布茹阿玛的这个白昼里，我们未曾目睹到全部毁灭。而且，众所周知，当玛尔康戴亚无可奈何地飘荡在浩瀚的毁灭之洋中，他从可怕的大水中望去，看到一个神奇的人物——一名男婴独自躺在一片榕树叶上。苏塔啊，这位了不起的圣人玛尔康戴亚·瑞希真是令我大惑不解，惊讶不已。伟大的瑜伽师啊，你被普遍认可为精通所有普然那的权威人士。因此，请好心地驱散我的疑惑。
497.yw_en: Authorities say that Mārkaṇḍeya Ṛṣi, the son of Mṛkaṇḍu, was an exceptionally long-lived sage who was the only survivor at the end of Brahmā’s day, when the entire universe was merged in the flood of annihilation. But this same Mārkaṇḍeya Ṛṣi, the foremost descendant of Bhṛgu, took birth in my own family during the current day of Brahmā, and we have not yet seen any total annihilation in this day of Brahmā. Also, it is well known that Mārkaṇḍeya, while wandering helplessly in the great ocean of annihilation, saw in those fearful waters a wonderful personality — an infant boy lying alone within the fold of a banyan leaf. O Sūta, I am most bewildered and curious about this great sage, Mārkaṇḍeya Ṛṣi. O great yogī, you are universally accepted as the authority on all the Purāṇas. Therefore kindly dispel my confusion.
497.yz_zh: 主布茹阿玛的一个白昼由他的十二个小时组成，持续四十三亿二千万年，他的一个夜晚也这么长。显然，玛尔康戴亚活了这样长的一天一夜，并在布茹阿玛的下一个白天里，继续以同一位玛尔康戴亚活着。看来好像当毁灭发生在布茹阿玛的夜晚时，这位圣人在恐怖的毁灭之水中随波飘荡，他放眼望去，看到一个不同寻常的人躺在一片榕树叶上。在诸位伟大圣人的请求下，关于玛尔康戴亚的—切奥秘将由苏塔•勾斯瓦米一一阐明。
497.yz_en: Lord Brahmā’s day, consisting of his 12 hours, lasts 4 billion 320 million years, and his night is of the same duration. Apparently Mārkaṇḍeya lived throughout one such day and night and in the following day of Brahmā continued living as the same Mārkaṇḍeya. It seems that when annihilation occurred during Brahmā’s night, the sage wandered throughout the fearful waters of destruction and saw within those waters an extraordinary personality lying on a banyan leaf. All of these mysteries concerning Mārkaṇḍeya will be clarified by Sūta Gosvāmī at the request of the great sages.

497.yw_zh: 苏塔·哥斯瓦米说：伟大的圣哲邵纳卡呀，你提出的问题将助人解除疑惑，因为它引人讨论有关主纳茹阿央纳的题旨，这题旨可清除卡历年代的污染。
497.yw_en: Sūta Gosvāmī said: O great sage Śaunaka, your very question will help remove everyone’s illusion, for it leads to the topics of Lord Nārāyaṇa, which cleanse away the contamination of this Kali age.

497.yw_zh: 玛尔康戴亚在他父亲给他婆罗门启迪，施行规范仪式典礼，如此经过净化之后，研究韦达赞歌，严格遵守原则。他在苦行和韦达知识方面变得十分精进，始终保持终身贞守。他怡然平和，头发纠结，以树皮当衣，他手持托钵僧棍、水罐、莲子做的念珠和几束库沙草，他带着圣线，系着布茹阿玛查瑞腰带，身披鹿皮，如此深入灵修。在白昼神圣的时间交接点，他以五种形式规范地崇拜至尊人格首神——火祭、太阳、他的灵性导师、布茹阿玛纳们和他心中的超灵。他早晚出门乞讨，返回之后，把收集的所有食物献给他的灵性导师。只有在他的灵性导师邀请他时，他才静默地进食一顿；不然便一直戒食。就这样，无数百万年以来，玛尔康戴亚·瑞希始终献身于苦行和研习韦达经，崇拜至尊感官之主，人格首神，如此，他征服了不可征服的死亡。
497.yw_en: After being purified by his father’s performance of the prescribed rituals leading to Mārkaṇḍeya’s brahminical initiation, Mārkaṇḍeya studied the Vedic hymns and strictly observed the regulative principles. He became advanced in austerity and Vedic knowledge and remained a lifelong celibate. Appearing most peaceful with his matted hair and his clothing made of bark, he furthered his spiritual progress by carrying the mendicant’s waterpot, staff, sacred thread, brahmacārī belt, black deerskin, lotus-seed prayer beads and bundles of kuśa grass. At the sacred junctures of the day he regularly worshiped the Supreme Personality of Godhead in five forms — the sacrificial fire, the sun, his spiritual master, the brāhmaṇas and the Supersoul within his heart. Morning and evening he would go out begging, and upon returning he would present all the food he had collected to his spiritual master. Only when his spiritual master invited him would he silently take his one meal of the day; otherwise he would fast. Thus devoted to austerity and Vedic study, Mārkaṇḍeya Ṛṣi worshiped the supreme master of the senses, the Personality of Godhead, for countless millions of years, and in this way he conquered unconquerable death.

497.yw_zh: 主布茹阿玛，布瑞古·牟尼，主希瓦，帕佳帕提·达克沙，布茹阿玛的杰出儿子们，许多其他人类，半神人，祖先们和幽灵们——无不惊讶于玛尔康戴亚·瑞希的成就。
497.yw_en: Lord Brahmā, Bhṛgu Muni, Lord Śiva, Prajāpati Dakṣa, the great sons of Brahmā, and many others among the human beings, demigods, forefathers and ghostly spirits — all were astonished by the achievement of Mārkaṇḍeya Ṛṣi.

497.words_en_fc: in this manner; maintaining the vow of celibacy, brahmacarya; by his austerities, study of the Vedas and regulative principles; he meditated; upon the transcendental Lord; the yogī; destroyed; all troubles; with his introspective mind.
497.yw_zh: 就这样，满怀奉爱的玛尔康戴亚通过苦行，研习韦达经和自控自律恪守贞守的誓言。如此，他的心意免受一切打扰，进而将其转向内观，冥想超然于物质感官之外的至尊人格首神。
497.yw_en: In this way the devotional mystic Mārkaṇḍeya maintained rigid celibacy through penance, study of the Vedas and self-discipline. With his mind thus free of all disturbances, he turned it inward and meditated on the Supreme Personality of Godhead, who lies beyond the material senses.

497.yw_en: While the mystic sage thus concentrated his mind by powerful yoga practice, the tremendous period of six lifetimes of Manu passed by.

497.words_en_fc: this; Lord Indra; learning; in the seventh; this; indeed; reign of Manu; of the austerities; becoming fearful; O brāhmaṇa Śaunaka; he set into motion; of that austerity; obstruction.
497.yw_zh: 布茹阿玛纳啊，在第七位玛努统治期间，即眼下的年代，主因陀得知玛尔康戴亚所做的苦行，不禁害怕他与日俱增的神秘力量。故而，他千方百计阻止这位圣人苦修苦炼。
497.yw_en: O brāhmaṇa, during the seventh reign of Manu, the current age, Lord Indra came to know of Mārkaṇḍeya’s austerities and became fearful of his growing mystic potency. Thus he tried to impede the sage’s penance.

497.ldw:
gandharvāpsarasaḥ kāmaṁ
 vasanta-malayānilau
munaye preṣayām āsa
 rajas-toka-madau tathā|

497.yw_zh: 为了摧垮圣人的灵修，主因陀派去丘比特，美丽的歌仙、舞仙，春季以及从玛拉雅群山吹来和着檀香气息的和风，还有贪婪与醉意的人格。
497.yw_en: To ruin the sage’s spiritual practice, Lord Indra sent Cupid, beautiful celestial singers, dancing girls, the season of spring and the sandalwood-scented breeze from the Malaya Hills, along with greed and intoxication personified.

497.words_en_fc: they; indeed; of Mārkaṇḍeya Ṛṣi; to the hermitage; went; of the Himālaya Mountains; to the side; on the north; the Puṣpabhadrā River; where; named Citrā; and; the peak; O powerful Śaunaka.
497.yw_zh: 最孔武有力的邵纳卡呀，他们去到玛尔康戴亚的修院，那里位于喜马拉雅山北侧，普施帕巴卓河流经著名的琪陀峰的地方。
497.yw_en: O most powerful Śaunaka, they went to Mārkaṇḍeya’s hermitage, on the northern side of the Himālaya Mountains where the Puṣpabhadrā River passes by the famous peak Citrā.

497.words_en_fc: his; place of hermitage; pious; pious; with trees; and creepers; specially marked; pious; of brāhmaṇa sages; with the groups; brimming; pious; spotless; having reservoirs of water; maddened; of bees; with singing; maddened; of cuckoos; with cooing; maddened; of peacocks; with the frenzy of dancing; maddened; of birds; with the families; filled; the wind of the Malaya Hills; entering; taking up; chilling; of the waterfalls; the drops of mist; by the flowers; being embraced; blew; evoking; Cupid.
497.yw_zh: 玛尔康戴亚·瑞希神圣的阿刷玛坐落在虔诚的树丛中，那里居住着许多布茹阿玛纳圣人，密布着幽幽纯净的圣湖池塘。阿刷玛周周回荡着蜜蜂陶醉的嗡嗡声和布谷鸟活跃的咕咕啼鸣，兴高采烈的孔雀在四周轻盈起舞。千真万确，成群结队兴奋若狂的飞鸟蜂拥到那所修院。主因陀送来的盈盈春风掠过那里，携带着附近瀑布飞溅的清凉水花。和风飘送着森林鲜花温馨的芳香，轻拂过幽静的修院，渐渐撩起丘比特的情欲。
497.yw_en: Groves of pious trees decorated the holy āśrama of Mārkaṇḍeya Ṛṣi, and many saintly brāhmaṇas lived there, enjoying the abundant pure, sacred ponds. The āśrama resounded with the buzzing of intoxicated bees and the cooing of excited cuckoos, while jubilant peacocks danced about. Indeed, many families of maddened birds crowded that hermitage. The springtime breeze sent by Lord Indra entered there, carrying cooling drops of spray from nearby waterfalls. Fragrant from the embrace of forest flowers, that breeze entered the hermitage and began evoking the lusty spirit of Cupid.

497.ldw:
udyac-candra-niśā-vaktraḥ
 pravāla-stabakālibhiḥ
gopa-druma-latā-jālais
 tatrāsīt kusumākaraḥ|

497.words_en_fc: rising; with the moon; nighttime; whose face; of new sprouts; and blossoms; with rows; being hidden; of the trees; and creepers; along with the multitude; there; appeared; the spring season.
497.yw_zh: 于是，春季降临在玛尔康戴亚的阿刷玛。夜空被冉冉升起的明月照亮，俨如春天的脸庞，刚刚萌发的嫩芽与绽放的鲜花压弯树木和爬藤的枝头。
497.yw_en: Springtime then appeared in Mārkaṇḍeya’s āśrama. Indeed, the evening sky, glowing with the light of the rising moon, became the very face of spring, and sprouts and fresh blossoms virtually covered the multitude of trees and creepers.

497.words_en_fc: being followed; by Gandharvas; of singers; and players of musical instruments; by companies; was seen; holding up; his bow and arrows; of hoardes of heavenly women; the master; Cupid.
497.yw_zh: 丘比特，众天堂女子的主人，手持弓箭去到那里。他身后跟着一群群甘达尔瓦，他们一边弹奏乐器，一边放声歌唱。
497.yw_en: Cupid, the master of many heavenly women, then came there holding his bow and arrows. He was followed by groups of Gandharvas playing musical instruments and singing.

497.yw_zh: 因陀的这些侍从发现，圣人把规定的供品献祭到祭火之后，正坐着冥想。他双眼紧闭，处在神觉中，仿佛火的人格一样不可征服。
497.yw_en: These servants of Indra found the sage sitting in meditation, having just offered his prescribed oblations into the sacrificial fire. His eyes closed in trance, he seemed invincible, like fire personified.

497.yw_en: The women danced before the sage, and the celestial singers sang to the charming accompaniment of drums, cymbals and vīṇās.

497.yw_zh: 就在激情之子（贪婪的人格），春天和因陀的其他侍从们百般搅扰玛尔康戴亚的心意时，丘比特取出他的五头箭，搭在弓弦上。
497.yw_en: While the son of passion [greed personified], spring and the other servants of Indra all tried to agitate Mārkaṇḍeya’s mind, Cupid drew his five-headed arrow and fixed it upon his bow.

497.yw_zh: 阿普萨尔·彭吉卡斯塔丽闪亮登场，玩耍着几个玩具球。她的腰肢似乎被她丰腴厚重的双乳压弯，她头上的花环渐渐蓬松洒落。当她奔跑追逐玩具球，她双眸左顾右盼，轻薄衣裳上的腰带松懈开来，忽然，一阵风吹走她的衣裳。
497.yw_en: The Apsarā Puñjikasthalī made a show of playing with a number of toy balls. Her waist seemed weighed down by her heavy breasts, and the wreath of flowers in her hair became disheveled. As she ran about after the balls, glancing here and there, the belt of her thin garment loosened, and suddenly the wind blew her clothes away.

visasarja tadā bāṇaṁ

497.yw_zh: 丘比特想着自己已征服圣人，便射出利箭。然而，所有这些旨在引诱玛尔康戴亚的企图被证实是白费气力，就像一个无信仰的无神论者徒劳无获。
497.yw_en: Cupid, thinking he had conquered the sage, then shot his arrow. But all these attempts to seduce Mārkaṇḍeya proved futile, just like the useless endeavors of an atheist.

497.ldw:
ta ittham apakurvanto
 munes tat-tejasā mune
dahyamānā nivavṛtuḥ
 prabodhyāhim ivārbhakāḥ|

497.words_en_fc: they; in this way; trying to do harm; to the sage; his; by the potency; O sage (Śaunaka); feeling burned; they desisted; having awakened; a snake; as if; children.
497.yw_zh: 博学的邵纳卡呀，当丘比特及其随从试图伤害圣人，他们感觉自己被他的力量活活焚烧着。于是，他们停止捣乱，仿佛一群孩童吵醒了一条熟睡的蟒蛇。
497.yw_en: O learned Śaunaka, while Cupid and his followers tried to harm the sage, they felt themselves being burned alive by his potency. Thus they stopped their mischief, just like children who have aroused a sleeping snake.

497.ldw:
itīndrānucarair brahman

 na tac citraṁ mahatsu hi|

497.words_en_fc: thus; by the followers of Indra; O brāhmaṇa; impudently attacked; although; the elevated sage; that; he did not succumb; of false ego; to the transformation; not; that; surprising; for great souls; indeed.
497.yw_zh: 布茹阿玛纳呀，主因陀的追随者们曾鲁莽放肆地攻击圣人玛尔康戴亚，然而，他决不屈服于假自我的影响。对于伟大的灵魂来说，如此忍耐一点也不稀奇。
497.yw_en: O brāhmaṇa, the followers of Lord Indra had impudently attacked the saintly Mārkaṇḍeya, yet he did not succumb to any influence of false ego. For great souls such tolerance is not at all surprising.

497.ldw:
dṛṣṭvā nistejasaṁ kāmaṁ

śrutvānubhāvaṁ brahmarṣer

497.words_en_fc: seeing; deprived of his power; Cupid; along with his associates; the powerful lord; King Indra; and hearing; the influence; of the sage among the brāhmaṇas; astonishment; he attained; great.
497.yw_zh: 当强大的因陀王听闻崇高的圣人玛尔康戴亚拥有的神秘力量，看到丘比特及其同游在他面前变得无能为力，不禁惊愕不已。
497.yw_en: The mighty King Indra was most astonished when he heard of the mystic prowess of the exalted sage Mārkaṇḍeya and saw how Cupid and his associates had become powerless in his presence.

497.ldw:
tasyaivaṁ yuñjataś cittaṁ
 tapaḥ-svādhyāya-saṁyamaiḥ
anugrahāyāvirāsīn
 nara-nārāyaṇo hariḥ|

497.words_en_fc: while he, Mārkaṇḍeya; in this way; was fixing; his mind; by austerity; study of the Vedas; and regulative principles; for showing mercy; made Himself manifest; exhibiting the forms of Nara and Nārāyaṇa; the Supreme Personality of Godhead.
497.yw_zh: 至尊人格首神想要施恩于圣人玛尔康戴亚，他全力苦行，研习韦达经，恪守规范原则，已全神贯注于觉悟自我，故而，至尊人格首神以纳茹阿和纳茹阿央纳的形体亲自显现在圣人面前。
497.yw_en: Desiring to bestow His mercy upon the saintly Mārkaṇḍeya, who had perfectly fixed his mind in self-realization through penance, Vedic study and observance of regulative principles, the Supreme Personality of Godhead personally appeared before the sage in the forms of Nara and Nārāyaṇa.

497.words_en_fc: the two of Them; one white and the other black; like blooming lotus flowers; Their eyes; having four arms; black deerskin; and bark; as Their clothing; most purifying; Their hands; sacred thread; threefold; waterpot; staff; straight; and; made of bamboo; of lotus seeds; prayer beads; and; which purifies all living beings; the Vedas (represented by bundles of darbha grass); and; directly; austerity; indeed; personified; blazing; lightning; the color; yellowish; with Their effulgence; very tall; bearing; by the chief of the demigods; worshiped.
497.yw_zh: 他们俩一位肤色白皙，另一位黝黑，两人都拥有四臂。他们的眼睛好似盛开的莲花瓣，他们身穿黑色鹿皮和树皮，戴着三股绳组成的圣线。他们那最具净化力的手拿着僧人用的水缸、笔直的竹棍和莲子串成的念珠，还有象征着最有净化力的韦达经的标志物，几束darbha草。他们身材伟岸，气宇轩昂，他们泛黄的光辉恰似闪电炫目的色彩。他们显现为苦行的人格，深受半神人之首的崇拜。
497.yw_en: One of Them was of a whitish complexion, the other blackish, and They both had four arms. Their eyes resembled the petals of blooming lotuses, and They wore garments of black deerskin and bark, along with the three-stranded sacred thread. In Their hands, which were most purifying, They carried the mendicant’s waterpot, straight bamboo staff and lotus-seed prayer beads, as well as the all-purifying Vedas in the symbolic form of bundles of darbha grass. Their bearing was tall and Their yellow effulgence the color of radiant lightning. Appearing as austerity personified, They were being worshiped by the foremost demigods.

497.ldw:
te vai bhagavato rūpe
 nara-nārāyaṇāv ṛṣī
dṛṣṭvotthāyādareṇoccair
 nanāmāṅgena daṇḍa-vat|

497.words_en_fc: They; indeed; of the Personality of Godhead; the personal manifestations; Nara and Nārāyaṇa; the two sages; seeing; standing up; with respect; great; bowed down; with his entire body; just like a stick.
497.yw_zh: 这两位圣人，纳茹阿和纳茹阿亚纳，是至尊主直接的亲身形体。当玛尔康戴亚·瑞希看到他们，便 立即起身，像一根棍子似的五体投地，恭恭敬敬地顶礼膜拜。
497.yw_en: These two sages, Nara and Nārāyaṇa, were the direct personal forms of the Supreme Lord. When Mārkaṇḍeya Ṛṣi saw Them, he immediately stood up and then with great respect offered Them obeisances by falling down flat on the ground like a stick.
