497.ldw_fc: saḥ ; tat ; sandarśana ; ānanda ; nirvṛta ; ātma ; indriya ; āśayaḥ ; hṛṣṭa ; romā ; aśru ; pūrṇa ; akṣaḥ ; na sehe ; tau ; udīkṣitum
497.words_en_fc: he, Mārkaṇḍeya; of Them; because of seeing; by the ecstasy; pleased; whose body; senses; and mind; standing on end; his bodily hairs; with tears; filled; his eyes; he was unable; upon them; to glance.
497.yw_zh: 得见他们，玛尔康戴亚的身体、心意和感官彻底满足，陷入狂喜，他毛发直竖，泪眼汪汪。玛尔康戴亚有些不知所措，发现难以目不转睛地注视他们。
497.yw_en: The ecstasy of seeing Them completely satisfied Mārkaṇḍeya’s body, mind and senses and caused the hairs on his body to stand on end and his eyes to fill with tears. Overwhelmed, Mārkaṇḍeya found it difficult to look at Them.

497.ldw:
utthāya prāñjaliḥ prahva
 autsukyād āśliṣann iva
namo nama itīśānau
 babhāṣe gadgadākṣaram|
497.ldw_fc: utthāya ; prāñjaliḥ ; prahvaḥ ; autsukyāt ; āśliṣan ; iva ; namaḥ ; namaḥ ; iti ; īśānau ; babhāṣe ; gadgada ; akṣaram
497.words_en_fc: standing up; with folded hands; humble; out of eagerness; embracing; as if; obeisances; obeisances; thus; to the two Lords; he spoke; choking with ecstasy; the syllables.
497.yw_zh: 玛尔康戴亚双手合十起身站立，谦恭地叩首顶礼，出于由衷的渴望，他想象着自己在拥抱二位主。他处在狂喜中，声音哽咽，口里不断地重复着，“我谦恭地顶拜您们。”
497.yw_en: Standing with his hands folded in supplication and his head bowed in humility, Mārkaṇḍeya felt such eagerness that he imagined he was embracing the two Lords. In a voice choked with ecstasy, he repeatedly said, “I offer You my humble obeisances.”

497.ldw:
tayor āsanam ādāya
 pādayor avanijya ca
arhaṇenānulepena
 dhūpa-mālyair apūjayat|
497.ldw_fc: tayoḥ ; āsanam ; ādāya ; pādayoḥ ; avanijya ; ca ; arhaṇena ; anulepena ; dhūpa ; mālyaiḥ ; apūjayat
497.words_en_fc: to Them; sitting places; offering; Their feet; bathing; and; with suitable respectful offerings; by anointing Them with sandalwood pulp and other fragrant substances; with incense; and flower garlands; he worshiped.
497.yw_zh: 他请他们入座，崇拜他们的足，然后用檀香浆、香精油、香和鲜花花环等供品崇拜他们。
497.yw_en: He gave Them sitting places and washed Their feet, and then he worshiped Them with presentations of arghya, sandalwood pulp, fragrant oils, incense and flower garlands.

497.ldw:
sukham āsanam āsīnau
 prasādābhimukhau munī
punar ānamya pādābhyāṁ
 gariṣṭhāv idam abravīt|
497.ldw_fc: sukham ; āsanam ; āsīnau ; prasāda ; abhimukhau ; munī ; punaḥ ; ānamya ; pādābhyām ; gariṣṭhau ; idam ; abravīt
497.words_en_fc: comfortably; on sitting places; seated; mercy; ready to give; to the Lord’s incarnation as the two sages; again; bowing down; at Their feet; to the supremely worshipable; this; he spoke.
497.yw_zh: 玛尔康戴亚·瑞希再次顶拜二位最值得崇拜的圣人的莲花足，他们怡然自在地坐着，准备赐予他一切恩泽。那时，他对他们如下说道。
497.yw_en: Mārkaṇḍeya Ṛṣi once again bowed down at the lotus feet of those two most worshipable sages, who were sitting at ease, ready to bestow all mercy upon him. He then addressed Them as follows.

497.ldw:
śrī-mārkaṇḍeya uvāca|kiṁ varṇaye tava vibho yad-udīrito ’suḥ
 saṁspandate tam anu vāṅ-mana-indriyāṇi
spandanti vai tanu-bhṛtām aja-śarvayoś ca
 svasyāpy athāpi bhajatām asi bhāva-bandhuḥ|
497.ldw_fc: śrī-mārkaṇḍeyaḥ uvāca ; kim ; varṇaye ; tava ; vibho ; yat ; udīritaḥ ; asuḥ ; saṁspandate ; tam anu ; vāk ; manaḥ ; indriyāṇi ; spandanti ; vai ; tanu-bhṛtām ; aja-śarvayoḥ ; ca ; svasya ; api ; atha api ; bhajatām ; asi ; bhāva-bandhuḥ
497.words_en_fc: Śrī Mārkaṇḍeya said; what; shall I describe; about You; O Almighty Lord; by whom; moved; the vital air; comes to life; following it; the power of speech; the mind; and the senses; begin to act; indeed; of all embodied living beings; of Lord Brahmā and Lord Śiva; as well; of myself; also; nevertheless; for those who are worshiping; You become; the intimate loving friend.
497.yw_zh: 施瑞·玛尔康戴亚说：全能的主啊，我如何能描述您们呢？您们唤醒生命之气，继而生命之气推动心意、感官和言语的力量活动。这对于一切普通受条件限制灵魂，甚至对于像布茹阿玛和希瓦这样伟大的半神人来说，都是确凿的事实。对我来说，这无疑也是事实。虽然如此，您们却是那些崇拜您们之人的挚友。
497.yw_en: Śrī Mārkaṇḍeya said: O Almighty Lord, how can I possibly describe You? You awaken the vital air, which then impels the mind, senses and power of speech to act. This is true for all ordinary conditioned souls and even for great demigods like Brahmā and Śiva. So it is certainly true for me. Nevertheless, You become the intimate friend of those who worship You.

497.ldw:
mūrtī ime bhagavato bhagavaṁs tri-lokyāḥ
 kṣemāya tāpa-viramāya ca mṛtyu-jityai
nānā bibharṣy avitum anya-tanūr yathedaṁ
 sṛṣṭvā punar grasasi sarvam ivorṇanābhiḥ|
497.ldw_fc: mūrtī ; ime ; bhagavataḥ ; bhagavan ; tri-lokyāḥ ; kṣemāya ; tāpa ; viramāya ; ca ; mṛtyu ; jityai ; nānā ; bibharṣi ; avitum ; anya ; tanūḥ ; yathā ; idam ; sṛṣṭvā ; punaḥ ; grasasi ; sarvam ; iva ; ūrṇa-nābhiḥ
497.words_en_fc: the two personal forms; these; of the Supreme Personality of Godhead; O Lord; of all the three worlds; for the ultimate benefit; of material misery; for the cessation; and; of death; for the conquest; various; You manifest; for the purpose of protecting; other; transcendental bodies; just as; this universe; having created; once again; You swallow up; entirely; just like; a spider.
497.yw_zh: 至尊人格首神啊，您们这两位人体形象降临显现，为的是赐予三个世界终极的福祉——停止物质痛苦，征服死亡。我的主，虽然您们创造出此间宇宙，却紧接着以许多超然形体化身显现，对之加以保护，您们还将其吞没，犹如蜘蛛吐丝结网，然后将网收回。
497.yw_en: O Supreme Personality of Godhead, these two personal forms of Yours have appeared to bestow the ultimate benefit for the three worlds — the cessation of material misery and the conquest of death. My Lord, although You create this universe and then assume many transcendental forms to protect it, You also swallow it up, just like a spider who spins and later withdraws its web.

497.ldw:
tasyāvituḥ sthira-careśitur aṅghri-mūlaṁ
 yat-sthaṁ na karma-guṇa-kāla-rajaḥ spṛśanti
yad vai stuvanti ninamanti yajanty abhīkṣṇaṁ
 dhyāyanti veda-hṛdayā munayas tad-āptyai|
497.ldw_fc: tasya ; avituḥ ; sthira-cara ; īśituḥ ; aṅghri-mūlam ; yat-stham ; na ; karma-guṇa-kāla ; rajaḥ ; spṛśanti ; yat ; vai ; stuvanti ; ninamanti ; yajanti ; abhīkṣṇam ; dhyāyanti ; veda-hṛdayāḥ ; munayaḥ ; tat-āptyai
497.words_en_fc: of Him; the protector; of the stationary and moving living beings; the supreme controller; the soles of His lotus feet; one who is situated at which; do not; of material work, material qualities and time; the contamination; touch; whom; indeed; praise; bow down to; worship; at every moment; meditate upon; who have assimilated the essence of the Vedas; sages; for the purpose of achieving Him.
497.yw_zh: 因为您们是保护者兼一切动与不动的生物的至尊控制者，任何托庇于您们的莲花足的人决不会被物质活动、物质品质和物质时间的污染触碰。已经汲取并消化韦达经之要义的伟大圣人们礼赞您们，恒常崇拜您们，冥想您们。
497.yw_en: Because You are the protector and the supreme controller of all moving and nonmoving beings, anyone who takes shelter of Your lotus feet can never be touched by the contamination of material work, material qualities or time. Great sages who have assimilated the essential meaning of the Vedas offer their prayers to You. To gain Your association, they bow down to You at every opportunity and constantly worship You and meditate upon You.

497.ldw:
nānyaṁ tavāṅghry-upanayād apavarga-mūrteḥ
 kṣemaṁ janasya parito-bhiya īśa vidmaḥ
brahmā bibhety alam ato dvi-parārdha-dhiṣṇyaḥ
 kālasya te kim uta tat-kṛta-bhautikānām|
497.ldw_fc: na anyam ; tava ; aṅghri ; upanayāt ; apavarga-mūrteḥ ; kṣemam ; janasya ; paritaḥ ; bhiyaḥ ; īśa ; vidmaḥ ; brahmā ; bibheti ; alam ; ataḥ ; dvi-parārdha ; dhiṣṇyaḥ ; kālasya ; te ; kim uta ; tat-kṛta ; bhautikānām
497.words_en_fc: no other; Your; of the lotus feet; than the attainment; who are liberation personified; benefit; for the person; on all sides; who is fearful; O Lord; do we know; Lord Brahmā; is afraid; very much; on account of this; the entire duration of the universe; the period of whose reign; because of time; Your feature; then what to speak; created by him, Brahmā; of the mundane creatures.
497.yw_zh: 我亲爱的主，就连在宇宙的整个持续时间中一直得享其自身崇高地位的主布茹阿玛都惧怕时间的流逝。那么，更不用说由布茹阿玛创造的世俗受造物了。他们在生命的每一步都危机四伏。我不知道除了托庇于您们的莲花足外，还有什么能使众生脱离这种恐惧。
497.yw_en: My dear Lord, even Lord Brahmā, who enjoys his exalted position for the entire duration of the universe, fears the passage of time. Then what to speak of those whom Brahmā creates, the conditioned souls. They encounter fearful dangers at every step of their lives. I do not know of any relief from this fear except shelter at Your lotus feet, which are the very form of liberation.

497.ldw:
tad vai bhajāmy ṛta-dhiyas tava pāda-mūlaṁ
 hitvedam ātma-cchadi cātma-guroḥ parasya
dehādy apārtham asad antyam abhijña-mātraṁ
 vindeta te tarhi sarva-manīṣitārtham|
497.ldw_fc: tat ; vai ; bhajāmi ; ṛta-dhiyaḥ ; tava ; pāda-mūlam ; hitvā ; idam ; ātma-chadi ; ca ; ātma-guroḥ ; parasya ; deha-ādi ; apārtham ; asat ; antyam ; abhijña-mātram ; vindeta ; te ; tarhi ; sarva ; manīṣita ; artham
497.words_en_fc: therefore; indeed; I worship; of Him whose intelligence always perceives the truth; of You; the soles of the lotus feet; giving up; this; covering of the self; and; of the master of the soul; who is the Supreme Truth; the material body and other false designations; useless; insubstantial; temporary; only imagined to have a separate existence; one obtains; from You; then; all; desired; objects.
497.yw_zh: 因此，我崇拜您们的莲花足，我已不再把自我与物质躯体和遮蔽真我的别的一切认同。这些无用、无实质、短暂的覆盖物只不过被认为是游离于您们的，而您们的智慧却涵盖着一切真理。通过臻达您们——至尊首神兼个体灵魂之主——便可获得称心如意的一切。
497.yw_en: Therefore I worship Your lotus feet, having renounced my identification with the material body and everything else that covers my true self. These useless, insubstantial and temporary coverings are merely presumed to be separate from You, whose intelligence encompasses all truth. By attaining You — the Supreme Godhead and the master of the soul — one attains everything desirable.
497.yz_zh: 错误地将自我认同于物质躯体或物质心意的人，自然觉得自己有资格开发利用物质世界。但是，当我们认识到我们永恒的灵性本性，了解到主奎师那是一切存在的至尊拥有者，籍着灵性知识的力量，我们就会摈弃我们虚幻的享乐倾向。
497.yz_en: One who falsely identifies himself as the material body or mind automatically feels entitled to exploit the material world. But when we realize our eternal spiritual nature and Lord Kṛṣṇa’s supreme proprietorship over all that be, we renounce our false enjoying propensity by the strength of spiritual knowledge.

497.ldw:
sattvaṁ rajas tama itīśa tavātma-bandho
 māyā-mayāḥ sthiti-layodaya-hetavo ’sya
līlā dhṛtā yad api sattva-mayī praśāntyai
 nānye nṛṇāṁ vyasana-moha-bhiyaś ca yābhyām|
497.ldw_fc: sattvam ; rajaḥ ; tamaḥ ; iti ; īśa ; tava ; ātma-bandho ; māyā-mayāḥ ; sthiti-laya-udaya ; hetavaḥ ; asya ; līlāḥ ; dhṛtāḥ ; yat api ; sattva-mayī ; praśāntyai ; na ; anye ; nṛṇām ; vyasana ; moha ; bhiyaḥ ; ca ; yābhyām
497.words_en_fc: goodness; passion; ignorance; the modes of nature thus termed; O Lord; Your; O supreme friend of the soul; produced from Your personal energy; of maintenance, destruction and creation; the causes; of this universe; as pastimes; assumed; although; that which is in the mode of goodness; for liberation; not; the other two; for persons; danger; bewilderment; and fear; also; from which.
497.yw_zh: 我的主啊，受条件限制灵魂的至尊朋友啊，尽管为了这世界的创造、维系和毁灭，您接受组成您迷幻能量的善良、激情和愚昧属性，但您特别运用善良属性以解脱受条件限制的灵魂。其他两种属性只给他们带来痛苦、幻象和恐惧。
497.yw_en: O my Lord, O supreme friend of the conditioned soul, although for the creation, maintenance and annihilation of this world You accept the modes of goodness, passion and ignorance, which constitute Your illusory potency, You specifically employ the mode of goodness to liberate the conditioned souls. The other two modes simply bring them suffering, illusion and fear.
497.yz_zh:
词语lila dhrtah说明，主布茹阿玛的创造活动，主希瓦的毁灭活动和主维施努的维系活动全是绝对真理，主奎师那的逍遥时光。但是，终极而言，唯有主维施努能赐予解脱，使人免于物质幻象的束缚，正如词语sattva-mayi prasantyai表明的。

我们的激情和愚昧活动为自己和他人带来巨大的痛苦，因此，应该予以摒弃。一个人应该逐渐稳处于善良属性中，进而平和地生活在灵性层面上，善良属性的实质在于舍弃从事一切活动的自私利益，全心全意奉献于至尊生物，主奎师那，我们存在的根源。
497.yz_en:
The words līlā dhṛtāḥ indicate that the creative activities of Lord Brahmā, the destructive activities of Lord Śiva and the sustaining functions of Lord Viṣṇu are all pastimes of the Absolute Truth, Lord Kṛṣṇa. But ultimately only Lord Viṣṇu can award liberation from the clutches of material illusion, as indicated by the words sattva-mayī praśāntyai.

Our passionate and ignorant activities cause great suffering, illusion and fear for us and others; therefore they should be given up. One should become firmly situated in the mode of goodness and live peacefully on the spiritual platform. The essence of goodness is to renounce selfish interest in all one’s activities and thus dedicate one’s entire being to the Supreme Being, Lord Kṛṣṇa, who is the source of our existence.

497.ldw:
tasmāt taveha bhagavann atha tāvakānāṁ
 śuklāṁ tanuṁ sva-dayitāṁ kuśalā bhajanti
yat sātvatāḥ puruṣa-rūpam uśanti sattvaṁ
 loko yato ’bhayam utātma-sukhaṁ na cānyat|
497.ldw_fc: tasmāt ; tava ; iha ; bhagavan ; atha ; tāvakānām ; śuklām ; tanum ; sva-dayitām ; kuśalāḥ ; bhajanti ; yat ; sātvatāḥ ; puruṣa ; rūpam ; uśanti ; sattvam ; lokaḥ ; yataḥ ; abhayam ; uta ; ātma-sukham ; na ; ca ; anyat
497.words_en_fc: therefore; Your; in this world; O Supreme Lord; and; of Your devotees; transcendental; the personal form; most dear to them; those who are expert in spiritual knowledge; worship; because; the great devotees; of the original Personality of Godhead; the form; consider; the mode of goodness; the spiritual world; from which; fearlessness; and; the happiness of the soul; not; and; any other.
497.yw_zh: 主啊，由于无惧无畏，灵性快乐和神的国度皆可通过纯粹善良属性到达，您的奉献者认为，只有这个属性而非激情和愚昧属性，才是您，至尊人格首神的一个直接展示。因此，智者崇拜您那由纯粹善良属性构成的可爱的超然形体，崇拜您的纯粹奉献者的灵性形体。
497.yw_en: O Lord, because fearlessness, spiritual happiness and the kingdom of God are all achieved through the mode of pure goodness, Your devotees consider this mode, but never passion and ignorance, to be a direct manifestation of You, the Supreme Personality of Godhead. Intelligent persons thus worship Your beloved transcendental form, composed of pure goodness, along with the spiritual forms of Your pure devotees.
497.yz_zh: 智者不崇拜半神人，半神人代表着激情和愚昧属性。主布茹两玛代表激情属性，主希瓦代表愚昧属性，茵卓等半神人也代表诸多物质属性。但是，主维施努或纳茹阿亚纳则代表灵性的纯粹善良属性，这属性为人带来对灵性世界的觉悟和灵性喜乐，使人免于恐惧。这样的裨益永远不能从不纯净的物质善良属性中获得，因为它总是混杂着激情和愚昧属性。正如这节诗淸楚说明，神的超然形体完全由永恒的灵性善良属性构成，故而不沾染一丝一毫的物质善良、激情和愚昧属性。
497.yz_en: Intelligent persons do not worship the demigods, who represent the modes of passion and ignorance. Lord Brahmā represents passion, Lord Śiva represents ignorance, and demigods such as Indra also represent the modes of material nature. But Lord Viṣṇu, or Nārāyaṇa, represents pure spiritual goodness, which brings one realization of the spiritual world, freedom from fear, and spiritual bliss. Such benefits can never be derived from impure, material goodness, for it is always mixed with the modes of passion and ignorance. As clearly indicated in this verse, the transcendental form of God is fully constituted of eternal spiritual goodness and thus has no tinge of the material mode of goodness, passion or ignorance.

497.ldw:
tasmai namo bhagavate puruṣāya bhūmne
 viśvāya viśva-gurave para-daivatāya
nārāyaṇāya ṛṣaye ca narottamāya
 haṁsāya saṁyata-gire nigameśvarāya|
497.ldw_fc: tasmai ; namaḥ ; bhagavate ; puruṣāya ; bhūmne ; viśvāya ; viśva-gurave ; para-daivatāya ; nārāyaṇāya ; ṛṣaye ; ca ; nara-uttamāya ; haṁsāya ; saṁyata-gire ; nigama-īśvarāya
497.words_en_fc: to Him; my obeisances; to the Godhead; the Supreme Person; the all-pervading one; the all-inclusive manifestation of the universe; the spiritual master of the universe; the supremely worshipable Deity; to Lord Nārāyaṇa; the sage; and; to the best of human beings; situated in perfect purity; who has controlled his speech; the master of the Vedic scriptures.
497.yw_zh: 我向他，至尊人格首神，致以我卑微的顶拜。他是无所不在且包罗万象的宇宙的形体兼宇宙的灵性导师。我向主纳茹阿亚纳顶礼膜拜，他是最值得崇拜的神祇，他显现为一名圣哲，我也向圣洁的纳茹阿，最超卓的人，致以顶拜，他至纯至粹，完全控制一已的言语，而且是韦达文献的传播者。
497.yw_en: I offer my humble obeisances to Him, the Supreme Personality of Godhead. He is the all-pervading and all-inclusive form of the universe, as well as its spiritual master. I bow down to Lord Nārāyaṇa, the supremely worshipable Deity appearing as a sage, and also to the saintly Nara, the best of human beings, who is fixed in perfect goodness, fully in control of his speech, and the propagator of the Vedic literatures.

497.ldw:
yaṁ vai na veda vitathākṣa-pathair bhramad-dhīḥ
 santaṁ svakeṣv asuṣu hṛdy api dṛk-patheṣu
tan-māyayāvṛta-matiḥ sa u eva sākṣād
 ādyas tavākhila-guror upasādya vedam|
497.ldw_fc: yam ; vai ; na veda ; vitatha ; akṣa-pathaiḥ ; bhramat ; dhīḥ ; santam ; svakeṣu ; asuṣu ; hṛdi ; api ; dṛk-patheṣu ; tat-māyayā ; āvṛta ; matiḥ ; saḥ ; u ; eva ; sākṣāt ; ādyaḥ ; tava ; akhila-guroḥ ; upasādya ; vedam
497.words_en_fc: whom; indeed; does not recognize; deceptive; by methods of empirical perception; becoming diverted; whose intelligence; present; within one’s own; senses; within the heart; even; among perceived objects of the external world; by His illusory potency; covered over; his understanding; he; even; indeed; directly; originally (in ignorance); of You; the spiritual master of all living beings; obtaining; the knowledge of the Vedas.
497.yw_zh: 其智性被其骗人的感官行为滥用的物质主义者根本不能认出您，尽管您时刻存在于他的感官、内心和他的感知对象中。然而，即使一个人的理解已被您的迷幻能量覆盖，假如他从您，众生的至尊灵性导师那里获得韦达知识，便能直接了解您。
497.yw_en: A materialist, his intelligence perverted by the action of his deceptive senses, cannot recognize You at all, although You are always present within his own senses and heart and also among the objects of his perception. Yet even though one’s understanding has been covered by Your illusory potency, if one obtains Vedic knowledge from You, the supreme spiritual master of all, he can directly understand You.

497.ldw:
yad-darśanaṁ nigama ātma-rahaḥ-prakāśaṁ
 muhyanti yatra kavayo ’ja-parā yatantaḥ
taṁ sarva-vāda-viṣaya-pratirūpa-śīlaṁ
 vande mahā-puruṣam ātma-nigūḍha-bodham|
497.ldw_fc: yat ; darśanam ; nigame ; ātma ; rahaḥ ; prakāśam ; muhyanti ; yatra ; kavayaḥ ; aja-parāḥ ; yatantaḥ ; tam ; sarva-vāda ; viṣaya ; pratirūpa ; śīlam ; vande ; mahā-puruṣam ; ātma ; nigūḍha ; bodham
497.words_en_fc: of whom; the vision; in the Vedas; of the Supreme Soul; the mystery; which reveals; become bewildered; about which; great learned authorities; headed by Brahmā; endeavoring; to Him; of all different philosophies; the subject matter; adjusting itself as suitable; whose personal nature; I offer my homage; to the Supreme Personality of Godhead; from the spirit soul; hidden; understanding.
497.yw_zh: 我亲爱的主，诸多韦达文献本身揭示有关您，至尊之人的机密知识，因此，就连主布茹阿玛等伟大学者在努力通过经验性方法了解您的时候都大惑不解。每位哲学家按照各自的推测结论了解您。我崇拜那位至尊之人，关于他的知识为覆盖着受条件限制灵魂的灵性身份的躯体名号所掩蔽。
497.yw_en: My dear Lord, the Vedic literatures alone reveal confidential knowledge of Your supreme personality, and thus even such great scholars as Lord Brahmā himself are bewildered in their attempt to understand You through empirical methods. Each philosopher understands You according to his particular speculative conclusions. I worship that Supreme Person, knowledge of whom is hidden by the bodily designations covering the conditioned soul’s spiritual identity.
497.yz_zh: 甚至像布茹阿玛这样的伟大半神人，在努力推测以了解至尊人格首神时无不感到困惑。每位哲学家都被诸多自然属性的某种组合覆盖，故而按照各自的物质状态描述至尊真理。因此，即便竭尽全力以经验性方法也决不会使人得出一切知识的结论。最高的知识是奎师那，至尊人格首神，只有通过全然臣服皈依他，以爱服务于他，方能了解他。这就是为什么玛尔康戴亚•瑞希在此说，vande maha-purusam：“我只崇拜至尊之人。”那些努力崇拜神但同时却继续心智推敲或从事果报活动的人，将只会得到混杂不淸、令人困惑的结果。要想成为纯粹奉献者，就该摈弃一切果报活动和心智推敲，如此，对主的爱心服务才会结出有关至尊者的完美知识。唯有这样的完美能使永恒的灵魂心满意足。
497.yz_en:
Even great demigods like Brahmā are bewildered in their speculative attempts to understand the Supreme Personality of Godhead. Each philosopher is covered by a unique combination of the modes of nature and thus describes the Supreme Truth according to his own material conditioning. Therefore even strenuous empirical endeavor will never bring one to the conclusion of all knowledge. The highest knowledge is Kṛṣṇa, the Supreme Personality of Godhead, and one can understand Him only by fully surrendering to Him and serving Him with love. This is why Mārkaṇḍeya Ṛṣi states here, vande mahā-puruṣam: “I simply worship that Supreme Personality.” Those who try to worship God but at the same time continue speculating or acting fruitively will attain only mixed and bewildering results. To be pure a devotee must give up all fruitive activity and mental speculation; in that way his loving service to the Lord will yield perfect knowledge of the Supreme. Only this perfection can satisfy the eternal soul.

Thus end the purports of the humble servants of His Divine Grace A.C. Bhaktivedanta Swami Prabhupāda to the Twelfth Canto, Eighth Chapter, of the Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam, entitled “Mārkaṇḍeya’s Prayers to Nara-Nārāyaṇa Ṛṣi.”

498.ldw:
sūta uvāca|saṁstuto bhagavān itthaṁ
 mārkaṇḍeyena dhīmatā
nārāyaṇo nara-sakhaḥ
 prīta āha bhṛgūdvaham|
498.ldw_fc: sūtaḥ uvāca ; saṁstutaḥ ; bhagavān ; ittham ; mārkaṇḍeyena ; dhī-matā ; nārāyaṇaḥ ; nara-sakhaḥ ; prītaḥ ; āha ; bhṛgu-udvaham
498.words_en_fc: Sūta Gosvāmī said; properly glorified; the Supreme Lord; in this way; by Mārkaṇḍeya; the intelligent sage; Lord Nārāyaṇa; the friend of Nara; satisfied; spoke; to the most eminent descendant of Bhṛgu.
498.yw_zh: 苏塔·哥斯瓦米说：至尊主纳茹阿亚纳，纳茹阿之友，对睿智的圣人玛尔康戴亚献上的恰当的荣耀祷文甚为满意。所以，主对布瑞古最杰出的后裔如下说道。
498.yw_en: Sūta Gosvāmī said: The Supreme Lord Nārāyaṇa, the friend of Nara, was satisfied by the proper glorification offered by the intelligent sage Mārkaṇḍeya. Thus the Lord addressed that excellent descendant of Bhṛgu.

498.ldw:
śrī-bhagavān uvāca|bho bho brahmarṣi-varyo ’si
 siddha ātma-samādhinā
mayi bhaktyānapāyinyā
 tapaḥ-svādhyāya-saṁyamaiḥ|
498.ldw_fc: śrī-bhagavān uvāca ; bhoḥ bhoḥ ; brahma-ṛṣi ; varyaḥ ; asi ; siddhaḥ ; ātma-samādhinā ; mayi ; bhaktyā ; anapāyinyā ; tapaḥ ; svādhyāya ; saṁyamaiḥ
498.words_en_fc: the Supreme Personality of Godhead said; dear sage; of all learned brāhmaṇas; the best; you are; perfect; by fixed meditation upon the Self; directed toward Me; by devotional service; undeviating; by austerities; study of the Vedas; and regulative principles.
498.yw_zh: 至尊人格首神说：我亲爱的玛尔康戴亚，千真万确，你是所有博学布茹阿玛纳中的佼佼者。你通过专注地冥想至尊灵魂，毫不偏离地为我从事奉献服务，从事苦行，研习韦达经和恪守规范守则，你的生命已臻至完美。
498.yw_en: The Supreme Personality of Godhead said: My dear Mārkaṇḍeya, you are indeed the best of all learned brāhmaṇas. You have perfected your life by practicing fixed meditation upon the Supreme Soul, as well as by focusing upon Me your undeviating devotional service, your austerities, your study of the Vedas and your strict adherence to regulative principles.

498.ldw:
vayaṁ te parituṣṭāḥ sma
 tvad-bṛhad-vrata-caryayā
varaṁ pratīccha bhadraṁ te
 vara-do ’smi tvad-īpsitam|
498.ldw_fc: vayam ; te ; parituṣṭāḥ ; sma ; tvat ; bṛhat-vrata ; caryayā ; varam ; pratīccha ; bhadram ; te ; vara-daḥ ; asmi ; tvat-īpsitam
498.words_en_fc: We; with you; perfectly satisfied; have become; your; of the vow of lifelong celibacy; by performance; a benediction; please choose; all good; unto you; the giver of benedictions; I am; desired by you.
498.yw_zh: 我们对你终身贞守的修行感到十分满意。请选择你所渴望的祝福，因为我能使你如愿以偿。愿你得享一切好运。
498.yw_en: We are perfectly satisfied with your practice of lifelong celibacy. Please choose whatever benediction you desire, since I can grant your wish. May you enjoy all good fortune.
498.yz_zh: 施瑞拉•维施瓦纳塔•恰夸瓦尔提•塔库尔解释说，主在这节诗的开首用了复数词“我们感到满意”一因为他在指他自己以及希瓦和乌玛，后来玛尔康戴亚荣耀了希瓦和乌玛。接着，主用了单数形式--“我是祝福的赐予者”——因为，终极而言，唯有主纳茹阿亚纳（奎师那）才能赐予生命的最髙完美，永恒的奎师那知觉。
498.yz_en: Śrīla Viśvanātha Cakravartī Ṭhākura explains that the Lord used the plural form in the beginning of this verse — “We are satisfied” — because He was referring to Himself along with Śiva and Umā, who will later be glorified by Mārkaṇḍeya. The Lord then used the singular — “I am the bestower of benedictions” — because ultimately only Lord Nārāyaṇa (Kṛṣṇa) can award the highest perfection of life, eternal Kṛṣṇa consciousness.

498.ldw:
śrī-ṛṣir uvāca|jitaṁ te deva-deveśa
 prapannārti-harācyuta
vareṇaitāvatālaṁ no
 yad bhavān samadṛśyata|
498.ldw_fc: śrī-ṛṣiḥ uvāca ; jitam ; te ; deva-deva-īśa ; prapanna ; ārti-hara ; acyuta ; vareṇa ; etāvatā ; alam ; naḥ ; yat ; bhavān ; samadṛśyata
498.words_en_fc: the sage said; are victorious; You; O Lord of lords; of one who is surrendered; O remover of all distress; O infallible one; with the benediction; this much; enough; by us; that; Your good self; has been seen.
498.yw_zh: 圣人说：众神明之主啊，一切荣耀归于您！主阿丘塔啊，您去除臣服皈依于您的奉献者一切痛苦。您允许我看到您就是我想要的一切祝福。
498.yw_en: The sage said: O Lord of lords, all glories to You! O Lord Acyuta, You remove all distress for the devotees who surrender unto You. That you have allowed me to see You is all the benediction I want.

498.ldw:
gṛhītvājādayo yasya
 śrīmat-pādābja-darśanam
manasā yoga-pakvena
 sa bhavān me ’kṣi-gocaraḥ|
498.ldw_fc: gṛhītvā ; aja-ādayaḥ ; yasya ; śrīmat ; pāda-abja ; darśanam ; manasā ; yoga-pakvena ; saḥ ; bhavān ; me ; akṣi ; go-caraḥ
498.words_en_fc: receiving; (became) Brahmā and others; whose; all-opulent; of the lotus feet; the sight; by the mind; matured in yoga practice; He; Yourself; my; to the eyes; perceptible.
498.yw_zh: 像主布茹阿玛这样的半神人在他们的内心通过瑜伽修习变得成熟之后，单凭得见您美丽的莲花足便获得了他们崇高的地位。眼下，我的主，您却亲自显现在我面前。
498.yw_en: Such demigods as Lord Brahmā achieved their exalted positions simply by seeing Your beautiful lotus feet after their minds had become mature in yoga practice. And now, my Lord, You have personally appeared before me.
498.yz_zh: 玛尔康戴亚•瑞希指出，像主布茹阿玛这样崇髙的半神人仅凭得见主的莲花足，便获得了他们的地位，而玛尔康戴亚•瑞希如今却能见到主奎师那的整个形体。因此，他简直难以想象他有多么幸运。
498.yz_en: Mārkaṇḍeya Ṛṣi points out that exalted demigods like Lord Brahmā achieved their positions simply by glimpsing the Lord’s lotus feet, and yet Mārkaṇḍeya Ṛṣi was now able to see Lord Kṛṣṇa’s entire body. Thus he could not even imagine the extent of his good fortune.

498.ldw:
athāpy ambuja-patrākṣa
 puṇya-śloka-śikhāmaṇe
drakṣye māyāṁ yayā lokaḥ
 sa-pālo veda sad-bhidām|
498.ldw_fc: atha api ; ambuja-patra ; akṣa ; puṇya-śloka ; śikhāmaṇe ; drakṣye ; māyām ; yayā ; lokaḥ ; sa-pālaḥ ; veda ; sat ; bhidām
498.words_en_fc: nonetheless; like the petals of a lotus; O You whose eyes; of famous personalities; O crest jewel; I desire to see; the illusory energy; by which; the entire world; along with its ruling demigods; considers; of the absolute reality; material differentiation.
498.yw_zh: 眼如莲花的主啊，著名人物中的瑰宝啊，尽管我只是因为看到您而心满意足，但我还是渴望目睹您的迷幻能量，正是通过这迷幻能量的影响，整个世界连同其执政半神人们都认为真相是斑驳陆离的物质。
498.yw_en: O lotus-eyed Lord, O crest jewel of renowned personalities, although I am satisfied simply by seeing You, I do wish to see Your illusory potency, by whose influence the entire world, together with its ruling demigods, considers reality to be materially variegated.
498.yz_zh: 受条件限制灵魂看到物质世界是由独立的实体组成。实际上切都是统一的，全是至尊主的能量。玛尔康戴亚•瑞希好奇地想亲眼目睹maya，主的迷幻能量将生物投掷到幻象中的确切过程。
498.yz_en: A conditioned soul sees the material world to be constituted of independent, separate entities. Actually, all things are united, being potencies of the Supreme Lord. Mārkaṇḍeya Ṛṣi is curious to witness the exact process by which māyā, the Lord’s bewildering potency, casts living beings into illusion.

498.ldw:
sūta uvāca|itīḍito ’rcitaḥ kāmam
 ṛṣiṇā bhagavān mune
tatheti sa smayan prāgād
 badary-āśramam īśvaraḥ|
498.ldw_fc: sūtaḥ uvāca ; iti ; īḍitaḥ ; arcitaḥ ; kāmam ; ṛṣiṇā ; bhagavān ; mune ; tathā iti ; saḥ ; smayan ; prāgāt ; badarī-āśramam ; īśvaraḥ
498.words_en_fc: Sūta Gosvāmī said; in these words; glorified; worshiped; satisfactorily; by the sage Mārkaṇḍeya; the Personality of Godhead; O wise Śaunaka; “so be it”; He; smiling; departed; for the hermitage Badarikāśrama; the Supreme Lord.
498.yw_zh: 苏塔·哥斯瓦米说：明智的邵纳卡呀，玛尔康戴亚的礼赞与崇拜令至尊人格首神心满意足，他微笑着答道，“如你所愿”。然后离开，前往他在巴达瑞卡阿施茹阿姆的修院。
498.yw_en: Sūta Gosvāmī said: O wise Śaunaka, thus satisfied by Mārkaṇḍeya’s praise and worship, the Supreme Personality of Godhead, smiling, replied, “So be it,” and then departed for His hermitage at Badarikāśrama.
498.yz_zh: 本节诗中的词语bhagavan和isvam指的是，至尊主的挛生圣人纳茹阿和纳茹阿亚纳化身。据施瑞拉•维施瓦纳塔•恰夸瓦尔提•塔库尔说，至尊主的笑靥带着一丝愁容，因为他更愿意他的纯粹奉献者远离他的迷幻能量。想见到主的迷幻能量的好奇感，有时发展成罪恶的物质欲望。尽管如此，为了取悦他的奉献者玛尔康戴亚，主满足了他的请求，就像父亲不能说服儿子放弃追求有害的欲望时，会让他去体会某种令人痛苦的反应，如此，他会自愿放弃那种念头。就这样，主十分明了玛尔康戴亚即将遭遇什么，便微笑着准备向他展示迷幻能量。
498.yz_en: The words bhagavān and īśvara in this verse refer to the Supreme Lord in His incarnation as the twin sages Nara and Nārāyaṇa. According to Śrīla Viśvanātha Cakravartī Ṭhākura, the Supreme Lord smiled ruefully, because He prefers that His pure devotees stay away from His illusory energy. Curiosity to see the illusory energy of the Lord sometimes develops into sinful material desire. Nonetheless, to please His devotee Mārkaṇḍeya, the Lord granted his request, just as a father who cannot convince his son to give up pursuing a harmful desire may let him experience some painful reaction so that he will then voluntarily desist. Thus, understanding what would soon happen to Mārkaṇḍeya, the Lord smiled as He prepared to display the illusory potency to him.

498.ldw:
tam eva cintayann artham
 ṛṣiḥ svāśrama eva saḥ
vasann agny-arka-somāmbu-
 bhū-vāyu-viyad-ātmasu|dhyāyan sarvatra ca hariṁ
 bhāva-dravyair apūjayat
kvacit pūjāṁ visasmāra
 prema-prasara-samplutaḥ|
498.ldw_fc: tam ; eva ; cintayan ; artham ; ṛṣiḥ ; sva-āśrame ; eva ; saḥ ; vasan ; agni ; arka ; soma ; ambu ; bhū ; vāyu ; viyat ; ātmasu ; dhyāyan ; sarvatra ; ca ; harim ; bhāva-dravyaiḥ ; apūjayat ; kvacit ; pūjām ; visasmāra ; prema ; prasara ; samplutaḥ
498.words_en_fc: that; indeed; thinking of; the goal; the sage Mārkaṇḍeya; at his own hermitage; indeed; he; remaining; in the fire; the sun; the moon; the water; the earth; the wind; the lightning; and in his own heart; meditating; in all circumstances; and; upon Lord Hari; with paraphernalia conceived in his mind; he offered worship; sometimes; the worship; he forgot; of pure love of God; in the flood; being drowned.
498.yw_zh: 圣人一直想要看到主的迷幻能量，所以他寸步不离他的阿刷玛，恒常冥想火、日月、水、土、空气、闪电和他心中的主，并用他心意设想的用具崇拜他。但有时，玛尔康戴亚淹没在对主的爱的波澜中，故而浑然忘记做常规的崇拜。
498.yw_en: Thinking always of his desire to see the Lord’s illusory energy, the sage remained in his āśrama, meditating constantly upon the Lord within fire, the sun, the moon, water, the earth, air, lightning and his own heart and worshiping Him with paraphernalia conceived in his mind. But sometimes, overwhelmed by waves of love for the Lord, Mārkaṇḍeya would forget to perform his regular worship.
498.yz_zh: 显而易见，这些诗节表明玛尔康戴亚•瑞希是主奎师那的伟大奉献者，因此，他想要见到主的迷幻能量并非为了实现某物质野心，而是想了解他的能量在如何运作。
498.yz_en: It is apparent from these verses that Mārkaṇḍeya Ṛṣi was a great devotee of Lord Kṛṣṇa; therefore he wanted to see the illusory energy of the Lord not to fulfill some material ambition but to learn how His potency is working.

498.ldw:
tasyaikadā bhṛgu-śreṣṭha
 puṣpabhadrā-taṭe muneḥ
upāsīnasya sandhyāyāṁ
 brahman vāyur abhūn mahān|
498.ldw_fc: tasya ; ekadā ; bhṛgu-śreṣṭha ; puṣpabhadrā-taṭe ; muneḥ ; upāsīnasya ; sandhyāyām ; brahman ; vāyuḥ ; abhūt ; mahān
498.words_en_fc: while he; one day; O best of the descendants of Bhṛgu; on the bank of the river Puṣpabhadrā; the sage; was performing worship; at the juncture of the day; O brāhmaṇa; a wind; arose; great.
498.yw_zh: 布茹阿玛纳·邵纳卡啊，布瑞古后裔中的佼佼者啊，一日，傍晚时分，当玛尔康戴亚在普施帕巴卓河岸做崇拜时，突然狂风四起。
498.yw_en: O brāhmaṇa Śaunaka, best of the Bhṛgus, one day while Mārkaṇḍeya was performing his evening worship on the bank of the Puṣpabhadrā, a great wind suddenly arose.

498.ldw:
taṁ caṇḍa-śabdaṁ samudīrayantaṁ
 balāhakā anv abhavan karālāḥ
akṣa-sthaviṣṭhā mumucus taḍidbhiḥ
 svananta uccair abhi varṣa-dhārāḥ|
498.ldw_fc: tam ; caṇḍa-śabdam ; samudīrayantam ; balāhakāḥ ; anu ; abhavan ; karālāḥ ; akṣa ; sthaviṣṭhāḥ ; mumucuḥ ; taḍidbhiḥ ; svanantaḥ ; uccaiḥ ; abhi ; varṣa ; dhārāḥ
498.words_en_fc: that wind; a terrible sound; which was creating; clouds; following it; appeared; fearful; like wagon wheels; solid; they released; along with lightning; resounding; greatly; in all directions; of rain; torrents.
498.yw_zh: 狂风呼啸而过，卷起滚滚乌云，怒吼的雷鸣笼罩天宇，四面八方暴雨滂沱，雨水大得犹如车轮。
498.yw_en: That wind created a terrible sound and brought in its wake fearsome clouds that were accompanied by lightning and roaring thunder and that poured down on all sides torrents of rain as heavy as wagon wheels.

498.ldw:
tato vyadṛśyanta catuḥ samudrāḥ
 samantataḥ kṣmā-talam āgrasantaḥ
samīra-vegormibhir ugra-nakra-
 mahā-bhayāvarta-gabhīra-ghoṣāḥ|
498.ldw_fc: tataḥ ; vyadṛśyanta ; catuḥ samudrāḥ ; samantataḥ ; kṣmā-talam ; āgrasantaḥ ; samīra ; vega ; ūrmibhiḥ ; ugra ; nakra ; mahā-bhaya ; āvarta ; gabhīra ; ghoṣāḥ
498.words_en_fc: then; appeared; the four oceans; on all sides; the surface of the earth; swallowing up; of the wind; impelled by the force; with their waves; terrible; with sea monsters; very fearful; with whirlpools; grave; with sounds.
498.yw_zh: 那时，四大洋从四面八方汹涌而至，吞没地球表面。海洋里充满面目狰狞的海怪，恐怖的漩涡和不祥的隆隆声。
498.yw_en: Then the four great oceans appeared on all sides, swallowing up the surface of the earth with their wind-tossed waves. In these oceans were terrible sea monsters, fearful whirlpools and ominous rumblings.

498.ldw:
antar bahiś cādbhir ati-dyubhiḥ kharaiḥ
 śatahradābhir upatāpitaṁ jagat
catur-vidhaṁ vīkṣya sahātmanā munir
 jalāplutāṁ kṣmāṁ vimanāḥ samatrasat|

498.yw_zh: 圣人看到，包括他自己在内的全体宇宙居民在内在外深受狂风、电闪雷鸣的侵袭折磨，汹涌的巨浪翻腾得比天还高。整个地球被水吞没，他惊恐万状，不知所措。
498.yw_en: The sage saw all the inhabitants of the universe, including himself, tormented within and without by the harsh winds, the bolts of lightning, and the great waves rising beyond the sky. As the whole earth flooded, he grew perplexed and fearful.
498.yz_zh: 这里的词语catur-vidham指的是受条件限制灵魂的四种出生：胎生、卵生、胚芽生和汗液生。
498.yz_en: Here the word catur-vidham refers to the four sources of birth for conditioned souls: embryos, eggs, seeds and perspiration.

498.yw_zh: 玛尔康戴亚眼睁睁看着滚滚乌云倾泻瓢泼大雨，使得海水急剧上涨，飓风卷起千层浪呼啸而过，掩盖了地球上的一切岛屿、山脉和大陆。
498.yw_en: Even as Mārkaṇḍeya looked on, the rain pouring down from the clouds filled the ocean more and more until that great sea, its waters violently whipped into terrifying waves by hurricanes, covered up all the earth’s islands, mountains and continents.

498.yw_zh: 大水淹没了地球、外太空、天堂和一切天体。千真万确，整个宇宙所有方向洪水泛滥，全体居民中唯有玛尔康戴亚存活下来。这位了不起的圣人披头散发，独自在水中飘来荡去，好似聋哑盲人。
498.yw_en: The water inundated the earth, outer space, heaven and the celestial region. Indeed, the entire expanse of the universe was flooded in all directions, and out of all its inhabitants only Mārkaṇḍeya remained. His matted hair scattered, the great sage wandered about alone in the water as if dumb and blind.

498.yw_zh: 他跌进无尽的黑暗，在其中漫无目的地漂泊，他饥渴交加，不断遭受madaras怪兽和timingila巨鱼的攻击，还被狂风巨浪抛来掷去。他越来越筋疲力尽，完全失去方向感，分不出天与地。
498.yw_en: Tormented by hunger and thirst, attacked by monstrous makaras and timiṅgila fish and battered by the wind and waves, he moved aimlessly through the infinite darkness into which he had fallen. As he grew increasingly exhausted, he lost all sense of direction and could not tell the sky from the earth.

498.yw_zh: 他有时被巨大的漩涡吞没，有时被巨浪拍打，有时在水生怪兽互相攻击进，受到要被他们生吞活吃的威胁。有时他感到悲伤、困惑、痛苦、快乐、恐惧，有时他身患急症，疼痛难耐，感觉几近于死。
498.yw_en: At times he was engulfed by the great whirlpools, sometimes he was beaten by the mighty waves, and at other times the aquatic monsters threatened to devour him as they attacked one another. Sometimes he felt lamentation, bewilderment, misery, happiness or fear, and at other times he experienced such terrible illness and pain that he felt himself dying.

498.yw_zh: 当玛尔康戴亚在洪水中漂泊时，数百万年过去了，他的心意被主维施努，至尊人格首神的迷幻迷惑了。
498.yw_en: Countless millions of years passed as Mārkaṇḍeya wandered about in that deluge, his mind bewildered by the illusory energy of Lord Viṣṇu, the Supreme Personality of Godhead.

498.yw_en: Once, while wandering in the water, the brāhmaṇa Mārkaṇḍeya discovered a small island, upon which stood a young banyan tree bearing blossoms and fruits.

498.yw_zh: 他看到，在那棵树的东北角一丫树枝的一片树叶上躺着一名男婴。婴孩的光灿吞没四周的黑暗。
498.yw_en: Upon a branch of the northeast portion of that tree he saw an infant boy lying within a leaf. The child’s effulgence was swallowing up the darkness.

498.words_en_fc: like a great emerald; dark blue; beautiful; whose lotus face; like a conchshell; whose throat; broad; whose chest; having a beautiful nose; having beautiful eyebrows; by His breath; trembling; with the hair; splendid; like a conchshell; beautiful; His ears; resembling pomegranate flowers; like coral; of His lips; by the effulgence; slightly; reddened; nectarean; His smile; like the whorl of a lotus; reddish; the corners of His eyes; charming; with a smile; His countenance; by His breath; made to move; by the lines; contorted; deep; with His navel; like a leaf; whose abdomen; attractive; having fingers; by His two hands; picking up; His lotus foot; in His mouth; placing; the best of brāhmaṇas, Mārkaṇḍeya; drinking; seeing; was amazed.
498.yw_zh: 那婴孩的肤色深蓝，色如完美无瑕的翡翠，他的莲花脸熠熠生辉，异常俊美，他的喉咙上呈现出海螺般的纹路。他的胸膛宽广，鼻子精美，双眉优雅，可爱的双耳犹如石榴花，耳朵的褶皱好比海螺的螺旋纹。他的眼角微微泛红，色如莲花，他珊瑚般的嘴唇色泽红润甘美，脸上露着迷人的微笑。他轻柔的呼吸使得他亮丽的头发微微颤动，他深深的肚脐随着他肚腹肌肤的伸缩而卷曲，他的肚腹则好比榕树叶。崇高的布茹阿玛纳惊奇地看到，婴孩用他优雅的手指抱着他的一只莲花足，把脚趾放在嘴里吸吮。
498.yw_en: The infant’s dark-blue complexion was the color of a flawless emerald, His lotus face shone with a wealth of beauty, and His throat bore marks like the lines on a conchshell. He had a broad chest, a finely shaped nose, beautiful eyebrows, and lovely ears that resembled pomegranate flowers and that had inner folds like a conchshell’s spirals. The corners of His eyes were reddish like the whorl of a lotus, and the effulgence of His corallike lips slightly reddened the nectarean, enchanting smile on His face. As He breathed, His splendid hair trembled and His deep navel became distorted by the moving folds of skin on His abdomen, which resembled a banyan leaf. The exalted brāhmaṇa watched with amazement as the infant took hold of one of His lotus feet with His graceful fingers, placed a toe within His mouth and began to suck.
498.yz_zh: 那年幼的孩子就是至尊人格首神。据施瑞拉·维施瓦纳塔·恰夸瓦尔提·塔库尔说，主奎师那心想，“这么多的奉献者都在寻求我莲花足的甘露。所以，让我亲自感受一下那甘露吧。”因此，主就像普通婴儿一样玩耍着吸吮他的脚趾。
498.yz_en: The young child was the Supreme Personality of Godhead. According to Śrīla Viśvanātha Cakravartī Ṭhākura, Lord Kṛṣṇa wondered, “So many devotees are hankering for the nectar of My lotus feet. Therefore let Me personally experience that nectar.” Thus the Lord, playing like an ordinary baby, began to suck on His toes.

498.ldw:
tad-darśanād vīta-pariśramo mudā
 protphulla-hṛt-padma-vilocanāmbujaḥ
prahṛṣṭa-romādbhuta-bhāva-śaṅkitaḥ
 praṣṭuṁ puras taṁ prasasāra bālakam|

498.words_en_fc: by seeing the child; dispelled; his weariness; out of pleasure; expanded wide; the lotus of his heart; and his lotus eyes; standing on end; the hairs on his body; about the identity of this wonderful form; confused; in order to inquire; in front; of Him; he approached; the child.
498.yw_zh: 当玛尔康戴亚注视着孩子，他所有的疲乏烟消云散。千真万确，他喜乐无穷，乃至毛发直竖，心灵的莲花和莲花眼也乐开了花。圣人对这位神奇婴儿的身份感到困惑，便去到他跟前。
498.yw_en: As Mārkaṇḍeya beheld the child, all his weariness vanished. Indeed, so great was his pleasure that the lotus of his heart, along with his lotus eyes, fully blossomed and the hairs on his body stood on end. Confused as to the identity of the wonderful infant, the sage approached Him.
498.yz_zh: 玛尔康戴亚想要询问孩子的身份，所以去到他跟前。
498.yz_en: Mārkaṇḍeya wanted to ask the child about His identity and therefore approached Him.

498.ldw:
tāvac chiśor vai śvasitena bhārgavaḥ
 so ’ntaḥ śarīraṁ maśako yathāviśat
tatrāpy ado nyastam acaṣṭa kṛtsnaśo
 yathā purāmuhyad atīva vismitaḥ|

498.words_en_fc: at that very moment; of the infant; indeed; with the breathing; the descendant of Bhṛgu; he; within the body; a mosquito; just like; entered; therein; indeed; this universe; placed; he saw; entire; as; previously; he became bewildered; extremely; surprised.
498.yw_zh: 就在那一刻，孩子一吸气，把玛尔康戴亚像蚊子似的吸入他的体内。在他的体内，圣人发现整个宇宙跟毁灭之前一样排列有序。看到这一幕，玛尔康戴亚惊愕之余深感困惑。
498.yw_en: Just then the child inhaled, drawing Mārkaṇḍeya within His body like a mosquito. There the sage found the entire universe arrayed as it had been before its dissolution. Seeing this, Mārkaṇḍeya was most astonished and perplexed.

vanāni deśān saritaḥ purākarān

yat kiñcid anyad vyavahāra-kāraṇaṁ

498.words_en_fc: the sky; the heavens and earth; all the stars; the mountains; and oceans; the great islands; along with the continents; the directions; the saintly devotees and the demons; the forests; the various countries; the rivers; the cities; and the mines; the agricultural villages; the cow pastures; of the various spiritual and occupational divisions of society; the engagements; the basic elements of nature; and; all their gross manifestations; he; time; also; of the different millennia and the days of Brahmā; the regulating agent; whatever; other; object intended for use in material life; he saw; the universe; real; as if; manifest.
498.yw_zh: 圣人看到了整个宇宙：太空，天地，星辰，山脉，海洋，各大岛屿和大洲，朝各方向延伸的宽广区域，圣洁与邪恶的生灵，森林，国家，河流，城市，矿区，农业村庄和奶牛牧场，各社会阶层的职业和灵性活动。他还看到创造的基本元素及其全部副产品，以及掌控布茹阿玛的白昼中无数年代进程的时间本身。另外，他还看到用于物质生活的其他一切造物。他目睹的这一切就展示在他面前，仿佛全是真实的。
498.yw_en: The sage saw the entire universe: the sky, heavens and earth, the stars, mountains, oceans, great islands and continents, the expanses in every direction, the saintly and demoniac living beings, the forests, countries, rivers, cities and mines, the agricultural villages and cow pastures, and the occupational and spiritual activities of the various social divisions. He also saw the basic elements of creation along with all their by-products, as well as time itself, which regulates the progression of countless ages within the days of Brahmā. In addition, he saw everything else created for use in material life. All this he saw manifested before him as if it were real.

498.ldw:
himālayaṁ puṣpavahāṁ ca tāṁ nadīṁ
 nijāśramaṁ yatra ṛṣī apaśyata
viśvaṁ vipaśyañ chvasitāc chiśor vai
 bahir nirasto nyapatal layābdhau|

498.words_en_fc: the Himālaya Mountains; Puṣpabhadrā; and; that; river; his own hermitage; where; the two sages, Nara-Nārāyaṇa; he saw; the universe; while observing; by the breath; of the infant; indeed; outside; expelled; he fell; into the ocean of dissolution.
498.yw_zh: 在他面前，他看到喜马拉雅山，普施帕巴卓河以及他自己的修院，此前，他在那里见过圣哲纳茹阿·纳茹阿亚纳。那时，正当玛尔康戴亚注视着整个宇宙，婴儿一呼气把圣人从他的体内喷出来，抛回到毁灭之洋中。
498.yw_en: He saw before him the Himālaya Mountains, the Puṣpabhadrā River, and his own hermitage, where he had had the audience of the sages Nara-Nārāyaṇa. Then, as Mārkaṇḍeya beheld the entire universe, the infant exhaled, expelling the sage from His body and casting him back into the ocean of dissolution.

 pariṣvaktum adhokṣajam|

498.words_en_fc: in that water; of land; on the raised place; growing up; the banyan tree; and; of it; within the slight depression of the leaf; lying; the child; and; for himself; of love; like nectar; with a smile; being looked upon; of the corner of His eyes; by the glance; then; that; infant; looking upon; by his eyes; placed; within his heart; ran forward; greatly agitated; to embrace; the transcendental Supreme Lord.
498.yw_zh: 在浩瀚的海洋中，他再次看到长在小岛上的那棵榕树和躺在叶子上的男婴。孩子莞尔微笑着，笑容里浸透着爱的甘露，他以眼角向他投以瞥视，玛尔康戴亚便透过双眼将他置于心田。圣人激动不已地向前跑，要去拥抱超然的人格首神。
498.yw_en: In that vast sea he again saw the banyan tree growing on the tiny island and the infant boy lying within the leaf. The child glanced at him from the corner of His eyes with a smile imbued with the nectar of love, and Mārkaṇḍeya took Him into his heart through his eyes. Greatly agitated, the sage ran to embrace the transcendental Personality of Godhead.

498.ldw:
tāvat sa bhagavān sākṣād
 yogādhīśo guhā-śayaḥ
antardadha ṛṣeḥ sadyo
 yathehānīśa-nirmitā|
498.ldw_fc: tāvat ; saḥ ; bhagavān ; sākṣāt ; yoga-adhīśaḥ ; guhā-śayaḥ ; antardadhe ; ṛṣeḥ ; sadyaḥ ; yathā ; īhā ; anīśa ; nirmitā
498.words_en_fc: just then; He; the Personality of Godhead; directly; the supreme master of yoga; who is hidden within the heart of all living beings; disappeared; in front of the sage; suddenly; in the same way as; the object of endeavor; by an incompetent person; created.
498.yw_zh: 就在那时，至尊人格首神，一切神秘力量的原始之主，隐藏在众生心中的人，从圣人的视线中消失了，俨如不称职的人，其成就突然荡然无存。
498.yw_en: At that moment the Supreme Personality of Godhead, who is the original master of all mysticism and who is hidden within everyone’s heart, became invisible to the sage, just as the achievements of an incompetent person can suddenly vanish.

498.ldw:
tam anv atha vaṭo brahman
 salilaṁ loka-samplavaḥ
tirodhāyi kṣaṇād asya
 svāśrame pūrva-vat sthitaḥ|
498.ldw_fc: tam ; anu ; atha ; vaṭaḥ ; brahman ; salilam ; loka-samplavaḥ ; tirodhāyi ; kṣaṇāt ; asya ; sva-āśrame ; pūrva-vat ; sthitaḥ
498.words_en_fc: Him; following; then; the banyan tree; O brāhmaṇa, Śaunaka; the water; the annihilation of the universe; they disappeared; immediately; in front of him; in his own hermitage; as previously; he was present.
498.yw_zh: 主消失之后，布茹阿玛纳啊，榕树，大水和宇宙毁灭也都消失了，顷刻间，玛尔康戴亚发现自己已回到修院，跟往常一样。
498.yw_en: After the Lord disappeared, O brāhmaṇa, the banyan tree, the great water and the dissolution of the universe all vanished as well, and in an instant Mārkaṇḍeya found himself back in his own hermitage, just as before.
498.yz_en: Thus end the purports of the humble servants of His Divine Grace A.C. Bhaktivedanta Swami Prabhupāda to the Twelfth Canto, Ninth Chapter, of the Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam, entitled “Mārkaṇḍeya Ṛṣi Sees the Illusory Potency of the Lord.”

499.ldw:
sūta uvāca|sa evam anubhūyedaṁ
 nārāyaṇa-vinirmitam
vaibhavaṁ yoga-māyāyās
 tam eva śaraṇaṁ yayau|
499.ldw_fc: sūtaḥ uvāca ; saḥ ; evam ; anubhūya ; idam ; nārāyaṇa-vinirmitam ; vaibhavam ; yoga-māyāyāḥ ; tam ; eva ; śaraṇam ; yayau
499.words_en_fc: Sūta Gosvāmī said; he, Mārkaṇḍeya; in this way; experiencing; this; manufactured by the Supreme Personality of Godhead, Nārāyaṇa; the opulent exhibition; of His internal mystic energy; to Him; indeed; for shelter; he went.
499.yw_zh: 苏塔•哥斯瓦米说：至尊主纳茹阿亚纳安排了他的迷幻能量的这一宏伟展示。玛尔康戴亚•瑞希对此有切身体验，进而托庇于主。
499.yw_en: Sūta Gosvāmī said: The Supreme Lord Nārāyaṇa had arranged this opulent display of His bewildering potency. Mārkaṇḍeya Ṛṣi, having experienced it, took shelter of the Lord.

499.ldw:
śrī-mārkaṇḍeya uvāca|prapanno ’smy aṅghri-mūlaṁ te
 prapannābhaya-daṁ hare
yan-māyayāpi vibudhā
 muhyanti jñāna-kāśayā|
499.ldw_fc: śrī-mārkaṇḍeyaḥ uvāca ; prapannaḥ ; asmi ; aṅghri-mūlam ; te ; prapanna ; abhaya-dam ; hare ; yat-māyayā ; api ; vibudhāḥ ; muhyanti ; jñāna-kāśayā
499.words_en_fc: Śrī Mārkaṇḍeya said; surrendered; I am; to the soles of the lotus feet; Your; of those who surrender; the giver of fearlessness; O Lord Hari; by whose illusory potency; even; intelligent demigods; become bewildered; which falsely appears as knowledge.
499.yw_zh: 施瑞•玛尔康戴亚说：主哈尔依啊，我求庇于您的莲花足，您的莲花足赐予一切对之臣服的人以无惧无畏。就连伟大的半神人们都被您的迷幻能量困惑，在他们看来，您的迷幻能量披着知识的外衣。
499.yw_en: Śrī Mārkaṇḍeya said: O Lord Hari, I take shelter of the soles of Your lotus feet, which bestow fearlessness upon all who surrender to them. Even the great demigods are bewildered by Your illusory energy, which appears to them in the guise of knowledge.
499.yz_zh: 受条件限制灵魂被物质感官享乐吸引，所以他们精心研究大自然的运作。尽管他们看似在科学知识方面显得很精进，却越来越认同于物质躯体，纠缠于虚假的身份，故而越发深陷在愚昧中。
499.yz_en: Conditioned souls are attracted to material sense gratification, and thus they meticulously study the workings of nature. Although they appear to be advancing in scientific knowledge, they become increasingly entangled in their false identification with the material body and therefore increasingly merge into ignorance.

499.ldw:
sūta uvāca|tam evaṁ nibhṛtātmānaṁ
 vṛṣeṇa divi paryaṭan
rudrāṇyā bhagavān rudro
 dadarśa sva-gaṇair vṛtaḥ|
499.ldw_fc: sūtaḥ uvāca ; tam ; evam ; nibhṛta-ātmānam ; vṛṣeṇa ; divi ; paryaṭan ; rudrāṇyā ; bhagavān ; rudraḥ ; dadarśa ; sva-gaṇaiḥ ; vṛtaḥ
499.words_en_fc: Sūta Gosvāmī said; him, Mārkaṇḍeya Ṛṣi; thus; his mind completely absorbed in trance; on his bull; in the sky; traveling; accompanied by his consort, Rudrāṇī (Umā); the powerful lord; Śiva; saw; by his entourage; surrounded.
499.yw_zh: 苏塔•哥斯瓦米说：主茹卓由他的伴侣卓妮陪同，骑着他的公牛在太空云游，随行者还有他的亲身同游们，他看到玛尔康戴亚正处在神定中。
499.yw_en: Sūta Gosvāmī said: Lord Rudra, traveling in the sky on his bull and accompanied by his consort, Rudrāṇī, as well as his personal associates, observed Mārkaṇḍeya in trance.

499.ldw:
athomā tam ṛṣiṁ vīkṣya
 giriśaṁ samabhāṣata
paśyemaṁ bhagavan vipraṁ
 nibhṛtātmendriyāśayam|
499.ldw_fc: atha ; umā ; tam ; ṛṣim ; vīkṣya ; giriśam ; samabhāṣata ; paśya ; imam ; bhagavan ; vipram ; nibhṛta ; ātma-indriya-āśayam
499.words_en_fc: then; Umā; that; sage; seeing; to Lord Śiva; spoke; just see; this; my lord; learned brāhmaṇa; motionless; his body, senses and mind.
499.yw_zh: 女神乌玛看到圣人之后，对主给瑞沙说道：我的主人，看啊，这位博学的布茹阿玛纳，他的躯体、心意和感官纹丝不动地正处在神定中。
499.yw_en: Goddess Umā, seeing the sage, addressed Lord Giriśa: My lord, just see this learned brāhmaṇa, his body, mind and senses motionless in trance.

499.ldw:
nibhṛtoda-jhaṣa-vrāto
 vātāpāye yathārṇavaḥ
kurv asya tapasaḥ sākṣāt
 saṁsiddhiṁ siddhi-do bhavān|
499.ldw_fc: nibhṛta ; uda ; jhaṣa-vrātaḥ ; vāta ; apāye ; yathā ; arṇavaḥ ; kuru ; asya ; tapasaḥ ; sākṣāt ; saṁsiddhim ; siddhi-daḥ ; bhavān
499.words_en_fc: stationary; water; and schools of fish; of the wind; upon the ceasing; just as; the ocean; please make; his; of the austerities; manifest; perfection; the bestower of perfection; you.
499.yw_zh: 他像风平浪静的海水，纹丝不动的鱼儿一样平静。因此，我的主人，既然您给予苦行者完美，所以请赐予这位圣人应得的完美吧。
499.yw_en: He is as calm as the waters of the ocean when the wind has ceased and the fish remain still. Therefore, my lord, since you bestow perfection on the performers of austerity, please award this sage the perfection that is obviously due him.

499.ldw:
śrī-bhagavān uvāca|naivecchaty āśiṣaḥ kvāpi
 brahmarṣir mokṣam apy uta
bhaktiṁ parāṁ bhagavati
 labdhavān puruṣe ’vyaye|
499.ldw_fc: śrī-bhagavān uvāca ; na ; eva ; icchati ; āśiṣaḥ ; kva api ; brahma-ṛṣiḥ ; mokṣam ; api uta ; bhaktim ; parām ; bhagavati ; labdhavān ; puruṣe ; avyaye
499.words_en_fc: the powerful lord said; not; indeed; desires; benedictions; in any realm; the saintly brāhmaṇa; liberation; even; devotional service; transcendental; for the Supreme Lord; he has achieved; for the Personality of Godhead; who is inexhaustible.
499.yw_zh: 主希瓦答道：千真万确，这位布茹阿玛纳圣人不欲求任何祝福，甚至不欲求解脱，因为他已获得对无穷无尽的人格首神的纯粹奉献服务。
499.yw_en: Lord Śiva replied: Surely this saintly brāhmaṇa does not desire any benediction, not even liberation itself, for he has attained pure devotional service unto the inexhaustible Personality of Godhead.
499.yz_zh: 词语naivecchaty asisah kvapi表明，玛尔康戴亚•瑞希对宇宙间任何星球上的赐福毫无兴趣。他也不想要解脱，因为他已获得至尊主本人。
499.yz_en: The words naivecchaty āśiṣaḥ kvāpi indicate that Mārkaṇḍeya Ṛṣi was uninterested in any reward available on any planet within the universe. Nor did he want liberation, for he had achieved the Supreme Lord Himself.

499.ldw:
athāpi saṁvadiṣyāmo
 bhavāny etena sādhunā
ayaṁ hi paramo lābho
 nṛṇāṁ sādhu-samāgamaḥ|
499.ldw_fc: atha api ; saṁvadiṣyāmaḥ ; bhavāni ; etena ; sādhunā ; ayam ; hi ; paramaḥ ; lābhaḥ ; nṛṇām ; sādhu-samāgamaḥ
499.words_en_fc: nevertheless; we shall converse; my dear Bhavānī; with this; pure devotee; this; indeed; the best; gain; for men; the association of saintly devotees.
499.yw_zh: 我亲爱的巴瓦妮，尽管如此，我们还是与这位圣人谈论一番吧。毕竟，与奉献者圣人的联谊是人类的最高收获。
499.yw_en: Still, my dear Bhavānī, let us talk with this saintly personality. After all, association with saintly devotees is man’s highest achievement.

499.ldw:
sūta uvāca|ity uktvā tam upeyāya
 bhagavān sa satāṁ gatiḥ
īśānaḥ sarva-vidyānām
 īśvaraḥ sarva-dehinām|
499.ldw_fc: sūtaḥ uvāca ; iti ; uktvā ; tam ; upeyāya ; bhagavān ; saḥ ; satām ; gatiḥ ; īśānaḥ ; sarva-vidyānām ; īśvaraḥ ; sarva-dehinām
499.words_en_fc: Sūta Gosvāmī said; thus; having said; to the sage; going; the exalted demigod; he; of the pure souls; the shelter; the master; of all branches of knowledge; the controller; of all embodied living beings.
499.yw_zh: 苏塔•哥斯瓦米说：如此说罢，主商卡尔——纯粹灵魂的庇护所，一切灵性科学之主兼所有体困灵魂的控制者——去到圣人跟前。
499.yw_en: Sūta Gosvāmī said: Having spoken thus, Lord Śaṅkara — the shelter of pure souls, master of all spiritual sciences and controller of all embodied living beings — approached the sage.

499.ldw:
tayor āgamanaṁ sākṣād
 īśayor jagad-ātmanoḥ
na veda ruddha-dhī-vṛttir
 ātmānaṁ viśvam eva ca|
499.ldw_fc: tayoḥ ; āgamanam ; sākṣāt ; īśayoḥ ; jagat-ātmanoḥ ; na veda ; ruddha ; dhī-vṛttiḥ ; ātmānam ; viśvam ; eva ; ca
499.words_en_fc: of the two of them; the arrival; in person; of the powerful personalities; the controllers of the universe; he did not notice; checked; the functioning of his mind; himself; the external universe; indeed; also.
499.yw_zh: 由于玛尔康戴亚的物质心意停止了活动，所以圣人没有留意到主希瓦及其妻子，宇宙的控制者们，已亲自前来与他相见。玛尔康戴亚完全沉浸在冥想中，乃至没有意识到自己和外部世界
499.yw_en: Because Mārkaṇḍeya’s material mind had stopped functioning, the sage failed to notice that Lord Śiva and his wife, the controllers of the universe, had personally come to see him. Mārkaṇḍeya was so absorbed in meditation that he was unaware of either himself or the external world.

499.ldw:
bhagavāṁs tad abhijñāya
 giriśo yoga-māyayā
āviśat tad-guhākāśaṁ
 vāyuś chidram iveśvaraḥ|
499.ldw_fc: bhagavān ; tat ; abhijñāya ; giriśaḥ ; yoga-māyayā ; āviśat ; tat ; guhā-ākāśam ; vāyuḥ ; chidram ; iva ; īśvaraḥ
499.words_en_fc: the great personality; that; understanding; Lord Giriśa; by his mystic power; entered; of Mārkaṇḍeya; the hidden sky of the heart; the air; a hole; as if; the lord.
499.yw_zh: 孔武有力的主希瓦对此了然于心，于是运用他的神秘力量进入玛尔康戴亚的心灵天空，犹如强风穿过旷野。
499.yw_en: Understanding the situation very well, the powerful Lord Śiva employed his mystic power to enter within the sky of Mārkaṇḍeya’s heart, just as the wind passes through an opening.

499.ldw:
ātmany api śivaṁ prāptaṁ
 taḍit-piṅga-jaṭā-dharam
try-akṣaṁ daśa-bhujaṁ prāṁśum
 udyantam iva bhāskaram|vyāghra-carmāmbaraṁ śūla-
 dhanur-iṣv-asi-carmabhiḥ
akṣa-mālā-ḍamaruka-
 kapālaṁ paraśuṁ saha|bibhrāṇaṁ sahasā bhātaṁ
 vicakṣya hṛdi vismitaḥ
kim idaṁ kuta eveti
 samādher virato muniḥ|
499.ldw_fc: ātmani ; api ; śivam ; prāptam ; taḍit ; piṅga ; jaṭā ; dharam ; tri-akṣam ; daśa-bhujam ; prāṁśum ; udyantam ; iva ; bhāskaram ; vyāghra ; carma ; ambaram ; śūla ; dhanuḥ ; iṣu ; asi ; carmabhiḥ ; akṣa-mālā ; ḍamaruka ; kapālam ; paraśum ; saha ; bibhrāṇam ; sahasā ; bhātam ; vicakṣya ; hṛdi ; vismitaḥ ; kim ; idam ; kutaḥ ; eva ; iti ; samādheḥ ; virataḥ ; muniḥ
499.words_en_fc: within himself; also; Lord Śiva; arrived; like lightning; yellowish; locks of hair; carrying; with three eyes; and ten arms; very tall; rising; as; the sun; of a tiger; the fur; as his garment; with his trident; bow; arrows; sword; and shield; his prayer beads; small drum; and skull; ax; together with; exhibiting; suddenly; manifest; seeing; in his heart; surprised; what; this; from where; indeed; thus; from his trance; desisted; the sage.
499.yw_zh: 施瑞•玛尔康戴亚看到主希瓦突然显现在他的心中。主希瓦的金发好似闪电，他拥有三只眼，十只臂膀和像冉冉升起的太阳般耀眼的伟岸身躯。他身着虎皮，随身带着三叉戟、弓、箭 、刀剑、盾以及念珠、damaru鼓、骷髅和斧子。圣人惊愕不已，继而从神定中出来，心想，“此人是谁？他从哪里来？”
499.yw_en: Śrī Mārkaṇḍeya saw Lord Śiva suddenly appear within his heart. Lord Śiva’s golden hair resembled lightning, and he had three eyes, ten arms and a tall body that shone like the rising sun. He wore a tiger skin, and he carried a trident, a bow, arrows, a sword and a shield, along with prayer beads, a ḍamaru drum, a skull and an ax. Astonished, the sage came out of his trance and thought, “Who is this, and where has he come from?”

499.ldw:
netre unmīlya dadṛśe
 sa-gaṇaṁ somayāgatam
rudraṁ tri-lokaika-guruṁ
 nanāma śirasā muniḥ|
499.ldw_fc: netre ; unmīlya ; dadṛśe ; sa-gaṇam ; sa-umayā ; āgatam ; rudram ; tri-loka ; eka-gurum ; nanāma ; śirasā ; muniḥ
499.words_en_fc: his eyes; opening; he saw; with his associates; and with Umā; having arrived; Lord Rudra; of the three worlds; the one spiritual master; he offered his obeisances; with his head; the sage.
499.yw_zh: 圣人睁开眼，看到主茹卓，三个世界的灵性导师，还有乌玛和茹卓的追随者们。玛尔康戴亚叩首致以虔敬的顶拜。
499.yw_en: Opening his eyes, the sage saw Lord Rudra, the spiritual master of the three worlds, together with Umā and Rudra’s followers. Mārkaṇḍeya then offered his respectful obeisances by bowing his head.
499.yz_zh: 当玛尔康戴亚•瑞希看到主希瓦和乌玛显现在他心中，便立即意识到他们和自己的存在。也就是说，他在神定中，完全只是专注于知觉至尊主，忘了自己是有知觉的感知者。
499.yz_en: When Mārkaṇḍeya Ṛṣi saw Lord Śiva and Umā within his heart, he immediately became aware of them and thus also of his own individual self. During his trance, on the other hand, he had simply been absorbed in awareness of the Supreme Lord and had thus forgotten himself as the conscious perceiver.

499.ldw:
tasmai saparyāṁ vyadadhāt
 sa-gaṇāya sahomayā
svāgatāsana-pādyārghya-
 gandha-srag-dhūpa-dīpakaiḥ|
499.ldw_fc: tasmai ; saparyām ; vyadadhāt ; sa-gaṇāya ; saha umayā ; su-āgata ; āsana ; pādya ; arghya ; gandha ; srak ; dhūpa ; dīpakaiḥ
499.words_en_fc: to him; worship; he offered; together with his associates; together with Umā; by words of greeting; offering of sitting places; water for bathing the feet; fragrant drinking water; perfumed oil; garlands; incense; and lamps.
499.yw_zh: 玛尔康戴亚向主希瓦和乌玛以及希瓦的同游们致以欢迎辞，献上座位，濯足水，芳香的饮用水，香精油，鲜花花环和arati灯。
499.yw_en: Mārkaṇḍeya worshiped Lord Śiva, along with Umā and Śiva’s associates, by offering them words of welcome, sitting places, water for washing their feet, scented drinking water, fragrant oils, flower garlands and ārati lamps.

499.ldw:
āha tv ātmānubhāvena
 pūrṇa-kāmasya te vibho
karavāma kim īśāna
 yenedaṁ nirvṛtaṁ jagat|
499.ldw_fc: āha ; tu ; ātma-anubhāvena ; pūrṇa-kāmasya ; te ; vibho ; karavāma ; kim ; īśāna ; yena ; idam ; nirvṛtam ; jagat
499.words_en_fc: Mārkaṇḍeya said; indeed; by your own experience of ecstasy; who is satisfied in all respects; for you; O mighty one; I can do; what; O lord; by whom; this; is made peaceful; the entire world.
499.yw_zh: 玛尔康戴亚说：孔武有力的主人啊，您完全满足于您自身的狂喜，我如何能服务于您？千真万确，籍着您的恩慈，您使整个世界感到满足。
499.yw_en: Mārkaṇḍeya said: O mighty lord, what can I possibly do for you, who are fully satisfied by your own ecstasy? Indeed, by your mercy you satisfy this entire world.

499.ldw:
namaḥ śivāya śāntāya
 sattvāya pramṛḍāya ca
rajo-juṣe ’tha ghorāya
 namas tubhyaṁ tamo-juṣe|
499.ldw_fc: namaḥ ; śivāya ; śāntāya ; sattvāya ; pramṛḍāya ; ca ; rajaḥ-juṣe ; atha ; ghorāya ; namaḥ ; tubhyam ; tamaḥ-juṣe
499.words_en_fc: obeisances; to the all-auspicious; peaceful; the personification of material goodness; the giver of pleasure; and; to him who is in contact with the mode of passion; also; terrible; obeisances; to you; who associates with the mode of ignorance.
499.yw_zh: 我一次又一次地向您致以顶拜，全面吉祥的超然之人啊。作为善良之主，您赐予快乐，您接触激情属性，故而显得最令人恐惧，您还跟愚昧属性接触。
499.yw_en: Again and again I offer my obeisances unto you, O all-auspicious transcendental personality. As the lord of goodness you give pleasure, in contact with the mode of passion you appear most fearful, and you also associate with the mode of ignorance.

499.ldw:
sūta uvāca|evaṁ stutaḥ sa bhagavān
 ādi-devaḥ satāṁ gatiḥ
parituṣṭaḥ prasannātmā
 prahasaṁs tam abhāṣata|
499.ldw_fc: sūtaḥ uvāca ; evam ; stutaḥ ; saḥ ; bhagavān ; ādi-devaḥ ; satām ; gatiḥ ; parituṣṭaḥ ; prasanna-ātmā ; prahasan ; tam ; abhāṣata
499.words_en_fc: Sūta Gosvāmī said; in these words; praised; he; the powerful Lord Śiva; the foremost of demigods; of the saintly devotees; the shelter; perfectly satisfied; happy in his mind; smiling; to Mārkaṇḍeya; spoke.
499.yw_zh: 苏塔•哥斯瓦米说：主希瓦，最首要的半神人兼奉献者圣人的庇护所，为玛尔康戴亚的溢美之词所取悦。他喜形于色，对圣人说了如下一番话。
499.yw_en: Sūta Gosvāmī said: Lord Śiva, the foremost demigod and the shelter of the saintly devotees, was satisfied by Mārkaṇḍeya’s praise. Pleased, he smiled and addressed the sage.

499.ldw:
śrī-bhagavān uvāca|varaṁ vṛṇīṣva naḥ kāmaṁ
 vara-deśā vayaṁ trayaḥ
amoghaṁ darśanaṁ yeṣāṁ
 martyo yad vindate ’mṛtam|
499.ldw_fc: śrī-bhagavān uvāca ; varam ; vṛṇīṣva ; naḥ ; kāmam ; vara-da ; īśāḥ ; vayam ; trayaḥ ; amogham ; darśanam ; yeṣām ; martyaḥ ; yat ; vindate ; amṛtam
499.words_en_fc: Lord Śiva said; a benediction; please choose; from us; as desired; of all givers of benedictions; the controlling lords; we; three (Brahmā, Viṣṇu and Maheśvara); never in vain; the seeing; of whom; a mortal being; by which; achieves; immortality.
499.yw_zh: 主希瓦说：请向我要个祝福吧，在所有赐福者当中，我们三位——布茹阿玛，维施努和我——最为优秀。见到我们决不会一无所获，因为只要看到我们，难免一死的人就会获得不朽。
499.yw_en: Lord Śiva said: Please ask me for some benediction, since among all givers of benedictions, we three — Brahmā, Viṣṇu and I — are the best. Seeing us never goes in vain, because simply by seeing us a mortal achieves immortality.

499.ldw:
brāhmaṇāḥ sādhavaḥ śāntā
 niḥsaṅgā bhūta-vatsalāḥ
ekānta-bhaktā asmāsu
 nirvairāḥ sama-darśinaḥ|sa-lokā loka-pālās tān
 vandanty arcanty upāsate
ahaṁ ca bhagavān brahmā
 svayaṁ ca harir īśvaraḥ|
499.ldw_fc: brāhmaṇāḥ ; sādhavaḥ ; śāntāḥ ; niḥsaṅgāḥ ; bhūta-vatsalāḥ ; eka-anta-bhaktāḥ ; asmāsu ; nirvairāḥ ; sama-darśinaḥ ; sa-lokāḥ ; loka-pālāḥ ; tān ; vandanti ; arcanti ; upāsate ; aham ; ca ; bhagavān ; brahmā ; svayam ; ca ; hariḥ ; īśvaraḥ
499.words_en_fc: brāhmaṇas; saintly in behavior; peaceful and free of envy and other bad qualities; free of material association; compassionate to all living beings; unalloyed devotees; of ourselves (Brahmā, Lord Śrī Hari and Śiva); never hateful; seeing equally; with the inhabitants of all the worlds; the rulers of the various planets; those brāhmaṇas; glorify; worship; assist; I; also; the great lord; Brahmā; Himself; also; Lord Hari; the Supreme Personality of Godhead.
499.yw_zh: 各个星球的居民和半神人控制者们，以及主布茹阿玛，至尊主哈尔依和我，都荣耀、崇拜和协助圣洁的布茹阿玛纳们，他们怡然平和，没有物质依附，怜悯众生，全然奉献于我们，毫不憎恨，一视同仁。
499.yw_en: The inhabitants and ruling demigods of all planets, along with Lord Brahmā, the Supreme Lord Hari and I, glorify, worship and assist those brāhmaṇas who are saintly, always peaceful, free of material attachment, compassionate to all living beings, purely devoted to us, devoid of hatred and endowed with equal vision.

499.ldw:
na te mayy acyute ’je ca
 bhidām aṇv api cakṣate
nātmanaś ca janasyāpi
 tad yuṣmān vayam īmahi|
499.ldw_fc: na ; te ; mayi ; acyute ; aje ; ca ; bhidām ; aṇu ; api ; cakṣate ; na ; ātmanaḥ ; ca ; janasya ; api ; tat ; yuṣmān ; vayam ; īmahi
499.words_en_fc: do not; they; in me; in Lord Viṣṇu; in Lord Brahmā; and; difference; slight; even; see; not; of themselves; and; of other people; also; therefore; yourselves; we; worship.
499.yw_zh: 这些奉献者不对主维施努，主布茹阿玛和我厚此薄彼，也不区别对待他们自己和其他生物。由于你是这类圣洁的奉献者，所以我们崇拜你。
499.yw_en: These devotees do not differentiate between Lord Viṣṇu, Lord Brahmā and me, nor do they differentiate between themselves and other living beings. Therefore, because you are this kind of saintly devotee, we worship you.
499.yz_zh: 主布茹阿玛和主希瓦分别是人格首神维施努的创造和毁灭能力的展示。因此，物质世界的这三位主宰神祗是团结一致的。人不该根据物质属性而认为物质二元性存在于至尊主的主宰能力中，尽管那能力以布茹阿玛、维施努和希瓦三者展示出来。
499.yz_en: Lord Brahmā and Lord Śiva are, respectively, manifestations of the creating and annihilating potencies of the Personality of Godhead, Viṣṇu. Thus unity exists among these three ruling deities of the material world. One should not, on the basis of the modes of nature, find material duality within the ruling potency of the Supreme Lord, although that potency is manifested in three divisions as Brahmā, Viṣṇu and Śiva.

499.ldw:
na hy am-mayāni tīrthāni
 na devāś cetanojjhitāḥ
te punanty uru-kālena
 yūyaṁ darśana-mātrataḥ|
499.ldw_fc: na ; hi ; ap-mayāni ; tīrthāni ; na ; devāḥ ; cetana-ujjhitāḥ ; te ; punanti ; uru-kālena ; yūyam ; darśana-mātrataḥ
499.words_en_fc: not; indeed; consisting of sacred water; holy places; not; deity forms of demigods; devoid of life; they; purify; after a long time; yourselves; simply by being seen.
499.yw_zh: 只是水体并不构成圣地，缺乏生气的半神人也并非真正值得崇拜的神祇。因为单从外表看无法领会众多圣河和半神人的更高本质，在许久之后，这些才使人净化。但是，像你这样的奉献者，只是被看到，就立即受到净化。
499.yw_en: Mere bodies of water do not constitute holy places, nor are lifeless statues of the demigods actual worshipable deities. Because external vision fails to appreciate the higher essence of the holy rivers and the demigods, these purify only after a considerable time. But devotees like you purify immediately, just by being seen.

499.ldw:
brāhmaṇebhyo namasyāmo
 ye ’smad-rūpaṁ trayī-mayam
bibhraty ātma-samādhāna-
 tapaḥ-svādhyāya-saṁyamaiḥ|
499.ldw_fc: brāhmaṇebhyaḥ ; namasyāmaḥ ; ye ; asmat-rūpam ; trayī-mayam ; bibhrati ; ātma-samādhāna ; tapaḥ ; svādhyāya ; saṁyamaiḥ
499.words_en_fc: to the brāhmaṇas; we offer our respects; who; the form of ourselves (Śiva, Brahmā and Viṣṇu); represented by the three Vedas; carry; by meditative trance focused on the Self; by austerities; by study; and by following regulative principles.
499.yw_zh: 通过冥想至尊灵魂，从事苦行，研习韦达经，遵守规范原则，布茹阿玛纳们把跟主维施努、主布茹阿玛和我毫无分别的三韦达经铭记于心。因此，我向布茹阿玛纳们顶礼膜拜。
499.yw_en: By meditating upon the Supreme Soul, performing austerities, engaging in Vedic study and following regulative principles, the brāhmaṇas sustain within themselves the three Vedas, which are nondifferent from Lord Viṣṇu, Lord Brahmā and me. Therefore I offer my obeisances unto the brāhmaṇas.
499.yz_zh: 至尊主的纯粹奉献者被认为是最崇高的布茹阿玛纳，因为一切灵性努力的巅峰便是对神的奉爱服务。
499.yz_en: A pure devotee of the Supreme Lord is considered the most elevated of brāhmaṇas, since all spiritual endeavor culminates in the loving service of God.

499.ldw:
śravaṇād darśanād vāpi
 mahā-pātakino ’pi vaḥ
śudhyerann antya-jāś cāpi
 kim u sambhāṣaṇādibhiḥ|
499.ldw_fc: śravaṇāt ; darśanāt ; vā ; api ; mahā-pātakinaḥ ; api ; vaḥ ; śudhyeran ; antya-jāḥ ; ca ; api ; kim u ; sambhāṣaṇa-ādibhiḥ
499.words_en_fc: by hearing about; by seeing; or; also; those who commit the worst kinds of sins; even; you; they become purified; outcastes; and; even; what to speak of; by directly speaking with, and so on.
499.yw_zh: 甚至罪大恶极者和社会上被逐出种姓者，仅凭聆听或见到像你这样的人物，就会被净化。那么，可想而知，如果他们直接与你交谈，该会变得多么纯净啊。
499.yw_en: Even the worst sinners and social outcastes are purified just by hearing about or seeing personalities like you. Imagine, then, how purified they become by directly speaking with you.

499.ldw:
sūta uvāca|iti candra-lalāmasya
 dharma-gahyopabṛṁhitam
vaco ’mṛtāyanam ṛṣir
 nātṛpyat karṇayoḥ piban|
499.ldw_fc: sūtaḥ uvāca ; iti ; candra-lalāmasya ; dharma-guhya ; upabṛṁhitam ; vacaḥ ; amṛta-ayanam ; ṛṣiḥ ; na atṛpyat ; karṇayoḥ ; piban
499.words_en_fc: Sūta Gosvāmī said; thus; of Lord Śiva, who is decorated with the moon; with the secret essence of religion; filled; the words; the reservoir of nectar; the sage; did not feel satiated; with his ears; drinking.
499.yw_zh: 苏塔•哥斯瓦米说：玛尔康戴亚•瑞希以双耳喝饮主希瓦充盈宗教机密实质的甘露之语，感到永无餍足。
499.yw_en: Sūta Gosvāmī said: Drinking with his ears Lord Śiva’s nectarean words, full of the confidential essence of religion, Mārkaṇḍeya Ṛṣi could not be satiated.
499.yz_zh: 玛尔康戴亚•瑞希不热心于听主希瓦赞扬自己，而且他欣赏主希瓦对宗教原则的深刻觉悟，故而渴望聆听更多。
499.yz_en: Mārkaṇḍeya Ṛṣi was not eager to hear himself praised by Lord Śiva, but he appreciated Lord Śiva’s deep realization of religious principles and therefore desired to hear more.

499.ldw:
sa ciraṁ māyayā viṣṇor
 bhrāmitaḥ karśito bhṛśam
śiva-vāg-amṛta-dhvasta-
 kleśa-puñjas tam abravīt|
499.ldw_fc: saḥ ; ciram ; māyayā ; viṣṇoḥ ; bhrāmitaḥ ; karśitaḥ ; bhṛśam ; śiva ; vāk-amṛta ; dhvasta ; kleśa-puñjaḥ ; tam ; abravīt
499.words_en_fc: he; for a long time; by the illusory energy; of the Supreme Personality of Godhead, Viṣṇu; made to wander; exhausted; extremely; of Lord Śiva; by the words of nectar; destroyed; his heaps of suffering; to him; spoke.
499.yw_zh: 此前，玛尔康戴亚在主维施努的迷幻能量的迫使下，长久地在毁灭之水中漂泊，已经筋疲力尽。不过，主希瓦的甘露之言消除了他堆积如山的痛苦。于是，他对主希瓦说了如下一番话。
499.yw_en: Mārkaṇḍeya, having been forced by Lord Viṣṇu’s illusory energy to wander about for a long time in the water of dissolution, had become extremely exhausted. But Lord Śiva’s words of nectar vanquished his accumulated suffering. Thus he addressed Lord Śiva.
499.yz_zh: 玛尔康戴亚•瑞希渴望目睹主维施努的迷幻能量，故而饱受疾苦。但是现在，主维施努通过希瓦再次显现在圣人面前，传授充盈喜乐的灵性教导，解除了他的一切痛苦。
499.yz_en: Mārkaṇḍeya Ṛṣi had desired to see Lord Viṣṇu’s illusory energy and had suffered extensive miseries. But now, in the person of Śiva, Lord Viṣṇu again appeared before the sage and relieved all his suffering by imparting blissful spiritual instructions.

499.ldw:
śrī-mārkaṇḍeya uvāca|aho īśvara-līleyaṁ
 durvibhāvyā śarīriṇām
yan namantīśitavyāni
 stuvanti jagad-īśvarāḥ|
499.ldw_fc: śrī-mārkaṇḍeyaḥ uvāca ; aho ; īśvara ; līlā ; iyam ; durvibhāvyā ; śarīriṇām ; yat ; namanti ; īśitavyāni ; stuvanti ; jagat-īśvarāḥ
499.words_en_fc: Śrī Mārkaṇḍeya said; ah; of the great lords; the pastime; this; inconceivable; for embodied souls; since; they offer obeisances; to those who are controlled by them; they praise; the rulers of the universe.
499.yw_zh: 施瑞•玛尔康戴亚说：体困的灵魂确实很难明白宇宙控制者们的逍遥时光，因为这些神明们顶拜并赞美他们所统治的生物。
499.yw_en: Śrī Mārkaṇḍeya said: It is indeed most difficult for embodied souls to understand the pastimes of the universal controllers, for such lords bow down to and offer praise to the very living beings they rule.
499.yz_zh: 在物质世界，受条件限制的灵魂力图互相主宰对方。因此，他们不能明白宇宙的真正神明们的逍遥时光。这些真正的神明们内心极其慷慨大度，所以有时顶拜他们最具资格最圣洁的臣民。
499.yz_en: In the material world, conditioned souls strive to lord it over one another. Therefore they cannot understand the pastimes of the actual lords of the universe. Such bona fide lords have a wonderfully magnanimous mentality and thus sometimes bow down to the most qualified and saintly among their own subjects.

499.ldw:
dharmaṁ grāhayituṁ prāyaḥ
 pravaktāraś ca dehinām
ācaranty anumodante
 kriyamāṇaṁ stuvanti ca|
499.ldw_fc: dharmam ; grāhayitum ; prāyaḥ ; pravaktāraḥ ; ca ; dehinām ; ācaranti ; anumodante ; kriyamāṇam ; stuvanti ; ca
499.words_en_fc: religion; to cause the acceptance of; for the most part; the authorized speakers; and; for ordinary embodied souls; they act; they encourage; one who is executing; they praise; also.
499.yw_zh: 一般来说，为了诱导体困的灵魂接受宗教原则，宗教权威导师们既表现出完美的行为举止，也鼓励和称颂其他人的端正行为。
499.yw_en: Generally it is to induce embodied souls to accept religious principles that the authorized teachers of religion exhibit ideal behavior while encouraging and praising the proper behavior of others.

499.ldw:
naitāvatā bhagavataḥ
 sva-māyā-maya-vṛttibhiḥ
na duṣyetānubhāvas tair
 māyinaḥ kuhakaṁ yathā|
499.ldw_fc: na ; etāvatā ; bhagavataḥ ; sva-māyā ; maya ; vṛttibhiḥ ; na duṣyeta ; anubhāvaḥ ; taiḥ ; māyinaḥ ; kuhakam ; yathā
499.words_en_fc: not; by such (a show of humility); of the Personality of Godhead; of His own illusory energy; consisting of; by the activities; is not spoiled; the power; by them; of a magician; the tricks; just as.
499.yw_zh: 这种显而易见的谦卑完全是仁慈的体现。至尊主和他亲身同游们的这种受主的迷惑能力影响的行为，决不使他的力量受损，不像魔术师一旦透露把戏的诀窍，其力量就被削弱。
499.yw_en: This apparent humility is simply a show of mercy. Such behavior of the Supreme Lord and His personal associates, which the Lord effects by His own bewildering potency, does not spoil His power any more than a magician’s powers are diminished by his exhibition of tricks.

499.ldw:
sṛṣṭvedaṁ manasā viśvam
 ātmanānupraviśya yaḥ
guṇaiḥ kurvadbhir ābhāti
 karteva svapna-dṛg yathā|tasmai namo bhagavate
 tri-guṇāya guṇātmane
kevalāyādvitīyāya
 gurave brahma-mūrtaye|
499.ldw_fc: sṛṣṭvā ; idam ; manasā ; viśvam ; ātmanā ; anupraviśya ; yaḥ ; guṇaiḥ ; kurvadbhiḥ ; ābhāti ; kartā iva ; svapna-dṛk ; yathā ; tasmai ; namaḥ ; bhagavate ; tri-guṇāya ; guṇa-ātmane ; kevalāya ; advitīyāya ; gurave ; brahma-mūrtaye
499.words_en_fc: creating; this; by His mind, simply by His desire; the universe; as the Supersoul; subsequently entering; who; by the modes of nature; which are acting; appears; as if the doer; a person who is seeing a dream; as; unto Him; obeisances; unto the Supreme Personality of Godhead; who possesses the three modes of nature; who is the ultimate controller of the modes of nature; to the pure; who has no equal; the supreme spiritual master; the personal form of the Absolute Truth.
499.yw_zh: 我顶拜至尊人格首神，他仅凭他的意愿就创造了整个宇宙，随后作为超灵进入其中。通过使自然属性动作，他看似好像是这世界的直接创造者，好比睡梦者似乎在梦中活动。他是自三属性的拥有者兼控制者，然而他永远超然稳处，至纯至粹，独一无二。他是一切的至尊灵性导师，绝对真理的原始人格形象。
499.yw_en: I offer my obeisances to that Supreme Personality of Godhead, who has created this entire universe simply by His desire and then entered into it as the Supersoul. By making the modes of nature act, He seems to be the direct creator of this world, just as a dreamer seems to be acting within his dream. He is the owner and ultimate controller of the three modes of nature, yet He remains alone and pure, without any equal. He is the supreme spiritual master of all, the original personal form of the Absolute Truth.
499.yz_zh: 至尊人格首神释放他的各种物质能量，这些物质能量交互作用致使创造发生。主作为至尊超然的生物体，永远超然稳处。然而，由于整个创造按照他的设计和意愿展现，所以从万事万物中可觉知到他的创造之手。因此，人们猜想神是这世界的直接建造者，尽管他永远超超然然，通过他的各种能量的操作进行创造。
499.yz_en: The Supreme Lord releases His material potencies, and by their interaction creation takes place. The Lord remains aloof, as the supreme transcendental entity. Still, because the entire creation unfolds according to His design and will, His controlling hand is perceived within all things. People thus imagine that God is the direct builder of this world, although He remains aloof, creating through the manipulation of His multifarious potencies.

499.ldw:
kaṁ vṛṇe nu paraṁ bhūman
 varaṁ tvad vara-darśanāt
yad-darśanāt pūrṇa-kāmaḥ
 satya-kāmaḥ pumān bhavet|
499.ldw_fc: kam ; vṛṇe ; nu ; param ; bhūman ; varam ; tvat ; vara-darśanāt ; yat ; darśanāt ; pūrṇa-kāmaḥ ; satya-kāmaḥ ; pumān ; bhavet
499.words_en_fc: what; shall I choose; indeed; other; O all-pervading lord; benediction; from you; the sight of whom is itself the highest benediction; of whom; from the seeing; full in all desires; able to achieve anything desired; a person; becomes.
499.yw_zh: 无所不在的主人啊，见到您我便得到了祝福，我还能请求什么别的祝福呢？只是通过看到您，一个人的所有心愿便得以实现，还能获得想欲的一切。
499.yw_en: O all-pervading lord, since I have received the benediction of seeing you, what other benediction can I ask for? Simply by seeing you, a person fulfills all his desires and can achieve anything imaginable.

499.ldw:
varam ekaṁ vṛṇe ’thāpi
 pūrṇāt kāmābhivarṣaṇāt
bhagavaty acyutāṁ bhaktiṁ
 tat-pareṣu tathā tvayi|
499.ldw_fc: varam ; ekam ; vṛṇe ; atha api ; pūrṇāt ; kāma-abhivarṣaṇāt ; bhagavati ; acyutām ; bhaktim ; tat-pareṣu ; tathā ; tvayi
499.words_en_fc: benediction; one; I request; nevertheless; from him who is completely full; who showers down the fulfillment of desires; for the Supreme Personality of Godhead; infallible; devotional service; for those who are dedicated to Him; and also; for yourself.
499.yw_zh: 但是，我恳请您，既完整又完美且能洒下实现一切愿望之甘露的人，给我一个祝福。我请求得到对至尊人格首神，对奉献于他的奉献者，尤其对您永不息止的奉爱。
499.yw_en: But I do request one benediction from you, who are full of all perfection and able to shower down the fulfillment of all desires. I ask to have unfailing devotion for the Supreme Personality of Godhead and for His dedicated devotees, especially you.
499.yz_zh:
词语tat-paresu tatha tvayi清楚说明，主希瓦是至尊主的一位奉献者，而非至尊主本人。因为神的代表受到跟神本人一样的礼待，所以玛尔康戴亚•瑞希在前几诗节称主希瓦为“主”，不过，现在这里清楚揭示，正如韦达文献通篇讲述，主希瓦是神的一位永恒仆人，而非神本人。

根据操纵知觉的精微法则，欲望展现在头脑和心里。使人从事对主的奉爱服务的纯粹愿望，将人带至最崇高的知觉层面，这种对生命的了解唯有藉着主的奉献者方能获得。
499.yz_en:
The words tat-pareṣu tathā tvayi clearly indicate that Lord Śiva is a devotee of the Supreme Lord, not the Supreme Lord Himself. Because the representative of God is offered the same protocol as God Himself, Mārkaṇḍeya Ṛṣi addressed Lord Śiva as “lord” in previous verses. But now it is clearly revealed that, as stated throughout Vedic literature, Lord Śiva is an eternal servant of God and not God Himself.

Desire manifests itself within the mind and heart according to the subtle laws governing consciousness. Pure desire to engage in the loving service of the Lord brings one to the most exalted platform of consciousness, and such a perfect understanding of life is available only by the special mercy of the Lord’s devotees.

499.ldw:
sūta uvāca|ity arcito ’bhiṣṭutaś ca
 muninā sūktayā girā
tam āha bhagavāñ charvaḥ
 śarvayā cābhinanditaḥ|

499.words_en_fc: Sūta Gosvāmī said; in these words; worshiped; glorified; and; by the sage; well-spoken; with words; to him; spoke; Lord Śiva; by his consort, Śarvā; and; encouraged.
499.yw_zh: 苏塔•哥斯瓦米说：圣人玛尔康戴亚如此以儒雅动人的话语崇拜荣耀主沙尔瓦（希瓦）之后，主希瓦在他伴侣的激励下，如下作答。
499.yw_en: Sūta Gosvāmī said: Thus worshiped and glorified by the eloquent statements of the sage Mārkaṇḍeya, Lord Śarva [Śiva], encouraged by his consort, replied to him as follows.

499.ldw:
kāmo maharṣe sarvo ’yaṁ
 bhaktimāṁs tvam adhokṣaje
ā-kalpāntād yaśaḥ puṇyam
 ajarāmaratā tathā|
499.ldw_fc: kāmaḥ ; mahā-ṛṣe ; sarvaḥ ; ayam ; bhakti-mān ; tvam ; adhokṣaje ; ā-kalpa-antāt ; yaśaḥ ; puṇyam ; ajara-amaratā ; tathā
499.words_en_fc: desire; O great sage; all; this; full of devotion; you; for the transcendental Personality of Godhead; up until the end of the day of Brahmā; fame; pious; freedom from old age and death; also.
499.yw_zh: 了不起的圣人啊，由于你奉献于主阿窦珂沙佳，你的一切心愿将得偿。直至这创造循环结束，你会一直享有虔诚的美名，免于年老与死亡。
499.yw_en: O great sage, because you are devoted to Lord Adhokṣaja, all your desires will be fulfilled. Until the very end of this creation cycle, you will enjoy pious fame and freedom from old age and death.

499.ldw:
jñānaṁ trai-kālikaṁ brahman
 vijñānaṁ ca viraktimat
brahma-varcasvino bhūyāt
 purāṇācāryatāstu te|
499.ldw_fc: jñānam ; trai-kālikam ; brahman ; vijñānam ; ca ; virakti-mat ; brahma-varcasvinaḥ ; bhūyāt ; purāṇa-ācāryatā ; astu ; te
499.words_en_fc: knowledge; of all three phases of time (past, present and future); O brāhmaṇa; transcendental realization; also; including renunciation; of him who is endowed with brahminical potency; let there be; the status of being a teacher of the Purāṇas; may there be; of you.
499.yw_zh: 布茹阿玛纳啊，愿你十分了解过去、现在和未来，愿你具有对至尊者的超然觉悟，富有弃绝精神。你具备理想的布茹阿玛纳的才华，故而你会获得作为精通诸多普然那的灵性导师的地位。
499.yw_en: O brāhmaṇa, may you have perfect knowledge of past, present and future, along with transcendental realization of the Supreme, enriched by renunciation. You have the brilliance of an ideal brāhmaṇa, and thus may you achieve the post of spiritual master of the Purāṇas.

499.ldw:
sūta uvāca|evaṁ varān sa munaye
 dattvāgāt try-akṣa īśvaraḥ
devyai tat-karma kathayann
 anubhūtaṁ purāmunā|

499.words_en_fc: Sūta Gosvāmī said; in this way; benedictions; he; to the sage; giving; went; he who has three eyes; Lord Śiva; to goddess Pārvatī; the activities of Mārkaṇḍeya; recounting; what was experienced; before; by him, Mārkaṇḍeya.
499.yw_zh: 苏塔•哥斯瓦米说：这般祝福了玛尔康戴亚•瑞希之后，主希瓦启程上路，继续向女神帕尔瓦缇讲述圣人的成就，以及圣人切身经历的主的迷幻能量的直接展示。
499.yw_en: Sūta Gosvāmī said: Having thus granted Mārkaṇḍeya Ṛṣi benedictions, Lord Śiva went on his way, continuing to describe to goddess Devī the accomplishments of the sage and the direct exhibition of the Lord’s illusory power that he had experienced.

499.ldw:
so ’py avāpta-mahā-yoga-
 mahimā bhārgavottamaḥ
vicaraty adhunāpy addhā
 harāv ekāntatāṁ gataḥ|
