499.words_en_fc: he, Mārkaṇḍeya; indeed; having achieved; of the topmost perfection of yoga; the glories; the best descendant of Bhṛgu; is traveling about; even today; directly; for Lord Hari; the platform of exclusive devotion; having attained.
499.yw_zh: 玛尔康戴亚•瑞希，布瑞古的最佳后裔，因其获得神秘瑜伽的完美而无比荣耀。甚至时至今日，他还在这世界漫游，全然沉浸在对至尊人格首神的纯粹奉爱之中。
499.yw_en: Mārkaṇḍeya Ṛṣi, the best of the descendants of Bhṛgu, is glorious because of his achievement of perfection in mystic yoga. Even today he travels about this world, fully absorbed in unalloyed devotion for the Supreme Personality of Godhead.

499.ldw:
anuvarṇitam etat te
 mārkaṇḍeyasya dhīmataḥ
anubhūtaṁ bhagavato
 māyā-vaibhavam adbhutam|
499.ldw_fc: anuvarṇitam ; etat ; te ; mārkaṇḍeyasya ; dhī-mataḥ ; anubhūtam ; bhagavataḥ ; māyā-vaibhavam ; adbhutam
499.words_en_fc: described; this; to you; by Mārkaṇḍeya; the intelligent; experienced; of the Personality of Godhead; the opulence of the illusory energy; amazing.
499.yw_zh: 我已向你叙述了极具智慧的圣人玛尔康戴亚的活动，尤其是他如何体验到至尊主那令人惊异的迷幻能量的神奇威力。
499.yw_en: I have thus narrated to you the activities of the highly intelligent sage Mārkaṇḍeya, especially how he experienced the amazing power of the Supreme Lord’s illusory energy.

499.ldw:
etat kecid avidvāṁso
 māyā-saṁsṛtir ātmanaḥ
anādy-āvartitaṁ nṝṇāṁ
 kādācitkaṁ pracakṣate|
499.ldw_fc: etat ; kecit ; avidvāṁsaḥ ; māyā-saṁsṛtiḥ ; ātmanaḥ ; anādi ; āvartitam ; nṝṇām ; kādācitkam ; pracakṣate
499.words_en_fc: this; some persons; who are not learned; the illusory creation; of the Supreme Soul; from time immemorial; repeating; of conditioned living beings; unprecedented; they say.
499.yw_zh: 虽然这件事是前所未有的罕闻，但有些智慧稍逊的人却将其比作是至尊主为受条件限制灵魂创造的循环往复的迷幻的物质存在——从亘古以来就一直存在着的无休止的循环。
499.yw_en: Although this event was unique and unprecedented, some unintelligent persons compare it to the cycle of illusory material existence the Supreme Lord has created for the conditioned souls — an endless cycle that has been continuing since time immemorial.
499.yz_zh: 玛尔康戴亚被主吸人体内，继而又被呼出体外，这不该被认为是对不断循环的物质创造与毁灭的一个象征性描述。《施瑞玛德-巴嘎瓦谭》的这部分讲述的是主的一位伟大奉献者切身经历的一段真实的历史事件，而那些试图把这段史实贬低为只是一个象征性寓言的人，在此被宣布为没有智慧的傻瓜。
499.yz_en: Mārkaṇḍeya’s being drawn into the Lord’s body by His inhalation and expelled again by His exhalation should not be considered a symbolic description of the perennial cycles of material creation and annihilation. This portion of the Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam describes a real, historical event experienced by a great devotee of the Lord, and those trying to relegate this story to mere symbolic allegory are here declared to be unintelligent fools.

499.ldw:
ya evam etad bhṛgu-varya varṇitaṁ
 rathāṅga-pāṇer anubhāva-bhāvitam
saṁśrāvayet saṁśṛṇuyād u tāv ubhau
 tayor na karmāśaya-saṁsṛtir bhavet|
499.ldw_fc: yaḥ ; evam ; etat ; bhṛgu-varya ; varṇitam ; ratha-aṅga-pāṇeḥ ; anubhāva ; bhāvitam ; saṁśrāvayet ; saṁśṛṇuyāt ; u ; tau ; ubhau ; tayoḥ ; na ; karma-āśaya ; saṁsṛtiḥ ; bhavet
499.words_en_fc: who; thus; this; O best of the descendants of Bhṛgu (Śaunaka); described; of Lord Śrī Hari, who carries a chariot wheel in His hand; with the potency; infused; causes anyone to hear; himself hears; or; they; both; of them; not; based on the mentality of fruitive work; the cycle of material life; there is.
499.yw_zh: 布瑞古后裔中的佼佼者啊，这段关于玛尔康戴亚•瑞希的叙述讲的是至尊主的超然能量。谁正确地予以讲述或聆听，谁就不会再遭受这基于从事果报活动之欲望的物质存在。
499.yw_en: O best of the Bhṛgus, this account concerning Mārkaṇḍeya Ṛṣi conveys the transcendental potency of the Supreme Lord. Anyone who properly narrates or hears it will never again undergo material existence, which is based on the desire to perform fruitive activities.
499.yz_en: Thus end the purports of the humble servants of His Divine Grace A.C. Bhaktivedanta Swami Prabhupāda to the Twelfth Canto, Tenth Chapter, of the Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam, entitled “Lord Śiva and Umā Glorify Mārkaṇḍeya Ṛṣi.”

500.ldw:
śrī-śaunaka uvāca|athemam arthaṁ pṛcchāmo
 bhavantaṁ bahu-vittamam
samasta-tantra-rāddhānte
 bhavān bhāgavata tattva-vit|

500.words_en_fc: Śrī Śaunaka said; now; this; matter; we are inquiring about; from you; the possessor of the broadest knowledge; of all; the scriptures prescribing practical methods of worship; in the definitive conclusions; you; O great devotee of the Supreme Lord; the knower of the essential facts.
500.yw_zh: 施瑞·邵纳卡说：苏塔啊，你是博学者中的佼佼者兼至尊主的伟大奉献者。因此，我们现在向你询问有关一切谭陀经典（指定实际崇拜方式的经典）的最终结论。
500.yw_en: Śrī Śaunaka said: O Sūta, you are the best of learned men and a great devotee of the Supreme Lord. Therefore we now inquire from you about the definitive conclusion of all tantra scriptures.

500.ldw:
tāntrikāḥ paricaryāyāṁ
 kevalasya śriyaḥ pateḥ
aṅgopāṅgāyudhākalpaṁ
 kalpayanti yathā ca yaiḥ|tan no varṇaya bhadraṁ te
 kriyā-yogaṁ bubhutsatām
yena kriyā-naipuṇena
 martyo yāyād amartyatām|
500.ldw_fc: tāntrikāḥ ; paricaryāyām ; kevalasya ; śriyaḥ ; pateḥ ; aṅga ; upāṅga ; āyudha ; ākalpam ; kalpayanti ; yathā ; ca ; yaiḥ ; tat ; naḥ ; varṇaya ; bhadram ; te ; kriyā-yogam ; bubhutsatām ; yena ; kriyā ; naipuṇena ; martyaḥ ; yāyāt ; amartyatām
500.words_en_fc: the followers of the methods of the tantric literatures; in regulated worship; who is pure spirit; of the goddess of fortune; of the master; His limbs, such as His feet; His secondary limbs, such as associates like Garuḍa; His weapons, such as the Sudarśana disc; and His ornaments, such as the Kaustubha gem; they conceive of; how; and; by which (material representations); that; to us; please describe; all-auspiciousness; unto you; the practical method of cultivation; who are eager to learn; by which; in the systematic practice; expertise; a mortal being; may attain; immortality.
500.yw_zh: 愿一切好运降临于你！我们求知若渴，请向我们讲解通过规范地崇拜超然的主，幸运女神的丈夫，而得以践行的kriya.yoga（实际的培养方法）程序。也请你说明主的奉献者如何根据特定的物质代表想着他的肢体、同游、武器和饰物。通过娴熟地崇拜至尊主，凡人能获得永生不朽。
500.yw_en: All good fortune to you! Please explain to us, who are very eager to learn, the process of kriyā-yoga practiced through regulated worship of the transcendental Lord, the husband of the goddess of fortune. Please also explain how the Lord’s devotees conceive of His limbs, associates, weapons and ornaments in terms of particular material representations. By expertly worshiping the Supreme Lord, a mortal can attain immortality.

500.ldw:
sūta uvāca|namaskṛtya gurūn vakṣye
 vibhūtīr vaiṣṇavīr api
yāḥ proktā veda-tantrābhyām
 ācāryaiḥ padmajādibhiḥ|
500.ldw_fc: sūtaḥ uvāca ; namaskṛtya ; gurūn ; vakṣye ; vibhūtīḥ ; vaiṣṇavīḥ ; api ; yāḥ ; proktāḥ ; veda-tantrābhyām ; ācāryaiḥ ; padmaja-ādibhiḥ
500.words_en_fc: Sūta Gosvāmī said; offering obeisances; to the spiritual masters; I shall speak; the opulences; belonging to Lord Viṣṇu; indeed; which; are described; by the Vedas and the tantras; by standard authorities; beginning with Lord Brahmā.
500.yw_zh: 苏塔·哥斯瓦米说：首先我向我的灵性导师们致以顶拜，我将向你们复述韦达经和谭陀经中对主维施努的富裕的描述，这些讯息由以生自莲花的布茹阿玛为首的伟大权威们传授。
500.yw_en: Sūta Gosvāmī said: Offering obeisances to my spiritual masters, I shall repeat to you the description of the opulences of Lord Viṣṇu given in the Vedas and tantras by great authorities, beginning from lotus-born Brahmā.

500.ldw:
māyādyair navabhis tattvaiḥ
 sa vikāra-mayo virāṭ
nirmito dṛśyate yatra
 sa-citke bhuvana-trayam|
500.ldw_fc: māyā-ādyaiḥ ; navabhiḥ ; tattvaiḥ ; saḥ ; vikāra-mayaḥ ; virāṭ ; nirmitaḥ ; dṛśyate ; yatra ; sa-citke ; bhuvana-trayam
500.words_en_fc: beginning with the unmanifest stage of nature; with the nine; elements; that; also comprising the transformations (of the eleven senses and the five gross elements); the universal form of the Lord; constructed; are seen; in which; being conscious; the three planetary systems.
500.yw_zh: 人格首神的宇宙形体包括以未展示的自然为开始的九种基本创造元素和随之而来的各种转化物在内。这宇宙形体一经被灌注以知觉，三个星系便在其中跃入眼帘。
500.yw_en: The universal form [virāṭ] of the Personality of Godhead includes the nine basic elements of creation, starting with the unmanifest nature, and their subsequent transformations. Once this universal form is instilled with consciousness, the three planetary systems become visible within it.
500.yz_zh: 九种基本创造元素是prakrti，sutra，mahat-tattva，假自我和五种精微感觉。各种转化物是十一个感官和五大粗糙物质元素。
500.yz_en: The nine basic elements of creation are prakṛti, sūtra, mahat-tattva, false ego, and the five subtle perceptions. The transformations are the eleven senses and the five gross material elements.

500.ldw:
etad vai pauruṣaṁ rūpaṁ
 bhūḥ pādau dyauḥ śiro nabhaḥ
nābhiḥ sūryo ’kṣiṇī nāse
 vāyuḥ karṇau diśaḥ prabhoḥ|prajāpatiḥ prajananam
 apāno mṛtyur īśituḥ
tad-bāhavo loka-pālā
 manaś candro bhruvau yamaḥ|lajjottaro ’dharo lobho
 dantā jyotsnā smayo bhramaḥ
romāṇi bhūruhā bhūmno
 meghāḥ puruṣa-mūrdhajāḥ|

500.words_en_fc: this; indeed; of the Virāṭ-puruṣa; the form; the earth; His feet; heaven; His head; the sky; His navel; the sun; His eyes; His nostrils; the air; His ears; the directions; of the Supreme Lord; the demigod of procreation; His genitals; His anus; death; of the absolute controller; His many arms; the presiding demigods of the various planets; His mind; the moon; His eyebrows; the god of death; shame; His upper lip; His lower lip; greed; His teeth; the light of the moon; His smile; delusion; the hairs of the body; the trees; of the almighty Lord; the clouds; of the Virāṭ-puruṣa; the hairs upon the head.
500.yw_zh: 这就是至尊主的代表，宇宙形体，其中大地是他的足，天空是他的肚脐，太阳是他的眼睛，风是他的鼻孔，进行繁衍的半神人是他的生殖器，死亡是他的肛门，月亮是他的心意，天堂星宿是他的头，方向是他的耳朵，保护各个星球的半神人是他的许多臂膀。死神是他的眉毛，羞耻是他的下嘴唇，贪婪是他的上嘴唇，迷惑是他的微笑，月光是他的牙齿，树木是全能的普茹沙的体毛，云朵则是他的头发。
500.yw_en: This is the representation of the Supreme Lord as the universal person, in which the earth is His feet, the sky His navel, the sun His eyes, the wind His nostrils, the demigod of procreation His genitals, death His anus and the moon His mind. The heavenly planets are His head, the directions His ears, and the demigods protecting the various planets His many arms. The god of death is His eyebrows, shame His lower lip, greed His upper lip, delusion His smile, and moonshine His teeth, while the trees are the almighty Puruṣa’s bodily hairs, and the clouds the hair on His head.
500.yz_zh: 物质创造的方方面面，比如大地、日月和树木，都为主的宇宙形体的各部分所维系。因此，它们被认为跟他别无二致，正如本诗节所述，是为冥想而设。
500.yz_en: Various aspects of material creation, such as the earth, the sun and the trees, are sustained by various limbs of the universal body of the Lord. Thus they are considered nondifferent from Him, as described in this verse, which is meant for meditation.

500.ldw:
yāvān ayaṁ vai puruṣo
 yāvatyā saṁsthayā mitaḥ
tāvān asāv api mahā-
 puruṣo loka-saṁsthayā|
500.ldw_fc: yāvān ; ayam ; vai ; puruṣaḥ ; yāvatyā ; saṁsthayā ; mitaḥ ; tāvān ; asau ; api ; mahā-puruṣaḥ ; loka-saṁsthayā
500.words_en_fc: to which extent; this; indeed; ordinary individual person; extending to which dimensions; by the position of his limbs; measured; to that extent; He; also; the transcendental personality; according to the positions of the planetary systems.
500.yw_zh: 就像通过测量这世间通常人的四肢便能确定其身长，通过衡量玛哈普茹沙宇宙形体内各星系的分布位置，就能明确他的外形规格。
500.yw_en: Just as one can determine the dimensions of an ordinary person of this world by measuring his various limbs, one can determine the dimensions of the Mahāpuruṣa by measuring the arrangement of the planetary systems within His universal form.

500.ldw:
kaustubha-vyapadeśena
 svātma-jyotir bibharty ajaḥ
tat-prabhā vyāpinī sākṣāt
 śrīvatsam urasā vibhuḥ|

500.yz_en: All activity is ultimately aimed at the supreme perfection of life, and this perfection is awarded by the merciful hands of the Lord. The gestures of the Lord remove all fear from the heart of a devotee and elevate him to the Lord’s own association in the spiritual sky.

500.yz_en: One should meditate on the fiery sun globe as a place where God is worshiped. Lord Kṛṣṇa is the reservoir of all effulgence, and thus it is fitting that He be properly worshiped on the glowing sun.

500.yw_zh: 幸运女神，施瑞，永不离开主的身旁，她作为主的内存能量这一代表显现于世。维施瓦克塞纳，他的亲身同游之首，被称为是Pancaratra和其他谭陀经典的人格化身。以南达为首的主的八位看门人，代表以anima为首的神秘瑜伽完美。
500.yw_en: The goddess of fortune, Śrī, who never leaves the Lord’s side, appears with Him in this world as the representation of His internal potency. Viṣvaksena, the chief among His personal associates, is known to be the personification of the Pañcarātra and other tantras. And the Lord’s eight doorkeepers, headed by Nanda, are His mystic perfections, beginning with aṇimā.
500.yz_zh:
据施瑞拉•吉瓦•勾斯瓦米说，幸运女神是一切物质富裕之源。物质自然直接被主的低等能量玛哈•玛亚控制，而幸运女神则是他的内在、高等能量。然而，主的低等自然的富裕之源是幸运女神至髙无上的灵性富裕。正如《施瑞 哈亚希 尔沙 潘査茹阿陀》说：

paramatma harir devas

tac-chaktih srir ihodita

srir devi prakrtih prokta

kesavah purusah smrtah

na visnuna vina devi

na harih padmajam vina

“至尊灵魂是主哈尔依，他的能量在这世上以施瑞着称。女神施瑞被称为prakrti，至尊主凯沙瓦则以普茹沙着称。神圣的女神从不离开他，他也永远跟她形影不离。”

又如《施瑞 维施努 普然那》（1.8.15)说：

nityaiva sajagan-mata

visnoh srir anapayini

yatha sarva-gato visnus

tathaiveyam dvijottamah

“她是宇宙的永恒母亲，主维施努的幸运女神，她永不与他分离。布茹阿玛纳中的佼佼者啊，主维施努无处不在，同样，她也无处不在。”

《维施努 普然那》（1.9.140)还说：

evam yatha jagat-svami

deva-devo janardanah

avataram karoty eva

tatha sristat-sahayini

“因此，当宇宙之主，众神明之神，佳纳尔丹，降临于世，他的伴侣幸运女神也来了。”

幸运女神的纯粹灵性地位在《斯康达 普然那》中有述：

aparam tv aksaram ya sa

prakrtir jada-rupika

srih para prakrtih prokta

cetana visnu-samsraya

tam aksaram param prahuh

paratah param aksaram

harir evakhila-guno py

aksara-trayam iritam

“低等的永不犯错的实体是展示为物质世界的自然。另一方面，幸运女神被称为高等自然，她是至纯至粹的知觉，在主维施努的直接庇护下。当她被说成是高等的永不犯错的实体，那比最伟大的还要伟大的永不犯错的实体便是主哈尔依本人，一切超然品质的原始拥有者。如此，三种明显不同的永不犯错的实体被得以描述。"

因此，尽管主的低等能量的活动是绝无谬误的，但他展示短暂而迷幻的富裕的力量则是凭借内在能量，幸运女神，至尊主的亲身伴侣的恩泽而存在。

《帕德玛普然那》(256.9-21)罗列出主的看门人：南达，苏南达，佳亚，维佳亚，羌达，帕羌达，巴铎，苏巴铎，达塔，维达塔，库姆达，库姆达克萨，彭达日克萨，瓦玛纳，商库卡尔纳，萨尔瓦内陀，苏姆卡和苏帕提施提塔。
500.yz_en:
According to Śrīla Jīva Gosvāmī, the goddess of fortune is the original source of all material opulence. Material nature is directly controlled by the Lord’s inferior energy, Mahā-māyā, whereas the goddess of fortune is His internal, superior energy. Still, the opulence of the Lord’s inferior nature has its source in the supreme spiritual opulence of the goddess of fortune. As stated in Śrī Hayaśīrṣa Pañcarātra:

paramātmā harir devas
 tac-chaktiḥ śrīr ihoditā
śrīr devī prakṛtiḥ proktā
 keśavaḥ puruṣaḥ smṛtaḥ
na viṣṇunā vinā devī
 na hariḥ padmajāṁ vinā

“The Supreme Soul is Lord Hari, and His potency is known in this world as Śrī. Goddess Śrī is known as prakṛti, and the Supreme Lord Keśava is known as the puruṣa. The divine goddess is never present without Him, nor does He ever appear without her.”

Also, Śrī Viṣṇu Purāṇa (1.8.15) states:

nityaiva sā jagan-mātā
 viṣṇoḥ śrīr anapāyinī
yathā sarva-gato viṣṇus
 tathaiveyaṁ dvijottamāḥ

“She is the eternal mother of the universe, the goddess of fortune of Lord Viṣṇu, and she is never separated from Him. In the same way that Lord Viṣṇu is present everywhere, so is she, O best of brāhmaṇas.”

Also in Viṣṇu Purāṇa (1.9.140):

evaṁ yathā jagat-svāmī
 deva-devo janārdanaḥ
avatāraṁ karoty eva
 tathā śrīs tat-sahāyinī

“Thus, in the same way that the Lord of the universe, the God of gods, Janārdana, descends to this world, so His consort, the goddess of fortune, does also.”

The pure spiritual status of the goddess of fortune is described in the Skanda Purāṇa:

aparaṁ tv akṣaraṁ yā sā
 prakṛtir jaḍa-rūpikā
śrīḥ parā prakṛtiḥ proktā
 cetanā viṣṇu-saṁśrayā

taṁ akṣaraṁ paraṁ prāhuḥ
 parataḥ param akṣaram
harir evākhila-guṇo ’py
 akṣara-trayam īritam

“The inferior infallible entity is that nature who manifests as the material world. The goddess of fortune, on the other hand, is known as the superior nature. She is pure consciousness and is under the direct shelter of Lord Viṣṇu. While she is said to be the superior infallible entity, that infallible entity who is greater than the greatest is Lord Hari Himself, the original possessor of all transcendental qualities. In this way, three distinct infallible entities are described.”

Thus, although the inferior energy of the Lord is infallible in her function, her power to manifest temporary illusory opulences exists by the grace of the internal energy, the goddess of fortune, who is the personal consort of the Supreme Lord.

The Padma Purāṇa (256.9-21) lists eighteen doorkeepers of the Lord: Nanda, Sunanda, Jaya, Vijaya, Caṇḍa, Pracaṇḍa, Bhadra, Subhadra, Dhātā, Vidhātā, Kumuda, Kumudākṣa, Pundarīkṣa, Vāmana, Śaṅkukarṇa, Sarvanetra, Sumukha and Supratiṣṭhita.

500.ldw:
dvija-ṛṣabha sa eṣa brahma-yoniḥ svayaṁ-dṛk

500.yw_zh: 布茹阿玛纳中的佼佼者啊，他本人是自明的，是韦达经的根源，他自身的荣耀既完美又完整。通过他的物质能量，他创造、维系和毁灭这整个宇宙。由于他是各种物质功能的执行者，所以他有时被描述为物质分割者，然而，他永远超超然然，稳处于纯粹知识中。那些满怀奉爱奉献于他的的人，能觉悟到他就是他们的真正灵魂。
500.yw_en: O best of brāhmaṇas, He alone is the self-luminous, original source of the Vedas, perfect and complete in His own glory. By His material energy He creates, destroys and maintains this entire universe. Because He is the performer of various material functions, He is sometimes described as materially divided, yet He always remains transcendentally situated in pure knowledge. Those who are dedicated to Him in devotion can realize Him to be their true Soul.
500.yz_zh: 施瑞拉•维施瓦纳塔•恰夸瓦尔提•塔库尔告诫说，如下修习冥想会变得谦卑：“我始终得见的大地是我主莲花足的扩展，他永远是冥想的对象。一切动与不动的生物体已托庇于大地，并以此方式求庇在我主的莲花足下。出于这个原因，我应该尊敬每一生物体，不该嫉妒谁。事实上，芸芸众生组成我主胸膛上的考斯图巴宝石。因此，我决不该嫉妒和嘲笑任何生物体。”如此修习冥想，一个人的生命就能圆满成功。
500.yz_en: Śrīla Viśvanātha Cakravartī Ṭhākura recommends that we become humble by practicing the following meditation: “The earth, which is always visible to me, is the expansion of the lotus feet of my Lord, who is always to be meditated upon. All moving and nonmoving living beings have taken shelter of the earth and are thus sheltered at the lotus feet of my Lord. For this reason I should respect every living being and not envy anyone. In fact, all living entities constitute the Kaustubha gem on My Lord’s chest. Therefore I should never envy or deride any living entity.” By practicing this meditation one can achieve success in life.

500.yw_zh: 圣奎师那啊，阿尔诸那之友啊，维施尼后裔的首领啊，您是那些在地球上制造骚乱的政党的毁灭者。您的威力永不减退。您是超然居所的拥有者，您那为温达文的牧牛郎牧牛女及其仆人们所咏唱的最神圣的荣耀，只是被聆听到，便赐予一切吉祥。主啊，请保护您的奉献者吧。
500.yw_en: O Kṛṣṇa, O friend of Arjuna, O chief among the descendants of Vṛṣṇi, You are the destroyer of those political parties that are disturbing elements on this earth. Your prowess never deteriorates. You are the proprietor of the transcendental abode, and Your most sacred glories, which are sung by Vṛndāvana’s cowherd men and women and their servants, bestow all auspiciousness just by being heard. O Lord, please protect Your devotees.

500.yw_en: Anyone who rises early in the morning and, with a purified mind fixed upon the Mahāpuruṣa, quietly chants this description of His characteristics will realize Him as the Supreme Absolute Truth residing within the heart.

500.yw_en: Śrī Śaunaka said: Please describe to us, who have great faith in your words, the different sets of seven personal features and associates the sun-god exhibits during each month, along with their names and activities. The associates of the sun-god, who serve their lord, are personal expansions of the Supreme Personality of Godhead Hari in His feature as the presiding deity of the sun.
500.yz_zh:
聆听了舒卡戴瓦•勾斯瓦米和玛哈茹阿吉•帕瑞克西特之间的神圣对话之后，邵纳卡询问有关太阳作为至尊主的扩展的疑难。虽然太阳是一切星球之王，但施瑞•邵纳卡却对这作为施瑞•哈尔依，至尊人格首神的扩展的灿烂球体饶有兴致。

跟太阳相关的人物有七位。太阳沿轨道运行的过程中有十二个月，在每个月有一位不同的太阳神和一组不同的六人同游负责管理。在始于外沙卡Vaisakha的十二个月中的每个月，太阳神本人、圣人、亚克刹、甘达尔瓦、阿普萨尔、茹阿克刹萨和纳嘎的名字都各不相同，一共七位。
500.yz_en:
After hearing an account of the exalted conversation between Śukadeva Gosvāmī and Mahārāja Parīkṣit, Śaunaka now inquires about the sun as the expansion of the Supreme Lord. Although the sun is the king of all planets, Śrī Śaunaka is specifically interested in this effulgent globe as the expansion of Śrī Hari, the Supreme Personality of Godhead.

The personalities related with the sun are of seven categories. In the course of the sun’s orbit there are twelve months, and in each month a different sun-god and a different set of his six associates preside. In each of the twelve months beginning from Vaiśākha there are different names for the sun-god himself, the sage, the Yakṣa, the Gandharva, the Apsarā, the Rākṣasa and the Nāga, making a total of seven categories.

500.yw_en: Sūta Gosvāmī said: The sun travels among all the planets and thus regulates their movements. It has been created by Lord Viṣṇu, the Supreme Soul of all embodied beings, through His beginningless material energy.

500.yz_zh:
所有这些太阳神及其同游们在《库尔玛 普然那》中记载如下：

dhataryama ca mitras ca

varunas cendra eva ca

vivasvan atha pūsa ca

parjanyas camsur eva ca

bhagas tvasta ca visnus ca

aditya dvadasa smrtah

pulastyah pulahas catrir

vasisto ’thangira bhrguh

gautamo ’tha bharadvajah

kasyapah kratur eva ca

jamadagnih kausikas ca

munayo brahma-vadinah

rathakrc capy athojas ca

gramanih surucis tatha

ratha-citrasvanah srota

arunah senajit tatha

tarksya aristanemis ca

rtajit satyajit tatha

atha hetih prahetis ca

pauruseyo vadhas tatha

varyo vyaghras tathapas ca

vayur vidyud divakarah

brahmapetas ca vipendra

yajnapetas ca raksakah

vasukih kacchaniras ca

taksakah sukra eva ca

elapatrah sankhapalas

tathairavata-samjnitah

dhananjayo mahapadmas

tatha karkotako dvijah

kambalo svataras caiva

vahanty enam yatha-kramam

tumburur narado haha

hūhūr visvavasus tatha

ugraseno vasurucir

visvavasur athaparah

citrasenas tathornayur

dhrtarastro dvijottamah

sūryavarca dvadasaite

gandharva gayatam varah

krtasthaly apsaro-varya

tathanya punjikasthali

menaka sahajanya ca

pramloca ca dvijottamah

anumloca ghrtaci ca

visvaci corvasi tatha

anya ca pūrvacittih syad

anya caiva tilottama

rambha ceti dvija-sresthas

tathaivapsarasah smrtah
500.yz_en:
All these sun-gods and their associates are mentioned in divisions in the Kūrma Purāṇa, as follows:

dhātāryamā ca mitraś ca
 varuṇaś cendra eva ca
vivasvān atha pūṣā ca
 parjanyaś cāṁśur eva ca

bhagas tvaṣṭā ca viṣṇuś ca
 ādityā dvādaśa smṛtāḥ
pulastyaḥ pulahaś cātrir
 vasiṣṭo ’thāṅgirā bhṛguḥ

gautamo ’tha bharadvājaḥ
 kaśyapaḥ kratur eva ca
jamadagniḥ kauśikaś ca
 munayo brahma-vādināḥ

rathakṛc cāpy athojāś ca
 grāmaṇīḥ surucis tathā
ratha-citrasvanaḥ śrotā
 aruṇaḥ senajit tathā
tārkṣya ariṣṭanemiś ca
 ṛtajit satyajit tathā

atha hetiḥ prahetiś ca
 pauruṣeyo vadhas tathā
varyo vyāghras tathāpaś ca
 vāyur vidyud divākaraḥ

brahmāpetaś ca vipendrā
 yajñāpetaś ca rākṣakāḥ
vāsukiḥ kacchanīraś ca
 takṣakaḥ śukra eva ca

elāpatraḥ śaṅkhapālas
 tathairāvata-saṁjñitaḥ
dhanañjayo mahāpadmas
 tathā karkoṭako dvijāḥ

kambalo ’śvataraś caiva
 vahanty enaṁ yathā-kramam
tumburur nārado hāhā
 hūhūr viśvāvasus tathā

ugraseno vasurucir
 viśvavasur athāparaḥ
citrasenas tathorṇāyur
 dhṛṭarāṣṭro dvijottamāḥ

sūryavarcā dvādaśaite
 gandharvā gāyatāṁ varāḥ
kṛtasthaly apsaro-varyā
 tathānyā puñjikasthalī

menakā sahajanyā ca
 pramlocā ca dvijottamāḥ
anumlocā ghṛtācī ca
 viśvācī corvaśī tathā

anyā ca pūrvacittiḥ syād
 anyā caiva tilottamā
rambhā ceti dvija-śreṣṭhās
 tathaivāpsarasaḥ smṛtāḥ

500.yw_zh: 所有这些人全是至尊人格首神，维施努，以太阳形式显现的富裕扩展。这些神祇拿走那些在每日黎明和日落时分铭记他们之人的一切罪恶反应。
500.yw_en: All these personalities are the opulent expansions of the Supreme Personality of Godhead, Viṣṇu, in the form of the sun-god. These deities take away all the sinful reactions of those who remember them each day at dawn and sunset.

500.ldw:

500.words_en_fc: in each of the twelve; indeed; months; the lord; this; with his six types of associates; for the population of this universe; certainly; traveling; in all directions; spreads; in the next life; in this life; and; pure consciousness.
500.yw_zh: 就这样，在整个十二个月当中，太阳神协同他的六位同游在所有方向游历，在此间宇宙的居民中为今生与来世传播纯粹的知觉。
500.yw_en: Thus, throughout the twelve months, the lord of the sun travels in all directions with his six types of associates, disseminating among the inhabitants of this universe purity of consciousness for both this life and the next.

500.words_en_fc: with the hymns of the Sāma, Ṛg and Yajur Vedas; which reveal the sun; the sages; glorify; him; the Gandharvas; about him; sing loudly; dance; the Apsarās; in front; bind up; the chariot; the Nāgas; the Yakṣas; those who harness the horses to the chariot; drive; the chariot; from the rear; the Rākṣasas; strong.
500.yw_zh: 当圣人们以揭示太阳神身份的萨玛，瑞歌和雅褚韦达赞歌荣耀他时，众甘达尔瓦也歌颂他，阿普萨尔们则在他的战车前翩翩起舞。众纳嘎安排好战车绳索，亚克刹们将马匹按上战车，强壮的茹阿克刹萨们从后面推动。
500.yw_en: While the sages glorify the sun-god with the hymns of the Sāma, Ṛg and Yajur Vedas, which reveal his identity, the Gandharvas also sing his praises and the Apsarās dance before his chariot. The Nāgas arrange the chariot ropes and the Yakṣas harness the horses to the chariot, while the powerful Rākṣasas push from behind.

500.ldw:
vālakhilyāḥ sahasrāṇi
 ṣaṣṭir brahmarṣayo ’malāḥ
purato ’bhimukhaṁ yānti
 stuvanti stutibhir vibhum|

500.words_en_fc: the Vālakhilyas; thousands; sixty; great sages among the brāhmaṇas; pure; in front; facing the chariot; they go; they offer praise; with Vedic prayers; to the almighty lord.
500.yw_zh: 名为瓦拉克依勒亚的六万名布茹阿玛纳圣人面对战车，一边在前面走，一边以韦达曼陀向全能的太阳神供奉祷文。
500.yw_en: Facing the chariot, the sixty thousand brāhmaṇa sages known as Vālakhilyas travel in front and offer prayers to the almighty sun-god with Vedic mantras.

500.ldw:
evaṁ hy anādi-nidhano

 vyūhya lokān avaty ajaḥ|

500.words_en_fc: thus; indeed; without beginning; or end; the Personality of Godhead; Lord Hari; the supreme controller; in each day of Brahmā; Himself; expanding into various forms; the worlds; protects; the unborn Lord.
500.yw_zh: 为保护所有世界，不经出生仍存在且无始无终的至尊人格首神哈尔依，因此在布茹阿玛的每个白昼里把他自己扩展成这些特定的他的亲身代表们。
500.yw_en: For the protection of all the worlds, the Supreme Personality of Godhead Hari, who is unborn and without beginning or end, thus expands Himself during each day of Brahmā into these specific categories of His personal representations.
500.yz_en: Thus end the purports of the humble servants of His Divine Grace A.C. Bhaktivedanta Swami Prabhupāda to the Twelfth Canto, Eleventh Chapter, of the Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam, entitled “Summary Description of the Mahāpuruṣa.”

501.ldw:
sūta uvāca|namo dharmāya mahate
 namaḥ kṛṣṇāya vedhase

 dharmān vakṣye sanātanān|

501.words_en_fc: Sūta Gosvāmī said; obeisances; to the principle of religion; greatest; obeisances; to Lord Kṛṣṇa; the creator; to the brāhmaṇas; offering my obeisances; the principles of religion; I shall speak; eternal.
501.yw_zh: 苏塔·哥斯瓦米说：我向至尊宗教原则，奉献服务，向主奎师那，至尊创造者，向全体布茹阿玛纳，致以顶拜，现在，我将讲述永恒的宗教原则。
501.yw_en: Sūta Gosvāmī said: Offering my obeisances to the supreme religious principle, devotional service; to Lord Kṛṣṇa, the supreme creator; and to all the brāhmaṇas, I shall now describe the eternal principles of religion.
501.yz_zh: 在这第十二篇的第十二章，苏塔•勾斯瓦米将概述《施瑞玛德-巴嘎瓦谭》从第一篇开始的全部题旨。
501.yz_en: In this Twelfth Chapter of the Twelfth Canto, Sūta Gosvāmī will summarize all the topics of Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam, beginning from the First Canto.

501.ldw:
etad vaḥ kathitaṁ viprā
 viṣṇoś caritam adbhutam
bhavadbhir yad ahaṁ pṛṣṭo
 narāṇāṁ puruṣocitam|
501.ldw_fc: etat ; vaḥ ; kathitam ; viprāḥ ; viṣṇoḥ ; caritam ; adbhutam ; bhavadbhiḥ ; yat ; aham ; pṛṣṭaḥ ; narāṇām ; puruṣa ; ucitam
501.words_en_fc: these; to you; narrated; O sages; of Lord Viṣṇu; the pastimes; wonderful; by your good selves; which; I; was asked about; among men; for an actual human being; suitable.
501.yw_zh: 诸位了不起的圣人啊，我已向你们讲述过主维施努奇妙的逍遥时光，因为你们向我询问了这些。
501.yw_en: O great sages, I have narrated to you the wonderful pastimes of Lord Viṣṇu, as you inquired about them from me. Hearing such narrations is the suitable engagement for a person who is actually a human being.
501.yz_zh: 词语naranam purusocitam说明，真正按照人类生命准则生活的男男女女，会聆听和唱颂至尊主的荣耀，而不文明的人对有关神的科学索然无味。
501.yz_en: The words narāṇāṁ puruṣocitam indicate that men and women who actually come to the standard of human life hear and chant the glories of the Supreme Lord, whereas uncivilized persons may not be interested in the science of God.

501.ldw:
atra saṅkīrtitaḥ sākṣāt
 sarva-pāpa-haro hariḥ
nārāyaṇo hṛṣīkeśo
 bhagavān sātvatāṁ patiḥ|
501.ldw_fc: atra ; saṅkīrtitaḥ ; sākṣāt ; sarva-pāpa ; haraḥ ; hariḥ ; nārāyaṇaḥ ; hṛṣīkeśaḥ ; bhagavān ; sātvatām ; patiḥ
501.words_en_fc: here, in the Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam; is fully glorified; directly; of all sins; the remover; the Personality of Godhead, Lord Hari; Nārāyaṇa; Hṛṣīkeśa, the Lord of the senses; the Supreme Personality; of the Yadus; the master.
501.yw_zh: 这部文献充分荣耀至尊人格首神哈尔依，他清除掉他所有奉献者的罪恶反应。主被荣耀为纳茹阿亚纳，慧施凯沙和众萨特瓦塔（雅度族）之主。
501.yw_en: This literature fully glorifies the Supreme Personality of Godhead Hari, who removes all His devotees’ sinful reactions. The Lord is glorified as Nārāyaṇa, Hṛṣīkeśa and the Lord of the Sātvatas.
501.yz_zh: 主奎师那的许多圣名表明他非凡的超然品质。哈尔依这个名字说明，主去除他奉献者心中的一切罪恶。圣名纳茹阿亚纳表明，主维系芸芸众生的存在。慧施凯沙一词显明，主奎师那是一切众生的感官的终极控制者。巴嘎万这个词说明，主奎师那是最具吸引力的至尊生物。词语satvatam patih表明，主自然是圣洁虔诚之人，尤其是崇髙的雅度族人的主人。
501.yz_en: Lord Kṛṣṇa’s many holy names indicate His extraordinary transcendental qualities. The name Hari indicates that the Lord removes all sins from the heart of His devotee. Nārāyaṇa indicates that the Lord sustains the existence of all other beings. Hṛṣīkeśa indicates that Lord Kṛṣṇa is the ultimate controller of the senses of all living beings. The word bhagavān indicates that Lord Kṛṣṇa is the all-attractive Supreme Being. And the words sātvatāṁ patiḥ indicate that the Lord is naturally the master of saintly and religious people, especially the members of the exalted Yadu family.

501.ldw:
atra brahma paraṁ guhyaṁ
 jagataḥ prabhavāpyayam
jñānaṁ ca tad-upākhyānaṁ
 proktaṁ vijñāna-saṁyutam|
501.ldw_fc: atra ; brahma ; param ; guhyam ; jagataḥ ; prabhava ; apyayam ; jñānam ; ca ; tat-upākhyānam ; proktam ; vijñāna ; saṁyutam
501.words_en_fc: here; the Absolute Truth; supreme; confidential; of this universe; the creation; and annihilation; knowledge; and; the means of cultivating it; are spoken; transcendental realization; including.
501.yw_zh: 这部文献讲述至尊绝对真理的奥秘，此间宇宙的创造与毁灭之源。还呈现关于他的神圣知识和培养这知识的程序，以及人可获得的超然觉悟。
501.yw_en: This literature describes the mystery of the Supreme Absolute Truth, the source of the creation and annihilation of this universe. Also presented are divine knowledge of Him together with the process of its cultivation, and the transcendental realization one achieves.

501.ldw:
bhakti-yogaḥ samākhyāto
 vairāgyaṁ ca tad-āśrayam
pārīkṣitam upākhyānaṁ
 nāradākhyānam eva ca|
501.ldw_fc: bhakti-yogaḥ ; samākhyātaḥ ; vairāgyam ; ca ; tat-āśrayam ; pārīkṣitam ; upākhyānam ; nārada ; ākhyānam ; eva ; ca
501.words_en_fc: the process of devotional service; is thoroughly enunciated; renunciation; and; which is subsidiary to it; of Mahārāja Parīkṣit; the history; of Nārada; the history; indeed; also.
501.yw_zh: 还讲述以下题旨：奉献服务的程序及其附属特征弃绝，玛哈茹阿吉·帕瑞克西特和圣人拿茹阿达的历史。
501.yw_en: The following topics are also narrated: the process of devotional service together with its subsidiary feature of renunciation, and the histories of Mahārāja Parīkṣit and the sage Nārada.

501.ldw:
prāyopaveśo rājarṣer
 vipra-śāpāt parīkṣitaḥ
śukasya brahmarṣabhasya
 saṁvādaś ca parīkṣitaḥ|
501.ldw_fc: prāya-upaveśaḥ ; rāja-ṛṣeḥ ; vipra-śāpāt ; parīkṣitaḥ ; śukasya ; brahma-ṛṣabhasya ; saṁvādaḥ ; ca ; parīkṣitaḥ
501.words_en_fc: the fast until death; of the sage among kings; because of the curse of the brāhmaṇa’s son; of King Parīkṣit; of Śukadeva; the best of brāhmaṇas; the conversation; and; with Parīkṣit.
501.yw_zh: 还讲述，圣王帕瑞克西特打坐戒食直到死亡，应验了一位布茹阿玛纳之子的诅咒，以及帕瑞克西特与布茹阿玛纳中的佼佼者舒卡戴瓦·哥斯瓦米之间的对话。
501.yw_en: Also described are saintly King Parīkṣit’s sitting down to fast until death in response to the curse of a brāhmaṇa’s son, and the conversations between Parīkṣit and Śukadeva Gosvāmī, who is the best of all brāhmaṇas.

501.ldw:
yoga-dhāraṇayotkrāntiḥ
 saṁvādo nāradājayoḥ
avatārānugītaṁ ca
 sargaḥ prādhāniko ’grataḥ|
501.ldw_fc: yoga-dhāraṇayā ; utkrāntiḥ ; saṁvādaḥ ; nārada-ajayoḥ ; avatāra-anugītam ; ca ; sargaḥ ; prādhānikaḥ ; agrataḥ
501.words_en_fc: by fixed meditation in yoga; the attainment of liberation at the time of passing away; the conversation; between Nārada and Brahmā; the listing of the incarnations of the Supreme Lord; and; the process of creation; from the unmanifest material nature; in progressive order.
501.yw_zh: 《巴嘎瓦谭》阐明，一个人如何能在死亡时，通过专注地修习瑜伽冥想获得解脱。它还叙述拿茹阿达与布茹阿玛之间的讨论，列举出至尊人格首神的诸多化身，讲述宇宙如何从未展示的物质自然状态循序渐进地被得以创造。
501.yw_en: The Bhāgavatam explains how one can attain liberation at the time of death by practicing fixed meditation in yoga. It also contains a discussion between Nārada and Brahmā, an enumeration of the incarnations of the Supreme Personality of Godhead, and a description of how the universe was created in progressive sequence, beginning from the unmanifest stage of material nature.
501.yz_zh: 施瑞拉•维施瓦纳塔•恰夸瓦尔提•塔库尔阐明，很难全部列出《施瑞玛德-巴嘎瓦谭》所涵盖的数不胜数的叙述与题旨，因此，要知道，苏塔•勾斯瓦米只是在概述各种题旨。我们不该认为，他在此未提及的话题就不那么重要或是多余的，因为《施瑞玛德-巴嘎瓦谭》的每个字母和单词都是绝对的、具有奎师那知觉的音震。
501.yz_en: Śrīla Viśvanātha Cakravartī Ṭhākura explains that it would be difficult to give a complete list of the numerous accounts and topics contained in the Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam. Therefore it is understood that Sūta Gosvāmī is merely summarizing the topics. We should not consider the topics he fails to mention here less important or superfluous, since every letter and word of Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam is absolute, Kṛṣṇa conscious sound vibration.

501.ldw:
viduroddhava-saṁvādaḥ
 kṣattṛ-maitreyayos tataḥ
purāṇa-saṁhitā-praśno
 mahā-puruṣa-saṁsthitiḥ|
501.ldw_fc: vidura-uddhava ; saṁvādaḥ ; kṣattṛ-maitreyayoḥ ; tataḥ ; purāṇa-saṁhitā ; praśnaḥ ; mahā-puruṣa ; saṁsthitiḥ
501.words_en_fc: between Vidura and Uddhava; the discussion; between Vidura and Maitreya; then; concerning this Purāṇic compilation; inquiries; within the Supreme Personality of Godhead; the winding up of creation.
501.yw_zh: 这部经典还讲述维杜茹阿分别跟乌达瓦和麦垂亚的讨论，对这部普然那的主题的询问，以及毁灭时创造息止于至尊主体内。
501.yw_en: This scripture also relates the discussions Vidura had with Uddhava and with Maitreya, inquiries about the subject matter of this Purāṇa, and the winding up of creation within the body of the Supreme Lord at the time of annihilation.

501.ldw:
tataḥ prākṛtikaḥ sargaḥ
 sapta vaikṛtikāś ca ye
tato brahmāṇḍa-sambhūtir
 vairājaḥ puruṣo yataḥ|
501.ldw_fc: tataḥ ; prākṛtikaḥ ; sargaḥ ; sapta ; vaikṛtikāḥ ; ca ; ye ; tataḥ ; brahma-aṇḍa ; sambhūtiḥ ; vairājaḥ puruṣaḥ ; yataḥ
501.words_en_fc: then; from material nature; the creation; the seven; stages of creation derived by transformation; and; which; then; of the universal egg; the construction; the universal form of the Lord; from which.
501.yw_zh: 创造因物质自然属性被激活而得以产生，元素转化演变的七个阶段，宇宙蛋的构筑以及出现在其中的至尊主的宇宙形体——所有这一切都被描述得淋漓尽致。
501.yw_en: The creation effected by the agitation of the modes of material nature, the seven stages of evolution by elemental transformation, and the construction of the universal egg, from which arises the universal form of the Supreme Lord — all these are thoroughly described.

501.ldw:
kālasya sthūla-sūkṣmasya
 gatiḥ padma-samudbhavaḥ
bhuva uddharaṇe ’mbhodher
 hiraṇyākṣa-vadho yathā|
501.ldw_fc: kālasya ; sthūla-sūkṣmasya ; gatiḥ ; padma ; samudbhavaḥ ; bhuvaḥ ; uddharaṇe ; ambhodheḥ ; hiraṇyākṣa-vadhaḥ ; yathā
501.words_en_fc: of time; gross and subtle; the movement; of the lotus; the generation; of the earth; in connection with the deliverance; from the ocean; the killing of the demon Hiraṇyākṣa; as it occurred.
501.yw_zh: 普通主题包括时间的精微与粗糙的运动，从嘎尔博达卡沙依·维施努的肚脐生出一朵莲花，当地球被拯救出嘎尔博达卡海洋时，恶魔黑冉亚克沙横遭毁灭。
501.yw_en: Other topics include the subtle and gross movements of time, the generation of the lotus from the navel of Garbhodakaśāyī Viṣṇu, and the killing of the demon Hiraṇyākṣa when the earth was delivered from the Garbhodaka Ocean.

501.ldw:
ūrdhva-tiryag-avāk-sargo
 rudra-sargas tathaiva ca
ardha-nārīśvarasyātha
 yataḥ svāyambhuvo manuḥ|
501.ldw_fc: ūrdhva ; tiryak ; avāk ; sargaḥ ; rudra ; sargaḥ ; tathā ; eva ; ca ; ardha-nārī ; īśvarasya ; atha ; yataḥ ; svāyambhuvaḥ manuḥ
501.words_en_fc: of the higher species, the demigods; of the animals; and of lower species; the creation; of Lord Śiva; the creation; and; indeed; also; as a half man, half woman; of the lord; then; from whom; Svāyambhuva Manu.
501.yw_zh: 《巴嘎瓦谭》描述半神人、走兽、恶魔般生命种族的创造；主茹铎的诞生；斯瓦阳布瓦·玛努显现自半男半女的伊士瓦尔。
501.yw_en: The Bhāgavatam also describes the creation of demigods, animals and demoniac species of life; the birth of Lord Rudra; and the appearance of Svāyambhuva Manu from the half-man, half-woman Īśvara.

501.ldw:
śatarūpā ca yā strīṇām
 ādyā prakṛtir uttamā
santāno dharma-patnīnāṁ
 kardamasya prajāpateḥ|
501.ldw_fc: śatarūpā ; ca ; yā ; strīṇām ; ādyā ; prakṛtiḥ ; uttamā ; santānaḥ ; dharma-patnīnām ; kardamasya ; prajāpateḥ
501.words_en_fc: Śatarūpā; and; who; of women; the first; the consort; best; the progeny; of the pious wives; of the sage Kardama; the progenitor.
501.yw_zh: 还讲述第一位女子莎塔茹帕，玛努的优秀伴侣的显现，以及帕佳帕提·卡尔达玛及其虔诚妻子的后裔。
501.yw_en: Also related are the appearance of the first woman, Śatarūpā, who was the excellent consort of Manu, and the offspring of the pious wives of Prajāpati Kardama.

501.ldw:
avatāro bhagavataḥ
 kapilasya mahātmanaḥ
devahūtyāś ca saṁvādaḥ
 kapilena ca dhīmatā|
501.ldw_fc: avatāraḥ ; bhagavataḥ ; kapilasya ; mahā-ātmanaḥ ; devahūtyāḥ ; ca ; saṁvādaḥ ; kapilena ; ca ; dhī-matā
501.words_en_fc: the descent; of the Supreme Personality of Godhead; Lord Kapila; the Supreme Soul; of Devahūti; and; the conversation; with Lord Kapila; and; the intelligent.
501.yw_zh: 《巴嘎瓦谭》描述了至尊人格首神作为崇高圣哲卡皮拉这一化身，记载了这位博学的伟大灵魂与他母亲黛瓦瑚缇的对话。
501.yw_en: The Bhāgavatam describes the incarnation of the Supreme Personality of Godhead as the exalted sage Kapila and records the conversation between that greatly learned soul and His mother, Devahūti.

501.ldw:
nava-brahma-samutpattir
 dakṣa-yajña-vināśanam
dhruvasya caritaṁ paścāt
 pṛthoḥ prācīnabarhiṣaḥ|nāradasya ca saṁvādas
 tataḥ praiyavrataṁ dvijāḥ
nābhes tato ’nucaritam
 ṛṣabhasya bharatasya ca|
501.ldw_fc: nava-brahma ; samutpattiḥ ; dakṣa-yajña ; vināśanam ; dhruvasya ; caritam ; paścāt ; pṛthoḥ ; prācīnabarhiṣaḥ ; nāradasya ; ca ; saṁvādaḥ ; tataḥ ; praiyavratam ; dvijāḥ ; nābheḥ ; tataḥ ; anucaritam ; ṛṣabhasya ; bharatasya ; ca
501.words_en_fc: of the nine brāhmaṇas (the sons of Lord Brahmā, headed by Marīci); the descendants; of the sacrifice performed by Dakṣa; the destruction; of Dhruva Mahārāja; the history; then; of King Pṛthu; of Prācīnabarhi; with Nārada Muni; and; his conversation; then; the story of Mahārāja Priyavrata; O brāhmaṇas; of Nābhi; then; the life story; of Lord Ṛṣabha; of Bharata Mahārāja; and.
501.yw_zh: 还讲述九位韦达布茹阿玛纳的后裔，达克沙施行的祭祀被毁，杜瓦·玛哈茹阿吉的历史，帕琪纳巴尔黑与拿茹阿达的对话，玛哈茹阿吉·普瑞亚瓦塔的生平。诸位布茹阿玛纳呀， 《巴嘎瓦谭》还讲述纳比王、主日沙巴和巴茹阿特王的品格与活动。
501.yw_en: Also described are the progeny of the nine great brāhmaṇas, the destruction of Dakṣa’s sacrifice, and the history of Dhruva Mahārāja, followed by the histories of King Pṛthu and King Prācīnabarhi, the discussion between Prācīnabarhi and Nārada, and the life of Mahārāja Priyavrata. Then, O brāhmaṇas, the Bhāgavatam tells of the character and activities of King Nābhi, Lord Ṛṣabha and King Bharata.

501.ldw:
dvīpa-varṣa-samudrāṇāṁ
 giri-nady-upavarṇanam
jyotiś-cakrasya saṁsthānaṁ
 pātāla-naraka-sthitiḥ|
501.ldw_fc: dvīpa-varṣa-samudrāṇām ; giri-nadī ; upavarṇanam ; jyotiḥ-cakrasya ; saṁsthānam ; pātāla ; naraka ; sthitiḥ
501.words_en_fc: of the continents, great islands and oceans; of the mountains and rivers; the detailed description; of the celestial sphere; the arrangement; of the subterranean regions; and of hell; the situation.
501.yw_zh: 《巴嘎瓦谭》详细描述地球上的大陆、海洋与山川。还描述了天体的排列，低等区域和地狱的状况。
501.yw_en: The Bhāgavatam gives an elaborate description of the earth’s continents, regions, oceans, mountains and rivers. Also described are the arrangement of the celestial sphere and the conditions found in the subterranean regions and in hell.

501.ldw:
dakṣa-janma pracetobhyas
 tat-putrīṇāṁ ca santatiḥ
yato devāsura-narās
 tiryaṅ-naga-khagādayaḥ|
501.ldw_fc: dakṣa-janma ; pracetobhyaḥ ; tat-putrīṇām ; ca ; santatiḥ ; yataḥ ; deva-asura-narāḥ ; tiryak-naga-khaga-ādayaḥ
501.words_en_fc: the birth of Dakṣa; from the Pracetās; of his daughters; and; the progeny; from which; the demigods, demons and human beings; the animals, serpents, birds and other species.
501.yw_zh: 帕佳帕提·达克沙作为众帕柴塔之子的再次诞生，达克沙之女的后裔，即半神人、恶魔、人类、走兽、蛇类、飞禽等生命种族由她们孕育而生——这一切均有讲述。
501.yw_en: The rebirth of Prajāpati Dakṣa as the son of the Pracetās, and the progeny of Dakṣa’s daughters, who initiated the races of demigods, demons, human beings, animals, serpents, birds and so on — all this is described.

501.ldw:
tvāṣṭrasya janma-nidhanaṁ
 putrayoś ca diter dvijāḥ
daityeśvarasya caritaṁ
 prahrādasya mahātmanaḥ|
501.ldw_fc: tvāṣṭrasya ; janma-nidhanam ; putrayoḥ ; ca ; diteḥ ; dvijāḥ ; daitya-īśvarasya ; caritam ; prahrādasya ; mahā-ātmanaḥ
501.words_en_fc: of the son of Tvaṣṭā (Vṛtra); the birth and death; of the two sons, Hiraṇyākṣa and Hiraṇyakaśipu; and; of Diti; O brāhmaṇas; of the greatest of the Daityas; the history; of Prahlāda; the great soul.
501.yw_zh: 众布茹阿玛纳啊，还讲述维陀苏茹阿以及迪缇之子黑冉亚克沙和黑冉亚卡西普的出生与死亡，迪缇的后裔中最了不起的人物，崇高灵魂帕拉德的生平。
501.yw_en: O brāhmaṇas, also recounted are the births and deaths of Vṛtrāsura and of Diti’s sons Hiraṇyākṣa and Hiraṇyakaśipu, as well as the history of the greatest of Diti’s descendants, the exalted soul Prahlāda.

501.ldw:
manv-antarānukathanaṁ
 gajendrasya vimokṣaṇam
manvantarāvatārāś ca
 viṣṇor hayaśirādayaḥ|
501.ldw_fc: manu-antara ; anukathanam ; gaja-indrasya ; vimokṣaṇam ; manuantara-avatārāḥ ; ca ; viṣṇoḥ ; hayaśirā-ādayaḥ
501.words_en_fc: of reigns of the various Manus; the detailed description; of the king of the elephants; the liberation; the particular incarnations of the Supreme Personality of Godhead in each manvantara; and; of Lord Viṣṇu; such as Lord Hayaśīrṣā.
501.yw_zh: 每位玛努的统治时期，象王嘎振铎的救赎，主维施努在每个manv.antara的具体化身，比如主哈亚希尔沙，都有描述。
501.yw_en: The reign of each Manu, the liberation of Gajendra, and the special incarnations of Lord Viṣṇu in each manvantara, such as Lord Hayaśīrṣā, are described as well.

501.ldw:
kaurmaṁ mātsyaṁ nārasiṁhaṁ
 vāmanaṁ ca jagat-pateḥ
kṣīroda-mathanaṁ tadvad
 amṛtārthe divaukasām|
501.ldw_fc: kaurmam ; mātsyam ; nārasiṁham ; vāmanam ; ca ; jagat-pateḥ ; kṣīra-uda ; mathanam ; tadvat ; amṛta-arthe ; diva-okasām
501.words_en_fc: the incarnation as a tortoise; as a fish; as a man-lion; as a dwarf; and; of the Lord of the universe; of the Ocean of Milk; the churning; thus; for the sake of nectar; on the part of the inhabitants of heaven.
501.yw_zh: 《巴嘎瓦谭》还讲述宇宙之主以库尔玛、玛茨亚、纳茹阿星哈和瓦玛纳等化身的显现，众半神人搅拌牛奶之洋以求甘露。
501.yw_en: The Bhāgavatam also tells of the appearances of the Lord of the universe as Kūrma, Matsya, Narasiṁha and Vāmana, and of the demigods’ churning of the Milk Ocean to obtain nectar.

501.ldw:
devāsura-mahā-yuddhaṁ
 rāja-vaṁśānukīrtanam
ikṣvāku-janma tad-vaṁśaḥ
 sudyumnasya mahātmanaḥ|
501.ldw_fc: deva-asura ; mahā-yuddham ; rāja-vaṁśa ; anukīrtanam ; ikṣvāku-janma ; tat-vaṁśaḥ ; sudyamnasya ; mahā-ātmanaḥ
501.words_en_fc: of the demigods and demons; the great war; of the dynasties of kings; the reciting in sequence; the birth of Ikṣvāku; his dynasty; (and the dynasty) of Sudyumna; the great soul.
501.yw_zh: 半神人与恶魔之间的激战，历代君王的皇朝，伊克施瓦库的诞生及其王朝，虔诚的苏丢姆纳皇朝——全呈现在这部文献中。
501.yw_en: An account of the great battle fought between the demigods and the demons, a systematic description of the dynasties of various kings, and narrations concerning Ikṣvāku’s birth, his dynasty and the dynasty of the pious Sudyumna — all are presented within this literature.

501.ldw:
ilopākhyānam atroktaṁ
 tāropākhyānam eva ca
sūrya-vaṁśānukathanaṁ
 śaśādādyā nṛgādayaḥ|
501.ldw_fc: ilā-upākhyānam ; atra ; uktam ; tārā-upākhyānam ; eva ; ca ; sūrya-vaṁśa ; anukathanam ; śaśāda-ādyāḥ ; nṛga-ādayaḥ
501.words_en_fc: the history of Ilā; herein; is spoken; the history of Tārā; indeed; also; of the dynasty of the sun-god; the narration; Śaśāda and others; Nṛga and others.
501.yw_zh: 还讲述伊拉和塔茹阿的历史，太阳神的后裔，其中包括沙厦达、尼日嘎等君王。
501.yw_en: Also related are the histories of Ilā and Tārā, and the description of the descendants of the sun-god, including such kings as Śaśāda and Nṛga.

501.ldw:
saukanyaṁ cātha śaryāteḥ
 kakutsthasya ca dhīmataḥ
khaṭvāṅgasya ca māndhātuḥ
 saubhareḥ sagarasya ca|
501.ldw_fc: saukanyam ; ca ; atha ; śaryāteḥ ; kakutsthasya ; ca ; dhī-mataḥ ; khaṭvāṅgasya ; ca ; māndhātuḥ ; saubhareḥ ; sagarasya ; ca
501.words_en_fc: the story of Sukanyā; and; then; that of Śaryāti; of Kakutstha; and; who was an intelligent king; of Khaṭvāṅga; and; of Māndhātā; of Saubhari; of Sagara; and.
501.yw_zh: 叙述了苏康亚，沙尔亚提、明智的卡库茨塔、卡特旺嘎、曼达塔、邵巴瑞和萨嘎茹阿的历史。
501.yw_en: The histories of Sukanyā, Śaryāti, the intelligent Kakutstha, Khaṭvāṅga, Māndhātā, Saubhari and Sagara are narrated.

501.ldw:
rāmasya kośalendrasya
 caritaṁ kilbiṣāpaham
nimer aṅga-parityāgo
 janakānāṁ ca sambhavaḥ|
501.ldw_fc: rāmasya ; kośala-indrasya ; caritam ; kilbiṣa-apaham ; nimeḥ ; aṅga-parityāgaḥ ; janakānām ; ca ; sambhavaḥ
501.words_en_fc: of Lord Rāmacandra; the King of Kośala; the pastimes; which drive away all sins; of King Nimi; the giving up of his body; of the descendants of Janaka; and; the appearance.
501.yw_zh: 《巴嘎瓦谭》讲述了蔻沙拉的君王主茹阿玛禅铎的神圣逍遥时光，尼弥王如何放弃他的物质躯体。佳纳卡王的后裔的显现也有提及。
501.yw_en: The Bhāgavatam narrates the sanctifying pastimes of Lord Rāmacandra, the King of Kośala, and also explains how King Nimi abandoned his material body. The appearance of the descendants of King Janaka is also mentioned.

501.ldw:
rāmasya bhārgavendrasya
 niḥkṣatrī-karaṇaṁ bhuvaḥ
ailasya soma-vaṁśasya
 yayāter nahuṣasya ca|dauṣmanter bharatasyāpi
 śāntanos tat-sutasya ca
yayāter jyeṣṭha-putrasya
 yador vaṁśo ’nukīrtitaḥ|
501.ldw_fc: rāmasya ; bhārgava-indrasya ; niḥkṣatrī-karaṇam ; bhuvaḥ ; ailasya ; soma-vaṁśasya ; yayāteḥ ; nahuṣasya ; ca ; dauṣmanteḥ ; bharatasya ; api ; śāntanoḥ ; tat ; sutasya ; ca ; yayāteḥ ; jyeṣṭha-putrasya ; yadoḥ ; vaṁśaḥ ; anu-kīrtitaḥ
501.words_en_fc: by Lord Paraśurāma; the greatest of the descendants of Bhṛgu Muni; the elimination of all the kṣatriyas; of the earth; of Mahārāja Aila; of the dynasty of the moon-god; of Yayāti; of Nahuṣa; and; of the son of Duṣmanta; Bharata; also; of King Śāntanu; his; of the son, Bhīṣma; and; of Yayāti; of the eldest son; Yadu; the dynasty; is glorified.
501.yw_zh: 《施瑞玛德·巴嘎瓦谭》讲述主帕茹阿舒茹阿玛，布瑞古最了不起的后裔，如何毁灭地球上的所有查锤亚，深入叙述涌现在月亮王朝中历代荣耀的君王，比如艾拉、雅亚提、纳胡沙、杜施曼塔之子巴茹阿塔、商塔努及其儿子彼士玛的生平。还讲述雅度王，雅亚提的长子，建立的伟大王朝。
501.yw_en: The Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam describes how Lord Paraśurāma, the greatest descendant of Bhṛgu, annihilated all the kṣatriyas on the face of the earth. It further recounts the lives of glorious kings who appeared in the dynasty of the moon-god — kings such as Aila, Yayāti, Nahuṣa, Duṣmanta’s son Bharata, Śāntanu and Śāntanu’s son Bhīṣma. Also described is the great dynasty founded by King Yadu, the eldest son of Yayāti.

501.ldw:
yatrāvatīrṇo bhagavān
 kṛṣṇākhyo jagad-īśvaraḥ
vasudeva-gṛhe janma
 tato vṛddhiś ca gokule|
501.ldw_fc: yatra ; avatīrṇaḥ ; bhagavān ; kṛṣṇa-ākhyaḥ ; jagat-īśvaraḥ ; vasudeva-gṛhe ; janma ; tataḥ ; vṛddhiḥ ; ca ; gokule
501.words_en_fc: in which dynasty; descended; the Supreme Personality of Godhead; known as Kṛṣṇa; the Lord of the universe; in the home of Vasudeva; His birth; subsequently; His growing up; and; in Gokula.
501.yw_zh: 施瑞·奎师那，至尊人格首神兼宇宙之主，如何降临在雅度王朝，如何诞生在瓦苏戴瓦的家，后来如何在哥库拉成长——这一切均有详述。
501.yw_en: How Śrī Kṛṣṇa, the Supreme Personality of Godhead and Lord of the universe, descended into this Yadu dynasty, how He took birth in the home of Vasudeva, and how He then grew up in Gokula — all this is described in detail.

501.ldw:
tasya karmāṇy apārāṇi
 kīrtitāny asura-dviṣaḥ
pūtanāsu-payaḥ-pānaṁ
 śakaṭoccāṭanaṁ śiśoḥ|tṛṇāvartasya niṣpeṣas
 tathaiva baka-vatsayoḥ
aghāsura-vadho dhātrā
 vatsa-pālāvagūhanam|
501.ldw_fc: tasya ; karmāṇi ; apārāṇi ; kīrtitāni ; asura-dviṣaḥ ; pūtanā ; asu ; payaḥ ; pānam ; śakaṭa ; uccāṭanam ; śiśoḥ ; tṛṇāvartasya ; niṣpeṣaḥ ; tathā ; eva ; baka-vatsayoḥ ; agha-asura ; vadhaḥ ; dhātrā ; vatsa-pāla ; avagūhanam
501.words_en_fc: His; activities; innumerable; are glorified; of the enemy of the demons; of the witch Pūtanā; along with her life air; of the milk; the drinking; of the cart; the breaking; by the child; of Tṛṇāvarta; the trampling; and; indeed; of the demons named Baka and Vatsa; of the demon Agha; the killing; by Lord Brahmā; of the calves and cowherd boys; the hiding away.
501.yw_zh: 还荣耀施瑞·奎师那，恶魔的敌手的无数逍遥时光，其中包括他的童年逍遥，比如，他吸吮菩妲那的乳汁的同时还吸走她的生命之气，踩蹈特瑞纳瓦尔塔使其坠亡，杀死巴卡苏茹阿、瓦特萨苏茹阿和阿嘎苏茹阿，他在主布茹阿玛将他的牛犊和牧牛童朋友藏在山洞之后上演的逍遥时光。
501.yw_en: Also glorified are the innumerable pastimes of Śrī Kṛṣṇa, the enemy of the demons, including His childhood pastimes of sucking out Pūtanā’s life air along with her breast milk, breaking the cart, trampling down Tṛṇāvarta, killing Bakāsura, Vatsāsura and Aghāsura, and the pastimes He enacted when Lord Brahmā hid His calves and cowherd boyfriends in a cave.

501.ldw:
dhenukasya saha-bhrātuḥ
 pralambasya ca saṅkṣayaḥ
gopānāṁ ca paritrāṇaṁ
 dāvāgneḥ parisarpataḥ|
501.ldw_fc: dhenukasya ; saha-bhrātuḥ ; pralambasya ; ca ; saṅkṣayaḥ ; gopānām ; ca ; paritrāṇam ; dāva-agneḥ ; parisarpataḥ
501.words_en_fc: of Dhenuka; along with his companions; of Pralamba; and; the destruction; of the cowherd boys; and; the saving; from the forest fire; which was encircling.
501.yw_zh: 《施瑞玛德·巴嘎瓦谭》讲述主奎师那和巴拉茹阿玛如何杀死恶魔戴努卡苏茹阿及其同党，主巴拉茹阿玛如何铲除帕朗巴苏茹阿，奎师那如何把牧牛童从围困他们的森林大火中解救出来。
501.yw_en: The Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam tells how Lord Kṛṣṇa and Lord Balarāma killed the demon Dhenukāsura and his companions, how Lord Balarāma destroyed Pralambāsura, and also how Kṛṣṇa saved the cowherd boys from a raging forest fire that had encircled them.

501.ldw:
damanaṁ kāliyasyāher
 mahāher nanda-mokṣaṇam
vrata-caryā tu kanyānāṁ
 yatra tuṣṭo ’cyuto vrataiḥ|prasādo yajña-patnībhyo
 viprāṇāṁ cānutāpanam
govardhanoddhāraṇaṁ ca
 śakrasya surabher atha|yajñabhiṣekaḥ kṛṣṇasya
 strībhiḥ krīḍā ca rātriṣu
śaṅkhacūḍasya durbuddher
 vadho ’riṣṭasya keśinaḥ|
501.ldw_fc: damanam ; kāliyasya ; aheḥ ; mahā-aheḥ ; nanda-mokṣaṇam ; vrata-caryā ; tu ; kanyānām ; yatra ; tuṣṭaḥ ; acyutaḥ ; vrataiḥ ; prasādaḥ ; yajña-patnībhyaḥ ; viprāṇām ; ca ; anutāpanam ; govardhana-uddhāraṇam ; ca ; śakrasya ; surabheḥ ; atha ; yajña-abhiṣekaḥ ; kṛṣṇasya ; strībhiḥ ; krīḍā ; ca ; rātriṣu ; śaṅkhacūḍasya ; durbuddheḥ ; vadhaḥ ; ariṣṭasya ; keśinaḥ
501.words_en_fc: the subduing; of Kāliya; the snake; from the great serpent; the rescue of Mahārāja Nanda; the execution of austere vows; and; of the gopīs; by which; became satisfied; Lord Kṛṣṇa; with their vows; the mercy; to the wives of the brāhmaṇas performing Vedic sacrifices; of the brāhmaṇa husbands; and; the experience of remorse; the lifting of Govardhana Hill; and; by Indra; along with the Surabhi cow; then; the worship and ritual bathing; of Lord Kṛṣṇa; together with the women; the sporting; and; in the nights; of the demon Śaṅkhacūḍa; who was foolish; the killing; of Ariṣṭa; of Keśī.
501.yw_zh: 惩戒卡利亚蛇；解救南达·玛哈茹阿吉脱离巨蛇的侵扰；年轻的哥琵们履行苦行的誓言，故而满足了主奎师那；他向施行韦达祭祀、自责不迭的布茹阿玛之妻施以恩泽；他举起哥瓦丹山，随后因陀和苏茹阿比乳牛崇拜他，为他举行沐浴仪式；主奎师那与牧牛姑娘们上演晚间逍遥时光；铲除愚蠢的恶魔商卡楚达、阿瑞施塔和凯希——所有这些逍遥时光均有详细的叙述。
501.yw_en: The chastisement of the serpent Kāliya; the rescue of Nanda Mahārāja from a great snake; the severe vows performed by the young gopīs, who thus satisfied Lord Kṛṣṇa; the mercy He showed the wives of the Vedic brāhmaṇas, who felt remorse; the lifting of Govardhana Hill followed by the worship and bathing ceremony performed by Indra and the Surabhi cow; Lord Kṛṣṇa’s nocturnal pastimes with the cowherd girls; and the killing of the foolish demons Śaṅkhacūḍa, Ariṣṭa and Keśī — all these pastimes are elaborately recounted.

501.ldw:
akrūrāgamanaṁ paścāt
 prasthānaṁ rāma-kṛṣṇayoḥ
vraja-strīṇāṁ vilāpaś ca
 mathurālokanaṁ tataḥ|
501.ldw_fc: akrūra ; āgamanam ; paścāt ; prasthānam ; rāma-kṛṣṇayoḥ ; vraja-strīṇām ; vilāpaḥ ; ca ; mathurā-ālokanam ; tataḥ
501.words_en_fc: of Akrūra; the coming; after that; the departure; of Lord Balarāma and Lord Kṛṣṇa; of the women of Vṛndāvana; the lamentation; and; the seeing of Mathurā; then.
501.yw_zh: 还讲述阿库茹阿的抵达，随后是奎师那和巴拉茹阿玛的离开，哥琵们的悲伤和瑞图茹阿之行。
501.yw_en: The Bhāgavatam describes the arrival of Akrūra, the subsequent departure of Kṛṣṇa and Balarāma, the lamentation of the gopīs and the touring of Mathurā.

501.ldw:
gaja-muṣṭika-cāṇūra-
 kaṁsādīnāṁ tathā vadhaḥ
mṛtasyānayanaṁ sūnoḥ
 punaḥ sāndīpaner guroḥ|
501.ldw_fc: gaja ; muṣṭika-cāṇūra ; kaṁsa ; ādīnām ; tathā ; vadhaḥ ; mṛtasya ; ānayanam ; sūnoḥ ; punaḥ ; sāndīpaneḥ ; guroḥ
501.words_en_fc: of the elephant Kuvalayāpīḍa; of the wrestlers Muṣṭika and Cāṇūra; of Kaṁsa; and of others; also; the killing; who had died; the bringing back; of the son; again; of Sāndīpani; their spiritual master.
501.yw_zh: 还叙述奎师那和巴拉茹阿玛如何杀死大象库瓦拉亚皮达，摔跤手姆施提卡和恰努茹阿，康撒与其他恶魔，还叙述奎师那如何带回他的灵性导师桑迪帕尼·牟尼夭折的儿子。
501.yw_en: Also narrated are how Kṛṣṇa and Balarāma killed the elephant Kuvalayāpīḍa, the wrestlers Muṣṭika and Cāṇūra, and Kaṁsa and other demons, as well as how Kṛṣṇa brought back the dead son of His spiritual master, Sāndīpani Muni.

501.ldw:
mathurāyāṁ nivasatā
 yadu-cakrasya yat priyam
kṛtam uddhava-rāmābhyāṁ
 yutena hariṇā dvijāḥ|
501.ldw_fc: mathurāyām ; nivasatā ; yadu-cakrasya ; yat ; priyam ; kṛtam ; uddhava-rāmābhyām ; yutena ; hariṇā ; dvijāḥ
501.words_en_fc: in Mathurā; by Him who was residing; for the circle of Yadus; which; gratifying; was done; with Uddhava and Balarāma; joined; by Lord Hari; O brāhmaṇas.
501.yw_zh: 众位布茹阿玛纳啊，这部经典随后讲述，当主哈尔依由乌达瓦和巴拉茹阿玛陪同居住在玛图茹阿，他如何上演逍遥时光，以满足雅度王朝。
501.yw_en: Then, O brāhmaṇas, this scripture recounts how Lord Hari, while residing in Mathurā in the company of Uddhava and Balarāma, performed pastimes for the satisfaction of the Yadu dynasty.

501.ldw:
jarāsandha-samānīta-
 sainyasya bahuśo vadhaḥ
ghātanaṁ yavanendrasya
 kuśasthalyā niveśanam|
501.ldw_fc: jarāsandha ; samānīta ; sainyasya ; bahuśaḥ ; vadhaḥ ; ghātanam ; yavana-indrasya ; kuśasthalyāḥ ; niveśanam
501.words_en_fc: bv King Jarāsandha; assembled; of the army; many times; the annihilation; the killing; of the king of the barbarians; of Dvārakā; the founding.
501.yw_zh: 还讲述佳茹阿桑达率领的军队屡遭覆灭，野蛮族的王卡拉亚瓦纳之死，杜瓦尔卡城堡的建立。
501.yw_en: Also described are the annihilation of each of the many armies brought by Jarāsandha, the killing of the barbarian king Kālayavana and the establishment of Dvārakā City.

501.ldw:
ādānaṁ pārijātasya
 sudharmāyāḥ surālayāt
rukmiṇyā haraṇaṁ yuddhe
 pramathya dviṣato hareḥ|
501.ldw_fc: ādānam ; pārijātasya ; sudharmāyāḥ ; sura-ālayāt ; rukmiṇyāḥ ; haraṇam ; yuddhe ; pramathya ; dviṣataḥ ; hareḥ
501.words_en_fc: the receiving; of the pārijāta tree; of the Sudharmā assembly hall; from the abode of the demigods; of Rukmiṇī; the kidnapping; in battle; defeating; His rivals; by Lord Hari.
501.yw_zh: 这部巨作还讲述主奎师那如何从天堂带回帕瑞嘉塔树和苏达尔玛议会厅，以及他如何在战斗中力挫群雄，掳走茹珂蜜妮。
501.yw_en: This work also describes how Lord Kṛṣṇa brought from heaven the pārijāta tree and the Sudharmā assembly hall, and how He kidnapped Rukmiṇī by defeating all His rivals in battle.

501.ldw:
harasya jṛmbhaṇaṁ yuddhe
 bāṇasya bhuja-kṛntanam
prāgjyotiṣa-patiṁ hatvā
 kanyānāṁ haraṇaṁ ca yat|
501.ldw_fc: harasya ; jṛmbhaṇam ; yuddhe ; bāṇasya ; bhuja ; kṛntanam ; prāgjyotiṣa-patim ; hatvā ; kanyānām ; haraṇam ; ca ; yat
501.words_en_fc: of Lord Śiva; the forced yawning; in battle; of Bāṇa; of the arms; the cutting,; the master of the city Prāgjyotiṣa; killing; of the unmarried virgins; the removal; and; which.
501.yw_zh: 还讲述主奎师那在与巴纳苏茹阿交战时，如何挫败主希瓦，使其哈欠连连，以及主如何砍去巴纳苏茹阿的多只手臂，如何消灭帕格玖提沙普尔王，随后营救被绑架囚禁在城中的年轻公主们。
501.yw_en: Also narrated are how Lord Kṛṣṇa, in the battle with Bāṇāsura, defeated Lord Śiva by making him yawn, how the Lord cut off Bāṇāsura’s arms, and how He killed the master of Prāgjyotiṣapura and then rescued the young princesses held captive in that city.

501.ldw:
caidya-pauṇḍraka-śālvānāṁ
 dantavakrasya durmateḥ
śambaro dvividaḥ pīṭho
 muraḥ pañcajanādayaḥ|māhātmyaṁ ca vadhas teṣāṁ
 vārāṇasyāś ca dāhanam
bhārāvataraṇaṁ bhūmer
 nimittī-kṛtya pāṇḍavān|
501.ldw_fc: caidya ; pauṇḍraka ; śālvānām ; dantavakrasya ; durmateḥ ; śambaraḥ dvividaḥ pīṭhaḥ ; muraḥ pañcajana-ādayaḥ ; māhātmyam ; ca ; vadhaḥ ; teṣām ; vārāṇasyāḥ ; ca ; dāhanam ; bhāra ; avataraṇam ; bhūmeḥ ; nimittī-kṛtya ; pāṇḍavān
501.words_en_fc: of the King of Cedi, Śiśupāla; of Pauṇḍraka; and of Śālva; of Dantavakra; the foolish; the demons Śambara, Dvivida and Pīṭha; Mura, Pañcajana and others; the prowess; and; the death; of these; of the holy city of Benares; and; the burning; of the burden; the reduction; of the earth; making the apparent cause; the sons of Pāṇḍu.
501.yw_zh: 讲述车迪王、彭卓卡、沙勒瓦、愚蠢的丹塔瓦夸、商巴尔、兑维达、琵塔、穆茹阿、潘查佳纳和其他恶魔等列强的死亡，瓦茹阿纳斯如何被焚毁，夷为平地。还叙述主奎师那如何使潘达瓦五兄弟亲临库茹柴陀战役，解除地球的重负。
501.yw_en: There are descriptions of the powers and the deaths of the King of Cedi, Pauṇḍraka, Śālva, the foolish Dantavakra, Śambara, Dvivida, Pīṭha, Mura, Pañcajana and other demons, along with a description of how Vārāṇasī was burned to the ground. The Bhāgavatam also recounts how Lord Kṛṣṇa relieved the earth’s burden by engaging the Pāṇḍavas in the Battle of Kurukṣetra.

501.ldw:
vipra-śāpāpadeśena
 saṁhāraḥ sva-kulasya ca
uddhavasya ca saṁvādo
 vasudevasya cādbhutaḥ|yatrātma-vidyā hy akhilā
 proktā dharma-vinirṇayaḥ
tato martya-parityāga
 ātma-yogānubhāvataḥ|
501.ldw_fc: vipra-śāpa ; apadeśena ; saṁhāraḥ ; sva-kulasya ; ca ; uddhavasya ; ca ; saṁvādaḥ ; vasudevasya ; ca ; adbhutaḥ ; yatra ; ātma-vidyā ; hi ; akhilā ; proktā ; dharma-vinirṇayaḥ ; tataḥ ; martya ; parityāgaḥ ; ātma-yoga ; anubhāvataḥ
501.words_en_fc: of the curse by the brāhmaṇas; on the pretext; the withdrawal; of His own family; and; with Uddhava; and; the discussion; of Vasudeva (with Nārada); and; wonderful; in which; the science of the self; indeed; completely; was spoken; the ascertainment of the principles of religion; then; of the mortal world; the giving up; of His personal mystic power; on the strength.
501.yw_zh: 主如何以众位布茹阿玛纳的诅咒为由收回他的王朝；瓦苏戴瓦与拿茹阿达的对话；乌达瓦与奎师那之间奇妙非凡的对话详尽地提示关于自我的科学，阐明人类社会的宗教原则；以及后来主奎师那如何凭他自身的神秘力量离开这凡尘俗世——《巴嘎瓦谭》叙述了所有这些事件。
501.yw_en: How the Lord withdrew His own dynasty on the pretext of the brāhmaṇas’ curse; Vasudeva’s conversation with Nārada; the extraordinary conversation between Uddhava and Kṛṣṇa, which reveals the science of the self in complete detail and elucidates the religious principles of human society; and then how Lord Kṛṣṇa gave up this mortal world by His own mystic power — the Bhāgavatam narrates all these events.

501.ldw:
yuga-lakṣaṇa-vṛttiś ca
 kalau nṝṇām upaplavaḥ
catur-vidhaś ca pralaya
 utpattis tri-vidhā tathā|
501.ldw_fc: yuga ; lakṣaṇa ; vṛttiḥ ; ca ; kalau ; nṝṇām ; upaplavaḥ ; catuḥ-vidhaḥ ; ca ; pralayaḥ ; utpattiḥ ; tri-vidhā ; tathā
501.words_en_fc: of the different ages; the characteristics; and the corresponding activities; also; in the present Age of Kali; of men; the total disturbance; fourfold; and; the process of annihilation; creation; of three kinds; and.
501.yw_zh: 这部著作还描述不同年代的人们的特征与行为，在卡历年代的人所经历的纷乱状况，四种毁灭和三种创造。
501.yw_en: This work also describes people’s characteristics and behavior in the different ages, the chaos men experience in the Age of Kali, the four kinds of annihilation and the three kinds of creation.

501.ldw:
deha-tyāgaś ca rājarṣer
 viṣṇu-rātasya dhīmataḥ
śākhā-praṇayanam ṛṣer
 mārkaṇḍeyasya sat-kathā
mahā-puruṣa-vinyāsaḥ
 sūryasya jagad-ātmanaḥ|
501.ldw_fc: deha-tyāgaḥ ; ca ; rāja-ṛṣeḥ ; viṣṇu-rātasya ; dhī-mataḥ ; śākhā ; praṇayanam ; ṛṣeḥ ; mārkaṇḍeyasya ; sat-kathā ; mahā-puruṣa ; vinyāsaḥ ; sūryasya ; jagat-ātmanaḥ
501.words_en_fc: the relinquishing of his body; and; by the saintly king; Parīkṣit; the intelligent; of the branches of the Vedas; the dissemination; from the great sage Vyāsadeva; of Mārkaṇḍeya Ṛṣi; the pious narration; of the universal form of the Lord; the detailed arrangement; of the sun; who is the soul of the universe.
501.yw_zh: 还讲述圣贤明君维施努茹阿塔（帕瑞克西特）离开人世，阐述施瑞拉·维亚萨戴瓦如何传播韦达经的各个支脉，虔诚地叙述玛尔康戴亚·瑞希的事迹，以及主，宇宙之太阳之灵魂的宇宙形体的详细结构和他的形体。
501.yw_en: There are also an account of the passing away of the wise and saintly King Viṣṇurāta [Parīkṣit], an explanation of how Śrīla Vyāsadeva disseminated the branches of the Vedas, a pious narration concerning Mārkaṇḍeya Ṛṣi, and a description of the detailed arrangement of the Lord’s universal form and His form as the sun, the soul of the universe.

501.ldw:
iti coktaṁ dvija-śreṣṭhā
 yat pṛṣṭo ’ham ihāsmi vaḥ
līlāvatāra-karmāṇi
 kīrtitānīha sarvaśaḥ|
501.ldw_fc: iti ; ca ; uktam ; dvija-śreṣṭhāḥ ; yat ; pṛṣṭaḥ ; aham ; iha ; asmi ; vaḥ ; līlā-avatāra ; karmāṇi ; kīrtitāni ; iha ; sarvaśaḥ
501.words_en_fc: thus; and; spoken; O best of the brāhmaṇas; what; inquired; I; here; have been; by you; of the divine descents of the Supreme Lord for His own enjoyment; the activities; have been glorified; in this scripture; completely.
501.yw_zh: 如此，布茹阿玛纳中的佼佼者啊，我已在此讲解了你向我询问的题旨。这部文献已详尽地荣耀了主的各种逍遥化身的活动。
501.yw_en: Thus, O best of the brāhmaṇas, I have explained herein what you have inquired from me. This literature has glorified in full detail the activities of the Lord’s pastime incarnations.

501.ldw:
patitaḥ skhalitaś cārtaḥ
 kṣuttvā vā vivaśo gṛṇan
haraye nama ity uccair
 mucyate sarva-pātakāt|
501.ldw_fc: patitaḥ ; skhalitaḥ ; ca ; ārtaḥ ; kṣuttvā ; vā ; vivaśaḥ ; gṛṇan ; haraye namaḥ ; iti ; uccaiḥ ; mucyate ; sarva-pātakāt
501.words_en_fc: falling; tripping; and; feeling pain; sneezing; or; involuntarily; chanting; “obeisances to Lord Hari”; thus; loudly; one is freed; from all sinful reactions.
501.yw_zh: 即便一个人在跌落、滑倒、感到疼痛或打喷嚏时，无意中高声呼喊着，“顶拜主哈尔依！”，也会自动地超脱一切罪恶反应。
501.yw_en: If when falling, slipping, feeling pain or sneezing one involuntarily cries out in a loud voice, “Obeisances to Lord Hari!” one will be automatically freed from all his sinful reactions.
501.yz_zh: 施瑞拉•巴克提希丹塔•萨茹阿斯瓦提•塔库尔阐明，主施瑞•柴坦尼亚总是在施瑞瓦萨•塔库尔的庭院中大声唱颂haraye namah krsna之歌，如果我们也髙声咏唱至尊主哈尔依的荣耀，这同一位主柴坦尼亚会使我们脱离物质享乐的倾向。
501.yz_en: Śrīla Bhaktisiddhānta Sarasvatī Ṭhākura explains that Lord Śrī Caitanya is always loudly chanting the song haraye namaḥ kṛṣṇa in the courtyard of Śrīvāsa Ṭhākura and that this same Lord Caitanya will free us from our materialistic enjoying propensity if we also loudly chant the glories of the Supreme Lord Hari.

501.ldw:
saṅkīrtyamāno bhagavān anantaḥ
 śrutānubhāvo vyasanaṁ hi puṁsām
praviśya cittaṁ vidhunoty aśeṣaṁ
 yathā tamo ’rko ’bhram ivāti-vātaḥ|
501.ldw_fc: saṅkīrtyamānaḥ ; bhagavān ; anantaḥ ; śruta ; anubhāvaḥ ; vyasanam ; hi ; puṁsām ; praviśya ; cittam ; vidhunoti ; aśeṣam ; yathā ; tamaḥ ; arkaḥ ; abhram ; iva ; ati-vātaḥ
501.words_en_fc: being properly chanted about; the Supreme Personality of Godhead; the unlimited; being heard about; His potency; the misery; indeed; of persons; enter; the heart; cleans away; entirely; just as; darkness; the sun; clouds; as; a strong wind.
501.yw_zh: 当人们正确地荣耀至尊人格首神或者只是倾听有关他能力的叙述，主便亲自进入他们的心房，涤除每种不幸，俨如太阳驱散黑暗，强风卷走乌云。
501.yw_en: When people properly glorify the Supreme Personality of Godhead or simply hear about His power, the Lord personally enters their hearts and cleanses away every trace of misfortune, just as the sun removes the darkness or as a powerful wind drives away the clouds.
501.yz_zh: 有人或许对太阳驱走黑暗的例子不尽满意，因为有时太阳驱不散洞穴里的黑暗，故而，给出狂风卷走浓密乌云的例子。如此举例为的是强调，至尊主将去除他的奉献者心中物质幻象的黑暗。
501.yz_en: One may not be satisfied by the example of the sun removing the darkness, since sometimes the darkness in a cave is not removed by the sun. Therefore the example is given of a strong wind that drives away a cover of clouds. It is thus emphatically stated here that the Supreme Lord will remove from the heart of His devotee the darkness of material illusion.

501.ldw:
mṛṣā giras tā hy asatīr asat-kathā
 na kathyate yad bhagavān adhokṣajaḥ
tad eva satyaṁ tad u haiva maṅgalaṁ
 tad eva puṇyaṁ bhagavad-guṇodayam|
501.ldw_fc: mṛṣāḥ ; giraḥ ; tāḥ ; hi ; asatīḥ ; asat-kathāḥ ; na kathyate ; yat ; bhagavān ; adhokṣajaḥ ; tat ; eva ; satyam ; tat ; u ha ; eva ; maṅgalam ; tat ; eva ; puṇyam ; bhagavat-guṇa ; udayam
501.words_en_fc: false; words; they; indeed; untrue; useless discussions of that which is not eternal; is not discussed; wherein; the Personality of Godhead; the transcendental Lord; that; alone; true; that; indeed; alone; auspicious; that; alone; pious; the qualities of the Supreme Personality; which manifests.
501.yw_zh: 不描述超然的人格首神，而只是讨论短暂物质的话语，完全是虚妄空言，毫无价值。唯有呈现至尊主的超然品质的话语才是真谛、吉言和神圣之语。
501.yw_en: Words that do not describe the transcendental Personality of Godhead but instead deal with temporary matters are simply false and useless. Only those words that manifest the transcendental qualities of the Supreme Lord are actually truthful, auspicious and pious.
501.yz_zh: 迟早，全部物质文献与谈论都经不起时间的考验。换言之，描述至尊主的超然讯息能使我们摆说幻象的束缚，恢复我们作为主的爱心仆人的永恒身份。虽然如同动物般的人会批评绝对真理的荣耀，但那些文明人应该继续大力传扬主的超然荣耀。
501.yz_en: Sooner or later, all material literature and discussion must fail the test of time. On the other hand, the transcendental descriptions of the Supreme Lord can free us from the bondage of illusion and restore us to our eternal status as loving servants of the Lord. Although men who are like animals may criticize the glorification of the Absolute Truth, those who are civilized should go on vigorously propagating the transcendental glories of the Lord.

501.ldw:
tad eva ramyaṁ ruciraṁ navaṁ navaṁ
 tad eva śaśvan manaso mahotsavam
tad eva śokārṇava-śoṣaṇaṁ nṛṇāṁ
 yad uttamaḥśloka-yaśo ’nugīyate|
501.ldw_fc: tat ; eva ; ramyam ; ruciram ; navam navam ; tat ; eva ; śaśvat ; manasaḥ ; mahā-utsavam ; tat ; eva ; śoka-arṇava ; śoṣaṇam ; nṛṇām ; yat ; uttamaḥśloka ; yaśaḥ ; anugīyate
501.words_en_fc: that; indeed; attractive; palatable; newer and newer; that; indeed; constantly; for the mind; a great festival; that; indeed; the ocean of misery; that which dries; for all persons; in which; of the all-famous Supreme Personality of Godhead; the glories; are sung.
501.yw_zh: 描写最闻名遐迩的人格首神的荣耀的话语引人入胜，回味无穷，永恒常新。千真万确，这样的话语对于心意来说是永不散的欢宴，能使痛苦之洋干涸枯竭。
501.yw_en: Those words describing the glories of the all-famous Personality of Godhead are attractive, relishable and ever fresh. Indeed, such words are a perpetual festival for the mind, and they dry up the ocean of misery.

501.ldw:
na yad vacaś citra-padaṁ harer yaśo
 jagat-pavitraṁ pragṛṇīta karhicit
tad dhvāṅkṣa-tīrthaṁ na tu haṁsa-sevitaṁ
 yatrācyutas tatra hi sādhavo ’malāḥ|
501.ldw_fc: na ; yat ; vacaḥ ; citra-padam ; hareḥ ; yaśaḥ ; jagat ; pavitram ; pragṛṇīta ; karhicit ; tat ; dhvāṅkṣa ; tīrtham ; na ; tu ; haṁsa ; sevitam ; yatra ; acyutaḥ ; tatra ; hi ; sādhavaḥ ; amalāḥ
501.words_en_fc: not; which; vocabulary; decorative words; of the Lord; the glories; the universe; sanctifying; describe; ever; that; of the crows; a place of pilgrimage; not; on the other hand; by saintly persons situated in knowledge; served; in which; Lord Acyuta (is described); there; alone; the saints; who are pure.
501.yw_zh: 那些不描述荣耀其自身就能圣化整个宇宙气氛的主的话语，被认为是如同乌鸦的朝圣之地，决不为稳处在超然知识中的人所光顾。纯粹而圣洁的奉献者只兴致于荣耀永不犯错的至尊主的话题。
501.yw_en: Those words that do not describe the glories of the Lord, who alone can sanctify the atmosphere of the whole universe, are considered to be like unto a place of pilgrimage for crows, and are never resorted to by those situated in transcendental knowledge. The pure and saintly devotees take interest only in topics glorifying the infallible Supreme Lord.

501.ldw:
tad vāg-visargo janatāgha-samplavo
 yasmin prati-ślokam abaddhavaty api
nāmāny anantasya yaśo ’ṅkitāni yat
 śṛṇvanti gāyanti gṛṇanti sādhavaḥ|
501.ldw_fc: tat ; vāk ; visargaḥ ; janatā ; agha ; samplavaḥ ; yasmin ; prati-ślokam ; abaddhavati ; api ; nāmāni ; anantasya ; yaśaḥ ; aṅkitāni ; yat ; śṛṇvanti ; gāyanti ; gṛṇanti ; sādhavaḥ
501.words_en_fc: that; vocabulary; creation; of the people in general; of the sins; a revolution; in which; each and every stanza; is irregularly composed; although; the transcendental names, etc; of the unlimited Lord; the glories; depicted; which; do hear; do sing; do accept; the purified men who are honest.
501.yw_zh: 另一方面，这部文献充盈对无限的至尊主的名字、名声、形体、逍遥时光等超然的荣耀，是一部与众不同的巨作，承载着满是为这世间受误导文明下的不虔诚生活带来革新的超然话语。这样的超然文献即便编纂得不完美，也为内心诚实而纯净的人所聆听、哼唱与接受。
501.yw_en: On the other hand, that literature which is full of descriptions of the transcendental glories of the name, fame, forms, pastimes and so on of the unlimited Supreme Lord is a different creation, full of transcendental words directed toward bringing about a revolution in the impious lives of this world’s misdirected civilization. Such transcendental literatures, even though imperfectly composed, are heard, sung and accepted by purified men who are thoroughly honest.

501.ldw:
naiṣkarmyam apy acyuta-bhāva-varjitaṁ
 na śobhate jñānam alaṁ nirañjanam
kutaḥ punaḥ śaśvad abhadram īśvare
 na hy arpitaṁ karma yad apy anuttamam|
501.ldw_fc: naiṣkarmyam ; api ; acyuta ; bhāva ; varjitam ; na ; śobhate ; jñānam ; alam ; nirañjanam ; kutaḥ ; punaḥ ; śaśvat ; abhadram ; īśvare ; na ; hi ; arpitam ; karma ; yat ; api ; anuttamam
501.words_en_fc: self-realization, being freed from the reactions of fruitive work; although; of the infallible Lord; conception; devoid of; does not; look well; transcendental knowledge; actually; free from designations; where is; again; always; uncongenial; unto the Lord; not; indeed; offered; fruitive work; which is; even; unsurpassed.
501.yw_zh: 关于觉悟自我的知识，即便免于一切物质情感，倘若缺乏对永不犯错者（神）的概念，也是不悦目的。那么，即使本性一开始就令人痛苦且短暂易逝的果报活动被做得再恰当体面，倘若不用来为主从事奉献服务，又有何用？
501.yw_en: Knowledge of self-realization, even though free from all material affinity, does not look well if devoid of a conception of the Infallible [God]. What, then, is the use of even the most properly performed fruitive activities, which are naturally painful from the very beginning and transient by nature, if they are not utilized for the devotional service of the Lord?
501.yz_zh: 这节诗和前两节诗所言跟《施瑞玛德-巴嘎瓦谭》第一篇1.5.10-12如出一辙。译文以施瑞拉•帕布帕德的为基准。
501.yz_en: This and the previous two verses are found in a slightly different form in the First Canto of Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam (1.5.10-12). The translations are based on Śrīla Prabhupāda’s.

501.ldw:
yaśaḥ-śriyām eva pariśramaḥ paro
 varṇāśramācāra-tapaḥ-śrutādiṣu
avismṛtiḥ śrīdhara-pāda-padmayor
 guṇānuvāda-śravaṇādarādibhiḥ|
501.ldw_fc: yaśaḥ ; śriyām ; eva ; pariśramaḥ ; paraḥ ; varṇa-āśrama-ācāra ; tapaḥ ; śruta ; ādiṣu ; avismṛtiḥ ; śrīdhara ; pāda-padmayoḥ ; guṇa-anuvāda ; śravaṇa ; ādara ; ādibhiḥ
501.words_en_fc: in fame; and opulence; only; the labor; great; by one’s execution of duties in the varṇāśrama system; austerities; hearing of sacred scripture; and so on; remembrance; of the maintainer of the goddess of fortune; of the lotus feet; of the chanting of the qualities; by hearing; respecting; and so on.
501.yw_zh: 人在履行瓦尔纳施茹阿姆制度中平常的社会与宗教职责，从事苦行和聆听韦达经所做的巨大努力，其最高境界只不过是获得世俗的名声与富裕。但是，通过讲述和专注聆听吟诵至尊主，幸运女神的丈夫的超然品质，一个人能将他的莲花足铭记于心。
501.yw_en: The great endeavor one undergoes in executing the ordinary social and religious duties of the varṇāśrama system, in performing austerities, and in hearing from the Vedas culminates only in the achievement of mundane fame and opulence. But by respecting and attentively hearing the recitation of the transcendental qualities of the Supreme Lord, the husband of the goddess of fortune, one can remember His lotus feet.

501.ldw:
avismṛtiḥ kṛṣṇa-padāravindayoḥ
 kṣiṇoty abhadrāṇi ca śaṁ tanoti
sattvasya śuddhiṁ paramātma-bhaktiṁ
 jñānaṁ ca vijñāna-virāga-yuktam|
501.ldw_fc: avismṛtiḥ ; kṛṣṇa-pada-aravindayoḥ ; kṣiṇoti ; abhadrāṇi ; ca ; śam ; tanoti ; sattvasya ; śuddhim ; parama-ātma ; bhaktim ; jñānam ; ca ; vijñāna ; virāga ; yuktam
501.words_en_fc: remembrance; of Lord Kṛṣṇa’s lotus feet; destroys; everything inauspicious; and; good fortune; expands; of the heart; the purification; for the Supreme Soul; devotion; knowledge; and; with direct realization; and detachment; endowed.
501.yw_zh: 对主奎师那的莲花足的忆念可摧毁不吉祥的一切，带来莫大的好运；可净化心灵，赐予对至尊灵魂的奉爱以及饱含觉悟与弃绝的知识。
501.yw_en: Remembrance of Lord Kṛṣṇa’s lotus feet destroys everything inauspicious and awards the greatest good fortune. It purifies the heart and bestows devotion for the Supreme Soul, along with knowledge enriched with realization and renunciation.

501.ldw:
yūyaṁ dvijāgryā bata bhūri-bhāgā
 yac chaśvad ātmany akhilātma-bhūtam
nārāyaṇaṁ devam adevam īśam
 ajasra-bhāvā bhajatāviveśya|
501.ldw_fc: yūyam ; dvija-agryāḥ ; bata ; bhūri-bhāgāḥ ; yat ; śaśvat ; ātmani ; akhila ; ātma-bhūtam ; nārāyaṇam ; devam ; adevam ; īśam ; ajasra ; bhāvāḥ ; bhajata ; āviveśya
501.words_en_fc: all of you; O most eminent of brāhmaṇas; indeed; extremely fortunate; because; constantly; in your hearts; of all; who is the ultimate Soul; Lord Nārāyaṇa; the Personality of Godhead; beyond whom there is no other god; the supreme controller; without interruption; having love; you should worship; placing Him.
501.yw_zh: 最杰出的布茹阿玛纳啊，你们的确非常幸运，因为你们已把主施瑞·纳茹阿亚纳。人格首神，一切存在的至高无上的控制者兼至尊灵魂，置于你们的心中——没有比他更高的神祇。你们拥有对他坚定不移的爱，所以我请求你们崇拜他。
501.yw_en: O most eminent of brāhmaṇas, you are all indeed extremely fortunate, since you have already placed within your hearts Lord Śrī Nārāyaṇa — the Personality of Godhead, the supreme controller and the ultimate Soul of all existence — beyond whom there is no other god. You have undeviating love for Him, and thus I request you to worship Him.

501.ldw:
ahaṁ ca saṁsmārita ātma-tattvaṁ
 śrutaṁ purā me paramarṣi-vaktrāt
prāyopaveśe nṛpateḥ parīkṣitaḥ
 sadasy ṛṣīṇāṁ mahatāṁ ca śṛṇvatām|
501.ldw_fc: aham ; ca ; saṁsmāritaḥ ; ātma-tattvam ; śrutam ; purā ; me ; parama-ṛṣi ; vaktrāt ; prāya-upaveśe ; nṛpateḥ ; parīkṣitaḥ ; sadasi ; ṛṣīṇām ; mahatām ; ca ; śṛṇvatām
501.words_en_fc: I; also; have been made to remember; the science of the Supersoul; heard; previously; by me; of the greatest of sages, Śukadeva; from the mouth; during the fast to death; of the king; Parīkṣit; in the assembly; of sages; great; and; while they were listening.
501.yw_zh: 我现在还完全回想起有关神的科学，这是我先前从伟大的圣贤舒卡戴瓦·哥斯瓦米的口中聆听到的。当时，我在伟大圣人的集会中，他们正在聆听他对打坐戒食至死亡的帕瑞克西特王娓娓讲述。
501.yw_en: I also have now been fully reminded of the science of God, which I previously heard from the mouth of the great sage Śukadeva Gosvāmī. I was present in the assembly of great sages who heard him speak to King Parīkṣit as the monarch sat fasting until death.

501.ldw:
etad vaḥ kathitaṁ viprāḥ
 kathanīyoru-karmaṇaḥ
māhātmyaṁ vāsudevasya
 sarvāśubha-vināśanam|
501.ldw_fc: etat ; vaḥ ; kathitam ; viprāḥ ; kathanīya ; uru-karmaṇaḥ ; māhātmyam ; vāsudevasya ; sarva-aśubha ; vināśanam
501.words_en_fc: this; to you; narrated; O brāhmaṇas; of Him who is most worthy of being described; and whose activities are very great; the glories; of Lord Vāsudeva; all inauspiciousness; which completely destroys.
501.yw_zh: 众位布茹阿玛纳啊，如此，我已向你们讲述了其超凡活动是最值得荣耀的至尊主华苏戴瓦的荣耀。这样的叙述可摧毁一切不吉祥。
501.yw_en: O brāhmaṇas, I have thus described to you the glories of the Supreme Lord Vāsudeva, whose extraordinary activities are most worthy of glorification. This narration destroys all that is inauspicious.

501.ldw:
ya etat śrāvayen nityaṁ
 yāma-kṣaṇam ananya-dhīḥ
ślokam ekaṁ tad-ardhaṁ vā
 pādaṁ pādārdham eva vā
śraddhāvān yo ’nuśṛṇuyāt
 punāty ātmānam eva saḥ|
501.ldw_fc: yaḥ ; etat ; śrāvayet ; nityam ; yāma-kṣaṇam ; ananya-dhīḥ ; ślokam ; ekam ; tat-ardham ; vā ; pādam ; pāda-ardham ; eva ; vā ; śraddhā-vān ; yaḥ ; anuśṛṇuyāt ; punāti ; ātmānam ; eva ; saḥ
501.words_en_fc: who; this; makes others hear; always; every hour and every minute; with undeviated attention; verse; one; half of that; or; a single line; half a line; indeed; or; with faith; who; hears from the proper source; purifies; his very self; indeed; he.
501.yw_zh: 时刻聚精会神吟诵这部文献，满怀信心地哪怕聆听一个或半个诗节，一行或半行，毋庸置疑，他自身便得到净化。
501.yw_en: One who with undeviating attention constantly recites this literature at every moment of every hour, as well as one who faithfully hears even one verse or half a verse or a single line or even half a line, certainly purifies his very self.

501.ldw:
dvādaśyām ekādaśyāṁ vā
 śṛṇvann āyuṣyavān bhavet
paṭhaty anaśnan prayataḥ
 pūto bhavati pātakāt|

501.words_en_fc: on the twelfth day of either fortnight of the month; on the auspicious eleventh day; or; hearing; possessed of long life; one becomes; if one recites; while refraining from eating; with careful attention; purified; one becomes; from sinful reactions.
501.yw_zh: 人在爱卡达西或杜瓦达西聆听这部《巴嘎瓦谭》，必保长命；戒食时全神贯注地吟诵《巴嘎瓦谭》，一切罪恶反应会洗涤殆尽。
501.yw_en: One who hears this Bhāgavatam on the Ekādaśī or Dvādaśī day is assured of long life, and one who recites it with careful attention while fasting is purified of all sinful reactions.

501.ldw:
puṣkare mathurāyāṁ ca
 dvāravatyāṁ yatātmavān
upoṣya saṁhitām etāṁ
 paṭhitvā mucyate bhayāt|

501.words_en_fc: at the holy place Puṣkara; at Mathurā; and; at Dvārakā; self-controlled; fasting; literature; this; reciting; one becomes freed; from fear.
501.yw_zh: 控制心意，在圣地菩施卡尔、玛图茹阿或杜瓦尔卡戒食，并且研习这部经典，必超脱一切恐惧。
501.yw_en: One who controls his mind, fasts at the holy places Puṣkara, Mathurā or Dvārakā, and studies this scripture will be freed from all fear.

501.ldw:
devatā munayaḥ siddhāḥ
 pitaro manavo nṛpāḥ
yacchanti kāmān gṛṇataḥ
 śṛṇvato yasya kīrtanāt|

501.words_en_fc: the demigods; the sages; the perfected yogīs; the forefathers; the progenitors of mankind; the kings of the earth; bestow; desires; to one who is chanting; or who is hearing; of which; because of the glorification.
501.yw_zh: 对通过吟诵或聆听这部普然那而荣耀之的人，半神人、圣哲、希达、琵塔、玛努和地球上的君王们会给予他们称心如意的一切。
501.yw_en: Upon the person who glorifies this Purāṇa by chanting or hearing it, the demigods, sages, Siddhas, Pitās, Manus and kings of the earth bestow all desirable things.

501.ldw:
ṛco yajūṁṣi sāmāni
 dvijo ’dhītyānuvindate
madhu-kulyā ghṛta-kulyāḥ
 payaḥ-kulyāś ca tat phalam|

501.words_en_fc: the mantras of the Ṛg Veda; those of the Yajur Veda; and those of the Sāma Veda; a brāhmaṇa; studying; obtains; rivers of honey; rivers of ghee; rivers of milk; and; that; fruit.
501.yw_zh: 通过研习这部《巴嘎瓦谭》，一位布茹阿玛纳能畅享通过研究《瑞歌·韦达》、《雅褚·韦达》和《萨玛·韦达》赞歌而得享的蜂蜜、酥油和牛奶之河。
501.yw_en: By studying this Bhāgavatam, a brāhmaṇa can enjoy the same rivers of honey, ghee and milk he enjoys by studying the hymns of the Ṛg, Yajur and Sāma Vedas.

501.ldw:
purāṇa-saṁhitām etām
 adhītya prayato dvijaḥ
proktaṁ bhagavatā yat tu
 tat padaṁ paramaṁ vrajet|

501.words_en_fc: essential compilation of all the Purāṇas; this; studying; carefully; a brāhmaṇa; described; by the Personality of Godhead; which; indeed; that; position; supreme; he attains.
501.yw_zh: 认真拜读这部所有普然那编纂物中的经典之作的布茹阿玛纳，将臻达至尊主在此描述过的至高目的地。
501.yw_en: A brāhmaṇa who diligently reads this essential compilation of all the Purāṇas will go to the supreme destination, which the Supreme Lord Himself has herein described.

501.ldw:
vipro ’dhītyāpnuyāt prajñāṁ
 rājanyodadhi-mekhalām
vaiśyo nidhi-patitvaṁ ca
 śūdraḥ śudhyeta pātakāt|
