501.words_en_fc: a brāhmaṇa; studying; achieves; intelligence in devotional service; a king; (the earth) bounded by the seas; a businessman; of treasures; lordship; and; a worker; becomes purified; from sinful reactions.
501.yw_zh: 布茹阿玛纳研习《巴嘎瓦谭》会获得从事奉献服务的坚定智慧，君王研习之会享有统治地球的权柄，外夏研习之会取得巨大的财富，舒陀研习之会超脱种种罪恶反应。
501.yw_en: A brāhmaṇa who studies the Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam achieves firm intelligence in devotional service, a king who studies it gains sovereignty over the earth, a vaiśya acquires great treasure and a śūdra is freed from sinful reactions.

501.ldw:
kali-mala-saṁhati-kālano ’khileśo
 harir itaratra na gīyate hy abhīkṣṇam
iha tu punar bhagavān aśeṣa-mūrtiḥ
 paripaṭhito ’nu-padaṁ kathā-prasaṅgaiḥ|
501.ldw_fc: kali ; mala-saṁhati ; kālanaḥ ; akhila-īśaḥ ; hariḥ ; itaratra ; na gīyate ; hi ; abhīkṣṇam ; iha ; tu ; punaḥ ; bhagavān ; aśeṣa-mūrtiḥ ; paripaṭhitaḥ ; anu-padam ; kathā-prasaṅgaiḥ
501.words_en_fc: of the age of quarrel; of all the contamination; the annihilator; the supreme controller of all beings; Lord Hari; elsewhere; is not described; indeed; constantly; here; however; on the other hand; the Personality of Godhead; who expands in unlimited personal forms; is openly described in narration; in each and every verse; on the pretext of stories.
501.yw_zh: 主哈尔依，一切众生的至尊控制者，摧毁卡历年代经年堆积的罪恶，然而，其他文献却不常荣耀他。但是，那位以他的无数人格形体显现的至尊人格首神，充分而不间断地在这整部《巴嘎瓦谭》被得以详尽描述。
501.yw_en: Lord Hari, the supreme controller of all beings, annihilates the accumulated sins of the Kali age, yet other literatures do not constantly glorify Him. But that Supreme Personality of Godhead, appearing in His innumerable personal expansions, is abundantly and constantly described throughout the various narrations of this Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam.

501.ldw:
tam aham ajam anantam ātma-tattvaṁ
 jagad-udaya-sthiti-saṁyamātma-śaktim
dyu-patibhir aja-śakra-śaṅkarādyair
 duravasita-stavam acyutaṁ nato ’smi|
501.ldw_fc: tam ; aham ; ajam ; anantam ; ātma-tattvam ; jagat ; udaya ; sthiti ; saṁyama ; ātma-śaktim ; dyu-patibhiḥ ; aja-śakra-śaṅkara-ādyaiḥ ; duravasita ; stavam ; acyutam ; nataḥ ; asmi
501.words_en_fc: to Him; I; to the unborn; the unlimited; the original Supersoul; of the material universe; the creation; maintenance; and destruction; by whose personal energies; by the masters of heaven; headed by Brahmā, Indra and Śiva; incomprehensible; whose praises; to the infallible Supreme Lord; bowed down; I am.
501.yw_zh: 我叩首顶拜那位不经出生仍存在、无穷无尽的至尊灵魂，他的个人能量引起物质宇宙的创造、维系和毁灭。就连布茹阿玛、因陀、商卡尔和天堂星球的其他神明都不能彻底明白永不犯错的人格首神的荣耀。
501.yw_en: I bow down to that unborn and infinite Supreme Soul, whose personal energies effect the creation, maintenance and destruction of the material universe. Even Brahmā, Indra, Śaṅkara and the other lords of the heavenly planets cannot fathom the glories of that infallible Personality of Godhead.

501.ldw:
upacita-nava-śaktibhiḥ sva ātmany
 uparacita-sthira-jaṅgamālayāya
bhagavata upalabdhi-mātra-dhamne
 sura-ṛṣabhāya namaḥ sanātanāya|
501.ldw_fc: upacita ; nava-śaktibhiḥ ; sve ātmani ; uparacita ; sthira jaṅgama ; ālayāya ; bhagavate ; upalabhdhi-mātra ; dhāmne ; sura ; ṛṣabhāya ; namaḥ ; sanātanāya
501.words_en_fc: fully developed; by His nine energies (prakṛti, puruṣa, mahat, false ego and the five subtle forms of perception); within Himself; arranged in proximity; of both the nonmoving and the moving living beings; the abode; to the Supreme Personality of Godhead; pure consciousness; whose manifestation; of deities; the chief; my obeisances; to the eternal Lord.
501.yw_zh: 我向至尊人格首神顶礼膜拜，他是永恒的主，所有其他神祇的领袖，他通过运用他的九种物质能量，在他自身之内安排了一切动与不动的生物的居所，他永远稳处在纯粹而超然的知觉中。
501.yw_en: I offer my obeisances to the Supreme Personality of Godhead, who is the eternal Lord and the leader of all other deities, who by evolving His nine material energies has arranged within Himself the abode of all moving and nonmoving creatures, and who is always situated in pure, transcendental consciousness.

501.ldw:
sva-sukha-nibhṛta-cetās tad-vyudastānya-bhāvo
 ’py ajita-rucira-līlākṛṣṭa-sāras tadīyam
vyatanuta kṛpayā yas tattva-dīpaṁ purāṇaṁ
 tam akhila-vṛjina-ghnaṁ vyāsa-sūnuṁ nato ’smi|
501.ldw_fc: sva-sukha ; nibhṛta ; cetāḥ ; tat ; vyudasta ; anya-bhāvaḥ ; api ; ajita ; rucira ; līlā ; ākṛṣṭa ; sāraḥ ; tadīyam ; vyatanuta ; kṛpayā ; yaḥ ; tattva-dīpam ; purāṇam ; tam ; akhila-vṛjina-ghnam ; vyāsa-sūnum ; nataḥ asmi
501.words_en_fc: in the happiness of the self; solitary; whose consciousness; because of that; given up; any other type of consciousness; although; of Śrī Kṛṣṇa, the unconquerable Lord; pleasing; by the pastimes; attracted; whose heart; consisting of the activities of the Lord; spread, manifested; mercifully; who; the bright light of the Absolute Truth; the Purāṇa (Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam); unto Him; defeating everything inauspicious; son of Vyāsadeva; I offer my obeisances.
501.yw_zh: 让我向我的灵性导师，维亚萨戴瓦之子，舒卡戴瓦·哥斯瓦米，致以虔敬的顶拜。是他击败此间宇宙中不吉祥的一切。尽管起初他沉浸在布茹阿曼觉悟的快乐中，住在僻静之处，舍弃所有其它类型的知觉意识，但后来越来越为圣主奎师那令人愉悦、妙不可言的逍遥时光所吸引。故而，他仁慈地讲述了这部至高无上的普然那，即辉煌的绝对真理之光，描述主的活动的《施瑞玛德·巴嘎瓦谭》。
501.yw_en: Let me offer my respectful obeisances unto my spiritual master, the son of Vyāsadeva, Śukadeva Gosvāmī. It is he who defeats all inauspicious things within this universe. Although in the beginning he was absorbed in the happiness of Brahman realization and was living in a secluded place, giving up all other types of consciousness, he became attracted by the pleasing, most melodious pastimes of Lord Śrī Kṛṣṇa. He therefore mercifully spoke this supreme Purāṇa, Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam, which is the bright light of the Absolute Truth and which describes the activities of the Lord.
501.yz_zh: 若不向舒卡戴瓦•勾斯瓦米及其传系中的其他伟大阿査尔亚致以虔敬的顶拜，则无法获得深入了解《施瑞玛德-巴嘎瓦谭》的超然真意的特权。
501.yz_en:
Without offering respectful obeisances to Śukadeva Gosvāmī and other great ācāryas in his line, one cannot possibly gain the privilege of entering into the deep transcendental meaning of Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam.

Thus end the purports of the humble servants of His Divine Grace A.C. Bhaktivedanta Swami Prabhupāda to the Twelfth Canto, Twelfth Chapter, of the Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam, entitled “The Topics of Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam Summarized.”

502.ldw:
sūta uvāca|yaṁ brahmā varuṇendra-rudra-marutaḥ stunvanti divyaiḥ stavair
 vedaiḥ sāṅga-pada-kramopaniṣadair gāyanti yaṁ sāma-gāḥ
dhyānāvasthita-tad-gatena manasā paśyanti yaṁ yogino
 yasyāntaṁ na viduḥ surāsura-gaṇā devāya tasmai namaḥ|
502.ldw_fc: sūtaḥ uvāca ; yam ; brahmā ; varuṇa-indra-rudra-marutaḥ ; stunvanti ; divyaiḥ ; stavaiḥ ; vedaiḥ ; sa ; aṅga ; pada-krama ; upaniṣadaiḥ ; gāyanti ; yam ; sāma-gāḥ ; dhyāna ; avasthita ; tat-gatena ; manasā ; paśyanti ; yam ; yoginaḥ ; yasya ; antam ; na viduḥ ; sura-asura-gaṇāḥ ; devāya ; tasmai ; namaḥ
502.words_en_fc: Sūta Gosvāmī said; whom; Lord Brahmā; as well as Varuṇa, Indra, Rudra and the Maruts; praise; with transcendental; prayers; with the Vedas; along with; the corollary branches; the special sequential arrangement of mantras; and the Upaniṣads; they sing about; whom; the singers of the Sāma Veda; in meditative trance; situated; which is fixed upon Him; within the mind; they see; whom; the mystic yogīs; whose; end; they do not know; all the demigods and demons; to the Supreme Personality of Godhead; to Him; obeisances.
502.yw_zh: 苏塔·哥斯瓦米说：向布茹阿玛、瓦茹那、因陀、茹卓和众玛茹特通过唱颂超然赞歌，吟诵韦达经及其推论和诸多pada.krama与乌帕尼沙德所歌颂的那位，《萨玛·韦达》的吟诵者始终颂扬的那位，完美的瑜伽师们专注地在神定中所冥想并在他们的心中所看到的那位，任何半神人与恶魔永远都无法找到其极限的那位——向那位至尊人格首神，我致以卑微的顶拜。
502.yw_en: Sūta Gosvāmī said: Unto that personality whom Brahmā, Varuṇa, Indra, Rudra and the Maruts praise by chanting transcendental hymns and reciting the Vedas with all their corollaries, pada-kramas and Upaniṣads, to whom the chanters of the Sāma Veda always sing, whom the perfected yogīs see within their minds after fixing themselves in trance and absorbing themselves within Him, and whose limit can never be found by any demigod or demon — unto that Supreme Personality of Godhead I offer my humble obeisances.

502.ldw:
pṛṣṭhe bhrāmyad amanda-mandara-giri-grāvāgra-kaṇḍūyanān
 nidrāloḥ kamaṭhākṛter bhagavataḥ śvāsānilāḥ pāntu vaḥ
yat-saṁskāra-kalānuvartana-vaśād velā-nibhenāmbhasāṁ
 yātāyātam atandritaṁ jala-nidher nādyāpi viśrāmyati|
502.ldw_fc: pṛṣṭhe ; bhrāmyat ; amanda ; mandara-giri ; grāva-agra ; kaṇḍūyanāt ; nidrāloḥ ; kamaṭha-ākṛteḥ ; bhagavataḥ ; śvāsa ; anilāḥ ; pāntu ; vaḥ ; yat ; saṁskāra ; kalā ; anuvartana-vaśāt ; velā-nibhena ; ambhasām ; yāta-āyātam ; atandritam ; jala-nidheḥ ; na ; adya api ; viśrāmyati
502.words_en_fc: upon His back; rotating; most heavy; of Mandara Mountain; by the edges of the stones; by the scratching; who became sleepy; in the form of a tortoise; of the Supreme Personality of Godhead; coming from the breathing; the winds; may they protect; all of you; of which; of the remnants; the traces; as the effect of following; by that which resembles the flow; of the water; the coming and going; ceaseless; of the ocean; does not; even today; stop.
502.yw_zh: 当至尊人格首神以龟的形体显现为主库尔玛，他驮着被旋转的曼达尔巨山，脊背受到锋利石头的搔抓，故而主昏昏欲睡。愿你们全被主在这种睡眠状态中呼吸时产生的气流保护着。自那以后，甚至时至今日，海洋的潮汐一直效仿主神圣地吸入呼出。
502.yw_en: When the Supreme Personality of Godhead appeared as Lord Kūrma, a tortoise, His back was scratched by the sharp-edged stones lying on massive, whirling Mount Mandara, and this scratching made the Lord sleepy. May you all be protected by the winds caused by the Lord’s breathing in this sleepy condition. Ever since that time, even up to the present day, the ocean tides have imitated the Lord’s inhalation and exhalation by piously coming in and going out.
502.yz_zh: 有时，我们在痒的部位轻轻吹气以缓解瘙痒的感觉。同样，施瑞拉•巴克提希丹塔•萨茹阿斯瓦提•塔库尔解释说，至尊人格首神的呼吸能解除心智推敲者心意中的瘙痒感，还能缓解沉迷于感官享乐的受条件限制灵魂的物质感官的瘙痒。如此，通过冥思主库尔玛一神龟化身——清风般的呼吸，各种受条件限制灵魂就能排解物貭存在的缺陷，臻至解脱的灵性层面。人必须完全让主库本玛的逍遥时光像沁人心脾的和风吹入心房，如此必感受到灵性的平和。
502.yz_en: At times we alleviate an itching sensation by blowing upon it. Similarly, Śrīla Bhaktisiddhānta Sarasvatī Ṭhākura explains, the breathing of the Supreme Personality of Godhead can alleviate the itching sensation within the minds of mental speculators, as well as the itching of the material senses of conditioned souls engaged in sense gratification. Thus by meditating on the windy breath of Lord Kūrma — the tortoise incarnation — all categories of conditioned souls can be relieved of the deficiencies of material existence and come to the liberated, spiritual platform. One must simply allow the pastimes of Lord Kūrma to blow within one’s heart like a favorable breeze; then one will surely find spiritual peace.

502.ldw_fc: purāṇa ; saṅkhyā ; sambhūtim ; asya ; vācya ; prayojane ; dānam ; dānasya ; māhātmyam ; pāṭha-ādeḥ ; ca ; nibodhata
502.words_en_fc: of the Purāṇas; of the counting (of verses); the summation; of this Bhāgavatam; the subject matter; and the purpose; the method of giving as a gift; of such gift-giving; the glories; of teaching and so on; and; please hear.
502.yw_zh: 现在，请听我总结每部普然那有多少诗节。然后，请听我讲述这部巴嘎瓦塔·普然那的主题与要义，派发这份礼物的正确方式与荣耀，以及聆听和吟诵这部文献的荣耀。
502.yw_en: Now please hear a summation of the verse length of each of the Purāṇas. Then hear of the prime subject and purpose of this Bhāgavata Purāṇa, the proper method of giving it as a gift, the glories of such gift-giving, and finally the glories of hearing and chanting this literature.
502.yz_zh: 《族瑞玛德-巴嘎瓦谭》是最佳的普然那。施瑞拉•维施瓦纳塔•恰夸瓦尔提·塔库尔说明，这里提到的其他普然那就像描述国王的得力助手，一说起国王的荣耀就会谈到他们。
502.yz_en: Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam is the best of all Purāṇas. Śrīla Viśvanātha Cakravartī Ṭhākura explains that the other Purāṇas will now be mentioned just as the assistants of a king are mentioned in connection with his glorification.

502.ldw:
brāhmaṁ daśa sahasrāṇi
 pādmaṁ pañcona-ṣaṣṭi ca
śrī-vaiṣṇavaṁ trayo-viṁśac
 catur-viṁśati śaivakam|daśāṣṭau śrī-bhāgavataṁ
 nāradaṁ pañca-viṁśati
mārkaṇḍaṁ nava vāhnaṁ ca
 daśa-pañca catuḥ-śatam|catur-daśa bhaviṣyaṁ syāt
 tathā pañca-śatāni ca
daśāṣṭau brahma-vaivartaṁ
 laiṅgam ekādaśaiva tu|catur-viṁśati vārāham

502.yw_zh: 《布茹阿玛·普然那》有一万个诗节，《帕德玛普然那》有五万五千个诗节，《希瓦 普然那》有二万五千个，《施瑞玛德·巴嘎瓦谭》有一万八千。《拿茹阿达 普然那》有二万五千个诗节，《玛尔康戴亚 普然那》九千个，《阿格尼 普然那》有一万五千个，《巴维夏 普然那》有一万四千五百个，《布茹阿玛·外瓦尔塔 普然那》有一万八千个，《灵嘎 普然那》有一万一千个。《瓦茹阿哈 普然那》有二四千个诗节，《斯堪达 普然那》有八万一千一百个，《瓦玛纳 普然那》有一万个，《库玛尔 普然那》有一万七千个，《玛蒋亚 普然那》有一万四千个，《嘎茹达 普然那》有一万九千个，《布茹阿曼达 普然那》有一万二千个诗节。如此，所有普然那的诗节总数是四十万。再重复一遍，其中有一万八千个诗节组成美妙的《巴嘎瓦谭》。
502.yw_en: The Brahma Purāṇa consists of ten thousand verses, the Padma Purāṇa of fifty-five thousand, Śrī Viṣṇu Purāṇa of twenty-three thousand, the Śiva Purāṇa of twenty-four thousand and Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam of eighteen thousand. The Nārada Purāṇa has twenty-five thousand verses, the Mārkaṇḍeya Purāṇa nine thousand, the Agni Purāṇa fifteen thousand four hundred, the Bhaviṣya Purāṇa fourteen thousand five hundred, the Brahma-vaivarta Purāṇa eighteen thousand and the Liṅga Purāṇa eleven thousand. The Varāha Purāṇa contains twenty-four thousand verses, the Skanda Purāṇa eighty-one thousand one hundred, the Vāmana Purāṇa ten thousand, the Kūrma Purāṇa seventeen thousand, the Matsya Purāṇa fourteen thousand, the Garuḍa Purāṇa nineteen thousand and the Brahmāṇḍa Purāṇa twelve thousand. Thus the total number of verses in all the Purāṇas is four hundred thousand. Eighteen thousand of these, once again, belong to the beautiful Bhāgavatam.
502.yz_zh:
施瑞拉•吉瓦•勾斯瓦米如下引述《玛茨亚 普然那》：

astadasa puranani

krtva satyavati-sutah

bharatakhyanam akhilam

cakre tad-upabrmhitam

laksanaikena tat proktam

vedartha-paribrmhitam

valmikinapi yat proktam

ramopakhyanam uttamam

Brahmanabhihitam rac ca

sata-koti-pravistarat

ahrtya naradenaiva

valmikaya punah punah

valmikina ca lokesu

dharma-kamartha-sadhanam

evam sa-padah pancaite

laksas tesu prakirtitah

“在编撰了十八部普然那之后，维亚萨戴瓦，萨提亚瓦提之子，撰著了涵盖全部普然那之精要的整部《玛哈巴阿》。它有十万多个诗节，文中饱含韦达经的所有理念。还有，瓦勒弥克依叙述的主茹阿玛禅铎的逍遥时光一叙述原本由主布茹阿玛讲述，有十亿个诗节。后来，这部《茹阿玛亚纳》由拿茹阿达槪述给瓦勒弥克依，后者将其传授给人类，如此，人类便能实现宗教、感官享乐和经济发展的目标，因此，在人类社会广为流传的所有普然那和伊提哈萨（历史)的诗节总数是525，000。”

施瑞拉•维施瓦纳塔•恰夸瓦尔提•塔库尔指出，在这部著作的第一篇第三章，当苏塔•勾斯瓦米罗列出首神的诸多化身后，他添了一句诗文krsnas tu bhagavan svayam:【SB1.3.28】“但是，奎师那是原始人格首神。”同样，在提及全部普然那之后，施瑞•苏塔•勾斯瓦米再次提到《施瑞玛德-巴嘎瓦谭》，以强调它是最重要的普然那。
502.yz_en:
Śrīla Jīva Gosvāmī has quoted from the Matsya Purāṇa as follows:

aṣṭādaśa purāṇāni
 kṛtvā satyavatī-sutaḥ
bhāratākhyānam akhilaṁ
 cakre tad-upabṛṁhitam

lakṣaṇaikena tat proktaṁ
 vedārtha-paribṛṁhitam
vālmīkināpi yat proktaṁ
 rāmopakhyānam uttamam

brahmaṇābhihitaṁ tac ca
 śata-koṭi-pravistarāt
āhṛtya nāradenaiva
 vālmīkāya punaḥ punaḥ

vālmīkinā ca lokeṣu
 dharma-kāmārtha-sādhanam
evaṁ sa-pādāḥ pañcaite
 lakṣās teṣu prakīṛtitāḥ

“After compiling the eighteen Purāṇas, Vyāsadeva, the son of Satyavatī, composed the entire Mahābhārata, which contains the essence of all the Purāṇas. It consists of over one hundred thousand verses and is filled with all the ideas of the Vedas. There is also the account of the pastimes of Lord Rāmacandra, spoken by Vālmīki — an account originally related by Lord Brahmā in one billion verses. That Rāmāyaṇa was later summarized by Nārada and related to Vālmīki, who further presented it to mankind so that human beings could attain the goals of religiosity, sense gratification and economic development. The total number of verses in all the Purāṇas and itihāsas (histories) is thus known in human society to amount to 525,000.”

Śrīla Viśvanātha Cakravartī Ṭhākura points out that in the First Canto, Third Chapter, of this work, after Sūta Gosvāmī lists the incarnations of Godhead, he adds the special phrase kṛṣṇas tu bhagavān svayam: “But Kṛṣṇa is the original Personality of Godhead.” Similarly, after mentioning all of the Purāṇas, Śrī Suta Gosvāmī again mentions the Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam to emphasize that it is the chief of all Purāṇic literatures.

502.ldw_fc: idam ; bhagavatā ; pūrvam ; brahmaṇe ; nābhi-paṅkaje ; sthitāya ; bhava ; bhītāya ; kāruṇyāt ; samprakāśitam
502.words_en_fc: this; by the Supreme Personality of Godhead; first; to Brahmā; upon the lotus growing from the navel; who was situated; of material existence; who was fearful; out of mercy; was fully revealed.
502.yw_zh: 至尊人格首神把《施瑞玛德·巴嘎瓦谭》首先充分揭示给主布茹阿玛。那时，布茹阿玛对物质存在感到害怕，正坐在一朵从主的肚脐长出的莲花上。
502.yw_en: It was to Lord Brahmā that the Supreme Personality of Godhead first revealed the Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam in full. At the time, Brahmā, frightened by material existence, was sitting on the lotus flower that had grown from the Lord’s navel.
502.yz_zh:
在此间宇宙被得以创造之前主奎师那把《施瑞玛德-巴嘎瓦谭》的知识传授给了布茹阿玛，正如这里的purvam—词说明的。而且，《巴嘎瓦谭》的第一节诗说tene brahma hrda ya adikavaye:【SB1.1.1】“主奎师那把这完美的知识扩展到布茹阿玛的内心。”因为受条件限制灵魂能亲身体验到的只是各种被创造、维系和毁灭的短暂实体，他们难以明白《施瑞玛德-巴嘎瓦谭》是一部永恒的超然文献，跟绝对真理没有不同。

“正如《蒙达卡 乌帕尼沙德》（1.1.1)所言：

brahma devanam prathamah sambabhuva

visvasya karta bhuvanasya gopta

sa brahma-vidyam sarva-vidya-pratistham

atharvaya jyestha-putraya praha

“在全体半神人中，布茹阿玛第一个诞生。他是此间宇宙的创造者兼保护者。他把关于自我的灵性科学，即所有其他知识支脉的基础，传授给了他的长子阿塔尔瓦。”然而，尽管他的地位崇高，他仍惧怕主的迷幻能量的影响。所以，这一能量似乎简直难以克服。但是，主柴坦尼亚是如此亲切仁慈，当他在印度东部和南部传教时，他向每个人免费地派发奎师那知觉，促使他们成为教授《巴嘎瓦德-歌依塔》的导师。主柴坦尼亚，即奎师那本人，激励人们说，“我命令你们成为传播主奎师那的讯息的导师，拯救这片国土。我向你们保证，玛亚的浪潮决不会阻止你们的进程。”(Cc.玛迪亚7.128)

如果我们摈弃一切罪恶活动，恒常地从事柴坦尼亚•玛哈帕布的桑克依坦运动，我们的生活和传教活动必功成圆满。
502.yz_en:
Lord Kṛṣṇa enlightened Brahmā with the knowledge of Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam before the creation of this universe, as indicated here by the word pūrvam. Also, the first verse of the Bhāgavatam states, tene brahma hṛdā ya ādi-kavaye: “Lord Kṛṣṇa expanded perfect knowledge into the heart of Lord Brahmā.” Because conditioned souls can experience only temporary objects, which are created, maintained and destroyed, they cannot readily understand that Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam is an eternal, transcendental literature nondifferent from the Absolute Truth.

As stated in the Muṇḍaka Upaniṣad (1.1.1):

brahmā devānāṁ prathamaḥ sambabhūva
 viśvasya kartā bhuvanasya goptā
sa brahma-vidyāṁ sarva-vidyā-pratiṣṭhām
 atharvāya jyeṣṭha-putrāya prāha

“Among all the demigods, Brahmā was the first to take birth. He is the creator of this universe and also its protector. To his eldest son, Atharvā, He instructed the spiritual science of the self, which is the basis of all other branches of knowledge.” Despite his exalted position, however, Brahmā still fears the influence of the Lord’s illusory potency. Thus this energy seems virtually insurmountable. But Lord Caitanya is so kind that during His missionary activities in eastern and southern India, He freely distributed Kṛṣṇa consciousness to everyone, urging them to become teachers of Bhagavad-gītā. Lord Caitanya, who is Kṛṣṇa Himself, encouraged the people by saying, “By My order just become a teacher of Lord Kṛṣṇa’s message and save this country. I assure you that the waves of māyā will never stop your progress.” (Cc. Madhya 7.128)

If we give up all sinful activities and engage constantly in the saṅkīrtana movement of Caitanya Mahāprabhu, victory is assured in our personal lives and also in our missionary efforts.

502.ldw_fc: ādi ; madhya ; avasāneṣu ; vairāgya ; ākhyāna ; saṁyutam ; hari-līlā ; kathā-vrāta ; amṛta ; ānandita ; sat-suram ; sarva-vedānta ; sāram ; yat ; brahma ; ātma-ekatva ; lakṣaṇam ; vastu ; advitīyam ; tat-niṣṭham ; kaivalya ; eka ; prayojanam
502.words_en_fc: in the beginning; the middle; and the end; concerning renunciation of material things; with narrations; full; of the pastimes of Lord Hari; of the many discussions; by the nectar; in which are made ecstatic; the saintly devotees and demigods; of all the Vedānta; the essence; which; the Absolute Truth; in terms of nondifference from the spirit soul; characterized; the reality; one without a second; having that as its prime subject matter; exclusive devotional service; the only; ultimate goal.
502.yw_zh: 《施瑞玛德·巴嘎瓦谭》至始至终充盈着激励人对物质生活心怀弃绝精神的叙述，充满对主哈尔依的超然逍遥时光甘露般的描述，这使圣洁的奉献者和半神人欣喜若狂。这部《巴嘎瓦谭》是所有韦丹塔哲学的精髓，因为其主题是绝对真理，亦即跟灵魂无二无别且独一无二的终极真相。这部文献的目标是对至尊真理纯一的奉献服务。
502.yw_en: From beginning to end, the Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam is full of narrations that encourage renunciation of material life, as well as nectarean accounts of Lord Hari’s transcendental pastimes, which give ecstasy to the saintly devotees and demigods. This Bhāgavatam is the essence of all Vedānta philosophy because its subject matter is the Absolute Truth, which, while nondifferent from the spirit soul, is the ultimate reality, one without a second. The goal of this literature is exclusive devotional service unto that Supreme Truth.
502.yz_zh: Vairagya，弃绝，意味着摈弃跟绝对真理无关的一切。圣洁的奉献者和半神人热衷于主的灵性逍遥时光的甘露，即一切韦达知识的精华。韦达知识强调一切物质短暂易逝，从而巧妙地否定物质决非终极真相。终极目标是vastu，真实的实体，这实体是独一无二的。独一无二的绝对真理是一个超然的人，远远超然于物质范畴和在我们这个苍白的物质世界中所发现的人物特征之上。因此，《施瑞玛德-巴嘎瓦谭》的终极目标是训练真诚的读者，使其培养对首神的爱。主奎师那因其永恒超然的品质而可爱之极。这世界的美乃是主无限美丽的模糊倒影。《施瑞玛德-巴嘎瓦谭》毫不妥协、持续不断地宣扬绝对真理的荣耀，故而是至髙无上的灵性文献，能使人在全然的奎师那知觉中充分品尝对奎师那之爱的甘露。
502.yz_en: Vairāgya, renunciation, means giving up everything that has no relation with the Absolute Truth. Saintly devotees and demigods are enthused by the nectar of the Lord’s spiritual pastimes, which are the essence of all Vedic knowledge. Vedic knowledge elaborately negates the ultimate reality of material things by emphasizing their temporary, fleeting existence. The ultimate goal is vastu, the factual substance, which is advitīyam, one without a second. That unique Absolute Truth is a transcendental person far beyond the mundane categories and characteristics of personality found in our pale material world. Thus the ultimate goal of Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam is to train the sincere reader in love of Godhead. Lord Kṛṣṇa is supremely lovable because of His eternal, transcendental qualities. The beauty of this world is a dim reflection of the unlimited beauty of the Lord. Without compromise, Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam persistently declares the glories of the Absolute Truth and is therefore the supreme spiritual literature, awarding a full taste of the nectar of love of Kṛṣṇa in full Kṛṣṇa consciousness.

502.ldw_fc: prauṣṭhapadyām ; paurṇamāsyām ; hema-siṁha ; samanvitam ; dadāti ; yaḥ ; bhāgavatam ; saḥ ; yāti ; paramām ; gatim
502.words_en_fc: in the month of Bhādra; on the full-moon day; upon a golden throne; seated; gives as a gift; who; Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam; he; goes; to the supreme; destination.
502.yw_zh: 如果在巴卓月的满月那日，把《施瑞玛德·巴嘎瓦谭》置于金制的御座上，将其视作礼物派发，便会到达至高的超然目的地。
502.yw_en: If on the full moon day of the month of Bhādra one places Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam on a golden throne and gives it as a gift, he will attain the supreme transcendental destination.
502.yz_zh: 应该把《施瑞玛德-巴嘎瓦谭》放在黄金宝座上，因为它是一切文献之王。在巴卓月的满月那天，被比喻为这部文献之王的太阳，处在狮子星座中，看似仿佛伫立在王座上。（按照星相学，太阳在狮子星座备受尊崇）。因此，可以毫无保留地岽拜至尊宝典《施瑞玛德-巴嘎瓦谭》。
502.yz_en: One should place Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam on a golden throne because it is the king of all literature. On the full-moon day of the month of Bhādra, the sun, which is compared to this king of literatures, is present in the constellation Leo and looks as if raised up on a royal throne. (According to astrology, the sun is said to be exalted in the sign of Leo). Thus one may unreservedly worship Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam, the supreme divine scripture.

502.ldw:
rājante tāvad anyāni
 purāṇāni satāṁ gaṇe
yāvad bhāgavataṁ naiva
 śrūyate ’mṛta-sāgaram|
502.ldw_fc: rājante ; tāvat ; anyāni ; purāṇāni ; satām ; gaṇe ; yāvat ; bhāgavatam ; na ; eva ; śrūyate ; amṛta-sāgaram
502.words_en_fc: they shine forth; that long; the other; Purāṇas; of saintly persons; in the assembly; as long as; Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam; not; indeed; is heard; the great ocean of nectar.
502.yw_zh: 只有在巨大的甘露之洋《施瑞玛德·巴嘎瓦谭》尚未被聆听到，所有其他普然那典籍才会熠熠闪耀在奉献者圣人的集会中。
502.yw_en: All other Purāṇic scriptures shine forth in the assembly of saintly devotees only as long as that great ocean of nectar, Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam, is not heard.
502.yz_zh: 其他韦达文献和世间的其他经典会保持强势，直到《施瑞玛德-巴嘎瓦谭》被得以恰当聆听与理解。《施瑞玛德-巴嘎瓦谭》是甘露之洋，至尊宝典。通过充满信心地聆听、吟诵和派发《施瑞玛德-巴嘎瓦谭》，世人将受到净化，其他次要文献便相形见拙。
502.yz_en: Other Vedic literatures and other scriptures of the world remain prominent until the Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam is duly heard and understood. Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam is the ocean of nectar and the supreme literature. By faithful hearing, recitation and distribution of Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam, the world will be sanctified and other, inferior literatures will fade to minor status.

502.ldw_fc: sarva-vedānta ; sāram ; hi ; śrī-bhāgavatam ; iṣyate ; tat ; rasa-amṛta ; tṛptasya ; na ; anyatra ; syāt ; ratiḥ ; kvacit
502.words_en_fc: of all Vedānta philosophy; the essence; indeed; Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam; is said to be; of it; by the nectarean taste; for one who is satisfied; not; elsewhere; there is; attraction; ever.
502.yw_zh: 《施瑞玛德·巴嘎瓦谭》被断言是全部韦丹塔哲学的精髓。品尝到其甘露滋味的人感到心满意足，永不被任何其他文献吸引。
502.yw_en: Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam is declared to be the essence of all Vedānta philosophy. One who has felt satisfaction from its nectarean mellow will never be attracted to any other literature.

502.ldw:
nimna-gānāṁ yathā gaṅgā
 devānām acyuto yathā
vaiṣṇavānāṁ yathā śambhuḥ
 purāṇānām idam tathā|
502.ldw_fc: nimna-gānām ; yathā ; gaṅgā ; devānām ; acyutaḥ ; yathā ; vaiṣṇavānām ; yathā ; śambhuḥ ; purāṇānām ; idam ; tathā
502.words_en_fc: of rivers flowing down to the sea; as; the Ganges; of all deities; the infallible Supreme Personality of Godhead; as; of devotees of Lord Viṣṇu; as; Śiva; of Purāṇas; this; similarly.
502.yw_zh: 就像恒河是百川之最，主阿丘塔是至尊神祇，主商布（希瓦）最伟大的外史那瓦，《施瑞玛德·巴嘎瓦谭》是最了不起的普然那。
502.yw_en: Just as the Gaṅgā is the greatest of all rivers, Lord Acyuta the supreme among deities and Lord Śambhu [Śiva] the greatest of Vaiṣṇavas, so Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam is the greatest of all Purāṇas.

502.ldw:
kṣetrāṇāṁ caiva sarveṣāṁ
 yathā kāśī hy anuttamā
tathā purāṇa-vrātānāṁ
 śrīmad-bhāgavataṁ dvijāḥ|
502.ldw_fc: kṣetrāṇām ; ca ; eva ; sarveṣām ; yathā ; kāśī ; hi ; anuttamā ; tathā ; purāṇa-vrātānām ; śrīmat-bhāgavatam ; dvijāḥ
502.words_en_fc: of holy places; and; indeed; of all; as; Benares; indeed; unexcelled; thus; of all the Purāṇas; Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam; O brāhmaṇas.
502.yw_zh: 众位布茹阿玛纳啊，同样，正如卡西城堡是圣地中无与伦比的，《施瑞玛德·巴嘎瓦谭》是所有普然那中至高无上的。
502.yw_en: O brāhmaṇas, in the same way that the city of Kāśī is unexcelled among holy places, Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam is supreme among all the Purāṇas.

502.ldw:
śrīmad-bhāgavataṁ purāṇam amalaṁ yad vaiṣṇavānāṁ priyaṁ
 yasmin pāramahaṁsyam ekam amalaṁ jñānaṁ paraṁ gīyate
tatra jñāna-virāga-bhakti-sahitaṁ naiṣkarmyam āviskṛtaṁ
 tac chṛṇvan su-paṭhan vicāraṇa-paro bhaktyā vimucyen naraḥ|
502.ldw_fc: śrīmat-bhāgavatam ; purāṇam ; amalam ; yat ; vaiṣṇavānām ; priyam ; yasmin ; pāramahaṁsyam ; ekam ; amalam ; jñānam ; param ; gīyate ; tatra ; jñāna-virāga-bhakti-sahitam ; naiṣkarmyam ; āviṣkṛtam ; tat ; śṛṇvan ; su-paṭhan ; vicāraṇa-paraḥ ; bhaktyā ; vimucyet ; naraḥ
502.words_en_fc: Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam; the Purāṇa; perfectly pure; which; to the Vaiṣṇavas; most dear; in which; attainable by the topmost devotees; exclusive; perfectly pure; knowledge; supreme; is sung; there; together with knowledge, renunciation and devotion; freedom from all material work; is revealed; that; hearing; properly chanting; who is serious about understanding; with devotion; becomes totally liberated; a person.
502.yw_zh: 《施瑞玛德·巴嘎瓦谭》是毫无瑕疵的普然那。它是外史那瓦们的至爱，因为它讲述帕茹阿玛航萨至纯至粹的知识。这部《巴嘎瓦谭》揭示超脱一切物质活动的方式，以及有关超然知识、弃绝和奉爱的程序。人若认真努力了解《施瑞玛德·巴嘎瓦谭》并怀着奉爱正确地聆听和吟诵，会变得彻底超脱。
502.yw_en: Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam is the spotless Purāṇa. It is most dear to the Vaiṣṇavas because it describes the pure and supreme knowledge of the paramahaṁsas. This Bhāgavatam reveals the means for becoming free from all material work, together with the processes of transcendental knowledge, renunciation and devotion. Anyone who seriously tries to understand Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam, who properly hears and chants it with devotion, becomes completely liberated.
502.yz_zh: 《施瑞玛德-巴嘎瓦谭》完全不受物质属性的污染，具备超凡的灵性之美，故而为主的奉献者所钟爱。Paramahamsyam一—词意指，就连完全解脱的灵魂都热切渴望聆听和叙述《施瑞玛德-巴嘎瓦谭》。那些努力臻达解脱之境的人，应该忠诚地服务这部文献，满怀信心与奉爱地予以聆听、吟诵。
502.yz_en: Because Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam is completely free of contamination by the modes of nature, it is endowed with extraordinary spiritual beauty and is therefore dear to the pure devotees of the Lord. The word pāramahaṁsyam indicates that even completely liberated souls are eager to hear and narrate Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam. Those who are trying to be liberated should faithfully serve this literature by hearing and reciting it with faith and devotion.

502.ldw:
kasmai yena vibhāsito ’yam atulo jñāna-pradīpaḥ purā
 tad-rūpeṇa ca nāradāya munaye kṛṣṇāya tad-rūpiṇā
yogīndrāya tad-ātmanātha bhagavad-rātāya kāruṇyatas
 tac chuddhaṁ vimalaṁ viśokam amṛtaṁ satyaṁ paraṁ dhīmahi|
502.ldw_fc: kasmai ; yena ; vibhāsitaḥ ; ayam ; atulaḥ ; jñāna ; pradīpaḥ ; purā ; tat-rūpeṇa ; ca ; nāradāya ; munaye ; kṛṣṇāya ; tat-rūpiṇā ; yogi-indrāya ; tat-ātmanā ; atha ; bhagavat-rātāya ; kāruṇyataḥ ; tat ; śuddham ; vimalam ; viśokam ; amṛtam ; satyam ; param ; dhīmahi
502.words_en_fc: unto Brahmā; by whom; thoroughly revealed; this; incomparable; of transcendental knowledge; the torchlight; long ago; in the form of Brahmā; and; to Nārada; the great sage; to Kṛṣṇa-dvaipāyana Vyāsa; in the form of Nārada; to the best of yogīs, Śukadeva; as Nārada; then; to Parīkṣit Mahārāja; out of mercy; that; pure; uncontaminated; free from misery; immortal; upon the truth; supreme; I meditate.
502.yw_zh: 我冥想那位至纯至粹、毫无瑕疵的至尊绝对真理，他没有痛苦与死亡，他最初亲自向布茹阿玛揭示了这无与伦比的知识火炬。接着，布茹阿玛将其口授给圣人拿茹阿达，拿茹阿达又将其传授给奎师那·兑帕亚纳·维亚萨，施瑞拉·维亚萨向最了不起的圣哲，舒卡戴瓦·哥斯 瓦米，揭示了这部《巴嘎瓦谭》，后来舒卡戴瓦·哥斯瓦米仁慈地将其讲授给玛哈茹阿吉·帕瑞克西特。
502.yw_en: I meditate upon that pure and spotless Supreme Absolute Truth, who is free from suffering and death and who in the beginning personally revealed this incomparable torchlight of knowledge to Brahmā. Brahmā then spoke it to the sage Nārada, who narrated it to Kṛṣṇa-dvaipāyana Vyāsa. Śrīla Vyāsa revealed this Bhāgavatam to the greatest of sages, Śukadeva Gosvāmī, and Śukadeva mercifully spoke it to Mahārāja Parīkṣit.
502.yz_zh: 《施瑞玛德-巴嘎瓦谭》第一诗节说，satyam param dhimahi[SB1.1.1]—“我冥想至尊真理”—现在，在这部辉煌的超然文献终结时，传出同样吉祥的音震。这节诗中的词语tad-rupena，tad-rupina和tad-atmana清楚表明，最初主奎师那本人将《施瑞玛德-巴嘎瓦谭》口授给布茹阿玛，然后，这部文献通过拿茹阿达•牟尼、兑帕亚纳•维亚萨、舒卡戴瓦•勾斯瓦米和其他伟大圣哲的代理世代相传。换言之，无论何时奉献者圣人讲述《施瑞玛德-巴嘎瓦谭》，要知道，是主奎师那本人在通过他的纯粹代表这一代理宣讲绝对真理。恭敬顺服地从主的真正奉献者那里聆听这部文献的人，可从受条件限制的状态中超脱出来，变得有资格冥想绝对真理并服务于他。
502.yz_en: The first verse of Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam states, satyaṁ paraṁ dhīmahi — “I meditate upon the Supreme Truth” — and now at the conclusion of this magnificent transcendental literature, the same auspicious sounds are vibrated. The words tad-rūpeṇa, tad-rūpiṇā and tad-ātmanā in this verse clearly indicate that Lord Kṛṣṇa Himself originally spoke Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam to Brahmā and then continued to speak this literature through the agency of Nārada Muni, Dvaipāyana Vyāsa, Śukadeva Gosvāmī and other great sages. In other words, whenever saintly devotees vibrate Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam, it is to be understood that Lord Kṛṣṇa Himself is speaking the Absolute Truth through the agency of His pure representatives. Anyone who submissively hears this literature from the Lord’s bona fide devotees transcends his conditioned state and becomes qualified to meditate upon the Absolute Truth and serve Him.

502.ldw:
namas tasmai bhagavate
 vāsudevāya sākṣiṇe
ya idam kṛpayā kasmai
 vyācacakṣe mumukṣave|
502.ldw_fc: namaḥ ; tasmai ; bhagavate ; vāsudevāya ; sākṣiṇe ; yaḥ ; idam ; kṛpayā ; kasmai ; vyācacakṣe ; mumukṣave
502.words_en_fc: obeisances; to Him; the Supreme Personality of Godhead; Lord Vāsudeva; the supreme witness; who; this; out of mercy; to Brahmā; explained; who was desiring liberation.
502.yw_zh: 我们向至尊人格首神，主华苏戴瓦，无所不在的见证者，致以顶礼，他仁慈地向当时急切渴求解脱的布茹阿玛讲解了这门科学。
502.yw_en: We offer our obeisances to the Supreme Personality of Godhead, Lord Vāsudeva, the all-pervading witness, who mercifully explained this science to Brahmā when he anxiously desired salvation.

502.ldw_fc: yogi-indrāya ; namaḥ ; tasmai ; śukaya ; brahma-rūpiṇe ; saṁsāra-sarpa ; daṣṭam ; yaḥ ; viṣṇu-rātam ; amūmucat
502.words_en_fc: to the king of mystics; obeisances; to him; Śukadeva Gosvāmī; who is a personal manifestation of the Absolute Truth; by the snake of material existence; bitten; who; Parīkṣit Mahārāja; freed.
502.yw_zh: 我向施瑞·舒卡戴瓦·哥斯瓦米，最优秀的神秘主义圣哲兼绝对真理的一个人格展示，致以卑微的顶拜。他拯救了遭物质存在之蛇噬咬的玛哈茹阿吉·帕瑞克西特。
502.yw_en: I offer my humble obeisances to Śrī Śukadeva Gosvāmī, the best of mystic sages and a personal manifestation of the Absolute Truth. He saved Mahārāja Parīkṣit, who was bitten by the snake of material existence.
502.yz_zh: 苏塔•勾斯瓦米现在向他的灵性导师舒卡戴瓦•勾斯瓦米顶礼模拜。施瑞拉•维施瓦纳塔•査夸瓦尔提•塔库尔阐明，就像阿尔诸那被置干物质困惑之中，从而《巴嘎瓦德-歌依塔》得以讲述，同样，帕瑞克西特王，主的一位纯粹而解脱的奉献者遭诅咒致死，继而《施瑞玛德-巴嘎瓦谭》得以宣讲。实际上，帕瑞克西特王是visnu-rata，永恒地处在主的保护之下。舒卡戴瓦•勾斯瓦米把国王从他的所谓幻象中解救出来，为的是展示一位纯粹奉献者的仁慈本性及其具有启发效应的亲身联谊。
502.yz_en: Sūta Gosvāmī now offers obeisances to his own spiritual master, Śukadeva Gosvāmī. Śrīla Viśvanātha Cakravartī Ṭhākura clarifies that just as Arjuna was placed into material confusion so that Bhagavad-gītā might be spoken, so King Parīkṣit, a pure, liberated devotee of the Lord, was cursed to die so that Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam might be spoken. Actually, King Parīkṣit is viṣṇu-rāta, eternally under the protection of the Lord. Śukadeva Gosvāmī liberated the king from his so-called illusion to exhibit the merciful nature of a pure devotee and the enlightening effect of his association.

502.ldw:
bhave bhave yathā bhaktiḥ
 pādayos tava jāyate
tathā kuruṣva deveśa
 nāthas tvaṁ no yataḥ prabho|
502.ldw_fc: bhave bhave ; yathā ; bhaktiḥ ; pādayoḥ ; tava ; jāyate ; tathā ; kuruṣva ; deva-īśa ; nāthaḥ ; tvam ; naḥ ; yataḥ ; prabho
502.words_en_fc: in life after life; so that; devotional service; at the lotus feet; of You; arises; so; please do; O Lord of lords; the master; You; our; because; O Lord.
502.yw_zh: 众神明之主啊，主人啊，请恩准我一世复一世在您的莲花足下从事纯粹奉献服务。
502.yw_en: O Lord of lords, O master, please grant us pure devotional service at Your lotus feet, life after life.

502.ldw:
nāma-saṅkīrtanaṁ yasya
 sarva-pāpa praṇāśanam
praṇāmo duḥkha-śamanas
 taṁ namāmi hariṁ param|
502.ldw_fc: nāma-saṅkīrtanam ; yasya ; sarva-pāpa ; praṇāśanam ; praṇāmaḥ ; duḥkha ; śamanaḥ ; tam ; namāmi ; harim ; param
502.words_en_fc: the congregational chanting of the holy name; of whom; all sins; which destroys; the bowing down; misery; which subdues; to Him; I offer my obeisances; to Lord Hari; the Supreme.
502.yw_zh: 我向至尊主哈尔依致以虔敬的顶拜，对他的齐颂圣名可摧毁一切罪恶反应，向他顶礼膜拜可解除一切物质痛苦。
502.yw_en: I offer my respectful obeisances unto the Supreme Lord, Hari, the congregational chanting of whose holy names destroys all sinful reactions, and the offering of obeisances unto whom relieves all material suffering.
502.yz_en:
Thus end the purports of the humble servants of His Divine Grace A.C. Bhaktivedanta Swami Prabhupāda to the Twelfth Canto, Thirteenth Chapter, of the Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam, entitled “The Glories of Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam.”


The Twelfth Canto was completed at Gainesville, Florida, on Sunday, July 18, 1982.

END OF THE TWELFTH CANTO

We offer our most respectful obeisances at the lotus feet of His Divine Grace Oṁ Viṣṇupāda Paramahaṁsa Parivrājakācārya Aṣṭottara-śata Śrī Śrīmad Bhaktivedanta Swami Prabhupāda and, by his mercy, to the Six Gosvāmīs of Vṛndāvana, to Lord Caitanya and His eternal associates, to Śrī Śrī Rādhā-Kṛṣṇa and to the supreme transcendental literature, Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam. By the causeless mercy of Śrīla Prabhupāda we have been able to approach the lotus feet of Śrīla Bhaktisiddhānta Sarasvatī Ṭhākura, Śrīla Jīva Gosvāmī, Śrīla Viśvanātha Cakravartī Ṭhākura, Śrīla Śrīdhara Svāmī, and other great Vaiṣṇava ācāryas, and by carefully studying their liberated commentaries we have humbly tried to complete the Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam. We are the insignificant servants of our spiritual master, Śrīla Prabhupāda, and by his mercy we have been allowed to serve him through the presentation of Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam.
